Leviticus9:23 Mose kple Aron woyi Agbadɔ la me
Leviticus9:24 eye dzo tso Yehowa gbɔ fia numevɔsa la kple amiawo le vɔsamlekpui la dzi. Esi ameawo kpɔe la
Leviticus10:1 Ke Aron ƒe viŋutsu eve
Leviticus10:2 eya ta dzo tso Yehowa gbɔ
Leviticus10:3 Tete Mose gblɔ na Aron be
Leviticus10:4 Mose yɔ Misael kple Elzafan
Leviticus10:5 Woyi ɖakɔ wo; wole woƒe awutewui ʋlayawo me abe ale si Mose gblɔ na wo la ene.
Leviticus10:6 Mose gblɔ na Aron kple Via ŋutsu eve
Leviticus10:7 Ke miawo ya la
Leviticus10:8 Yehowa gblɔ na Aron bena
Leviticus10:9 “Wò kple viwò ŋutsuwo
Leviticus10:10 Wò dɔdeasiwo anye be mialé avu ɖe amewo nu
Leviticus10:11 eye miafia Israelviwo se siwo katã Yehowa de na mi to Mose dzi la ameawo.”
Leviticus10:12 Mose gblɔ na Aron kple Via ŋutsu eve siwo susɔ
Leviticus10:13 eya ta miaɖui le Kɔkɔeƒe la. Miawo kple mia viwo tɔe wònye tso vɔsa si wome na Yehowa la me
Leviticus10:14 Ke miate ŋu aɖu lã la ƒe akɔ kple ata si wonye le yame le Yehowa ŋkume abe nu si wotsɔ nɛ ƒe dzesi ene la
Leviticus10:15 “Ele be ameawo natsɔ ata si woɖe ɖe aga kple akɔ si wona esi wotɔ dzo amiawo la vɛ. Woatsɔ wo ana Yehowa to wo nyenye le yame me. Ekema woazu wò kple viwòwo tɔ
Leviticus10:16 Mose di gbɔ̃tsu si wotsɔ vɛ na nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsa la le afi sia afi. Eva dze sii be wotɔ dzoe xoxo! Nu sia na wòdo dɔmedzoe vevie ɖe Eleaza kple Itamar
Leviticus10:17 Ebia wo be
Leviticus10:18 Zi ale si wometsɔ eƒe ʋu yi kɔkɔeƒe la o la
Leviticus10:19 Ke Aron xɔ nya ɖe wo nu le Mose gbɔ hegblɔ be
Leviticus10:20 Esi Mose se nya siawo la
Leviticus11:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron bena
Leviticus11:2 “Migblɔ na Israelviwo be
Leviticus11:3 Miate ŋu aɖu lã sia lã si ƒe afɔkli me fe
Leviticus11:4 “ ‘Lã aɖewo li siwo dzɔa nu gaɖuna alo woƒe afɔkli me koe fe
Leviticus11:5 Xɔfie
Leviticus11:6 Fɔmizi
Leviticus11:7 Ha
Leviticus11:8 Mele be miaɖu eƒe lã loo alo aka asi eƒe kukua teti hã ŋu o. Nu makɔmakɔ wònye na mi.
Leviticus11:9 “ ‘Le tɔmelãwo katã gome la
Leviticus11:10 Ke lã siwo katã le atsiaƒu me alo tɔ me esiwo ŋu adza alo tsro mele o
Leviticus11:11 Esi wònye be wonye ŋunyɔnuwo na mi ta la
Leviticus11:12 Nu gbagbe ɖe sia ɖe si le tɔ me
Leviticus11:13 “ ‘Xe siawo nanyɔ ŋu na mi
Leviticus11:14 aʋako dzĩtɔwo kple yibɔtɔwo
Leviticus11:15 akpaviã ƒomevi vovovoawo
Leviticus11:16 adzexe si to dzo ɖe ta
Leviticus11:17 ʋlukuku
Leviticus11:18 favieʋuto
Leviticus11:19 damixe
Leviticus11:20 “ ‘Nudzodzoe siwo katã zɔna le afɔ ene dzi
Leviticus11:21 Ke nudzodzoe aɖewo li siwo zɔna le afɔ ene dzi
Leviticus11:22 Esiwo miaɖu woe nye ʋetsuvi tɔgbiwo katã
Leviticus11:23 Miekpɔ mɔ aɖu nu bubu siwo katã dzona
Leviticus11:24 “ ‘Ame sia ame si aka asi woƒe kukua ŋu la ŋu makɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ
Leviticus11:25 eye ele nɛ be wòanya eƒe awuwo enumake. Ele nɛ hã be wòaɖe eɖokui ɖe aga va se ɖe fiẽ abe ame si ŋuti mekɔ o ene.
Leviticus11:26 “ ‘Ame si ka asi lã si ƒe afɔkli me mefe tututu o
Leviticus11:27 Miekpɔ mɔ aɖu lã afɔene siwo ƒe afɔwo nu fetsu le o. Ame si ka asi woƒe kukua ŋu hã ŋuti mekɔ o
Leviticus11:28 Ele be ame si atsɔ eƒe kukua aƒu gbe la nanya eƒe awuwo
Leviticus11:29 “ ‘Lã siwo zɔna le anyigba
Leviticus11:30 xɔmenyatri
Leviticus11:31 Ame sia ame si ka asi nu siawo ƒe kukuawo ŋu la ŋu mekɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ.
Leviticus11:32 Nu sia nu si dzi nu siawo dometɔ aɖe ƒe kukua ge dze la ŋu mekɔ o. Ne ege dze nu si wowɔ kple ati
Leviticus11:33 Ne ege dze agba aɖe si wome kple tsu me la
Leviticus11:34 Ne tsi si wotsɔ klɔ nu makɔmakɔ aɖe ŋu hlẽ ɖe nuɖuɖu aɖe ŋu la
Leviticus11:35 Ne lã makɔmakɔ siawo dometɔ aɖe ƒe kukua ka abolokpo aɖe ŋu la
Leviticus11:36 Ne nu siawo ƒe kuku aɖe ge ɖe tɔʋu alo tsigago aɖe si me tsi le la me la
Leviticus11:37 Ne nu kukua ka nuku aɖe si ƒã ge wole ŋu la
Leviticus11:38 Ke ne nukua ƒo tsi hafi nu kuku la ge ɖe edzi la
Leviticus11:39 “ ‘Ne dɔléle wu lã aɖe si ŋu woɖe mɔ le be woaɖu la
Leviticus11:40 Gawu la
Leviticus11:41 “ ‘Nu gbagbe ɖe sia ɖe si tana le anyigba dzi la nye nu si woatsri; womaɖui o.
Leviticus11:42 Migaɖu nu gbagbe si tana le anyigba le eƒe ƒodo dzi alo wòzɔna kple afɔ ene loo alo le afɔ geɖewo dzi la o. Enye nu si woatsri.
Leviticus11:43 Migaƒo ɖi mia ɖokuiwo to asikaka wo ŋu me o.
Leviticus11:44 Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus11:45 Elabena nyee nye Yehowa si kplɔ mi tso Egiptenyigba dzi be manye miaƒe Mawu. Ele na mi be mianɔ kɔkɔe
Leviticus11:46 “ ‘Esiawoe nye se siwo ku ɖe lãwo
Leviticus11:47 Esiawoe nye vovototo siwo le nu siwo ŋuti kɔ
Leviticus12:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus12:2 “De se siawo na Israelviwo be
Leviticus12:3 Ele be woatso aʋa na ɖevia le ŋkeke enyia gbe.
Leviticus12:4 Ekema le ŋkeke blaetɔ̃-vɔ-etɔ̃ siwo akplɔe ɖo
Leviticus12:5 Ne nyɔnu aɖe dzi nyɔnuvi la
Leviticus12:6 “ ‘Ne nyɔnu la ƒe ŋutikɔkɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣi de la
Leviticus12:7 nunɔla la asa vɔ na Yehowa
Leviticus12:8 Ke ne nyɔnu aɖe da ahe ale gbegbe be mate ŋu ana alẽ o la
Leviticus13:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron bena
Leviticus13:2 “Ne ame aɖe kpɔ nutete alo dzi alo teƒe aɖe si fu le eƒe ŋutilã ŋu si ate ŋu azu ŋutilã ƒe dɔxɔleameŋu la
Leviticus13:3 Nunɔla la alé ŋku ɖe abi si le eƒe ŋutigbalẽ ŋu la ŋu. Ne ŋutifu si le teƒea fu
Leviticus13:4 Ke ne teƒe si fu kpii la menye ɖe eme vie o
Leviticus13:5 Le ŋkeke adrea gbe la
Leviticus13:6 Nunɔla la agadoe akpɔ le ŋkeke adre evelia gbe. Ne dɔléle la dzi ka ɖe
Leviticus13:7 gake nenye be dzi la keke ɖe edzi le eƒe ŋutigbalẽ ŋu esi wòtsɔ eɖokui fia nunɔla la be wòagblɔ be eŋuti kɔ vɔ megbe la
Leviticus13:8 Eye nunɔla la agadoe kpɔ. Ne teƒea keke ɖe edzi la
Leviticus13:9 “Ne ame aɖe dze ŋutigbalẽdɔ si woate ŋu axɔ le ame ŋu la
Leviticus13:10 Nunɔla la alé ŋku ɖe eŋu eye ne nutete ɣi aɖe le eƒe ŋutilã ŋu la
Leviticus13:11 ekema eme kɔ ƒãa be anyie
Leviticus13:12 “Ke ne nunɔla la kpɔ be kpodɔ la xɔ ŋuti katã na amea
Leviticus13:13 kple afi sia afi si wòakpɔ ɖa le la
Leviticus13:14 Ke ne eƒe ŋutilã ƒe teƒe aɖe ƒlɔ la
Leviticus13:15 Nunɔla la agalé ŋku ɖe eŋu
Leviticus13:16 Gake ne ŋutilã ƒe akpa si ƒlɔ la ɖɔ ɖo
Leviticus13:17 eye nunɔla la agadoe akpɔ. Nenye be teƒe ƒɔƒlɔ la ɖɔ ɖo abe ŋutilãa ƒe akpa bubuwo ene la
Leviticus13:18 “Ne ƒoƒoe ƒo ame aɖe ƒe ŋutigbalẽ
Leviticus13:19 eye le teƒe si ƒoƒoe la ƒo nɛ nu ƒoƒoe wuliwuli aɖewo ƒo ɖi esiwo le ɣie alo le nu dzĩ kple nu ɣi dome la
Leviticus13:20 Ne nunɔla la doe kpɔ
Leviticus13:21 Ke ne nunɔla la kpɔ be fu ɣi aɖeke mele teƒea o
Leviticus13:22 Ne teƒea keke ɖe edzi le ŋkeke adre mawo me la
Leviticus13:23 Ke ne teƒea mekeke ɖe edzi o la
Leviticus13:24 “Ne dzo me ame aɖe ƒe ŋutigbalẽ
Leviticus13:25 ele be nunɔla la nalé ŋku ɖe teƒea ŋu. Ne fu si le teƒea fu
Leviticus13:26 Ke ne nunɔla la kpɔ be fu ɣi aɖeke mele teƒea o
Leviticus13:27 eye wòagadoe kpɔ le ŋkeke adrea gbe. Ne teƒea keke ɖe edzi la
Leviticus13:28 Ke ne teƒe biabiã la medze le teƒe bubu aɖeke loo alo keke ɖe edzi o
Leviticus13:29 “Ne ŋutsu alo nyɔnu aɖe dze abi ɖe ta alo glã la
Leviticus13:30 nunɔla alé ŋku ɖe abi la ŋu. Ne abi la teƒe dze abe ɖe wòde eme wu amea ƒe ŋutilã
Leviticus13:31 Ke ne nunɔla la kpɔ be ŋutigbalẽ la ŋuti ko abi la dzɔ tso
Leviticus13:32 eye wòagadoe kpɔ le ŋkeke adrea gbe. Ne teƒe la mekeke ɖe edzi o
Leviticus13:33 ekema nunɔla la aƒlɔ ɖa
Leviticus13:34 eye wòagadoe kpɔ le ŋkeke adrea gbe. Ne teƒe la mekeke ɖe edzi o
Leviticus13:35 Ke ne teƒe la de asi keke me ɖe edzi emegbe la
Leviticus13:36 ekema nunɔla la agadoe kpɔ
Leviticus13:37 Gake ne edze be teƒe la megale kekem ɖe edzi o
Leviticus13:38 “Ne ŋutsu aɖe alo nyɔnu aɖe ƒe ŋutilã ƒe akpa aɖewo fu kpii
Leviticus13:39 eye teƒe la ƒe fufu dzi le ɖeɖem kpɔtɔ la
Leviticus13:40 “Womatsɔ ame aɖeke ƒe ɖa ƒe bebe le ta nɛ abe anyidzedze ene o!
Leviticus13:41 Ne ɖa vɔ le ame aɖe ƒe ŋgonu la
Leviticus13:42 Ke ne teƒe aɖe le biabiã kple fufu dome le ta kpakpã la teƒe la
Leviticus13:43 Ekema nunɔla la adoe akpɔ. Ne teƒe la le kpokploo
Leviticus13:44 ekema nunɔla la atso nya me be amea dze kpodɔ.
Leviticus13:45 “Ele na ame si wokpɔ be edze kpodɔ la be wòadze eƒe awuwo
Leviticus13:46 Ŋkeke ale si dɔléle la le eŋu ko la
Leviticus13:47 “Ne nane dze le nudodo alo nutata aɖe me
Leviticus13:48 alo nu si wolɔ̃ kple ɖeti alo lãfu
Leviticus13:49 eye aŋgbamu alo ama dzĩ teƒe aɖe le eme la
Leviticus13:50 Nunɔla la atsɔ nu la adzra ɖo ŋkeke adre
Leviticus13:51 eye wòagalé ŋku ɖe eŋu le ŋkeke adrea gbe. Ne teƒe la keke ɖe edzi la
Leviticus13:52 Ekema ele be nunɔla la natɔ dzo awu la
Leviticus13:53 “Ke ne nunɔla la lé ŋku ɖe eŋu le ŋkeke adrea gbe
Leviticus13:54 ekema ana woanya alo aklɔ nu la
Leviticus13:55 Le ŋkeke adrea megbe
Leviticus13:56 Ne nunɔla la kpɔ be teƒe la ƒe amadede klo le nua nyanya megbe la
Leviticus13:57 Ke ne wogakpɔ dzesi ma le nu lɔlɔ̃a me la
Leviticus13:58 Ke ne dzesi ma megadze le nu lɔlɔ̃a nyanya vɔ megbe o la
Leviticus13:59 Esiawoe nye se siwo ku ɖe kpodɔ ƒe avɔ si wolɔ̃ kple lãfu alo ɖeti me nɔnɔ ŋuti. Wofia ale si woawɔ aka ɖe edzi be kpodɔléle la le eme loo alo mele eme o.
Leviticus14:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus14:2 “Esiawoe nye ɖoɖowo na ame si dze dɔ le ameŋukɔɣi ne wokplɔe va nunɔla gbɔe.
Leviticus14:3 Nunɔla la atso asaɖa la me ayi aɖadoe kpɔ. Ne nunɔla la kpɔ be kpodɔléla la ƒe lãme sẽ la
Leviticus14:4 ana amea nana xevi eve siwo ŋu se ɖe mɔ le be woaɖu
Leviticus14:5 Nunɔla la ana woawu xeviawo dometɔ ɖeka ɖe ze si me tsi nyui le la me.
Leviticus14:6 Woanyrɔ xevi evelia si le agbe la kple sedati
Leviticus14:7 Ekema nunɔla la ahlẽ ʋu la ɖe ame si ŋu kpodɔ la vɔ le la ŋu zi adre. Nunɔla la aɖe gbeƒã be amea ŋu kɔ azɔ
Leviticus14:8 “Ame si ŋu wokɔ la
Leviticus14:9 Le ŋkeke adrea gbe la
Leviticus14:10 “Ne ŋu ke si anye ŋkeke enyia gbe la
Leviticus14:11 Nunɔla si doe kpɔ la atsɔ amea kple eƒe nunana aɖo Yehowa ŋkume le Agbadɔ la ƒe mɔnu.
Leviticus14:12 Nunɔla la atsɔ alẽawo dometɔ ɖeka kple ami lita ɖeka ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia la
Leviticus14:13 Awu alẽ la le afi si wowua nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsalãwo kple numevɔsalãwo le
Leviticus14:14 Nunɔla la asisi fɔɖivɔsalã la ƒe ʋu ƒe ɖe ɖe ame si ŋuti kɔm wòle la ƒe ɖusito ŋu
Leviticus14:15 Emegbe nunɔla la akɔ ami la ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe miasiƒome.
Leviticus14:16 Nunɔla la atsɔ eƒe nuɖusi ƒe asibidɛ ɖeka ade ami la me
Leviticus14:17 Nunɔla la asisi ami si susɔ ɖe eƒe miasiƒome la ɖe amea ƒe ɖusito kple eƒe ɖusisi ƒe adegblefetsu kple eƒe ɖusifɔ ƒe adegblefetsu ŋu
Leviticus14:18 Atsɔ ami si gasusɔ ɖe eƒe miasiƒome la asi ɖe ta nɛ. Ale nunɔla la alé avu ɖe enu le Yehowa ŋkume.
Leviticus14:19 “Le esia megbe la
Leviticus14:20 eye wòatsɔ nuɖuvɔsa akpe ɖe eŋu atsɔ sa vɔe le vɔsamlekpui la dzi
Leviticus14:21 “Ne amea da ahe ale gbegbe be mate ŋu ana alẽvi eve o la
Leviticus14:22 “Ele be wòagana akpakpa eve alo ahɔnɛvi eve
Leviticus14:23 Amea atsɔ wo vɛ na nunɔla la le Agbadɔ la ƒe mɔnu le ŋkeke enyia gbe hena eŋutikɔkɔ le Yehowa ŋkume.
Leviticus14:24 Nunɔla la atsɔ alẽvi kple amitimi lita ɖeka ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia la asa fɔɖivɔ
Leviticus14:25 Emegbe la
Leviticus14:26 Azɔ la
Leviticus14:27 eye wòatsɔ eƒe ɖusi ƒe asibidɛ ɖeka ahlẽ ami la ƒe ɖe zi adre le Yehowa ŋkume.
Leviticus14:28 Ekema asi ami si le eƒe asiƒome la ƒe ɖe ɖe eƒe ɖusito ŋu kple eƒe ɖusisi ƒe adegblefetsu kple eƒe ɖusifɔ ƒe adegblefetsu dzi
Leviticus14:29 Nunɔla la atsɔ ami si susɔ ɖe eƒe asiƒome la asi na ame si ŋu kɔm wòle la ƒe ta
Leviticus14:30 Azɔ la
Leviticus14:31 Woatsɔ xeviawo dometɔ ɖeka asa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa
Leviticus14:32 Esiawoe nye se siwo ku ɖe ŋutigbalẽdɔléla siwo mate ŋu axe fe ɖe vɔsasa siwo woɖo hena wo ŋutikɔkɔ o la ŋu.
Leviticus14:33 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron be
Leviticus14:34 “Ne mieɖo Kanaanyigba
Leviticus14:35 ekema ele be aƒea tɔ nava gblɔ na nunɔla la be
Leviticus14:36 Nunɔla la ana woafɔ nu sia nu ado goe le aƒea me hafi wòalé ŋku ɖe aƒea ŋu
Leviticus14:37 Ne ekpɔ aŋgbamu ƒe teƒe kple teƒe dzĩ aɖewo le aƒea me ƒe gliwo ŋu
Leviticus14:38 ele be nunɔla la natu aƒe la ŋkeke adre
Leviticus14:39 eye wòatrɔ ava le ŋkeke adrea gbe be wòagalé ŋku ɖe aƒea ŋu. Ne teƒeawo keke ɖe edzi le gliawo ŋu la
Leviticus14:40 ekema nunɔla la ana woadza teƒe mawo ɖa le gliawo ŋu
Leviticus14:41 Le esia megbe la
Leviticus14:42 Woatsɔ kpe yeyewo aɖɔli kpe xoxo siwo woho le gliawo me
Leviticus14:43 “Ne aŋgbamu teƒe kple teƒe dzĩawo gadze la
Leviticus14:44 nunɔla la agava alé ŋku ɖe wo ŋu
Leviticus14:45 Ana woagbã xɔ la
Leviticus14:46 “Ame sia ame si ge ɖe aƒea me le esime wotui la
Leviticus14:47 Ele na ame sia ame si mlɔ aƒea me alo ɖu nu le eme la be wòanya eƒe awuwo.
Leviticus14:48 “Ke ne nunɔla la va zi evelia be yealé ŋku ɖe aƒea ŋu
Leviticus14:49 Atsɔ xevi eve
Leviticus14:50 Awu xeviawo dometɔ ɖeka ɖe ze si me tsi nyui le la me.
Leviticus14:51 Ekema atsɔ sedati la
Leviticus14:52 Akɔ aƒea ŋu kple xevi la ƒe ʋu
Leviticus14:53 Aɖe asi le xevi gbagbe la ŋu wòadzo ayi gbe me le du la godo. Mɔ sia dzie wòato aɖe vɔ̃ ɖa le aƒe la ŋu
Leviticus14:54 Esiawoe nye se siwo ku ɖe teƒe vovovo siwo kpodɔ ado ɖo la ŋu
Leviticus14:55 le awu me loo alo le xɔ ŋu
Leviticus14:56 le nutete teƒe
Leviticus14:57 Miato mɔ sia dzi anya nenye kpodɔe loo alo menye eyae o. Nu sia tae wona se siawo ɖo.
Leviticus15:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron be
Leviticus15:2 “Migblɔ na Israelviwo be
Leviticus15:3 Ne afua le dodom alo ne enu tso hã la
Leviticus15:4 “ ‘Abati si dzi wòmlɔ kple nu si dzi wònɔ hã ŋu mekɔ o
Leviticus15:5 eya ta ame si ka asi ŋutsu la ƒe abati ŋu hã ŋuti mekɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ; ele nɛ be wòanya eƒe awuwo
Leviticus15:6 Ame si nɔ zikpui si dzi ŋutsu si ŋu mekɔ o nɔ la hã ŋu mekɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ. Ele nɛ be wòanya eƒe awuwo
Leviticus15:7 “ ‘Ame si ka asi ŋutsu si le afu ɖɔm ŋuti la ŋuti mekɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ
Leviticus15:8 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu si le afu ɖɔm ɖe ta ɖe ame si ŋuti kɔ ŋu la
Leviticus15:9 “ ‘Nu sia nu si dzi afuɖɔla la anɔ ne ele sɔ dom la
Leviticus15:10 eye ame si aka asi nu siwo dzi wònɔ do sɔ la dometɔ aɖe ŋu la ŋuti mekɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ. Nenema ke ame si fɔ nuawo hã la ŋuti mekɔ o va se ɖe fie; ele nɛ be wòanya eƒe awuwo
Leviticus15:11 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu si ŋu mekɔ o
Leviticus15:12 “ ‘Ele be woagbã ze si ŋu ŋutsu la ka asii
Leviticus15:13 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe ŋu kɔ tso afuɖɔɖɔ me la
Leviticus15:14 Le ŋkeke enyia gbe la
Leviticus15:15 Nunɔla la atsɔ akpakpawo dometɔ ɖeka asa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa
Leviticus15:16 “ ‘Ɣe sia ɣi si ŋutsu aɖe anye tsi la
Leviticus15:17 Ele be wòanya nudodo alo ayi si ŋu ŋutsu ƒe tsi la ka la kple tsi
Leviticus15:18 Ne ŋutsu aɖe dɔ nyɔnu aɖe gbɔ la
Leviticus15:19 “ ‘Ne nyɔnu aɖe kpɔ dzinu la
Leviticus15:20 “ ‘Nu sia nu si dzi wòamlɔ alo anɔ le ɣe ma ɣi me la ŋuti mekɔ o.
Leviticus15:21 Ame sia ame si ka asi eƒe abati ŋu la anya eƒe awuwo
Leviticus15:22 Ame sia ame si ka asi eƒe nunɔdzi aɖe ŋu la
Leviticus15:23 Eɖanye abati o
Leviticus15:24 “ ‘Ŋutsu si adɔ nyɔnu sia gbɔ le eƒe asiɖoanyiɣi
Leviticus15:25 “ ‘Ne gbɔtotsitsi la xɔ ɣeyiɣi wu ale si wòxɔna tsã alo wòva le ɣeyiɣi trama aɖe dzi le ɣletia me la
Leviticus15:26 Esia fia be nu sia nu si dzi wòamlɔ le ɣeyiɣi ma me la ŋu makɔ o
Leviticus15:27 Ame sia ame si ka asi eƒe abati alo nu si dzi wònɔ ŋu la ŋu mekɔ o. Ele be wòanya eƒe awuwo
Leviticus15:28 “ ‘Ne gbɔtotsitsi sia nu tso
Leviticus15:29 Le ŋkeke enyia gbe la
Leviticus15:30 Nunɔla la atsɔ ɖeka asa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa
Leviticus15:31 “ ‘Ale ne Israelviwo ŋu mekɔ o la
Leviticus15:32 Eya ta esiae nye se na ŋutsu si le afu ɖɔm kple ŋutsu si nye tsi
Leviticus15:33 kple se le nyɔnuwo ƒe gbɔtotsitsi ŋu kple se na ŋutsu si adɔ nyɔnu si tsi gbɔto
Leviticus16:1 Yehowa ƒo nu na Mose le Aron ƒe viŋutsu eveawo ƒe ku megbe esime wote ɖe Yehowa ŋu.
Leviticus16:2 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus16:3 “Aron age ɖe Kɔkɔeƒe la me ale: atsɔ nyitsuvi ɖe asi hena nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsa kple agbo hena numevɔsa.
Leviticus16:4 Ado kɔmewu kɔkɔe la
Leviticus16:5 Israelviwo ana gbɔ̃tsu eve hena woƒe nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsa kple agbo ɖeka hena woƒe numevɔsa.
Leviticus16:6 “Gbã la
Leviticus16:7 Emegbe la
Leviticus16:8 eye wòadzidze nu
Leviticus16:9 Aron asa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa kple gbɔ̃tsu si nye Yehowa tɔ.
Leviticus16:10 Woatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu evelia si nye Azazel tɔ la agbagbe ava Yehowa ŋkume. Woaɖe dukɔwo ƒe nu vɔ̃wo ada ɖe edzi
Leviticus16:11 “Ne Aron tsɔ nyitsu la sa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa ɖe eya ŋutɔ kple eƒe ƒometɔwo ta vɔ la
Leviticus16:12 atsɔ dzoɖesonu
Leviticus16:13 Atsɔ dzudzɔdonu la akɔ ɖe dzoka xɔxɔawo dzi le afi ma
Leviticus16:14 Atsɔ nyitsu la ƒe ʋu ƒe ɖe ade asibidɛ eme
Leviticus16:15 “Ekema ado go
Leviticus16:16 Ekema aɖe nu vɔ̃ ɖa le teƒe kɔkɔe la ŋu
Leviticus16:17 Ame bubu aɖeke mekpɔ mɔ anɔ Agbadɔ la me ne Aron ge ɖe eme be yeaɖe nu vɔ̃ ɖa le Teƒe Kɔkɔe la ŋu o va se ɖe esime wòalé avu le eya ŋutɔ ɖokui
Leviticus16:18 “Azɔ la
Leviticus16:19 eye wòahlẽ ʋu la ƒe ɖe ɖe vɔsamlekpui la dzi zi adre kple eƒe asibidɛ. Ale wòakɔ eŋuti tso Israelviwo ƒe nu vɔ̃wo me
Leviticus16:20 “Ne ewu nu vɔ̃wo ɖeɖe ɖa le Teƒe Kɔkɔe la
Leviticus16:21 Ada eƒe asi eveawo ɖe gbɔ̃tsu la ƒe ta dzi
Leviticus16:22 Ale gbɔ̃ la atsɔ ameawo ƒe nu vɔ̃wo katã ayi gbedadaƒo
Leviticus16:23 “Azɔ la
Leviticus16:24 Esia megbe la
Leviticus16:25 Ekema atɔ dzo nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsalãwo ƒe ami ɖe vɔsamlekpui la dzi.
Leviticus16:26 “Ame si kplɔ gbɔ̃tsu la yi na Azazel le gbedzi la
Leviticus16:27 Woatsɔ nyitsu kple gbɔ̃tsu si Aron tsɔ sa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa
Leviticus16:28 Emegbe la
Leviticus16:29 “Esia nanye ɖoɖo mavɔ na mi: le ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi la
Leviticus16:30 elabena le ŋkeke sia dzi woalé avu na mi
Leviticus16:31 Enye dzudzɔgbe na mi
Leviticus16:32 Le dzidzime bubuwo ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo me la
Leviticus16:33 eye wòakɔ Teƒe Kɔkɔe la
Leviticus16:34 “Esia anye se mavɔ na mi; woalé avu ɖe Israelviwo ta ƒe sia ƒe le woƒe nu vɔ̃wo ta.” Eye wowɔ abe ale si Yehowa de se na Mose ene. Eye miawɔ abe ale si Yehowa de se na Mose ene.
Leviticus17:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus17:2 “Ƒo nu na Aron kple via ŋutsuwo kple Israelviwo katã
Leviticus17:3 Israelvi ɖe sia ɖe si asa vɔ kple nyitsu
Leviticus17:4 le esime wòatsɔe ava Mawu ƒe Agbadɔ la nu bena woasa vɔ na Yehowa le Yehowa ƒe Agbadɔ la ƒe ŋkume teƒe la
Leviticus17:5 Se sia ƒe taɖodzinue nye wòana be Israelviwo magasa vɔ le gbedzi o
Leviticus17:6 Nu sia wɔwɔ ana nunɔla la nate ŋu ahlẽ ʋu la ɖe Yehowa ƒe vɔsamlekpui la dzi
Leviticus17:7 Woawɔ alea
Leviticus17:8 “Gblɔ na wo be
Leviticus17:9 eye metsɔe va Mawu ƒe Agbadɔ la nu be wòasa vɔ la na Yehowa o la
Leviticus17:10 “ ‘Mado dɔmedzoe ɖe ame sia ame
Leviticus17:11 Esi lã aɖe ƒe agbe le eƒe ʋu me ta la
Leviticus17:12 Nu sia tae mede se na Israelviwo alo amedzro siwo le wo dome la be womekpɔ mɔ aɖu lã aɖeke ƒe ʋu o ɖo.
Leviticus17:13 “ ‘Ame sia ame
Leviticus17:14 elabena ʋue nye agbe la
Leviticus17:15 “ ‘Kpe ɖe esia ŋu la
Leviticus17:16 Ke ne menya eƒe awuwo o
Leviticus18:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus18:2 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Leviticus18:3 Mele be miawɔ nu abe ale si wowɔna le Egipte
Leviticus18:4 Ele be miawɔ nye sewo dzi
Leviticus18:5 Milé nye ɖoɖowo kple nye sewo me ɖe asi
Leviticus18:6 “ ‘Mia dometɔ aɖeke megadɔ kple eƒe ƒometɔ o
Leviticus18:7 “ ‘Vinyɔnu mekpɔ mɔ aɖe fofoa o. Nenema ke viŋutsu mekpɔ mɔ aɖe dadaa loo
Leviticus18:8 alo fofoa srɔ̃ bubuawo dometɔ aɖeke o.
Leviticus18:9 “ ‘Gawu la
Leviticus18:10 “ ‘Mègade asi wò tɔgbuiyɔvi nyɔnu si nye viwò ŋutsu ƒe vi alo viwò nyɔnu ƒe vi la ŋu o
Leviticus18:11 “ ‘Mègade asi fofowò srɔ̃ ƒe vinyɔnu ŋu o.
Leviticus18:12 “ ‘Eye mègade asi fofowò nɔvinyɔnu hã ŋu o
Leviticus18:13 “ ‘Mègade asi dawò nɔvinyɔnu ŋu o
Leviticus18:14 “ ‘Nenema ke
Leviticus18:15 “ ‘Mègade asi viwò ŋutsu srɔ̃ ŋu o; wò ŋutɔ viwò srɔ̃e; megaɖe amae o.
Leviticus18:16 “ ‘Megade asi nɔviwò ŋutsu srɔ̃ ŋu o
Leviticus18:17 “ ‘Mègade asi nyɔnu aɖe kple via nyɔnu alo mamayɔvia ŋu o
Leviticus18:18 “ ‘Mègaɖe nɔvinyɔnu eve o
Leviticus18:19 “ ‘Mègade asi nyɔnu si tsi gbɔto la ŋu o
Leviticus18:20 “ ‘Megade asi hawòvi srɔ̃ ŋu
Leviticus18:21 “ ‘Mègatsɔ viwò aɖeke na Molek o; atsɔe asa vɔe le eƒe vɔsamlekpui dzi. Mègaƒo ɖi wò Mawu ƒe ŋkɔ o
Leviticus18:22 “ ‘Se sesẽ tsi tsitre ɖe ŋutsu kple ŋutsu ƒe wo nɔewo gbɔ dɔdɔ ŋuti
Leviticus18:23 “ ‘Ŋutsu aɖeke mekpɔ mɔ adɔ lãnɔ aɖeke gbɔ
Leviticus18:24 “ ‘Migaƒo ɖi mia ɖokuiwo to mɔ siawo dometɔ aɖeke dzi o
Leviticus18:25 Woƒo ɖi anyigba blibo la kple nuwɔna siawo
Leviticus18:26 Ele be miazɔ ɖe nye sewo kple ɖoɖowo nu tututu
Leviticus18:27 Ɛ̃

Leviticus19:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus19:2 “Ƒo nu na Israel ƒe ƒuƒoƒo blibo la
Leviticus19:3 “ ‘Ele be mia dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe nabu fofoa kple dadaa
Leviticus19:4 “ ‘Migatrɔ ɖe legbawo ŋu alo miatsɔ ga awɔ mawuwo na mia ɖokuiwo o. Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus19:5 “ ‘Ne miesa akpedavɔ na Yehowa la
Leviticus19:6 Miɖui le ŋkeke si dzi miesa vɔ la le alo ne ŋu ke. Nu si atsi anyi va se ɖe ŋkeke etɔ̃a gbe la
Leviticus19:7 elabena esi woaɖu le ŋkeke etɔ̃a gbe la
Leviticus19:8 Ne mieɖui le ŋkeke etɔ̃a gbe la
Leviticus19:9 “ ‘Ne miexa miaƒe agblemenuwo la
Leviticus19:10 Miwɔ nenema ke le miaƒe wain tsetsewo hã gome. Migagbe kutsetseawo katã o
Leviticus19:11 “ ‘Migafi fi o. “ ‘Migada alakpa o. “ ‘Ame aɖeke megaba nɔvia o.
Leviticus19:12 “ ‘Migatsɔ nye ŋkɔ aka atam ɖe aʋatsonya aɖeke dzi
Leviticus19:13 “ ‘Migaba ame aɖeke alo ate ame aɖeke ɖe to o. “ ‘Mikpɔ egbɔ be yewoxe fe na yewoƒe agbatedɔwɔlawo kaba. Ne fe aɖe li miaxe na agbatedɔwɔlawo la
Leviticus19:14 “ ‘Migaƒo fi de tekunɔ o
Leviticus19:15 “ ‘Ele be ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo nafia dzɔdzɔenyenye le woƒe nyametsotsowo me
Leviticus19:16 “ ‘Mèganye sakplisala anɔ yiyim le wò dukɔ me o. “ ‘Mègade nɔviwò asi be woatso kufia nɛ o
Leviticus19:17 “ ‘Mègalé fu nɔviwò o. Ka mo na ame si wɔ nu vɔ̃. Ne ègbe mokaka nɛ la
Leviticus19:18 “ ‘Mègabia hlɔ̃ o. Mègalé nya ɖe dɔ me o
Leviticus19:19 “ ‘Miwɔ nye seawo dzi. “ ‘Migana lã nayɔ asi lã ƒomevi bubu o. “ ‘Mègaƒã nuku ƒomevi vovovowo ɖe wò agble me o. “ ‘Mègado awu si wotɔ kple avɔ si wotsɔ lãfu tsaka ɖeti lɔ̃ la o.
Leviticus19:20 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe de asi kosi si menye ablɔɖeme o ŋu
Leviticus19:21 Ele be ŋutsu la natsɔ eƒe fɔɖivɔsa vɛ na Yehowa le Agbadɔ la ƒe mɔnu. Nu si wòanae nye agbo.
Leviticus19:22 Nunɔla la alé avu kple agbo la le nu vɔ̃ si ŋutsu la wɔ ta
Leviticus19:23 “ ‘Ne mieva ɖo anyigba la dzi
Leviticus19:24 Woatsɔ ƒe enelia ƒe kutsetsewo katã ana Yehowa abe eƒe kafukafunu ene.
Leviticus19:25 Ƒe atɔ̃lia ƒe kutsetsewoe nye mia tɔ. Nyee nye Yehowa miaƒe Mawu.
Leviticus19:26 “ ‘Migaɖu lã si me ʋu metsyɔ le la o. “ ‘Migaka afa alo miawɔ adze o.
Leviticus19:27 “ ‘Mègalũ wò loglo o
Leviticus19:28 “ ‘Migasi mia ɖokuiwo alo miasi ame aɖe ŋuti le tsyɔ̃wɔwɔ me o. Nyee nye Yehowa.
Leviticus19:29 “ ‘Mègagblẽ viwò ɖetugbi ƒe dzadzɛnyenye me to ewɔwɔ gboloe me o. Ne menye nenema o la
Leviticus19:30 “ ‘Milé se si ku ɖe nye Dzudzɔgbe ŋuti la me ɖe asi
Leviticus19:31 “ ‘Migaƒo ɖi mia ɖokuiwo to ŋɔliyɔlawo kple bokɔnɔwo gbɔ dede me o
Leviticus19:32 “ ‘Ele be miatsɔ bubu kple sisiɖa si dze la na ame tsitsiwo le Mawuvɔvɔ̃ ta. Nyee nye Yehowa!
Leviticus19:33 “ ‘Migate amedzro siwo le miaƒe anyigba dzi la ɖe to o
Leviticus19:34 Ele be mialé be na wo abe mia ɖokuiwo ene
Leviticus19:35 “ ‘Migawɔ dzidzenu mademadewo ŋu dɔ ne miele didime
Leviticus19:36 Miwɔ nudanu kple nudakpe anukwaretɔwo
Leviticus19:37 “ ‘Ele be mialé nye sewo kple ɖoɖowo katã me ɖe asi

Leviticus20:2 “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be
Leviticus20:3 Emegbe nye ŋutɔ mado dɔmedzoe ɖe eŋu
Leviticus20:4 Ne anyigba la dzi tɔwo wɔ abe ɖe womenya naneke tso ame si tsɔ via na Molek ŋu o
Leviticus20:5 ekema nye ŋutɔ mado dɔmedzoe ɖe amea kple eƒe ƒometɔwo ŋu
Leviticus20:6 “ ‘Maɖe ŋku atɔ ame sia ame si adze ŋɔliyɔlawo kple bokɔnɔwo yome
Leviticus20:7 “ ‘Eya ta mikɔ mia ɖokuiwo ŋu
Leviticus20:8 Miwɔ nye seawo katã dzi
Leviticus20:9 “ ‘Ame sia ame si aƒo fi ade fofoa alo dadaa la
Leviticus20:10 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe wɔ ahasi kple ehavi srɔ̃ la
Leviticus20:11 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe dɔ fofoa srɔ̃ gbɔ la
Leviticus20:12 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe dɔ toyɔvia gbɔ la
Leviticus20:13 “ ‘Tohehe si woana ŋutsu eve siwo dɔ wo nɔewo gbɔe nye woawu wo ame eve la. Woawo ŋutɔe di ku na wo ɖokui.
Leviticus20:14 “ ‘Ŋutsu si dɔ nyɔnu aɖe kple nyɔnu la dada gbɔ la
Leviticus20:15 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe de asi lãnɔ aɖe ŋu la
Leviticus20:16 “ ‘Ne nyɔnu aɖe na lã aɖe de asi eŋu la
Leviticus20:17 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe de asi nɔvia nyɔnu
Leviticus20:18 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe dɔ nyɔnu aɖe si tsi gbɔto gbɔ la

Leviticus20:20 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe de asi fofoa nɔviŋutsu srɔ̃ alo dadaa nɔviŋutsu srɔ̃ ŋu la
Leviticus20:21 “ ‘Ne ŋutsu aɖe de asi nɔvia ŋutsu srɔ̃ ŋuti la
Leviticus20:22 “ ‘Eya ta miwɔ nye seawo kple nye ɖoɖowo katã dzi
Leviticus20:23 Migawɔ dukɔ siwo manya ɖa le mia ŋgɔ la ƒe kɔnuwo o
Leviticus20:24 Medo woƒe anyigba ŋugbe na mi. Matsɔe na mi wòazu mia tɔ. Enye anyigba aɖe si dzi notsi kple anyitsi bɔ ɖo. Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus20:25 “ ‘Eya ta ele be miade vovototo xe kple lã siwo meɖe mɔ na mi be miaɖu kple esiwo mebe migaɖu o la dome. Migaƒo ɖi mia ɖokui

Leviticus21:4 Ele be wòanɔ alea
Leviticus21:5 “ ‘Nunɔla aɖeke mekpɔ mɔ aƒlɔ eƒe ta alo afɔ eƒe ge dzi alo asi eƒe ŋutigbalẽ o.
Leviticus21:6 Ele be woanɔ kɔkɔe na woƒe Mawu
Leviticus21:7 Mele be nunɔla naɖe gbolo alo nyɔnu si gbe atsu o
Leviticus21:8 Mibu wo be wole kɔkɔe
Leviticus21:9 Ne nunɔla aɖe ƒe vinyɔnu gblẽ kɔ ɖo na eɖokui hetrɔ zu gbolo la
Leviticus21:10 “ ‘Nunɔlagã la
Leviticus21:11 Mekpɔ mɔ age ɖe teƒe si ame kuku le o. Mekpɔ mɔ hã be wòagblẽ kɔ ɖo na eɖokui
Leviticus21:12 Mekpɔ mɔ agblẽ eƒe Mawu la ƒe kɔkɔeƒe ɖi alo ado gui o
Leviticus21:13 Ele be wòaɖe ɖetugbivi dzadzɛ aɖe.
Leviticus21:14 Maɖe ahosi alo nyɔnu si gbe atsu alo nyɔnu si atsu gbe loo alo gbolo o. Ele be wòaɖe ɖetugbi dzadzɛ tso eya ŋutɔ ƒe to la me
Leviticus21:15 elabena mele be wòanye fofo na ɖevi siwo nyɔnu si wòɖe la kplɔ va atsuƒee o; nu sia aɖi gbɔ̃ eya ŋutɔ ƒe viwo le eƒe amewo dome

Leviticus21:18 Manye le kpɔɖeŋu me

Leviticus21:20 alo wòɖo kpo alo wònye ame kpui zegede alo tasi le ŋku dzi nɛ
Leviticus21:21 Ne amea nye Aron ƒe dzidzimevi hã la
Leviticus21:22 Ke ekpɔ mɔ aɖu nunɔlawo ƒe nu tso vɔ siwo wosa na Mawu la me
Leviticus21:23 gake mekpɔ mɔ ayi xɔmetsovɔ la godo alo ate ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ŋu o
Leviticus21:24 Ale Mose de se siawo na Aron kple via ŋutsuwo kple Israelviwo katã.
Leviticus22:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena
Leviticus22:2 “Gblɔ na Aron kple via ŋutsuwo be woade bubu vɔsa kɔkɔe siwo ŋu Israelviwo kɔ nam la ŋu
Leviticus22:3 “Tso azɔ dzi yi mavɔmavɔ me la
Leviticus22:4 “ ‘Ne Aron viwo dometɔ aɖe nye kpodɔléla alo dze abi si le tsi tsyɔm la
Leviticus22:5 alo wòka asi lã tata alo lã makɔmakɔ aɖe ŋu alo wòka asi ame si ŋuti mekɔ o le nane ta la
Leviticus22:6 nunɔla ma ŋu mekɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ
Leviticus22:7 Ne ɣe ɖo to la
Leviticus22:8 Mekpɔ mɔ aɖu lã aɖeke si ku le eɖokui si alo lã si lã wɔadã aɖe vuvu o
Leviticus22:9 “ ‘Gblɔ na nunɔlawo be woawɔ se siawo dzi nyuie
Leviticus22:10 “ ‘Ame si menye nunɔla o la mekpɔ mɔ aɖu vɔsanu kɔkɔe la o. Nunɔla ƒe amedzro alo agbatedɔwɔla mekpɔ mɔ aɖu nu sia o.
Leviticus22:11 Ke ame bubu siwo ate ŋu aɖui koe nye kluvi si nunɔla aɖe ƒle kple eya ŋutɔ ƒe ga kple vi siwo kluvi la dzi le nunɔla la ƒe aƒe me.
Leviticus22:12 Ne nunɔla aɖe ƒe vinyɔnu ɖe srɔ̃ tso to bubu me la
Leviticus22:13 Ke ne enye ahosi alo eƒe srɔ̃ɖeɖe me gblẽ
Leviticus22:14 “ ‘Ne amedzro aɖe ɖu nu kɔkɔe la le ŋuɖeɖi me la
Leviticus22:15 elabena ame siwo mekpɔ mɔ aɖu vɔsanu kɔkɔe la o la magblẽ kɔ ɖo na vɔsanu kɔkɔe siwo Israelviwo tsɔ vɛ la o
Leviticus22:16 Ne ame aɖe da le se sia dzi la
Leviticus22:17 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus22:18 “Ƒo nu na Aron kple via ŋutsuwo kple Israelviwo katã
Leviticus22:19 Yehowa axɔe
Leviticus22:20 Mele be woana nu si ŋu kpɔtsɔtsɔ aɖeke le la o
Leviticus22:21 Ne ame aɖe be yeasa akpedavɔ na Yehowa tso eƒe lãhawo me
Leviticus22:22 Womatsɔ lã si nye ŋkuagbãtɔ alo lã si afi aɖe gblẽ na alo lã si dze abi alo akpa alo le ŋutigbalẽmedɔ bubu aɖe lém la vɛ na Yehowa o. Medze na numevɔsa le Yehowa ƒe vɔsamlekpui la dzi o.
Leviticus22:23 Ne nane de gbɔ edzi alo nane mede tututu o le nyitsu alo alẽ si wotsɔ vɛ ƒe ŋutilã ŋu la
Leviticus22:24 Womatsɔ lã si nuvevi wɔ voku na alo lã si wota la ana Yehowa ɣe aɖeke ɣi o.
Leviticus22:25 Amedzro siwo le mia dome kple Israelviwo siaa woawɔ se siawo dzi le vɔsanuwo nana me
Leviticus22:26 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus22:27 “Ne wodzi nyivi alo alẽvi alo gbɔ̃vi aɖe la
Leviticus22:28 Mègawu nyi alo alẽ kple via le ŋkeke ɖeka dzi o.
Leviticus22:29 “Ne èsa akpedavɔ na Yehowa la
Leviticus22:30 Ele be woaɖui gbe ma gbe ke; mègagblẽ eƒe ɖeke ɖi va se ɖe ŋdi o. Nyee nye Yehowa.
Leviticus22:31 “Ele be mialé nye seawo me ɖe asi
Leviticus22:32 Migaƒo ɖi nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la o. Ele be Israelviwo nabum ame kɔkɔe. Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus22:33 eye mekplɔ mi tso Egipte be manye miaƒe Mawu. Nyee nye Yehowa.”

Leviticus23:2 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Leviticus23:3 “ ‘Esiawo akpe ɖe miaƒe dzudzɔgbewo ŋuti
Leviticus23:4 “ ‘Esiawoe nye Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke kɔkɔe ɖoanyiawo
Leviticus23:5 Yehowa Ƒe Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la adze egɔme le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wuienea gbe le fiẽ.
Leviticus23:6 “ ‘Le ɣleti gbãtɔ ma ke ƒe ŋkeke wuiatɔ̃a gbe la
Leviticus23:7 Le ŋkekenyui sia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi la
Leviticus23:8 Hena ŋkeke adre la
Leviticus23:9 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus23:10 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Leviticus23:11 Ele be wòanye lu babla la le yame le Yehowa ŋkume
Leviticus23:12 Gbe ma gbe ke miatsɔ alẽvi si xɔ ƒe ɖeka
Leviticus23:13 Miatsɔ wɔ memee kilogram eve si woblu kple ami la asa numevɔ na Yehowa
Leviticus23:14 Miekpɔ mɔ aɖu abolo aɖeke
Leviticus23:15 “ ‘Tso Dzudzɔgbe la ƒe ŋufɔke
Leviticus23:16 Xlẽ ŋkeke blaatɔ̃ va se ɖe ŋkeke si dze Dzudzɔgbe adrelia dzi
Leviticus23:17 Nunana sia anye abolo eve tso miaƒe aƒewo me
Leviticus23:18 Kpe ɖe abolo kple wain ŋuti la
Leviticus23:19 Emegbe la
Leviticus23:20 Nunɔla la anye nunana siawo le yame le Yehowa ŋkume hekpe ɖe nu gbãtɔwo ƒe abolo ŋu
Leviticus23:21 Woaɖe gbeƒã ŋkeke ma abe amewo katã ƒe takpekpe kɔkɔe ƒe ɣeyiɣi ene. Migawɔ dɔ aɖeke le ŋkeke ma dzi o. Esia nye se si dzi woawɔ tso dzidzime yi dzidzime.
Leviticus23:22 “ ‘Ne miexa miaƒe nukuwo la
Leviticus23:23 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena
Leviticus23:24 “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be
Leviticus23:25 Migawɔ gbe sia gbe dɔwo o
Leviticus23:26 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus23:27 “Ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ nye Avuléŋkekenyui la. Miwɔ takpekpe kɔkɔe
Leviticus23:28 Migawɔ dɔ aɖeke gbe ma gbe o
Leviticus23:29 Ne ame aɖe mewɔ ŋkeke sia ŋu dɔ hena dzimetɔtrɔ kple konyifafa ɖe eƒe nu vɔ̃wo ta o la
Leviticus23:30 Matsrɔ̃ ame sia ame si awɔ dɔ aɖe gbe ma gbe la tso eƒe amewo dome.
Leviticus23:31 Miawɔ dɔ aɖeke kura o. Ele be esia nanye ɖoɖo mavɔ na dzidzime siwo ava va le afi si mianɔ.
Leviticus23:32 Ŋkeke sia nye dzudzɔgbe; miabɔbɔ mia ɖokui
Leviticus23:33 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose bena
Leviticus23:34 “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be
Leviticus23:35 Ameawo katã awɔ takpekpe kɔkɔe le ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi. Migawɔ dɔ sesẽ aɖeke gbe ma gbe o.
Leviticus23:36 Le ŋkekenyui la ƒe ŋkeke adreawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe dzi la
Leviticus23:37 (“ ‘Esiawoe nye ŋkekenyui siwo miaɖu atsɔ de bubu Yehowa ŋu; ameawo katã awɔ takpekpe kɔkɔewo
Leviticus23:38 Ƒe sia ƒe ƒe ŋkekenyui siawo kpe ɖe kɔsiɖa ɖe sia ɖe ƒe Dzudzɔgbe ŋu. Vɔ siwo woasa le ŋkekenyui siawo dzi la akpe ɖe miaƒe ɣe sia ɣi ƒe nunanawo kple adzɔgbeɖefewo ŋu.)
Leviticus23:39 “ ‘Anyɔnyɔ ƒe ŋkeke mamlɛtɔ sia
Leviticus23:40 Le ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi la
Leviticus23:41 Ŋkekenyui sia
Leviticus23:42 Le ŋkeke adre mawo me la
Leviticus23:43 Nu sia ƒe taɖodzinue nye be woaɖo ŋku edzi na Israelviwo
Leviticus23:44 Ale Mose ɖe gbeƒã Yehowa ƒe ŋkekenyui siwo woaɖu ƒe sia ƒe la na Israelviwo.
Leviticus24:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus24:2 “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be woana amiti ƒe ami nyuitɔ wò nàde akaɖiawo me le agbadɔ la me
Leviticus24:3 Le Mawu ƒe Agbadɔ la ƒe xɔmetsovɔ megbe la
Leviticus24:4 Woakpɔ akaɖi siwo le sikakaɖiti la dzi le Yehowa ŋkume la dzi ɣeawo katã ɣi.
Leviticus24:5 “Le Dzudzɔgbe ɖe sia ɖe dzi la
Leviticus24:6 ada ɖe fli eve me: ade nanɔ fli ɖeka me le sikakplɔ̃ si le tsitre ɖe Yehowa ŋkume la dzi.
Leviticus24:7 Woatsɔ wɔ memee kilogram wuieve ame abolo ɖe sia ɖe. Woawu lifi ɖe fli eveawo dzi. Esia anye dzovɔsa na Yehowa
Leviticus24:8 Woaɖoe Yehowa ƒe ŋkume ɖaa Dzudzɔgbe sia Dzudzɔgbe
Leviticus24:9 Aron kple via ŋutsuwo aɖu abolo la le teƒe tɔxɛ si woɖo na aboloawo ɖuɖu
Leviticus24:10 Gbe ɖeka
Leviticus24:11 Le avu sia wɔwɔ me la
Leviticus24:12 Wodee gaxɔ me va se ɖe esime Yehowa aɖe nu si woawɔe la afia.
Leviticus24:13 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus24:14 “Kplɔ busunyagblɔla la yi asaɖa la godo. Ame siwo katã se eƒe busunyagbɔgblɔ la ada asi ɖe eƒe ta dzi
Leviticus24:15 Gblɔ na Israelviwo be
Leviticus24:16 woawu ame sia ame si ado vlo Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ. Ame sia ame si le ameha la me aƒu kpee. Eɖanye dzɔleaƒea loo alo amedzro
Leviticus24:17 “ ‘Kpe ɖe esia ŋuti la
Leviticus24:18 Ne ame aɖe wu lã aɖe si menye etɔ o la
Leviticus24:19 To si woahe na ame aɖe si awɔ nuvevi ame aɖe lae nye be woawɔ nuvevi ma tututu eya hã le mɔ ma ke nu:
Leviticus24:20 ƒuŋeŋe ɖe ƒuŋeŋe teƒe
Leviticus24:21 “ ‘Megale egblɔm be ne ame aɖe wu ame bubu aɖe ƒe lã la
Leviticus24:22 Se siwo miatsɔ akplɔ amedzrowo la
Leviticus24:23 Ale Mose ƒo nu na Israelviwo eye wohe ɖekakpui la yi asaɖa la godo
Leviticus25:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose le Sinai to la dzi bena
Leviticus25:2 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Leviticus25:3 Miaƒã miaƒe nukuwo
Leviticus25:4 ke le ƒe adrelia me la
Leviticus25:5 Migaŋe nuku siwo mie le wo ɖokuiwo si o; migagbe wain tsetsewo gɔ̃ hã na mia ɖokuiwo o
Leviticus25:6 Nuɖuɖu ɖe sia ɖe si ado tso anyigba la me le dzudzɔƒe la me la
Leviticus25:7 hekpe ɖe wò aƒemelãwo kple lã wɔadã siwo le wò anyigba dzi la ŋu. Nu sia nu si anyigba la na la
Leviticus25:8 “ ‘Xlẽ dzudzɔƒe teƒe adre ale be dzudzɔƒe teƒe adreawo ƒe teƒe adre nanye ƒe blaene-vɔ-asiekɛ.
Leviticus25:9 Ekema na woaku kpẽ le afi sia afi le ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke ewoa gbe; le Avuléŋkeke la dzi la
Leviticus25:10 Kɔ ƒe blatɔ̃lia ŋuti
Leviticus25:11 Ƒe blaatɔ̃lia anye Aseyetsoƒe na mi. Migaƒã nu alo axa nuku siwo mie le woawo ŋutɔ ɖokui si alo agbe waintsetse siwo tsi gbe me o
Leviticus25:12 elabena Aseyetsoƒe kɔkɔe aɖee wònye na mi. Le ƒe ma me la
Leviticus25:13 “ ‘Ɛ̃
Leviticus25:14 “ ‘Ne èdzra anyigba na Israelvi aɖe alo ƒlee le esi la
Leviticus25:15 Aseyetsoƒe la ŋu nàƒle nu le nɔviwo si ɖo
Leviticus25:16 Ne Aseyetsoƒe la le ŋgɔ ƒe geɖe la
Leviticus25:17 Migaba mia nɔewo o
Leviticus25:18 “ ‘Milé nye ɖoɖowo me ɖe asi
Leviticus25:19 Ne miewɔ seawo dzi la
Leviticus25:20 Ke miabia be
Leviticus25:21 Mayra mi le ƒe adelia me ale gbegbe be anyigba la ana nuɖuɖu si asu mia nu ƒe etɔ̃.
Leviticus25:22 Ne mieƒã nukuwo le ƒe enyilia me la
Leviticus25:23 “ ‘Miɖo ŋku edzi be tɔnyee nye anyigba la
Leviticus25:24 Le anyigbadzadzra ƒe ɖoɖo ɖe sia ɖe me la
Leviticus25:25 “ ‘Ne hiã tu ame aɖe
Leviticus25:26 Ne ƒometɔ aɖeke meli si ate ŋu axɔe o
Leviticus25:27 ekema eya ŋutɔ agate ŋu aƒlee ɣe sia ɣi
Leviticus25:28 Ke ne anyigbatɔ gbãtɔ la mete ŋu gbugbɔe ƒle o la
Leviticus25:29 “ ‘Ne ame aɖe dzra eƒe aƒe le du si woɖo gli ƒo xlãe me la
Leviticus25:30 Ke ne mete ŋu xɔe le ƒe ɖeka ma me o la
Leviticus25:31 Ke aƒe siwo le du siwo womeɖo gli ƒo xlã o me ya la le ko abe aƒe siwo wotso ɖe agblewo dzi ene
Leviticus25:32 “ ‘Mele alea le Levitɔwo ya gome o. Levitɔwo ya ate ŋu agbugbɔ woƒe aƒewo axɔ ɣe sia ɣi
Leviticus25:33 ke ne Levitɔ aɖeke mexɔe o la
Leviticus25:34 Womeɖe mɔ na Levitɔwo be woadzra lãnyiƒenyigba siwo ƒo xlã woƒe duwo o
Leviticus25:35 “ ‘Ne hiã tu hawòvi
Leviticus25:36 Mègaxɔ deme ɖe ga si nèdo nɛ la dzi o
Leviticus25:37 Ɖo ŋku edzi be deme aɖeke mele eme o
Leviticus25:38 Esiae nye sedede tso nye
Leviticus25:39 “ ‘Ne nɔviwò Israelvi aɖe ɖo ko
Leviticus25:40 ke boŋ nàbui abe wò agbatedɔwɔla alo wò amedzro ene
Leviticus25:41 Le Aseyetsoƒe la me la
Leviticus25:42 Esi wònye nyee kplɔ mi tso Egiptenyigba dzi
Leviticus25:43 alo awɔ fu mi o. Mivɔ̃ miaƒe Mawu.
Leviticus25:44 “ ‘Miate ŋu aƒle kluviwo tso dukɔ bubu siwo ƒo xlã mi la me
Leviticus25:45 eye miate ŋu aƒle amedzro siwo ƒo xlã mi la ƒe viwo
Leviticus25:46 Woanye kluviwo na mi tegbetegbe
Leviticus25:47 “ ‘Ne amedzro aɖe si le mia dome zu hotsuitɔ
Leviticus25:48 Israelvi la nɔviŋutsu
Leviticus25:49 fofoa alo dadaa nɔviŋutsu
Leviticus25:50 Fe si wòaxe ɖe eƒe ablɔɖe ta la
Leviticus25:51 Ne ƒe geɖewo ava yi hafi Aseyetsoƒe la naɖo la
Leviticus25:52 Ne ƒeawo va yi
Leviticus25:53 Ne edzra eɖokui na amedzro aɖe la
Leviticus25:54 “ ‘Ne womete ŋu xɔe hafi Aseyetsoƒe la ɖo o la
Leviticus25:55 Elabena nye amewoe nye Israelviwo. Nyee ɖe wo tso Egiptenyigba dzi. Nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus26:1 “ ‘Legba aɖeke meganɔ mia si o. Migasubɔ aklamakpakpɛwo
Leviticus26:2 “ ‘Miwɔ nye Dzudzɔgbe ƒe sewo dzi
Leviticus26:3 “ ‘Ne miewɔ nye seawo katã dzi la
Leviticus26:4 mana tsi nadza na mi le tsidzaɣi
Leviticus26:5 Miaƒe luƒoƒo ayi edzi va se ɖe wainxaɣi
Leviticus26:6 elabena mana ŋutifafa mi. Miamlɔ anyi
Leviticus26:7 Mianya miaƒe futɔwo ɖe du nu; woaku ɖe miaƒe yi nu.
Leviticus26:8 Mia dometɔ atɔ̃ anya ame alafa ɖeka ɖe du nu
Leviticus26:9 Makpɔ mia dzi
Leviticus26:10 Miaƒe nukuwo asɔ gbɔ na mi wu ale si miehiã ale gbegbe be miaganya nu si miawɔ kple esi atsi anyi o
Leviticus26:11 Manɔ mia dome; mianye ŋunyɔnu nam o.
Leviticus26:12 Mazɔ le mia dome
Leviticus26:13 elabena nyee nye Yehowa
Leviticus26:14 “Ke ne miaɖo tom alo awɔ nye seawo dzi o
Leviticus26:15 ke boŋ miagbe nye ɖoɖowo la
Leviticus26:16 ekema nu si mawɔ mie nye: mado ŋɔdzi na mi kple asrã sesẽtɔ. Dɔléle aɖe fu na miaƒe ŋkuwo
Leviticus26:17 “Maɖe ŋku atɔ mi; miasi le miaƒe futɔwo nu. Ame siwo lé fu mi la aɖu mia dzi. Gawu la
Leviticus26:18 “Ne miegagbe toɖoɖom kokoko la
Leviticus26:19 Maɖe miaƒe ŋusẽ si dzi miedana ɖo la dzi
Leviticus26:20 Miadagba dzodzro
Leviticus26:21 “Ne miagaɖo tom ɣe ma ɣi hã o la
Leviticus26:22 Maɖo lã wɔadãwo ɖa be woawu mia viwo
Leviticus26:23 “Eye ne nu siawo gɔ̃ hã mana miatrɔ dzi me o
Leviticus26:24 ekema nye hã matsi tsitre ɖe miaƒe didiwo ŋu
Leviticus26:25 Mabia hlɔ̃ mi le ale si miegbe nye nubabla dzi wɔwɔ ta
Leviticus26:26 Magblẽ miaƒe nuɖuɖu ƒe dzɔtsoƒe me
Leviticus26:27 “Ne miagagbe toɖoɖom kple nye sewo dzi wɔwɔ kokoko la
Leviticus26:28 ekema mana nye dɔmedzoe sesẽ la nabi ɖe mia ŋu
Leviticus26:29 Miaɖu miawo ŋutɔ mia viŋutsuwo kple mia vinyɔnuwo
Leviticus26:30 makaka vɔsamlekpui siwo le towo dzi
Leviticus26:31 Mana miaƒe du gãwo nazu aƒedowo
Leviticus26:32 Ɛ̃
Leviticus26:33 “Makaka mi ɖe dukɔwo dome
Leviticus26:34 Ekema anyigba la akpɔ gbɔdzɔe le ɣeyiɣi siwo katã wònye gbegbe la me
Leviticus26:35 Le ɣeyiɣi siwo katã me wònye gbegbe la
Leviticus26:36 “Mana woaɖe aboyo ame siwo aganɔ agbe la ayi didiƒenyigbawo dzi abe aʋaléleawo kple kluviwo ene. Woanɔ afi ma kple dzodzo nyanyanya ɣe sia ɣi. Ne ya ƒo aŋugba la
Leviticus26:37 Ɛ̃
Leviticus26:38 Miatsrɔ̃ le dukɔwo dome
Leviticus26:39 Ame siwo atsi agbe la atsi asi le futɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi le woƒe nu vɔ̃wo kple nu vɔ̃ siwo wo fofowo wɔ la ta.
Leviticus26:40 “Ke ne woaʋu woawo ŋutɔ ƒe nu vɔ̃wo kple wo fofowo ƒe nu vɔ̃wo me
Leviticus26:41 na meɖo wo ɖe woƒe futɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi me la
Leviticus26:42 magaɖo ŋku ŋugbe siwo medo na Abraham
Leviticus26:43 elabena ele be anyigba la nagbɔ ɖe eme le esime amewo dzo le edzi. Ekema
Leviticus26:44 Ke togbɔ be wowɔ nu siawo katã hã la
Leviticus26:45 Le woawo ta la
Leviticus26:46 Esiawoe nye se kple ɖoɖo siwo Yehowa na Israelviwo to Mose dzi le Sinai to la dzi.
Leviticus27:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Leviticus27:2 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Leviticus27:3 ekema ɖe ŋutsu si xɔ tso ƒe blaeve yi blaade nu la ana klosalo kpekpeme kilogram afã ɖe Kɔkɔeƒe la ƒe nudanu nu.
Leviticus27:4 Nenye be nyɔnue la
Leviticus27:5 Ɖe ŋutsuvi si xɔ tso ƒe atɔ̃ va se ɖe blaeve nu la
Leviticus27:6 Woaxe gram blaatɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃ ɖe ŋutsuvi si xɔ tso ɣleti ɖeka va se ɖe ƒe atɔ̃ la nu
Leviticus27:7 Ŋutsu si xɔ wu ƒe blaade la axe klosalo gram blaatɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃
Leviticus27:8 Ke ne ame si le adzɔgbe la ɖem da ahe ale gbegbe be mate ŋu axe fe si wòle be wòaxe o la
Leviticus27:9 “ ‘Ke ne nu si amea tsɔ ɖe adzɔgbee la nye lã si dzi woda asi ɖo be woatsɔ asa vɔe na Yehowa la
Leviticus27:10 Mele be adzɔgbeɖela la natrɔ eƒe ta me o; matrɔ ta me le etsɔtsɔ na Yehowa ŋu loo alo atsɔ nu nyui aɖo gbegblẽa teƒe alo atsɔ gbegblẽa aɖo nyuia teƒe o. Ne etrɔ ta me la
Leviticus27:11 Ke ne lã si wòɖe adzɔgbe be yeatsɔ asa vɔe nye lã makɔmakɔ
Leviticus27:12 ame si akpɔe ne lã la nyo alo menyo o. Ga home si ƒe asi nunɔla la ado ɖe lã la ŋu la
Leviticus27:13 Ne lã la nye lã si woate ŋu atsɔ asa vɔe
Leviticus27:14 “ ‘Ne ame aɖe tsɔ eƒe aƒe abe nu si ŋuti kɔ ene na Yehowa la
Leviticus27:15 Ne ame si tsɔ eƒe aƒe na agaxɔe la
Leviticus27:16 “ ‘Ne ame aɖe tsɔ eƒe anyigba ƒe akpa aɖe na Yehowa la
Leviticus27:17 Ne ame aɖe tsɔ eƒe anyigba na Yehowa le Aseyetsoƒe la me la
Leviticus27:18 Ke ne etsɔe na le Aseyetsoƒe la megbe la
Leviticus27:19 Ne amea di be yeagaxɔ anyigba la la
Leviticus27:20 “ ‘Ke ne eɖo be yemagbugbɔ anyigba la axɔ o
Leviticus27:21 Ne woɖe asi le anyigba la ŋu le Aseyetsoƒe la me la
Leviticus27:22 “ ‘Ne ame aɖe tsɔ anyigba si eya ŋutɔ ƒle
Leviticus27:23 ekema nunɔla la agblɔ ga home si anyigba la axɔ va se ɖe Aseyetsoƒe si gbɔna la nɛ. Amea axe ga home ma enumake na Yehowa.
Leviticus27:24 Ekema le Aseyetsoƒe la me la
Leviticus27:25 Ga homeawo katã nanɔ Kɔkɔeƒe la ƒe ga me: ga siwo katã woaxe la nanye esi dzi nunɔlawo ɖo kpee da ɖi.
Leviticus27:26 “ ‘Ame aɖeke matsɔ nyitsu alo agbo si ʋu dɔnu na dadaa la ana Yehowa o
Leviticus27:27 Ke ne enye ŋgɔgbevi na lã si ŋu se meɖe mɔ le be woatsɔ asa vɔe na Yehowa o la
Leviticus27:28 Ke nu sia nu si woatsɔ ana Yehowa
Leviticus27:29 “ ‘Ne wodo busu ame aɖe la
Leviticus27:30 “ ‘Nu siwo katã anyigba wɔ
Leviticus27:31 Ne ame aɖe di be yeaxɔ yeƒe kutsetse la alo agblemenuku la aƒle la
Leviticus27:32 Ne lãkplɔla aɖe le eƒe lãwo xlẽm ɖekeɖekae la
Leviticus27:33 Womatia lã ewolia si woatsɔ ana Yehowa la ɖe eƒe nyonyo alo manyomanyo ta o. Womatsɔ ɖeke aɖɔli bubu hã o. Ne woaɖɔli lã aɖe kokoko la
Leviticus27:34 Esiawoe nye se siwo Yehowa de na Mose le Sinai to la dzi na Israelviwo.
Numbers1:1 Le Israelviwo ƒe dzodzo le Egipte ƒe ƒe evelia ƒe ɣleti evelia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ si nye Israelviwo ƒe ɣleti evelia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi la
Numbers1:2 “Mi kple Aron mixlẽ Israel dukɔ la katã ɖe woƒe towo kple ƒomewo nu.
Numbers1:3 Miŋlɔ Israel ŋutsu siwo katã xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema la
Numbers1:4 Eye miɖe ŋutsu ɖekaɖeka le to sia to me
Numbers1:5 “Ŋutsu siwo akpe ɖe mia ŋu la ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye: “Elizur
Numbers1:6 Selumiel
Numbers1:7 Nahson
Numbers1:8 Netanel
Numbers1:9 Eliab
Numbers1:10 Yosef ƒe viwo tɔwoe nye: Elisama
Numbers1:11 Abidan
Numbers1:12 Ahiezer
Numbers1:13 Pagiel
Numbers1:14 Eliasaf
Numbers1:15 Ahira
Numbers1:16 Ame siawoe wotia tso ameawo dome be woanye kplɔlawo na Israel to vovovoawo.
Numbers1:17 Le gbe ma gbe ke la
Numbers1:18 yɔ dukɔ blibo la ƒo ƒu le dzinu evelia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi
Numbers1:19 abe ale si Yehowa de se ene. Mose wɔ ŋkɔŋɔŋlɔ sia le Sinai gbegbe.
Numbers1:20 Eye woxlẽ ŋutsu siwo katã xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema la
Numbers1:21 Ame siwo wotia
Numbers1:22 Woxlẽ ŋutsu siwo katã xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema
Numbers1:23 Ame siwo wotia
Numbers1:24 Eye woxlẽ ame siwo xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema
Numbers1:25 Ame siwo wotia
Numbers1:26 Woxlẽ ame siwo xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema
Numbers1:27 Ame siwo wotia
Numbers1:28 Eye woxlẽ ame siwo xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema
Numbers1:29 Ame siwo wotia
Numbers1:30 Eye woxlẽ ame siwo xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema
Numbers1:31 Ame siwo wotia
Numbers1:32 Yosef ƒe viwo tɔe nye esi: Woxlẽ ame siwo xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema
Numbers1:33 Ame siwo wotia

Numbers1:49 “Ɖe Levi ƒe viwo katã ɖa le amexexlẽ sia me

Numbers2:4 ame siwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaadre-vɔ-ene
Numbers2:5 Isaka ƒe to la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe wo xa. Isaka ƒe viwo ƒe kplɔlae nye Netanel
Numbers2:6 ame siwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaatɔ̃-vɔ-ene

Numbers2:11 ame siwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaene-vɔ-ade

Numbers2:13 ame siwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo le ame akpe blaetɔ̃-vɔ-asieke

Numbers3:1 Esiawoe nye Aron kple Mose viwo
Numbers3:2 Viŋutsu enee nɔ Aron si. Woawoe nye Nadab
Numbers3:3 Wosi ami na wo katã
Numbers3:4 Ke Nadab kple Abihu ku le Yehowa ŋkume le Sinai gbedzi esi wowɔ dzo makɔmakɔ ŋu dɔ le vɔsasa na Yehowa me. Esi vi aɖeke menɔ wo si o ta la
Numbers3:5 Eya ta Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers3:6 “Yɔ Levi ƒe viwo katã ƒo ƒu
Numbers3:7 Woawɔ nu siwo Aron aɖo na wo. Woawɔ dɔ kɔkɔewo le Agbadɔ la me ɖe Israelviwo katã nu
Numbers3:8 Woakpɔ Agbadɔ la me nuwo kple Agbadɔ blibo la dzi
Numbers3:9 elabena wotsɔ wo katã na Aron abe Israelviwo katã ƒe teƒenɔlawo ene.
Numbers3:10 Ke Aron ƒe viŋutsuwo koe awɔ nunɔlawo ƒe dɔdeasiwo. Ame bubu ɖe sia ɖe si atɔ asi akɔ be yeawɔ nunɔlawo ƒe dɔ la
Numbers3:11 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers3:12 “Metsɔ Levi ƒe viwo le Israelviwo dome ɖe Israel nyɔnu ɖe sia ɖe ƒe viŋutsu gbãtɔ teƒe. Levi ƒe viwo nye tɔnyewo.
Numbers3:13 Metsɔ wo ɖɔli viŋutsu tsitsitɔwo. Tso gbe si gbe mewu Egiptetɔwo ƒe viŋutsu ŋgɔgbetɔwo la
Numbers3:14 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose le Sinai gbegbe la be
Numbers3:15 “Xlẽ Levi ƒe viwo le woƒe ƒomewo kple towo nu. Xlẽ ŋutsu ɖe sia ɖe si xɔ ɣleti ɖeka alo wu nenema.”
Numbers3:16 Ale Mose xlẽ wo abe ale si Yehowa ƒe nya ɖo nɛ ene.
Numbers3:17 Levi ƒe viwo ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye: Gerson
Numbers3:18 Gerson ƒe viwo ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye esiawo le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Libni kple Simei.
Numbers3:19 Kohat ƒe viwo nye esiawo le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Amram
Numbers3:20 Eye Merari ƒe viwoe nye esiawo le woƒe ƒomewo nu: Mahli kple Musi. Esiawo nye Levi ƒe viwo ƒe ƒome le woƒe aƒewo nu.
Numbers3:21 Gerson hawo nye Libni kple Simei ƒe viwo ƒe ƒome. Woawoe nye Gerson ƒe ƒomeawo.
Numbers3:22 Wotia ŋutsu siwo xɔ dzinu ɖeka alo wu nenema la xlẽ le wo dome
Numbers3:23 Eye Gerson ƒe ƒome la ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe nɔƒe la megbe le ɣedzeƒe gome.
Numbers3:24 Gerson ƒe ƒome la ƒe kplɔlae nye Eliasaf
Numbers3:25 Gerson ƒe viwo ƒe hlɔ̃ eve siawo ƒe dɔdeasiwoe nye
Numbers3:26 kpɔ si ƒo xlã nɔƒe la
Numbers3:27 Kohat ƒe ƒomeawoe nye: Amram ƒe viwo
Numbers3:28 Ŋutsu siwo xɔ dzinu ɖeka alo wu nenema la ƒe xexlẽme le ame akpe enyi
Numbers3:29 Kohat ƒe ƒome la naƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe nɔƒe la ƒe axadzi le dzigbeme lɔƒo.
Numbers3:30 Kohat ƒe ƒome la ƒe kplɔlae nye Elizafan
Numbers3:31 Levi ƒe viwo ƒe hlɔ̃ ene siawo ƒe dɔdeasiwoe nye
Numbers3:32 Eleazar
Numbers3:33 Merari hawo nye: Mahli ƒe viwo ƒe ƒome kple Musi ƒe viwo ƒe ƒome. Woawoe nye Merari ƒe ƒomeawo.
Numbers3:34 Wo dome ŋutsu siwo xɔ dzinu ɖeka alo wu nenema la ƒe xexlẽme le ame akpe ade alafa eve (6
Numbers3:35 Merari ƒe ƒome la ƒe kplɔlae nye Zuriel
Numbers3:36 Levi ƒe viwo ƒe hlɔ̃ eve siawo ƒe dɔdeasie nye woakpɔ ati siwo wotsɔ tu Agbadɔ la
Numbers3:37 eye woagakpɔ sɔti siwo ƒo xlã xɔxɔnu la
Numbers3:38 Wotia teƒe si le agbadɔ la ƒe ɣedzeƒe la da ɖi na Mose kple Aron kple Aron ƒe viŋutsuwo ƒe agbadɔwo. Ame siawo ƒe dɔdeasie nye be woakpɔ be agbadɔ la dzi kpɔlawo wɔ woƒe dɔdeasiwo pɛpɛpɛ ɖe Israelviwo nu. Ame sia ame si menye nunɔla alo Levi ƒe vi o
Numbers3:39 Ale Levi ƒe viwo katã
Numbers3:40 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers3:41 Tsɔ Levi ƒe viwo nam ɖe Israelviwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo katã teƒe
Numbers3:42 Ale Mose xlẽ Israelviwo ƒe viŋutsu tsitsitɔwo abe ale si Yehowa ɖo nɛ ene
Numbers3:43 eye wòkpɔ be viŋutsu tsitsitɔwo
Numbers3:44 Yehowa gagblɔ na Mose be
Numbers3:45 “Tsɔ Levi ƒe viwo ɖɔli Israelviwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo katã
Numbers3:46 Be nàƒle Israelviwo ƒe ŋgɔgbevi alafa eve blaadre-vɔ-etɔ̃ (273)
Numbers3:47 ele be nàxɔ klosaloga gram blaatɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃ ɖe wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ta
Numbers3:48 Tsɔ ga si wona hena Israelvi mamlɛawo ɖeɖe la na Aron kple via ŋutsuwo.”
Numbers3:49 Ale Mose xɔ taƒlega ɖe Israelviwo ƒe viŋutsu tsitsitɔ alafa eve
Numbers3:50 Ga si woxɔ le Israelviwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo si la ƒe kpekpeme le klosalo kilogram wuiatɔ̃ kple afã (15.5) le kɔkɔeƒe la ƒe nudanu nu
Numbers3:51 Mose tsɔ taƒlega la na Aron kple via ŋutsuwo abe ale si Yehowa ƒe nya de see nɛ ene.
Numbers4:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron be
Numbers4:2 “Mixlẽ Kohat ƒe viwo tso Levi ƒe viwo dome le woƒe towo kple ƒomewo nu.
Numbers4:3 Mixlẽ ŋutsu siwo xɔ tso ƒe blaetɔ̃ va se ɖe blaatɔ̃
Numbers4:4 “Esiawoe nye Kohat ƒe viwo ƒe dɔ le agbadɔ la me: nu kɔkɔetɔwo dzi kpɔkpɔ.
Numbers4:5 Ne asaɖa la le hoho ge la
Numbers4:6 Emegbe la
Numbers4:7 “Le esia megbe la
Numbers4:8 Woakeke avɔ dzĩtɔ ɖe nu siawo dzi
Numbers4:9 “Nu si woagawɔ azɔe nye woatsɔ avɔ blɔtɔ atsyɔ akaɖiti la
Numbers4:10 Ekema woatsɔ tɔmenyigbalẽ la atsyɔ nuawo katã dzi
Numbers4:11 “Azɔ la
Numbers4:12 “Ekema woabla nu bubu siwo katã asusɔ ɖe agbadɔ la me la ɖe avɔ blɔtɔ aɖe me
Numbers4:13 “Woalɔ dzowɔ le akɔblivɔsamlekpui la dzi
Numbers4:14 Woatsɔ nu siwo katã ŋu dɔ wowɔna le vɔsamlekpui la dzi la ada ɖe avɔ la dzi. Nu siawoe nye afilɔnuwo
Numbers4:15 “Ne Aron kple via ŋutsuwo wu agbadodo kple nu kɔkɔeawo kple wo ŋunuwo katã nu vɔ
Numbers4:16 “Nunɔla Aron ƒe viŋutsu
Numbers4:17 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron be
Numbers4:18 “Kpɔ egbɔ be womeɖe Kohat ƒomea ɖa le Levi ƒe viwo dome o.
Numbers4:19 Be woanɔ agbe
Numbers4:20 Ne womekplɔ Kohat ƒe viŋutsuwo yi o la
Numbers4:21 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers4:22 “Xlẽ Gerson ƒe viŋutsuwo ɖe Levi ƒe viwo dome
Numbers4:23 ame siwo xɔ tso ƒe blaetɔ̃ va se ɖe ƒe blaatɔ̃
Numbers4:24 “Gerson viwo ƒe dɔdeasie nye be woakɔ:
Numbers4:25 Nɔƒe la ƒe xɔmetsovɔ
Numbers4:26 Woawoe akɔ kpɔ si ƒo xlã nɔƒe la ŋu vɔwo
Numbers4:27 Aron alo via ŋutsuwo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ate ŋu ade dɔ siawo asi na Gerson ƒe viwo
Numbers4:28 ke esiae nye Gerson viwo ƒe ƒome la ƒe dɔwo le agbadɔ la ŋu
Numbers4:29 “Azɔ la
Numbers4:30 Xlẽ ŋutsu siwo katã xɔ tso ƒe blaetɔ̃ va se ɖe ƒe blaatɔ̃ le ame siwo va be yewoawɔ agbadɔ la ŋu dɔwo dome
Numbers4:31 Esiae nye woƒe dɔdeasi si woawɔ le agbadɔ la ŋuti dɔwo wɔwɔ me: woakɔ ʋuƒowo
Numbers4:32 nɔƒe la ƒe kpɔ ƒe sɔtiwo kple zɔwo
Numbers4:33 Merari ƒe viwo hã awɔ dɔ le agbadɔ la ŋu le nunɔla Aron ƒe viŋutsu Itamar ƒe kpɔkplɔ te.”
Numbers4:34 Ale Mose kple Aron kple kplɔla bubuawo xlẽ Kohat ƒe viwo
Numbers4:35 kple woƒe ŋutsu siwo xɔ tso ƒe blaetɔ̃ va se ɖe ƒe blaatɔ̃
Numbers4:36 Wode ŋutsu akpe eve
Numbers4:37 Esiawo nye ame siwo katã Mose kple Aron tia xlẽ le Kohat viwo ƒe ƒome la me be woawɔ dɔ le agbadɔ la ŋu abe ale si Yehowa ɖo na Mose ene.
Numbers4:38 Eye wotia Gerson ƒe viwo xlẽ le woƒe ƒome kple aƒewo nu.
Numbers4:39 Woxlẽ ame siwo katã xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ alo wu nenema la va se ɖe ƒe blaatɔ̃
Numbers4:40 Ame siwo wotia
Numbers4:41 Ame siawo nye ame siwo katã Mose kple Aron tia
Numbers4:42 Eye wotia amewo
Numbers4:43 Woxlẽ ame siwo katã xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ alo wu nenema la va se ɖe ƒe blaatɔ̃
Numbers4:44 Ame siwo wotia
Numbers4:45 Esiawoe nye ame siwo Mose kple Aron wotia
Numbers4:46 Levi ƒe vi siwo katã Mose kple Aron kple Israel kplɔlawo wotia le woƒe ƒomewo kple aƒewo nu
Numbers4:47 eye woxɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ alo wu nenema va se ɖe ƒe blaatɔ̃ be woasubɔ le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la me
Numbers4:48 ƒe xexlẽme le ame akpe enyi
Numbers4:49 Mose na wofia ame sia ame ƒe dɔ kple agba si wòakɔ lae
Numbers5:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers5:2 “Ɖe gbe na Israelviwo be woaɖe ame siwo katã nye anyidzelawo kple ame siwo katã ŋu tsi ƒomevi aɖe le dodom le kple ame siwo katã gblẽ kɔ ɖo le ame kuku aɖe ta la ɖa le asaɖa la me.
Numbers5:3 Woawɔ ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo siaa nenema. Miɖe wo ɖa ale be womagblẽ kɔ ɖo na asaɖa la
Numbers5:4 Ale Israelviwo wɔ Yehowa ƒe se la dzi eye woɖe ame siawo katã ɖa le asaɖa la me.
Numbers5:5 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers5:6 “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be: ‘Ne ŋutsu alo nyɔnu da vo ɖe ame aɖe ŋu le mɔ aɖe nu eye wòto nu ma me meɖi anukware na Yehowa o la
Numbers5:7 Ele be wòaʋu eƒe nu vɔ̃ me eye wòaxe fe ɖe nu vɔ̃ si wòwɔ la ta. Gawu la
Numbers5:8 Ke ne ame si ŋu wòwɔ nu vɔ̃ ɖo la ku eye eƒe ƒometɔ gobii aɖeke meli wòaxe fea na o la
Numbers5:9 Nu kɔkɔe ɖe sia ɖe si Israelviwo atsɔ vɛ na nunɔla aɖe la
Numbers5:10 Ame sia ame ƒe nu kɔkɔewo nye eya ŋutɔ tɔ
Numbers5:11 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers5:12 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Numbers5:13 eye ŋutsu bubu de asi eŋu
Numbers5:14 ne ŋutsu la le ŋu ʋãm
Numbers5:15 ele be ŋutsu la nakplɔ srɔ̃a ayi nunɔla gbɔ. Nu si wòana nunɔla ɖe srɔ̃a tae nye luwɔ lita ɖeka. Womakɔ ami kple dzudzɔdonu ɖe edzi o
Numbers5:16 “ ‘Nunɔla la akplɔ nyɔnu la ayi Yehowa ŋkume
Numbers5:17 aku tsi kɔkɔe ɖe anyikplu aɖe me
Numbers5:18 Ne nunɔla la na nyɔnu la tsi tsitre ɖe Yehowa ŋkume vɔ la
Numbers5:19 Nunɔla la ana nyɔnu la naka atam
Numbers5:20 Ke ne èda afɔ esime nèle srɔ̃wò gbɔ
Numbers5:21 ekema nunɔla la aka atam agblɔ fiƒodenyawo na nyɔnu la be
Numbers5:22 Tsi sia si hea fiƒode vaa ame dzi la nage ɖe lãme na wò ale be wò ƒodo nate ɖe nuwò
Numbers5:23 “ ‘Ekema nunɔla la aŋlɔ fiƒode siawo ɖe agbalẽ me
Numbers5:24 Nunɔla la ana nyɔnu la nano tsi veve si hea fiƒode vaa ame dzi la
Numbers5:25 Le esia megbe la
Numbers5:26 Nunɔla la aku nuɖuvɔsa la ƒe asiʋlo ɖeka abe ŋkuɖodzivɔsa ene
Numbers5:27 Ne nyɔnu la gblẽ kɔ ɖo
Numbers5:28 Ke ne nyɔnu la megblẽ kɔ ɖo o
Numbers5:29 “ ‘Esiae nye ŋuʋaʋãŋutise ne nyɔnu aɖe da afɔ
Numbers5:30 alo ne ŋuʋaʋã xɔ ŋutsu aɖe me
Numbers5:31 Womaɖe agɔdzedze aɖeke na srɔ̃ŋutsu la o
Numbers6:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers6:2 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Numbers6:3 mele nɛ be wòano wain alo nu muame aɖeke alo aha sesẽ si wowɔ tso wain me alo aha si wotsɔ ɖo ƒãe o. Mano waintsetse me tsi alo aɖu waintsetse o.
Numbers6:4 Ŋkeke ale si wònye Nazaritɔ ko la
Numbers6:5 “ ‘Le ɣeyiɣi mawo katã me la
Numbers6:6 “ ‘Le ɣeyiɣi si me wòɖe eɖokui ɖe aga na Yehowa la
Numbers6:7 Ne eya ŋutɔ fofoa alo dadaa alo nɔvia ŋutsu alo nɔvia nyɔnu gɔ̃ hã ku la
Numbers6:8 eye wokɔ eŋuti na Yehowa to ɣeyiɣi la katã me.
Numbers6:9 “ ‘Ne ame aɖe ku le exa la
Numbers6:10 Le ŋkeke enyilia gbe la
Numbers6:11 Nunɔla la atsɔ xeviawo dometɔ ɖeka asa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa
Numbers6:12 Ŋkeke siwo wòwɔ eƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe dzi hafi gblẽ kɔ ɖo la
Numbers6:13 “ ‘Ne adzɔgbe si wòɖe be yeaɖe ye ɖokui ɖe aga na Yehowa ƒe ɣeyiɣi wu enu la
Numbers6:14 eye wòasa numevɔ na Yehowa kple alẽ si xɔ ƒe ɖeka
Numbers6:15 Kpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la
Numbers6:16 “ ‘Nunɔla la atsɔ nunana siawo ada ɖe Yehowa ŋkume. Atsɔ nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsa la ana gbã
Numbers6:17 Le esiawo megbe la
Numbers6:18 “ ‘Azɔ la
Numbers6:19 “ ‘Le takoko na adzɔgbeɖela la megbe la
Numbers6:20 Nunɔla la anye wo katã le yame

Numbers7:4 Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be

Numbers7:6 Ale Mose tsɔ tasiaɖamwo kple nyitsuawo na Levi ƒe viwo.

Numbers8:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers8:2 “Ƒo nu na Aron
Numbers8:3 Aron wɔ esia. Eɖo akaɖigbea atiawo dzi ɖe ɖoɖo siwo Yehowa na Mose nu tututu.
Numbers8:4 Wotsɔ sika wɔ akaɖiti la kple seƒoƒowo ɖe akaɖiti la ƒe zɔ kple alɔdzeawo ŋu. Wowɔ akaɖitiawo abe ale si Yehowa fia Mose ene.
Numbers8:5 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers8:6 “Ɖe Levi ƒe viwo ɖa le Israelvi bubuawo dome
Numbers8:7 Hlẽ tsi kɔkɔe la ɖe wo ŋu
Numbers8:8 Na woatsɔ nyitsuvi aɖe kple nuɖuvɔsanu si nye wɔ memee si wobaka kple ami la kple nyitsu bubu na nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsa vɛ.
Numbers8:9 Ekema
Numbers8:10 Le afi ma la
Numbers8:11 ato tsɔtsɔna ƒe dzesiwo me
Numbers8:12 “Le esia megbe la
Numbers8:13 Ekema woatsɔ Levi ƒe viwo ana Aron kple via ŋutsuwo abe ale si wotsɔa nu bubu ɖe sia ɖe si wodi be woana Yehowa la naa nunɔlawo ene!
Numbers8:14 Eya ta nàtia Levi ƒe viwo ɖa le Israelvi bubuawo katã dome
Numbers8:15 “Ne èkɔ wo ŋuti
Numbers8:16 Wonye tɔnyewo le Israelviwo katã dome. Mexɔ wo ɖe Israelviwo ƒe viŋutsu gbãtɔwo katã teƒe; mexɔ Levi ƒe viwo abe teƒenɔlawo ene.
Numbers8:17 Israelviwo ƒe viŋutsu ŋgɔgbetɔwo kple woƒe lãwo ƒe vi ŋgɔgbetɔwo katã nye tɔnyewo. Metsɔ wo na ɖokuinye le zã si me mewu Egiptetɔwo ƒe ŋgɔgbeviwo katã.
Numbers8:18 Ɛ̃
Numbers8:19 Matsɔ Levi ƒe viwo ake Aron kple via ŋutsuwo abe nunana ene. Levi ƒe viwo awɔ dɔ kɔkɔe siwo wohiã tso Israelviwo si be woawɔ le agbadɔ la me
Numbers8:20 Ale Mose kple Aron kpakple Israelviwo katã wotsɔ Levi ƒe viwo na Yehowa le se si wòde na Mose la nu.
Numbers8:21 Levi ƒe viwo kɔ wo ɖokuiwo ŋu
Numbers8:22 Le esia megbe la
Numbers8:23 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be

Numbers8:25 Ke ne woxɔ ƒe blaatɔ̃ la

Numbers9:2 “Na Israelviwo naɖu Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la le eƒe ɣeyiɣi la dzi.
Numbers9:3 Miɖui le eƒe ɣeyiɣi la dzi
Numbers9:4 Ale Mose gblɔ na Israelviwo be woaɖu Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la
Numbers9:5 eye woɖui le Sinai gbegbe la le fiẽ
Numbers9:6 Ke wo dometɔ aɖewo mete ŋu ɖu Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la gbe ma gbe o
Numbers9:7 eye wogblɔ na Mose be
Numbers9:8 Mose gblɔ na wo be yeabia nya Yehowa tso woƒe xaxa la ŋuti.
Numbers9:9 Yehowa ƒe nyametsotsoe nye:
Numbers9:10 “Ne Israelviwo dometɔ siwo li fifia alo siwo anɔ dzidzime siwo ava va me la gblẽ kɔ ɖo na wo ɖokuiwo le Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la ƒe ɣeyiɣi me
Numbers9:11 le ɣleti evelia ƒe ŋkeke wuienelia gbe. Woadze ŋkekenyui la ɖuɖu gɔme tso gbe ma gbe ƒe fiẽ. Woaɖu alẽvi la ɣe ma ɣi kple abolo maʋamaʋã kple amagbe veve.
Numbers9:12 Mele be woagblẽ nuɖuɖu la ƒe ɖeke ɖi ŋu nake ɖe edzi o
Numbers9:13 “Ke ame sia ame
Numbers9:14 Ne amedzro aɖe le mia dome
Numbers9:15 Le gbe si gbe wotu agbadɔ la la
Numbers9:16 Aleae wònɔna azɔ: enyea lilikpo le ŋkeke me eye wòdzena abe dzo bibi ene le zã me.
Numbers9:17 Ne lilikpo la ho la
Numbers9:18 Wozɔ mɔ alea le Yehowa ƒe kpɔkplɔ te. Wotɔna ɖe afi si Yehowa ɖo na wo be woatɔ ɖo. Wonɔa afi ma ɣeyiɣi si lilikpo la tɔ ɖe afi ma.
Numbers9:19 Ne enɔ anyi wòdidi la
Numbers9:20 Ɣe aɖewo ɣi la
Numbers9:21 Ɣe aɖewo ɣi la
Numbers9:22 Ne lilikpo la nɔ agbadɔ la tame ŋkeke eve alo ɣleti ɖeka alo ƒe ɖeka la
Numbers9:23 Le Yehowa ƒe gbeɖeɖe nu la
Numbers10:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers10:2 “Tsɔ klosalo wɔ kpẽ eve hena ameawo yɔyɔ be woaƒo ƒu kple gbeƒãɖeɖe be woaho.
Numbers10:3 Ne woku kpẽ eveawo ƒo ƒui la
Numbers10:4 Ke ne woku kpẽ ɖeka ko la
Numbers10:5 Ne woku kpẽa la
Numbers10:6 Ne kpẽa gaɖi zi evelia tu ɖe nu la
Numbers10:7 Ke ne wodi be dukɔ la katã nakpe ta la
Numbers10:8 “Aron ƒe viŋutsuwo
Numbers10:9 Ne mieyi aʋa kple miaƒe futɔwo
Numbers10:10 Miku kpẽawo le dzidzɔɣiwo hã. Miku wo le miaƒe ƒe sia ƒe Ŋkekenyuiwo dzi kple dzinu yeye ɖe sia ɖe ƒe Ŋkekenyuiwo dzi. Miku kpẽawo hã ɖe miaƒe numevɔsawo kple ŋutifafavɔsawo hã ŋu
Numbers10:11 Lilikpo la ho le agbadɔ la tame le Israelviwo ƒe dzodzo le Egipte ƒe ƒe evelia ƒe ɣleti evelia ƒe ŋkeke blaevelia gbe.
Numbers10:12 Ale Israelviwo dzo le Sinai gbegbe la. Wodze lilikpo la yome va se ɖe esime wòtɔ ɖe Paran gbegbe la.
Numbers10:13 Esiae nye woƒe mɔzɔzɔ gbãtɔ esi woxɔ Yehowa ƒe se siwo wòde na Mose tso mɔzɔzɔ la ŋuti.
Numbers10:14 Yuda ƒe to la dze ŋgɔ
Numbers10:15 Isaka ƒe to la kplɔ wo ɖo. Woƒe kplɔlae nye Netanel
Numbers10:16 Eliab
Numbers10:17 Wokaka Agbadɔ la
Numbers10:18 Ruben ƒe to la kple woƒe aflaga dze wo yome le woƒe kplɔla Elizur
Numbers10:19 Simeon ƒe to la kplɔ woawo hã ɖo. Wonɔ woƒe kplɔla Selumiel
Numbers10:20 To si kplɔ wo ɖo lae nye Gad ƒe to la. Woƒe kplɔlae nye Eliasaf
Numbers10:21 Kohat ƒe viwo kplɔ Gad ƒe to la ɖo. Woawoe tsɔa nu kɔkɔeawo. Wotua agbadɔ la ɖe teƒe yeyea hafi wova ɖona.
Numbers10:22 Efraim ƒe to la kplɔ Kohat ƒe viwo ɖo. Wonɔ woƒe aflaga yome le Elisama
Numbers10:23 Manase ƒe to la nɔ Gamaliel
Numbers10:24 eye Benyamin ƒe to la nɔ woƒe kplɔla Abidan
Numbers10:25 Ame mamlɛtɔwoe nye Dan ƒe to la. Wonɔ woƒe aflaga yome le woƒe kplɔla
Numbers10:26 Aser ƒe to la
Numbers10:27 kple Naftali ƒe to la
Numbers10:28 Ɖoɖo sia mee Israelviwo ƒe towo nɔna hezɔa mɔ.
Numbers10:29 Gbe ɖeka la
Numbers10:30 Ke Hobab gblɔ nɛ be
Numbers10:31 Mose ɖe kuku nɛ be
Numbers10:32 Ne èkplɔ mí ɖo la
Numbers10:33 Wozɔ mɔ ŋkeke etɔ̃ tso Sinai to
Numbers10:34 Wodze mɔ le ŋkeke me. Yehowa ƒe lilikpo la nɔ zɔzɔm le ŋgɔ na wo.
Numbers10:35 Ne wokɔ nubablaɖaka la dze mɔ la
Numbers10:36 Ne wodro nubablaɖaka la ɖi la
Numbers11:1 Ameawo de asi liʋĩliʋĩlilĩ me le woƒe fukpekpewo katã ta. Yehowa see
Numbers11:2 Wodo ɣli na Mose be wòaxɔ na yewo. Esi Mose do gbe ɖa na Yehowa ɖe wo ta la
Numbers11:3 Tso ɣe ma ɣi dzi la
Numbers11:4 Nuɖuɖu bubuwo de asi yakame siwo le wo dome la dzodzro me
Numbers11:5 Míeɖo ŋku tɔmelã siwo míeɖu le Egipte femaxee kple dzamatre
Numbers11:6 Ke fifia la
Numbers11:7 Mana la le ɣie abe bliku ene gake ele gbadzɛe
Numbers11:8 Ameawo fɔnɛ le anyigba
Numbers11:9 Mana gena kple zãmu ƒe dzadza le zã me.
Numbers11:10 Ƒomewo tsia tsitre ɖe woƒe agbadɔwo nu henɔa avi fam. Mose se woƒe avifafa. Yehowa gado dɔmedzoe ɖe edzi wu
Numbers11:11 Mose gblɔ na Yehowa be
Numbers11:12 Vinyewo wonyea? Nyee nye wo fofoa? Nu sia tae nède dɔ asi nam be makpɔ wo dzi abe vidzĩwo ene va se ɖe esime míaɖo anyigba si ŋugbe nèdo na mía tɔgbuiwo la dzia?
Numbers11:13 Afi ka makpɔ lã tsoe ana ame siawo katã? Wole avi fam nam le gbɔgblɔm be
Numbers11:14 Nye ɖeka nyemate ŋu atsɔ dukɔ sia ƒe nyawo o. Agba la kpe nam akpa!
Numbers11:15 Nenye aleae nàwɔm la
Numbers11:16 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers11:17 Maɖi ava ƒo nu kpli wò le afi ma. Maɖe Gbɔgbɔ si le dziwò la ƒe ɖe le dziwò ada ɖe woawo hã dzi. Woatsɔ dukɔ la ƒe agba akpe ɖe ŋuwò ale be dɔdeasi la maganɔ wò ɖeka ko dzi o.
Numbers11:18 “Gblɔ na ameawo be woakɔ wo ɖokuiwo ŋuti
Numbers11:19 Miaɖui ŋkeke ɖeka
Numbers11:20 ke ɣleti blibo ɖeka
Numbers11:21 Mose gblɔ be
Numbers11:22 Ne míawu míaƒe lãwo katã hã la
Numbers11:23 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers11:24 Mose dzo le agbadɔ la me
Numbers11:25 Yehowa ɖiɖi le lilikpo la me
Numbers11:26 Ke ametsitsi blaadreawo dometɔ eve
Numbers11:27 Ɖekakpui aɖewo ƒu du yi ɖagblɔ nya si dzɔ la na Mose.
Numbers11:28 Yosua
Numbers11:29 Ke Mose ɖo eŋu be
Numbers11:30 Emegbe la
Numbers11:31 Azɔ ya sesẽ aɖe ƒo tso Yehowa gbɔ
Numbers11:32 Ŋkeke kple zã blibo la kpakple ŋkeke si kplɔe ɖo la
Numbers11:33 Esi ame sia ame de asi lã la ɖuɖu me la

Numbers12:16 Le esia megbe la
Numbers13:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose azɔ be
Numbers13:2 “Dɔ ŋkutsalawo ɖe Kanaanyigba
Numbers13:3 Israelviwo ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Paran gbedzi ɣe ma ɣi. Mose wɔ ɖe se si Yehowa de nɛ la dzi
Numbers13:4 Woƒe ŋkɔwoe nye: Samua
Numbers13:5 Safat
Numbers13:6 Kaleb
Numbers13:7 Igal
Numbers13:8 Hosea
Numbers13:9 Palti
Numbers13:10 Gadiel
Numbers13:11 Gadi
Numbers13:12 Amiel
Numbers13:13 Setur
Numbers13:14 Nahbi
Numbers13:15 kple Geuel
Numbers13:16 Ame siawoe Mose dɔ be woaɖatsa anyigba la me. Ɣeyiɣi sia mee (Mose trɔ Hosea ƒe ŋkɔ wòzu Yosua) si gɔmee nye “Yehowa nye Ɖeɖe.”
Numbers13:17 Mose dɔ wo ɖa
Numbers13:18 ne miakpɔ ale si anyigba la le. Mikpɔ ale si ame siwo le anyigba la dzi hã le
Numbers13:19 Milé ŋku ɖe nuwo ŋu
Numbers13:20 ne anyigba la nyo alo menyo o
Numbers13:21 Ale wotsa ŋku le anyigba la dzi tso keke Zin gbegbe la va ɖo Rehob
Numbers13:22 Wotso afi ma ɖo ta dzigbeme lɔƒo; woto Negeb gbã
Numbers13:23 Tso afi ma la
Numbers13:24 Israelviwo na ŋkɔ Balime sia be
Numbers13:25 Le ŋkeke blaene megbe la
Numbers13:26 Wogblɔ nu si wokpɔ la na Mose
Numbers13:27 Wona nutsotso Mose ale
Numbers13:28 Ke afi ma tɔwo nye ŋusẽtɔwo. Woƒe duwo lolo
Numbers13:29 Amalekitɔwo le gbegbe le dziehe gome
Numbers13:30 Tete Kaleb tsi nya ɖe ameawo nu le Mose ŋkume
Numbers13:31 Ŋkutsala bubuawo gblɔ be
Numbers13:32 Ale wokaka nutsotso gbegblẽ ɖe Israelviwo dome tso anyigba si dzi wotsa ŋku le la ŋuti. Wogblɔ na ameawo be
Numbers13:33 Míekpɔ Nefilimtɔwo hã le afi ma (Anak nye Nefilimtɔwo ƒe dzidzimeviwo). Míedze le woƒe ŋkume abe abɔwo ene
Numbers14:1 Israelviwo katã de asi avifafa me sesĩe. Wofa avi zã blibo la.
Numbers14:2 Israelviwo katã lĩ liʋĩliʋĩ ɖe Mose kple Aron ŋu
Numbers14:3 Nu ka ŋuti Yehowa kplɔ mí va anyigba sia dzi be míatsi yi nu? Mía srɔ̃nyɔnuwo kple mía viwo azu nuhaha. Ɖe manyo wu ne míagbugbɔ ayi Egipte oa?”
Numbers14:4 Wogblɔ na wo nɔewo be
Numbers14:5 Tete Mose kple Aron wotsyɔ mo anyi ɖe Israelvi siwo katã ƒo ƒu ɖe afi ma la ƒe ŋkume.
Numbers14:6 Yosua
Numbers14:7 hegblɔ na Israel ha blibo la be
Numbers14:8 Nenye be míaƒe nu nyo Yehowa ŋu la
Numbers14:9 Gake ɖekoe miagadze aglã ɖe Yehowa ŋu o
Numbers14:10 Ke ameha blibo la ƒo nu tso kpeƒuƒu wo ŋu. Tete Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe dze le agbadɔ la gbɔ na Israelviwo katã.
Numbers14:11 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers14:12 Womaganye nye domenyilawo o. Matsrɔ̃ wo kple dɔvɔ̃. Mana dukɔ si alolo sãa
Numbers14:13 Mose ƒo koko na Yehowa be
Numbers14:14 Wogblɔ nya sia na anyigba sia dzi nɔlawo
Numbers14:15 Azɔ ne èwu wò amewo la
Numbers14:16 ‘Enɔ na Yehowa be wòawu wo
Numbers14:17 “Azɔ la
Numbers14:18 ‘Yehowa le blewu le dɔmedzoedodo me
Numbers14:19 O! Meɖe kuku na wò
Numbers14:20 Yehowa ɖo eŋu be
Numbers14:21 Gake zi ale si mele agbe
Numbers14:22 nenema tututue wòanye nyateƒe
Numbers14:23 makpɔ anyigba si ŋugbe medo na ame siawo tɔgbuiwo o.
Numbers14:24 Ke nye dɔla
Numbers14:25 Azɔ la
Numbers14:26 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron be
Numbers14:27 “Va se ɖe ɣe ka ɣie ameha vɔ̃ɖi sia alĩ liʋĩliʋĩ ɖe ŋutinye? Mese Israelvi liʋĩliʋĩlĩla siawo ƒe liʋĩliʋĩlilĩ.
Numbers14:28 Migblɔ na wo be
Numbers14:29 Mi katã miaku ɖe gbedzi le afi sia! Ame ɖeka pɛ si xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema
Numbers14:30 made Ŋugbedodonyigba la dzi o. Kaleb
Numbers14:31 Miegblɔ be yewo viwo ava zu kluviwo na anyigba la dzi tɔwo. Le esia teƒe la
Numbers14:32 Ke miawo la
Numbers14:33 Miatsa tsaglalã le gbedzi abe alẽnyilawo ene ƒe blaene. Ale miaxe fe ɖe miaƒe nu vɔ̃wo ta va se ɖe esime mia dometɔ mamlɛtɔ naku ɖe gbedzi.
Numbers14:34 Ƒe blaene
Numbers14:35 Nye
Numbers14:36 Ale ame siwo Mose ɖo ɖa be woatsa ŋku le anyigba la dzi
Numbers14:37 la
Numbers14:38 Yosua kple Yefune ƒe vi Kaleb koe susɔ le ŋkutsalawo dome.
Numbers14:39 Esi Mose gblɔ nya siwo Yehowa gblɔ nɛ la na Israelviwo la
Numbers14:40 Wofɔ ŋdi kanya
Numbers14:41 Ke Mose gblɔ be
Numbers14:42 Migazɔ ɖe miaƒe ɖoɖowo nu o; ne menye nenema o la
Numbers14:43 Mieɖo ŋku edzi oa? Amalekitɔwo kple Kanaantɔwo le afi ma eye miatsi yi nu! Miegbugbɔ le Yehowa yome. Azɔ la
Numbers14:44 Ke togbɔ be Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la loo alo Mose medzo le asaɖa la me o hã la
Numbers14:45 Tete Amalekitɔwo kple Kanaantɔwo
Numbers15:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers15:2 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Numbers15:3 eye miesa dzovɔ na Yehowa tso miaƒe lãhawo me
Numbers15:4 ekema ame si le vɔ la sam la atsɔ nuɖuvɔsa si nye wɔ memee kilogram ɖeka
Numbers15:5 eye nunovɔsa si nye wain lita ɖeka la akpe ɖe eŋu. Wain hin ɖeka ƒe akpa enelia akpe ɖe alẽvi ɖeka ŋu.
Numbers15:6 “ ‘Nenye agboe wotsɔ le vɔ la sam la
Numbers15:7 kple wain lita ɖeka kple afã la akpe ɖe eŋu abe nunovɔsa ene. Esia anye vɔsa si ʋẽna lĩlĩlĩ
Numbers15:8 “ ‘Ne ètsɔ nyitsuvi aɖe be yeasa numevɔ
Numbers15:9 ekema nàtsɔ nuɖuvɔsa
Numbers15:10 Nunovɔsa si akpe ɖe eŋu la anye wain lita eve. Woatsɔ dzo asa vɔ sia
Numbers15:11 Woawɔ nyitsu alo agbo
Numbers15:12 Wɔ nu sia na wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe
Numbers15:13 “ ‘Dzɔleaƒea ɖe sia ɖe awɔ nu siawo ale
Numbers15:14 Hena dzidzime siwo gbɔna la
Numbers15:15 Se ɖeka mawo ke nanɔ ameha la si na mi kple amedzro siwo le mia dome la siaa elabena miesɔ le Yehowa ƒe ŋkume. Esia nye ɖoɖo mavɔ na dzidzime siwo gbɔna.
Numbers15:16 Se kple ɖoɖo mawo ke nakplɔ mi kple amedzro siwo le mia dome.’ ”
Numbers15:17 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers15:18 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Numbers15:19 eye mieɖu anyigba ma dzi nuɖuɖu la
Numbers15:20 Mitsɔ miaƒe wɔ gbãtɔwo tɔ tatalĩ
Numbers15:21 To dzidzime siwo ava me la
Numbers15:22 “ ‘Ne miawo alo miaƒe dzidzimeviwo da vo
Numbers15:23 Yehowa ƒe se siwo wode na mi to edzi tso gbe si gbe Yehowa de wo
Numbers15:24 eye menye nu si woɖo wɔ
Numbers15:25 Nunɔla alé avu ɖe Israelviwo katã nu
Numbers15:26 Woatsɔ nu vɔ̃ ake ame sia ame; woatsɔe ake amedzro siwo le Israelviwo dome hã
Numbers15:27 “ ‘Nenye ame ɖekae da vo la
Numbers15:28 Nunɔla la alé avu ɖe enu le Yehowa ŋkume
Numbers15:29 Se sia bla mi ame Israelvi dzɔleaƒeawo kple amedzro siwo le mia dome hã.
Numbers15:30 “ ‘Ke ne ame aɖe nya nyuie hafi da vo aɖe la
Numbers15:31 Esi wòdo vlo Yehowa ƒe sewo abe nu ɖowɔ ene
Numbers15:32 Gbe ɖeka esime Israelviwo nɔ gbedzi la
Numbers15:33 Wokplɔe yi Mose kple Aron kple ameha la ŋkume.
Numbers15:34 Wodee mɔ va se ɖe esime woanya nu si Yehowa adi be woawɔ.
Numbers15:35 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers15:36 Ale wohee yi asaɖa la godo
Numbers15:37 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers15:38 “Ƒo nu na Israelviwo
Numbers15:39 Ne miekpɔ gbo siawo la
Numbers15:40 Ekema miaɖo ŋku edzi
Numbers15:41 Nyee nye Yehowa
Numbers16:1 Gbe ɖeka la
Numbers16:2 Ɖoɖo lae nye be woana amewo nadze aglã ɖe Mose ŋu. Ame siwo lɔ̃ ɖe aglãdzedze ƒe ɖoɖo sia dzi kple Israelviwo ƒe xexlẽmee nye ame alafa eve blaatɔ̃ (250). Wonye kplɔlawo kple aɖaŋudelawo.
Numbers16:3 Woyi Mose kple Aron gbɔ
Numbers16:4 Esi Mose se nya si gblɔm wole la
Numbers16:5 Egblɔ na Korah kple ame siwo le eŋu la be
Numbers16:6 Ele be wò
Numbers16:7 eye etsɔ la
Numbers16:8 Mose gblɔ na Korah be
Numbers16:9 Mesɔ gbɔ na mi be Israel ƒe Mawu la ɖe mi ɖa tso Israel ƒe ameha la me
Numbers16:10 Ɖe ale si wòtsɔ dɔ sia de asi na mi Levi ƒe viwo ɖeɖe ko la mesɔ gbɔ na mi oa? Ke azɔ la
Numbers16:11 Yehowa ŋue mi kple mia yomedzelawo katã miebla ɖo. Ame kae nye Aron be mialĩ liʋĩliʋĩ le eŋu?”
Numbers16:12 Mose ɖo du ɖe Datan kple Abiram
Numbers16:13 Ɖeko wogblɔ be
Numbers16:14 Gawu la
Numbers16:15 Mose do dɔmedzoe vevie
Numbers16:16 Mose gblɔ na Korah be
Numbers16:17 Ame sia ame natsɔ dzudzɔdosonu ɖe asi
Numbers16:18 Ale wotsɔ woƒe dzudzɔdosonuwo vɛ
Numbers16:19 Esi Korah ƒo eyomedzelawo katã nu ƒu ɖe Agbadɔ la ƒe ŋkume be woatsi tsitre ɖe wo ŋuti la
Numbers16:20 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron be
Numbers16:21 “Miɖe mia ɖokuiwo ɖa le ame siawo dome ale be matsrɔ̃ wo enumake.”
Numbers16:22 Mose kple Aron wotsyɔ mo anyi le Yehowa ŋkume
Numbers16:23 Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers16:24 “Gblɔ na ƒuƒoƒe la be
Numbers16:25 Ale Mose ɖe abla yi Datan kple Abiram ƒe agbadɔwo gbɔ
Numbers16:26 Mose xlɔ̃ nu ameha la be
Numbers16:27 Ale ameawo katã te ɖa le Korah
Numbers16:28 Eye Mose gblɔ be
Numbers16:29 Ne ŋutsu siawo aku dzɔdzɔmeku alo nu si dzɔna ɖe ŋutsu ɖe sia ɖe dzi koe dzɔ ɖe wo dzi la
Numbers16:30 Gake nenye be Yehowa ana nu yeye aɖe kura nadzɔ
Numbers16:31 Esi Mose wu nya siawo nu teti ko la
Numbers16:32 eye anyigba la mi wo kple woƒe aƒemenuwo katã
Numbers16:33 Ale woyi tsiẽƒe agbagbe kple woƒe nunɔamesiwo katã
Numbers16:34 Esi ame siwo yi tsiẽƒe la nɔ ɣli dom la
Numbers16:35 Dzo ge tso Yehowa gbɔ va fia ame alafa eve blaatɔ̃ (250) siwo nɔ dzudzɔ dom.
Numbers16:36 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers16:37 “Gblɔ na Eleazar
Numbers16:38 tso ame siwo wɔ nu vɔ̃
Numbers16:39 Ale nunɔla Eleazar tsɔ akɔblidzudzɔdosonu alafa eve blaatɔ̃ la tu ga ɖeka hena vɔsamlekpui la dzi tsyɔtsyɔ
Numbers16:40 be wòanye ŋkuɖodzinu na Israelviwo be ame sia ame si menye Aron ƒe dzidzimevi o la mekpɔ mɔ ava Yehowa ŋkume
Numbers16:41 Esi ŋu ke ŋdi la
Numbers16:42 Ale ameha gã aɖe ƒo ƒu; kasia woakpɔ agbadɔ la gbɔ ɖa la
Numbers16:43 Mose kple Aron yi agbadɔ la ŋgɔ
Numbers16:44 eye Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be.
Numbers16:45 “Mite ɖa le ame siawo gbɔ
Numbers16:46 Mose gblɔ na Aron be
Numbers16:47 Aron wɔ nu si Mose ɖo nɛ. Eƒu du yi ameawo dome
Numbers16:48 Etsi tsitre ɖe ame kukuawo kple agbagbeawo dome
Numbers16:49 ke ame akpe wuiene alafa adre (14
Numbers16:50 Aron trɔ va Mose gbɔ le agbadɔ la ƒe mɔnu. Ale dɔvɔ̃ la nu tso.
Numbers17:1 Emegbe la
Numbers17:2 “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be
Numbers17:3 Ele be Aron ƒe ŋkɔ nanɔ Levi ƒe viwo ƒe to la tɔ dzi.
Numbers17:4 Tsɔ atikplɔ siawo da ɖe agbadɔ la ƒe xɔ emetɔ me
Numbers17:5 Mawɔ atikplɔ siawo ŋu dɔ be made dzesi ame si metia
Numbers17:6 Ale Mose gblɔ nya la na Israelviwo. Kplɔlawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe
Numbers17:7 Mose tsɔ atikplɔawo da ɖe Yehowa ŋkume le agbadɔ la ƒe xɔ emetɔ me.
Numbers17:8 Esi ŋu ke wòyi la
Numbers17:9 Esi Mose kɔ atikplɔawo tso Yehowa ƒe ŋkume do goe va fia Israelviwo la
Numbers17:10 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be wòatsɔ Aron ƒe atikplɔ la ada ɖe nubablaɖaka la xa
Numbers17:11 Ale Mose wɔ nu siwo Yehowa ɖo nɛ.
Numbers17:12 Israelviwo gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers17:13 Ame sia ame si ate ɖe Yehowa ƒe agbadɔ la ŋu la
Numbers18:1 Yehowa ƒo nu na Aron azɔ gblɔ be
Numbers18:2 Kplɔ nɔviwò
Numbers18:3 Woawɔ dɔ le wò kpɔkplɔ te
Numbers18:4 Woanɔ ŋuwò awɔ dɔ
Numbers18:5 “Ɖo ŋku edzi be
Numbers18:6 Megale egblɔm be
Numbers18:7 Ke wò kple viwò ŋutsuwo
Numbers18:8 Yehowa gade se siawo na Aron. “Metsɔ nunana siwo katã Israelviwo tsɔna vɛ na Yehowa la na nunɔlawo. Nunana siwo katã wotsɔna naa Yehowa to wo nyenye le vɔsamlekpui la ŋgɔ me la nye wò kple viwò ŋutsuwo tɔ le se mavɔ la nu.
Numbers18:9 Nuɖuvɔsawo
Numbers18:10 Ŋutsuwo koe aɖu wo
Numbers18:11 “Nunana bubuawo katã si Israelviwo anam to wo nyenye le vɔsamlekpui la ŋgɔ me la nye wò kple wò ƒometɔwo
Numbers18:12 “Nenema ke kutsetse gbãtɔ siwo ameawo atsɔ vɛ na Yehowa abe ami
Numbers18:13 kple nuɖuɖu ɖe sia ɖe ene la hã nye mia tɔ. Miaƒe ƒometɔwo aɖu esiawo negbe ɖeko wo ŋuti mekɔ le ɣe ma ɣi me o.
Numbers18:14 “Nu sia nu si le Israel
Numbers18:15 Vi gbãtɔ ɖe sia ɖe
Numbers18:16 Ne woxɔ ɣleti ɖeka la
Numbers18:17 “Ke womaxe fe ɖe nyiwo
Numbers18:18 Lã siawo ƒe lã nye mia tɔ hekpe ɖe woƒe akɔ kple ɖusita
Numbers18:19 Ɛ̃
Numbers18:20 Yehowa gblɔ na Aron be
Numbers18:21 “Metsɔ Israelviwo ƒe nuwo ƒe ewolia na Levi ƒe viwo abe woƒe domenyinu ene le woƒe dɔ si wowɔna le agbadɔ me la ta.
Numbers18:22 Tso azɔ dzi heyina la
Numbers18:23 Levi ƒe viwo koe awɔ dɔ le agbadɔ la ŋu. Woaɖi fɔ ne wogbe dɔ wɔwɔ le afi ma. Esia nye se na mi tegbetegbe be nunɔamesi aɖeke manɔ Levi ƒe vi aɖeke si le Israelnyigba dzi o
Numbers18:24 elabena Israelviwo ƒe nuwo ƒe ewolia si wotsɔ na Yehowa to wo nyenye le vɔsamlekpui la ŋgɔ me la anye Levi ƒe viwo tɔ. Eya ta megblɔ na wo be
Numbers18:25 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers18:26 “Ƒo nu na Levi ƒe viwo
Numbers18:27 Yehowa axɔ nu sia na mi abe miaƒe lu kple waintsetse gbãtɔwo ƒe nunana ene
Numbers18:28 Ale miawo hã miana nu Yehowa tso nu ewolia siwo katã miexɔ tso Israelviwo gbɔ la me. Tso nu ewolia siawo me la
Numbers18:29 Ele be miatsɔ nu sia nu si wona la ƒe akpa nyuitɔ kple kɔkɔetɔ ana Yehowa abe eƒe ɖuƒe ene.’
Numbers18:30 “Gblɔ na Levi ƒe viwo be
Numbers18:31 Aron kple via ŋutsuwo kple eƒe ƒometɔwo aɖui le woƒe aƒewo me alo le teƒe ɖe sia ɖe si adze wo ŋu
Numbers18:32 Mi
Numbers19:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron be
Numbers19:2 “Esiae nye se si Yehowa de. Migblɔ na Israelviwo be woatsɔ nyinɔ dzĩ si ŋu kpɔtsɔtsɔ aɖeke mele o
Numbers19:3 Mitsɔe na nunɔla Eleazar
Numbers19:4 Ekema nunɔla Eleazar ade eƒe asibidɛ ʋu la me
Numbers19:5 Le esia megbe la
Numbers19:6 Nunɔla Eleazar atsɔ sedati kple kakle ƒe alɔdze kple ka dzĩ ada ɖe dzo la me.
Numbers19:7 Le esia megbe la
Numbers19:8 Ame si tɔ dzo lã la hã anya eƒe awuwo
Numbers19:9 “Ekema ame si ŋu kɔ la
Numbers19:10 Ame si ƒo ƒu nyinɔ la ƒe afi la anya eƒe awuwo
Numbers19:11 “Ame sia ame si ka asi ame kuku ŋu la ŋuti makɔ o ŋkeke adre.
Numbers19:12 Ele be wòakɔ eɖokui ŋuti le ŋkeke etɔ̃lia kple adrelia gbe kple tsi
Numbers19:13 Ame sia ame si aka asi ame kuku aɖe ŋu
Numbers19:14 “Se siwo dzi woawɔ ne ŋutsu aɖe ku le agbadɔ aɖe me la woe nye esiawo: Ame sia ame si ge ɖe agbadɔ la me kple ame siwo nɔ agbadɔ la me ɣe ma ɣi la ŋuti mekɔ o ŋkeke adre.
Numbers19:15 Nu sia nu si nu nutunu mele o la ŋuti mekɔ o.
Numbers19:16 “Ne ame aɖe le gbedzi
Numbers19:17 “Hena amea ŋuti kɔkɔ la
Numbers19:18 Ekema ame si ŋuti kɔ la
Numbers19:19 Woawɔ nu sia le ŋkeke etɔ̃lia kple adrelia gbewo. Emegbe la
Numbers19:20 “Ke ne ame aɖe ŋuti mekɔ o
Numbers19:21 Esia nye se na mi tegbetegbe. Ele be ame si hlẽ tsi kɔkɔe la ɖe amea ŋu la nanya eƒe awuwo emegbe. Ame sia ame si ka asi tsi la ŋu la ŋu mekɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ.
Numbers19:22 Nu sia nu si ŋu ame si ŋuti mekɔ o la ka asii la ŋu makɔ o va se ɖe fiẽ.”
Numbers20:1 Israelviwo ɖo Zin gbedzi le ƒea ƒe ɣleti gbãtɔ me. Woƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Kades. Miriam ku
Numbers20:2 Tsi mebɔ ɖe afi ma na nono o
Numbers20:3 eye wowɔ takpekpe ɖe Mose kple Aron ŋu. Wodo ɣli ɖe Mose ta gblɔ be
Numbers20:4 Ɖe nèɖoe koŋ kplɔ Yehowa ƒe amewo va gbedzi le afi sia be míawo kple míaƒe lãhawo siaa natsrɔ̃!
Numbers20:5 Nu ka koŋkoŋkoŋ ta nèna míedzo le Egipte
Numbers20:6 Mose kple Aron wotrɔ le wo gbɔ yi Agbadɔ la ƒe mɔnu. Wotsyɔ mo anyi le Yehowa ŋkume. Tete Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ɖe eɖokui fia wo.
Numbers20:7 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers20:8 “Tsɔ Aron ƒe atikplɔ la. Mi kple Aron miƒo ameawo nu ƒu. Ƒo nu le ameawo ƒe ŋkume na agakpe si le afi mɛ ɖa la be wòana tsi nado tso eme; eye nàna tsi wo tso agakpe la me wòade na ameawo kple woƒe lãwo katã.”
Numbers20:9 Mose wɔ nu si Mawu ɖo nɛ. Etsɔ atikplɔ la tso afi si wòdzrae ɖo le Yehowa ŋkume.
Numbers20:10 Mose kple Aron woyɔ ameawo
Numbers20:11 Mose kɔ atikplɔ la dzi
Numbers20:12 Ke Yehowa gblɔ na Mose kple Aron be
Numbers20:13 Wona ŋkɔ teƒe sia be Meriba
Numbers20:14 Esi Mose nɔ Kades la
Numbers20:15 ale si mía tɔgbuiwo yi Egipte
Numbers20:16 Ke esi míedo ɣli na Yehowa la
Numbers20:17 Míeɖe kuku ɖe mɔ na mí míato wò anyigba dzi. Míakpɔ nyuie be míato miaƒe agblewo kple waingblewo me o. Míano tsi tso miaƒe vudowo me hã o. Míanɔ mɔ gã la dzi ko tẽe. Míadzo le mɔ gã la dzi o va se ɖe esime míado go le wò anyigba dzi.”
Numbers20:18 Ke Edom fia gblɔ na wo be
Numbers20:19 Israelviwo ƒe ame dɔdɔwo yi edzi be
Numbers20:20 Edom fia gbe gbidigbidi gblɔ na wo be
Numbers20:21 Esi Edom gbe be womato yeƒe anyigba dzi o ta la
Numbers20:22 Israelviwo ƒe ha blibo la ho
Numbers20:23 Le Hor to la gbɔ
Numbers20:24 “Azã la su be Aron naku
Numbers20:25 Azɔ

Numbers20:29 eye esi ameawo se be Aron ku la
Numbers21:1 Arad fia
Numbers21:2 Israelviwo ɖe adzɔgbe na Yehowa be
Numbers21:3 Yehowa se woƒe kokoƒoƒo
Numbers21:4 Israelviwo trɔ yi Hor to la dzi
Numbers21:5 Wode asi liʋĩliʋĩlilĩ me ɖe Mawu kple Mose ŋu be
Numbers21:6 Ale Yehowa dɔ da vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖe Israelviwo dome woɖu ame geɖewo
Numbers21:7 Ameawo va Mose gbɔ hedo ɣli be
Numbers21:8 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers21:9 Ale Mose wɔ akɔblida la
Numbers21:10 Israelviwo tso afi sia yi Obot. Woƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe afi ma.
Numbers21:11 Tso Obot la
Numbers21:12 Woƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Zered tɔʋu la ƒe balime.
Numbers21:13 Wotso eme yi Arnon tɔsisi la ƒe akpa kemɛ si te ɖe Amoritɔwo ƒe liƒo ŋu. Arnon tɔsisi lae nye liƒo le Moabtɔwo kple Amoritɔwo dome.
Numbers21:14 Eya ta woŋlɔ ɖe Yehowa ƒe Aʋawɔwɔwo ƒe Agbalẽ la me be
Numbers21:15 tɔʋu la me tsi
Numbers21:16 Tso afi sia la
Numbers21:17 Israel dzi ha be
Numbers21:18 Esiae nye vudo si amegãwo kple dukɔ la ƒe bubumewo tsɔ woƒe atikplɔwo kple woƒe atizɔtiwo ɖee la.” Wodzo le gbegbe la
Numbers21:19 eye woto Matana
Numbers21:20 eye woyi balime si le Moab ƒe togbɛwo te
Numbers21:21 Azɔ la
Numbers21:22 Woɖe kuku na fia la be
Numbers21:23 Fia Sixɔn gbe mɔɖeɖe na Israel be wòato eƒe anyigba dzi ayi o. Sixɔn ƒo eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la nu ƒu eye wòho aʋa ɖe Israel ŋu le gbedzi esi woɖo Yahaz.
Numbers21:24 Israelviwo ɖu wo dzi
Numbers21:25 Israelviwo xɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe duwo katã
Numbers21:26 Hesbon nye Sixɔn
Numbers21:27 Eya ta hakpala la gblɔ be
Numbers21:28 “Elabena dzo do tso Hesbon
Numbers21:29 baba na wò

Numbers22:20 Le zã me la

Numbers22:23 Esi tedzi la kpɔ Yehowa ƒe dɔla wòtsi tsitre ɖe mɔa dzi
Numbers22:24 Azɔ la
Numbers22:25 Esi tedzi la kpɔe wònɔ tsitre ɖe afi ma la
Numbers22:26 Mawudɔla la gayi ɖatsi tsitre ɖe teƒe aɖe
Numbers22:27 Ale tedzi la tsyɔ akɔ anyi ɖe mɔ la dzi. Balaam do dɔmedzoe vevie
Numbers22:28 Tete Yehowa na be tedzi la nate ŋu aƒo nu. Tedzi la bia Balaam be
Numbers22:29 Balaam do ɣli ɖe tedzi la ta be
Numbers22:30 Tedzi la gabiae be
Numbers22:31 Tete Yehowa ʋu Balaam ƒe ŋkuwo. Ekpɔ mawudɔla la wòtsi tsitre ɖe mɔa dzi
Numbers22:32 Mawudɔla la bia Balaam be
Numbers22:33 Wò tedzi la kpɔm zi etɔ̃
Numbers22:34 Balaam ʋu eme na mawudɔla la be
Numbers22:35 Mawudɔla la gblɔ nɛ be

Numbers23:1 Balaam gblɔ na Fia Balak be

Numbers23:4 Mawu do goe

Numbers23:6 Esi Balaam trɔ gbɔ la
Numbers23:7 Nya siwo Balaam gblɔ la woe nye: “Fia Balak
Numbers23:8 Ke ame siwo Mawu meƒo fi de o la

Numbers23:24 Ame siawo tsi tsitre abe dzatanɔ ene; womamlɔ anyi o. Va se ɖe esime woaɖu nu si wolé. Eye woano nu si wolé la ƒe ʋu!’ ”
Numbers23:25 Balak blu ɖe Balaam ta be
Numbers23:26 Balaam ɖo eŋu be

Numbers23:29 Balaam gagblɔ na Balak be wòatu vɔsamlekpui adre
Numbers23:30 Balak wɔ nu si Balaam ɖo nɛ la

Numbers24:5 “O! Yakob
Numbers24:6 “Wokeke abe balimewo ene. Wole abe amabɔ siwo le tɔsisi to ene. Wole abe aloe si Yehowa do ene. Wole abe sedati le tɔwo to ene.
Numbers24:7 Tsi asi tso woƒe tɔkpowo me. Tsi anɔ woƒe kuwo me fũu. “Woƒe fia axɔ ŋkɔ wu Agag. Woado woƒe fiaɖuƒe ɖe dzi.
Numbers24:8 “Mawu kplɔ wo do goe tso Egipte. Woƒe ŋusẽ le abe to ƒe ŋusẽ ene. Wovuvu dukɔ siwo tso ɖe wo ŋu
Numbers24:9 Wole adeklo dzi abe dzata ene

Numbers24:12 Balaam ɖo eŋu na Balak be
Numbers24:13 be ne Balak tsɔ klosalo kple sika de fiasã aɖe me wòyɔ kpikpikpi nam hã la
