Numbers26:1 Esi dɔvɔ̃ la nu tso la
Numbers26:2 “Mixlẽ Israelvi siwo katã xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema ne miakpɔ ame siwo ate ŋu ayi aʋa tso to ɖe sia ɖe kple hlɔ̃ ɖe sia ɖe me.”
Numbers26:3 Ale le Moab tagba
Numbers26:4 “Mixlẽ ŋutsu siwo xɔ ƒe blaeve alo wu nenema
Numbers26:5 Ruben nye Israel ƒe ŋgɔgbevi. Ruben ƒe viwoe nye Hanok
Numbers26:6 Hezron
Numbers26:7 Esiawoe nye Ruben ƒe hlɔ̃metɔwo; ame siwo wotia xlẽ le wo me la le ame akpe blaene-vɔ-etɔ̃
Numbers26:8 Palu ƒe vie nye Eliab
Numbers26:9 eye Eliab ƒe viwoe nye Nemuel
Numbers26:10 Eya ta anyigba ke nu mi wo
Numbers26:11 Ke hã la
Numbers26:12 Simeon ƒe viŋutsuwo kple hlɔ̃ siwo dzɔ tso wo me la woe nye: Nemuel
Numbers26:13 Zera
Numbers26:14 Simeon ƒe hlɔ̃metɔwo ƒe xexlẽme le ame akpe blaeve-vɔ-eve
Numbers26:15 Gad ƒe viŋutsuwo kple hlɔ̃ siwo dzɔ tso wo me la woe nye: Zefon
Numbers26:16 Ozni
Numbers26:17 Arɔd
Numbers26:18 Esiawoe nye Gad ƒe viŋutsuwo
Numbers26:19 Yuda ƒe viwoe nye Er kple Onan
Numbers26:20 Yuda ƒe viŋutsuwo kple hlɔ̃ siwo dzɔ tso wo me la woe nye: Sela
Numbers26:21 Perez ƒe viŋutsuwoe nye: Hezron
Numbers26:22 Ame siwo wotia xlẽ le Yuda ƒe ƒome me la le ame akpe blaadre-vɔ-ade
Numbers26:23 Isaka ƒe viŋutsuwo kple hlɔ̃ siwo dzɔ tso wo me woe nye: Tola
Numbers26:24 Yasub
Numbers26:25 Ame siwo wotia xlẽ le Isaka ƒe hlɔ̃ me la le ame akpe blaade-vɔ-ene alafa etɔ̃ (64
Numbers26:26 Zebulon ƒe viŋutsuwo le woƒe towo nue nye: Sered
Numbers26:27 Ame siwo wotia xlẽ le Zebulon ƒe ƒome me la le ame akpe blaade
Numbers26:28 Yosef ƒe viwoe nye Manase kple Efraim:
Numbers26:29 Manase ƒe viŋutsuwoe nye: Makir
Numbers26:30 Gilead ƒe viŋutsuwo kple woƒe hlɔ̃woe nye esiawo. Yezer
Numbers26:31 Asriel
Numbers26:32 Semida
Numbers26:33 (Zelofehad
Numbers26:34 Esiawoe nye Manase ƒe hlɔ̃metɔwo
Numbers26:35 Efraim ƒe viŋutsuwo kple hlɔ̃ siwo dzɔ tso wo me la woe nye: Sutela
Numbers26:36 Sutela vi nye Eran
Numbers26:37 Ame siawoe nye Efraim ƒe viŋutsuwo. Ame siwo wotia xlẽ la le ame akpe blaetɔ̃-vɔ-eve
Numbers26:38 Benyamin ƒe viŋutsuwo kple hlɔ̃ siwo dzɔ tso wo me la woe nye: Bela
Numbers26:39 Sefufam
Numbers26:40 Bela viwoe nye Ard kple Naaman: Ard
Numbers26:41 Esiawoe nye Benyamin ƒe hlɔ̃metɔwo
Numbers26:42 Dan viwoe nye esi le woƒe ƒome nu: Suham
Numbers26:43 Wo katã nye Suham hlɔ̃ si ƒe xexlẽme nye ame akpe blaade-vɔ-ene
Numbers26:44 Aser ƒe viŋutsuwo kple woƒe hlɔ̃woe nye: Imna
Numbers26:45 Woma Beria hlɔ̃ la ɖe akpa eve me: Heber hlɔ̃ si dzɔ tso Beria ƒe viŋutsu Heber me
Numbers26:46 Aser ƒe vinyɔnu ŋkɔe nye Sera.
Numbers26:47 Ame siwo wotia xlẽ le Aser ƒe viwo ƒe hlɔ̃ me la le ame akpe blaatɔ̃-vɔ-etɔ̃
Numbers26:48 Naftali ƒe viŋutsuwo kple woƒe hlɔ̃woe nye: Yahzil
Numbers26:49 Yezer
Numbers26:50 Ame siwo wotia xlẽ le Naftali ƒe hlɔ̃ me la nye ame akpe blaene-vɔ-atɔ̃
Numbers26:51 Ale Israel ŋutsu siwo katã ate ŋu ade aʋa la de ame akpe alafa ade kple ɖeka
Numbers26:52 Azɔ Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers26:53 “Wòama anyigba la ɖe to vovovoawo dome le toawo me tɔwo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ nu
Numbers26:54 To siwo me amewo sɔ gbɔ le la
Numbers26:55 Yehowa ɖo na Mose be
Numbers26:56 Woama domenyinu ɖe sia ɖe to akɔdada me ɖe to gãwo kple to suewo siaa dome.”
Numbers26:57 Levi ƒe viwo ƒe hlɔ̃ siwo me woxlẽ ame le le amexexlẽa me la kple ame siwo me wodzɔ tso la woe nye: Gerson dzi Gerson hlɔ̃; Kohat dzi Kohat hlɔ̃; Merari dzi Merari hlɔ̃.
Numbers26:58 Levi ƒomea me tɔwoe nye
Numbers26:59 Amram srɔ̃ ŋkɔe nye Yohebed
Numbers26:60 Aron ƒe viŋutsuwoe nye Nadab
Numbers26:61 Nadab kple Abihu woku esi wodo dzudzɔ makɔmakɔ na Yehowa.)
Numbers26:62 Levi ƒe vi siwo katã woxlẽ wonye ŋutsuwo
Numbers26:63 Ale esiae nye Israelvi siwo Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar tia xlẽ le Moab gbegbe le Yɔdan tɔsisi la to le Yeriko kasa.
Numbers26:64 Wo dometɔ ɖeka gɔ̃ hã menɔ ame siwo Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar xlẽ esime woxlẽ Israelviwo le Sinai gbegbe la dome o.
Numbers26:65 Elabena Yehowa gblɔ na Israelvi mawo be

Numbers27:2 Gbe ɖeka la

Numbers27:6 eye Yehowa gblɔ nɛ be

Numbers28:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose be
Numbers28:2 “De se sia na Israelviwo
Numbers28:3 Ne miedi be yewoasa dzovɔ nam la
Numbers28:4 Woatsɔ alẽvi ɖeka asa vɔe le ŋdi me
Numbers28:5 Woatsɔ nuɖuvɔsanu
Numbers28:6 Esia nye dzovɔsa si meɖo na mi le Sinai to la dzi be miatsɔ wo nam le ɣeyiɣi ɖoɖoawo dzi
Numbers28:7 Woatsɔ nunovɔsanu
Numbers28:8 Mitsɔ alẽvi evelia sa vɔe le fiẽ me
Numbers28:9 “Le Dzudzɔgbe la dzi la
Numbers28:10 Esia nye Dzudzɔgbe ɖe sia ɖe ƒe numevɔsa hekpe ɖe gbe sia gbe ƒe numevɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋu.”
Numbers28:11 “Hekpe ɖe esiawo ŋuti la
Numbers28:12 Nu siwo woatsɔ akpe ɖe vɔsalã siawo ŋu lae nye: wɔ memee lita ade kple afã
Numbers28:13 eye woatsɔ wɔ memee si wobaka kple ami lita eve abe nuɖuvɔsa ene la akpe ɖe alẽvi ɖe sia ɖe ŋu. Woame vɔsa sia; ado dzidzɔ na Yehowa ŋutɔ.
Numbers28:14 Woatsɔ nunovɔsa si nye wain lita eve la akpe ɖe nyitsu la ŋu
Numbers28:15 “Emegbe la
Numbers28:16 “Woaɖu Yehowa ƒe Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wuienelia gbe le ƒe ɖe sia ɖe me. Miaɖu Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la atsɔ ɖo ŋku gbe si gbe mawudɔla la dze to Israelviwo ƒe viŋutsu gbãtɔwo ŋu
Numbers28:17 Ne ŋu ke la
Numbers28:18 Le ŋkekenyui sia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ gbe la
Numbers28:19 Miatsɔ nyitsuvi eve
Numbers28:20 Misa numevɔ kple wɔ memee lita ade kple afã si wobaka kple ami la kpe ɖe nyitsu ɖe sia ɖe ŋu
Numbers28:21 eye miatsɔ wɔ ma lita eve akpe ɖe alẽviawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers28:22 Ele be miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka hã asa nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔe
Numbers28:23 Vɔsa siawo akpe ɖe gbe sia gbe ƒe vɔ siwo miesana la ŋuti.
Numbers28:24 Miasa vɔ sia ke le Ŋkekenyui la ƒe ŋkeke adreawo ɖe sia ɖe gbe. Woadze Yehowa ŋu ŋutɔ.
Numbers28:25 Le ŋkeke adrea gbe la
Numbers28:26 “Le kutsetse gbãtɔwo ƒe Ŋkekenyui si woyɔna be Kɔsiɖawo ƒe Ŋkekenyui alo Pentekoste ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔa gbe la
Numbers28:27 Woasa numevɔ tɔxɛ si adze Yehowa ŋu ŋutɔ la gbe ma gbe kple nyitsuvi eve
Numbers28:28 Miatsɔ nuɖuvɔsa si wowɔ kple wɔ memee si wobaka kple ami lita ade kple afã akpe ɖe nyitsu ɖe sia ɖe ŋu
Numbers28:29 wɔ memee lita eve nakpe ɖe alẽvi adreawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers28:30 Hekpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la
Numbers28:31 Vɔsa tɔxɛ siawo akpe ɖe numevɔ
Numbers29:1 “Woaɖu Kpẽwo ƒe Ŋkekenyui le ƒe sia ƒe ƒe ɣleti adrelia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔa gbe. Ameawo katã awɔ takpekpe kɔkɔe aɖe gbe ma gbe
Numbers29:2 Gbe ma gbe la
Numbers29:3 Tsɔ nuɖuvɔsa si wowɔ kple wɔ memee lita ade kple afã si wobaka kple ami la akpe ɖe nyitsu la ŋu
Numbers29:4 eye nàtsɔ wɔ memee lita eve akpe ɖe alẽvi adreawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers29:5 Hekpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la
Numbers29:6 Vɔsa tɔxɛ siawo akpe ɖe ɣleti sia ɣleti ƒe numevɔ siwo miesana ɖaa la ŋuti gbe ma gbe abe ɣleti yeye ƒe numevɔsa ene. Miawɔ esia akpe ɖe gbe sia gbe ƒe numevɔsa
Numbers29:7 “Le ŋkeke ewo megbe la
Numbers29:8 Gbe ma gbe la
Numbers29:9 Sa nuɖuvɔ kple wɔ memee lita ade kple afã si wobaka kple ami la kpe ɖe nyitsu la ŋu kple wɔ memee lita ene kple afã kpe ɖe agbo la ŋu
Numbers29:10 eye wɔ memee lita eve akpe ɖe alẽvi adreawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers29:11 Ele be miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa hã. Esia akpe ɖe avuléŋkeke la ƒe nu vɔ̃ vɔsa si miesana ƒe sia ƒe le ŋkeke ma dzi la ŋuti
Numbers29:12 “Le ŋkeke atɔ̃ megbe la
Numbers29:13 Miaƒe gbe ma gbe ƒe numevɔsa tɔxɛ la ado dzidzɔ gã ŋutɔ na Yehowa. Miasa vɔ sia kple nyitsuvi wuietɔ̃
Numbers29:14 Miatsɔ nu siawo akpe ɖe miaƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe numevɔsa kple nuɖuvɔsa la ŋu ale: wɔ memee lita ade kple afã
Numbers29:15 eye wɔ memee lita eve nakpe ɖe alẽvi wuieneawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers29:16 Ele be miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa hã kpe ɖe miaƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe numevɔsa
Numbers29:17 “Le ŋkeke adre Ŋkekenyui sia ƒe ŋkeke evelia gbe la
Numbers29:18 kpe ɖe miaƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋu. Vɔsalã siawo nade blibo le go ɖe sia ɖe me.
Numbers29:19 Kpe ɖe miaƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe numevɔsa ŋu la
Numbers29:20 “Le Ŋkekenyui sia ƒe ŋkeke etɔ̃lia gbe la
Numbers29:21 Miatsɔ miaƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa akpe ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:22 Kpe ɖe miaƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe numevɔsa ŋuti la
Numbers29:23 “Le Ŋkekenyui sia ƒe ŋkeke enelia dzi la
Numbers29:24 Woatsɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:25 Ele be miatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nu vɔ̃ vɔsa hã kpe ɖe miaƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe numevɔsa
Numbers29:26 “Le ŋkeke atɔ̃lia gbe la
Numbers29:27 Sa nyitsuawo
Numbers29:28 Kpe ɖe esiawo ŋuti la
Numbers29:29 “Le Ŋkekenyui sia ƒe ŋkeke adelia gbe la
Numbers29:30 Mitsɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa kpe ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:31 Kpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la
Numbers29:32 “Le ŋkekenyui sia ƒe ŋkeke adrelia gbe la
Numbers29:33 Mitsɔ vɔsa siawo kpe ɖe miaƒe nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:34 Migasa nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔ kple gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka kpe ɖe miaƒe nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa kple miaƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe vɔsawo ŋuti.
Numbers29:35 “Le ŋkeke enyia gbe la
Numbers29:36 Mitsɔ nyitsuvi ɖeka
Numbers29:37 Miawɔ nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ɖe nyitsu la
Numbers29:38 Mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa vɔe kpe ɖe nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa ŋu abe nu vɔ̃ ŋuti vɔsa ene kpe ɖe miaƒe gbe sia gbe vɔsawo ŋu.
Numbers29:39 “Ele na mi be miasa vɔ siawo le miaƒe ƒe sia ƒe Ŋkekenyuiɖuɣiwo dzi kpe ɖe miaƒe adzɔgbeɖevɔsawo
Numbers29:40 Ale Mose de se siawo katã na Israelviwo.
Numbers30:1 Mose gblɔ na Israelviwo ƒe towo ƒe tatɔwo be
Numbers30:2 Ne ame aɖe ɖe adzɔgbe na Yehowa alo ka atam hetsri nane na eɖokui la
Numbers30:3 “Ne nyɔnu aɖe
Numbers30:4 eye fofoa nya nu tso ɖetugbi la ƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe la kple tohehe siwo ku ɖe adzɔgbeɖeɖe la ŋuti ŋu
Numbers30:5 Ke ne fofoa melɔ̃ ɖe adzɔgbeɖeɖe la dzi o
Numbers30:6 “Ne nyɔnu aɖe ɖe adzɔgbe alo do ŋugbe dzodzro aɖe hafi va ɖe srɔ̃ la
Numbers30:7 ne srɔ̃ŋutsu la se nya la

Numbers30:13 Ale srɔ̃ŋutsu ate ŋu alɔ̃ adzɔgbeɖeɖe la nabla srɔ̃a loo alo agbe
Numbers30:14 Ke ne ŋutsu la megblɔ nya aɖeke o

Numbers35:1 Esi Israelviwo ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yɔdan tɔsisi la to
Numbers35:2 “Na Israelviwo natsɔ du tɔxɛ aɖewo kple lãnyiƒe siwo ƒo xlã wo la ana Levi ƒe viwo abe woƒe domenyinu ene.
Numbers35:3 Woƒe aƒewo anɔ du siawo me

Numbers35:6 “Mitsɔ Sitsoƒedu adeawo na Levi ƒe viwo. Ne ame aɖe wu ame le nu maɖowɔ me

Numbers35:13 Du ade siawo si miena la anye miaƒe Sitsoƒeduwo.
Numbers35:14 Mina du etɔ̃ nanɔ Yɔdan ƒe akpa sia
Numbers35:15 Du siawo manye sitsoƒewo na Israelviwo ɖeɖe ko o
Numbers35:16 “ ‘Ke ne ame aɖe axlã gakpo aɖe ɖe nɔvia wòaku la
Numbers35:17 Ne woƒu kpe gã aɖe ame aɖe wòku la
Numbers35:18 Nenema kee woawɔ ame si atsɔ nu si wowɔ kple ati la aƒo nɔvia wòaku.
Numbers35:19 Hlɔ̃biala la nawu hlɔ̃dola la ne edo goe.
Numbers35:20 Ale ne ame aɖe le fuléle ta
Numbers35:21 alo tu kɔe kple dɔmedzoe wòku la
Numbers35:22 “ ‘Gake ne fuléle mele amea me o
Numbers35:23 alo ne mekpɔe o
Numbers35:24 woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnui
Numbers35:25 Ne wotso nya me be nyadzɔɖeamedzi koe la
Numbers35:26 “ ‘Ne hlɔ̃dola la do go le sitsoƒedu la me
Numbers35:27 eye hlɔ̃biala la kpɔe le du la godo hewui la
Numbers35:28 elabena ɖe wòle be hlɔ̃dola la nanɔ sitsoƒedu la me va se ɖe esime nunɔlagã la naku hafi. Ke le nunɔlagã la ƒe ku megbe la
Numbers35:29 “ ‘Esiawoe nye se siwo dzi Israelviwo katã nawɔ tso dzidzime yi dzidzime.
Numbers35:30 “ ‘Ele be woawu hlɔ̃dolawo katã
Numbers35:31 “ ‘Ne wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnu ame aɖe
Numbers35:32 “ ‘Nenema ke womaxɔ naneke le hlɔ̃dola si yi sitsoƒedu aɖe me la si
Numbers35:33 “ ‘Ale womagblẽ kɔ ɖo na anyigba la o
Numbers35:34 Migado ŋunyɔ anyigba si dzi nɔ ge miala la o

Numbers36:2 Wogblɔ be

Numbers36:4 eye womatrɔe na mí le Aseyetsoƒe la me o.”

Deuteronomy1:1 Nya siawo Mose gblɔ na Israelviwo katã le Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe go kemɛ dzi le gbedzi

Deuteronomy16:2 Wò Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la ƒe vɔsa nanye alẽwo loo alo nyiwo
Deuteronomy16:3 Miɖu vɔsalã la kple abolo maʋamaʋã. Ɖu abolo maʋamaʋã ŋkeke adre abe ŋkuɖoɖo abolo si mieɖu esi mienɔ sisim tso Egipte la dzi ene. Esia naɖo ŋku edzi na wò be

Deuteronomy16:7 Me lã la
Deuteronomy16:8 Le ŋkeke ade siwo adze eyome me la
Deuteronomy16:9 “Ne èdze wò nukuwo xaxa gɔme
Deuteronomy16:10 àgaɖu ŋkekenyui bubu le Yehowa

Deuteronomy16:15 Ɖu ŋkekenyui sia le kɔkɔeƒe

Deuteronomy25:10 Tso gbe ma gbe dzi la

Deuteronomy25:16 Ame siwo katã baa wo nɔviwo to nudanu kple dzidzeka mademadewo ŋu dɔ wɔwɔ me la nye ŋunyɔnu le Yehowa

Deuteronomy26:4 Nunɔla la axɔ kusi la le asiwò ada ɖe Yehowa wò Mawu ƒe vɔsamlekpui la dzi.

Deuteronomy27:4 “Ne ètso Yɔdan tɔsisi la la

Deuteronomy27:6 Tu vɔsamlekpui la kple kpe siwo womekpa o
Deuteronomy27:7 “Sa ŋutifafavɔ hã ɖe edzi

Deuteronomy28:2 eye yayra siawo katã agbã go ɖe dziwò ne àɖo to Yehowa
Deuteronomy28:3 Woayra wò le du me kple agble me siaa.
Deuteronomy28:4 Woayra wò alimeviwo
Deuteronomy28:5 Woayra wò kusi kple wò amɔze.
Deuteronomy28:6 Woayra wò ne èva aƒe me kple ne èdo go.
Deuteronomy28:7 “Yehowa aɖu wò futɔwo dzi le ŋgɔwò. Woaƒo ƒu alũ ɖe dziwò
Deuteronomy28:8 Yehowa ayra wò kple nuku nyuiwo kple nyi siwo ƒe lãme nyo. Ana nàkpɔ dzidzedze le nu sia nu si nàwɔ ne èva ɖo anyigba si Yehowa
Deuteronomy28:9 “Yehowa wò Mawu atrɔ wò nàzu dukɔ kɔkɔe na eɖokui abe ale si wòdo ŋugbe be yeawɔ ne ànya wɔ ɖe yeƒe sewo dzi

Deuteronomy28:30 “Ŋutsu bubu sãa aɖe nyɔnu si ta nèbia

Deuteronomy28:33 Didiƒe dukɔ aɖe si ƒe ŋkɔ mèse kpɔ gɔ̃ hã o la aɖu wò agblemenuku siwo nèƒã kple kutrikuku geɖe. Woate wò ɖe anyi

Deuteronomy28:42 Ʋetsuviwo agblẽ wò atiwo kple wò waingblewo.

Deuteronomy28:52 Dukɔ ma aɖe to ɖe wò duwo

Deuteronomy28:54 Nublanuikpɔnamela gãtɔ siwo le dowòme la asẽ ŋuta le eya ŋutɔ nɔvia ŋutsu
Deuteronomy28:55 Mana viawo ƒe lã si ɖum wòanɔ hã wo o

Deuteronomy32:5 Ke Israel gblẽ: nu vɔ̃ blibae. Meganye Mawu tɔ o. Ezu dukɔ kɔlialiatɔ kple dzidzime gɔglɔ̃.

Deuteronomy32:16 Edo dɔmedzoe ŋutɔ ɖe woƒe dzromawuwo subɔsubɔ ta; eʋã ŋu ɖe eƒe dukɔ ta.
Deuteronomy32:17 Israel sa vɔ na trɔ̃wo
Deuteronomy32:18 Eɖe kɔ ɖa le Agakpe si wɔe la ŋu ŋlɔ be be Mawue wɔ ye.
Deuteronomy32:19 Yehowa kpɔ nu si wɔm Israel le; elé fu Israel ŋutɔŋutɔ. Via ŋutsuwo kple via nyɔnuwo do vloe.
Deuteronomy32:20 Eye wògblɔ be
Deuteronomy32:21 Wona meʋã ŋu woƒe legbawo ŋutɔ
Deuteronomy32:22 Elabena nye dɔmedzoe do dzo aɖe si bina dea anyigba ƒe tume ke. Ebia anyigba kple eƒe nukuwo katã
Deuteronomy32:23 “Mali ke dzɔgbevɔ̃e ɖe edzi matee kple nye aŋutrɔ aƒu anyi.
Deuteronomy32:24 Mana dɔwuame
Deuteronomy32:25 Futɔwo ƒe yiwo le dua godo
Deuteronomy32:26 Maka eƒe amewo ahlẽ ale be ame aɖeke magaɖo ŋku wo dzi gɔ̃ hã o.
Deuteronomy32:27 Ke mebu eŋu hekpɔ be
Deuteronomy32:28 Israel nye abunɛdukɔ aɖe bometsitsi ɖe nunya le tagbɔ nɛ.
Deuteronomy32:29 O! Nunyalawo woanye hafi anye ne woase nu gɔme; anye ne woanya nu tso nu si me woɖo tae la ŋu!
Deuteronomy32:30 Aleke wɔ futɔ ɖeka pɛ anya wo dometɔ akpe ɖeka eye futɔ eve ko nanya akpe ewo? Ne menye woƒe Agakpee ɖe asi le wo ŋu
Deuteronomy32:31 Ke dukɔ bubuawo ƒe agakpe mele abe míaƒe Agakpe la ene o; gbedodoɖa na woƒe mawuwo nye nu dzodzro ko!
Deuteronomy32:32 Woƒe wainkawo nye Sodom wainkawo eye Gomora gblewo me wotso. Woƒe waintsetse nye aɖi
Deuteronomy32:33 Woƒe wainwo nye da ƒe aɖiwo kple ƒli ƒe veve.
Deuteronomy32:34 Ke Israel nye dukɔ tɔxɛ; metre enu abe kpe xɔasiwo ene ɖe nye nudzraɖoƒe.
Deuteronomy32:35 Tɔnyee nye hlɔ̃biabia. Ɣeyiɣi hena nye tohehe eƒe futɔwo ɖo woƒe afɔwo ada; elabena woƒe tsɔtsrɔ̃ɣi ɖo!
Deuteronomy32:36 Yehowa axɔ na eƒe dukɔ
Deuteronomy32:37 Ekema Mawu abia be
Deuteronomy32:38 Afi ka mawu siwo wosaa vɔ na kple lãmi kple wain le azɔ? Mina mawu siawo natsi tsitre
Deuteronomy32:39 Miekpɔ be nye koe nye Mawu oa? Mewua ame
Deuteronomy32:40 Zi ale si wònye nyee Nye Mawu gbagbe la la
Deuteronomy32:41 be manyre nye yi dadzo la
Deuteronomy32:42 Woƒe ʋu atsyɔ le aŋutrɔ ŋu nye yi awu ame siwo katã tso ɖe ŋunye. Nyemakpɔ nublanui na ame siwo wɔa aʋa kplim o; abixɔlawo kple gamenɔlawo gɔ̃ hã aku.
Deuteronomy32:43 Dukɔwo
Deuteronomy32:44 Mose kple Yosua
Deuteronomy32:45 Esi Mose wu Mawu ƒe seawo fiafia Israel dukɔ blibo la nu vɔ la
Deuteronomy32:46 egblɔ na wo be
Deuteronomy32:47 Se siawo menye nya ƒuƒluwo ko o. Woawoe nye miaƒe agbe! Ne miewɔ ɖe se siawo dzi la
Deuteronomy32:48 Yehowa gblɔ na Mose gbe ma gbe ke be

Deuteronomy33:3 Elɔ̃ eƒe amewo ŋutɔ eƒe ame kɔkɔewo le eƒe asi me wole wò afɔtoƒe tom woxɔ woƒe ɖoɖowo tso gbɔwò.
Deuteronomy33:4 Wò se siwo mede na wo la
Deuteronomy33:5 Yehowa zu fia le Yesurun esime Israel ƒe towo kpe ta.

Deuteronomy33:9 Ewɔ wò ɖoɖowo dzi
Deuteronomy33:10 Levitɔwo afia Mose ƒe seawo Israel woasubɔ wò le dzudzɔdovɔsamlekpui kple numevɔsamlekpui la dzi.
Deuteronomy33:11 O! Yehowa
Deuteronomy33:12 Mose gblɔ tso Benyamin ŋu be
Deuteronomy33:13 Mose gblɔ tso Yosef ƒe to la ŋu be
Deuteronomy33:14 Yehowa nayrae kple nuku nyuitɔwo tso esiwo ɣe nana wotsina la dome wòana nuwoe fũu ɣleti sia ɣleti
Deuteronomy33:15 nuku siwo wɔna nyuie le towo dzi kple esiwo wɔna nyuie le togbɛwo dzi
Deuteronomy33:16 Yehowa nayrae kple nunana nyuitɔwo kple anyigbadzinu geɖewo
Deuteronomy33:17 Ele abe nyitsuvi ene Le ŋusẽ kple ɖekadzedze me. Eto dzo abe to ƒe dzowo ene; Wòawo wòatsɔ tu dukɔwo aƒu anyi le afi sia afi. Esiae nye nye yayra na Efraim ƒe ame akpe nanewo kple Manase tɔ akpe akpewo.”
Deuteronomy33:18 Mose gblɔ tso Zebulon ŋu be
Deuteronomy33:19 Woawoe akpe amewo be woaɖu yewoƒe vɔsanuwo kple yewo. Kpɔ ɖa
Deuteronomy33:20 Mose gblɔ tso Gad ŋu be
Deuteronomy33:21 Wotsɔ anyigba ƒe nyuiƒewo na wo ɖokuiwo; wotsɔ kplɔla ƒe ɖuƒewo na wo. Wowɔ Yehowa ƒe sewo kple ɖoɖowo dzi.”
Deuteronomy33:22 Mose gblɔ tso Dan ŋu be

Deuteronomy33:27 Mawu mavɔ lae nye wò sitsoƒe

Joshua4:3 eye nàgblɔ na wo be: woatsɔ kpe wuieve tso teƒe si tututu nunɔlaawo tsi tsitre ɖo le Yɔdan tɔsisi la titina; woatsɔ kpe wuieve siawo ayi ɖe teƒe si miaƒu asaɖa anyi ɖo le zã sia me.”
Joshua4:4 Ale Yosua yɔ ame wuieve siwo wòtia tso Israel ƒe to ɖe sia ɖe me
Joshua4:5 eye wògblɔ na wo be
Joshua4:6 Mitsɔ wo tu ŋkuɖodzikpe ale be ne mia viwo abia mi gbe aɖe gbe be
Joshua4:7 miagblɔ na wo be

Joshua4:10 Nunɔla siwo kɔ nubablaɖaka la
Joshua4:11 Esi ameawo katã tso tɔsisi la la vɔ la

Joshua4:14 Gbe ma gbe nye ŋkeke gã aɖe na Yosua
Joshua4:15 Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua be

Joshua4:17 Yosua wɔ ɖe Yehowa ƒe nya sia dzi
Joshua4:18 eye esi nunɔlawo ɖo afɔ tɔsisi la ƒe go kemɛ dzi ko la
Joshua4:19 Nukunu sia va eme le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi. Gbe ma gbe la
Joshua4:20 Wokɔ kpe wuieveawo tso Yɔdan tɔsisi la me tu ŋkuɖodzikpe ɖe afi ma.
Joshua4:21 Yosua gaɖe nu si ŋkuɖodzikpe la le fiafiam la gɔme na Israelviwo hegblɔ be
Joshua4:22 miagblɔ na wo be kpe siawo le ŋku ɖom nukunu gã si dzɔ esime Israel dukɔ la zɔ ƒuƒuiƒe hetso Yɔdan tɔsisi la dzi!

Joshua7:1 Ke Israelviwo wɔ nu vɔ̃ ɖe Yehowa ŋu. Woda le eƒe se si wòde na wo be woatsrɔ̃ nu sia nu negbe nu siwo woatsɔ ada ɖe Yehowa ƒe nudzraɖoƒe la ko dzi. Akan
Joshua7:2 Esi woxɔ Yeriko teti ko la
Joshua7:3 Ŋkutsalawo trɔ gbɔ va gblɔ na Yosua be
Joshua7:4 Ale woɖo aʋawɔla abe akpe etɔ̃ ene ko ɖa. Ke woɖu Israelviwo dzi bɔbɔe;
Joshua7:5 wowu Israelvi abe ame blaetɔ̃ vɔ ade ene le aʋakpekpe la me
Joshua7:6 Yosua kple Israel ƒe ametsitsiwo dze woƒe awuwo; wotsyɔ mo anyi ɖe Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la ŋgɔ
Joshua7:7 Yosua do ɣli na Yehowa be

Joshua7:11 Israelviwo wɔ nu vɔ̃

Joshua7:14 “ ‘Eya ta le ŋdi la
Joshua7:15 Ekema woatɔ dzo ame si da le sea dzi la ƒe nuwo kple nu sia nu si nye etɔ la
Joshua7:16 Ale esi ŋu ke ŋdi kanya la
Joshua7:17 Yosua kplɔ Yuda ƒe hlɔ̃wo vɛ ɖekaɖeka
Joshua7:18 Ale mlɔeba la
Joshua7:19 Yosua gblɔ na Akan be
Joshua7:20 Akan ɖo eŋu be
Joshua7:21 Mekpɔ awu nyui aɖe si woƒle tso Babilonia kple klosaloga home aɖe kpe ɖe sikakɔ aɖe ŋuti. Meɣla wo ɖe to me le nye agbadɔ me; klosalo la le nuawo te.”
Joshua7:22 Yosua ɖo ame aɖewo ɖa be woaɖadi nu fifiawo. Woƒu du yi Axan ƒe agbadɔ me
Joshua7:23 Wolɔ nuawo katã va da ɖe anyigba le Yosua ƒe afɔ nu.
Joshua7:24 Yosua kple Israelviwo katã kplɔ Akan
Joshua7:25 Yosua gblɔ na Axan le afi ma be
Joshua7:26 eye wofɔ kpewo li kɔ ɖe wo dzi. Kpeawo gale afi ma va se ɖe egbe. Wogayɔa teƒe la be “Dzɔgbevɔ̃e Ƒe Balime” va se ɖe egbe. Ale Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoe helĩhelĩ la nu tso.
Joshua8:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua be
Joshua8:2 Miatsrɔ̃ wo abe ale si mietsrɔ̃ Yeriko kple woƒe fia ene. Ke azɔ ya la
Joshua8:3 Ale Yosua dzra ɖo hena aʋahoho ɖe Ai ŋu kple eƒe aʋawɔlawo katã. Etia eƒe asrafo nyuitɔwo akpe blaetɔ̃ ɖo ɖa le zã me;
Joshua8:4 egblɔ na wo do ŋgɔ be
Joshua8:5 Egagblɔ na wo be
Joshua8:6 Ekema míade asi sisi me
Joshua8:7 Ekema miado tso afi si miede xa ɖo
Joshua8:8 Mitɔ dzo dua abe ale si Yehowa ɖo na mí ene. Esiawoe nye nye ɖoɖowo na mi.”
Joshua8:9 Ale wodze mɔ zã ma me yi ɖade xa ɖe Betel kple Ai ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe gome
Joshua8:10 Esi ŋu ke ŋdi kanya la
Joshua8:11 Yosua kple aʋawɔla siwo nɔ eŋu la yi ɖe dua ƒe agbo gãtɔ gbɔ
Joshua8:12 Eɣla ame abe akpe atɔ̃ ene ɖe dua ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe lɔƒo
Joshua8:13 Woɖo asrafoawo ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ŋu
Joshua8:14 Ai fia kpɔ Israelviwo ɖa le balime la godo
Joshua8:15 Yosua kple eƒe Israelviwo si to gbegbe la abe ɖe nugbe menyo na wo o ene.
Joshua8:16 Ale Ai fia ɖe gbe na eƒe asrafo siwo katã nɔ dua me la be woati Israelviwo yome. Ale dutaʋlilawo vɔ le dua me;
Joshua8:17 asrafo aɖeke kura meganɔ Ai alo Betel o. Gawu la
Joshua8:18 Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua be
Joshua8:19 Esi xadelawo kpɔ Yosua ƒe dzesia ko la
Joshua8:20 Aitɔwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo nye kɔ kpɔ megbe
Joshua8:21 Yosua kple Israelviwo katã kpɔ be yewoƒe amewo xɔ dua
Joshua8:22 Israelvi siwo nɔ Ai dua me la do go tso dua me
Joshua8:23 negbe Ai fia
Joshua8:24 Esi Israelviwo wu Aitɔ siwo nɔ dua godo vɔ la
Joshua8:25 Ale wowu ame akpe wuieve (12
Joshua8:26 Yosua lé eƒe akplɔ do ɖe Ai du la gbɔ va se ɖe esime wowu Aitɔ mamlɛa.
Joshua8:27 Aitɔwo ƒe lãwo kple kesinɔnuwo ko wometsrɔ̃ o
Joshua8:28 Ale Ai trɔ zu gli gbagbã siwo woli kɔe ɖi va se ɖe egbe.
Joshua8:29 Yosua de ka ve na Ai fia ɖe ati aɖe ŋu
Joshua8:30 Le esia megbe la
Joshua8:31 abe ale si Mose
Joshua8:32 Yosua ŋlɔ Mose ƒe Se Ewoawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ƒe kpeawo dzi le Israelviwo ŋkume.
Joshua8:33 Azɔ la
Joshua8:34 Yosua xlẽ yayranya kple fiƒodenya siwo katã Mose ŋlɔ ɖe Yehowa ƒe Segbalẽ la me la na wo.
Joshua8:35 Exlẽ se siwo katã Mose de na wo kpɔ la hã na ameha blibo la
Joshua9:1 Ale si Israelviwo ɖu dukɔwo dzi la va ɖo to me na fia aɖewo. Fia siawo ƒe dukɔwoe nye esiwo nɔ Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe
Joshua9:2 Dukɔ siawo ƒe aʋakɔwo wɔ ɖeka enumake hena aʋawɔwɔ kple Yosua kple Israelviwo.
Joshua9:3 Ke Gibeontɔwo
Joshua9:4 Eya ta woɖo be yewoaflu Yosua. Wodo agba na woƒe tedziwo kple kotoku xoxowo kple waingolo vuvuwo.
Joshua9:5 Wodo awu vuvuwo kple afɔkpa siwo te vuvu wogbugbɔ tɔ
Joshua9:6 Esi wova ɖo Israelviwo ƒe asaɖa me le Gilgal la
Joshua9:7 Israelviwo gblɔ na Hivitɔ siawo be
Joshua9:8 Woɖo eŋu be
Joshua9:9 Woɖo eŋu na Yosua be
Joshua9:10 kpakple nu si wòwɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe fia eveawo
Joshua9:11 eya ta míaƒe ametsitsiwo kple míaƒe amewo gblɔ na mí be
Joshua9:12 Woɖe abolo sia dzodzoe tso abolokpo me teti ko míedze mɔ
Joshua9:13 Waingolo siawo nye nu yeyewo
Joshua9:14 Amedzroawo na nuɖuɖu Israelviwo
Joshua9:15 Yosua wɔ ŋutifafa ƒe nubabla kple Gibeontɔwo
Joshua9:16 Nyateƒe la va dze go le ŋkeke etɔ̃ megbe be Gibeontɔwo ƒe nɔƒe te ɖe Israelviwo ŋu kpokploe.
Joshua9:17 Israelviwo ƒe aʋakɔ dze mɔ enumake be yeaku nya la gɔme
Joshua9:18 Ke Israelviwo metsrɔ̃ duawo o le adzɔgbe si Israelviwo ƒe kplɔlawo ɖe le Yehowa
Joshua9:19 Kplɔlawo ɖo eŋu be
Joshua9:20 Ele be míana woanɔ agbe
Joshua9:21 Ale Gibeontɔwo zu kluviwo na Israelviwo
Joshua9:22 Yosua yɔ Gibeon ƒe kplɔlawo
Joshua9:23 Fifia la
Joshua9:24 Gibeontɔwo ƒe kplɔlawo ɖo eŋu be
Joshua9:25 Ke azɔ la
Joshua9:26 Yosua meɖe mɔ na Israelviwo be woawu Gibeontɔwo o
Joshua9:27 ke boŋ wozu nakefɔlawo kple tsidulawo na Israelviwo. Woawoe adu tsi na Yehowa ƒe subɔsubɔdɔwɔwɔ le afi sia afi si woawɔ subɔsubɔdɔ le ko. Ɖoɖo sia gale edzi kokoko va se ɖe egbe.
Joshua10:1 Esi Adoni Zedek
Joshua10:2 vɔvɔ̃ gã aɖe ɖoe
Joshua10:3 eya ta Adoni Zedek
Joshua10:4 Fia Adoni Zedek gblɔ na wo be
Joshua10:5 Ale Amoritɔwo ƒe fia atɔ̃ siawo ƒo ƒu woƒe aʋakɔwo katã ɖekae be yewoaho aʋa ɖe Gibeontɔwo ŋu.
Joshua10:6 Gibeontɔwo ɖo ame ɖe Yosua le Gilgal enumake be
Joshua10:7 Yosua kple Israelviwo ƒe aʋakɔ la ho tso Gilgal
Joshua10:8 Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua be
Joshua10:9 Yosua kple Israelviwo ƒe aʋakɔ la zɔ mɔ zã blibo la tso Gilgal
Joshua10:10 Tete Yehowa na futɔwo vɔ̃ eye wotɔtɔ
Joshua10:11 Esi futɔwo nɔ sisim tso toawo dzi henɔ abu ɖim la
Joshua10:12 Esime Israelviwo nɔ Amoritɔwo nyam
Joshua10:13 Eye ɣe kple ɣleti siaa megaʋã o va se ɖe esime Israelviwo ƒe aʋakɔ la tsrɔ̃ eƒe futɔwo keŋkeŋ! Woŋlɔ nu geɖewo wu esia tso aʋa sia wɔwɔ ŋuti ɖe Yasar ƒe Agbalẽ me. Ale ɣe tɔ ɖe dziƒo abe gaƒoƒo blaeve-vɔ-ene sɔŋ ene!
Joshua10:14 Ŋkeke sia tɔgbi meva yi kpɔ o
Joshua10:15 Le esia megbe la
Joshua10:16 Amoritɔwo ƒe fia atɔ̃awo si le aʋa la me yi ɖaɣla wo ɖokuiwo ɖe agado aɖe me le Makeda.
Joshua10:17 Esime wona nyanya Yosua be wokpɔ fiawo la
Joshua10:18 eɖe gbe be woamli kpe gã aɖe axe agado la nu
Joshua10:19 Yosua ɖe gbe na aʋakɔ la be
Joshua10:20 Ale Yosua kple Israelʋakɔ la yi futɔwo wuwu dzi. Wotsrɔ̃ aʋakɔ atɔ̃awo katã negbe ame ʋɛ aɖewo koe te ŋu ɖo woƒe du siwo woɖo gli ƒo xlã la me.
Joshua10:21 Le esia megbe la
Joshua10:22 Yosua ɖe gbe be woaɖe kpe gã la ɖa le agado la nu
Joshua10:23 Ale woʋu agado la
Joshua10:24 Esi wokplɔ fia atɔ̃ siawo va Yosua gbɔ la
Joshua10:25 Yosua gblɔ na Israelviwo be
Joshua10:26 Tete Yosua tsɔ eƒe yi wu fia atɔ̃awo
Joshua10:27 Esime ɣe nɔ to ɖom la
Joshua10:28 Gbe ma gbe ke la
Joshua10:29 Tso afi sia la
Joshua10:30 Yehowa tsɔ du la kple fia la de asi na Israel le afi sia hã; wowu ame sia ame le dua me abe ale si wowɔ le Yeriko ene.
Joshua10:31 Israelviwo tso Libna
Joshua10:32 Yehowa tsɔ du sia hã na Israel le ŋkeke evelia dzi. Wowu ame sia ame le afi sia hã abe ale si wowɔ le Libna ene.
Joshua10:33 Esime Israelviwo nɔ aʋa wɔm le Lakis la
Joshua10:34 Yosua kple Israel katã dzo le Lakis heyi Eglon. Woɖe to ɖe du sia
Joshua10:35 Woxɔ du sia hã gbe ma gbe ke
Joshua10:36 Esi wodzo le Eglon la
Joshua10:37 Woxɔ du sia kple du sue siwo ƒo xlãe
Joshua10:38 Wotrɔ azɔ yi Debir.
Joshua10:39 Woɖu Debirtɔwo dzi enumake
Joshua10:40 Ale Yosua kple eƒe aʋakɔ la woɖu anyigba blibo la dzi; woɖu dukɔ siwo nɔ toawo dzi
Joshua10:41 Wowu wo tso Kades Barnea yi Gaza
Joshua10:42 Wowɔ nu siawo katã le aʋadzedze ɖeka pɛ ko me
Joshua10:43 Le dziɖuɖu siawo megbe la
Joshua11:1 Esi Yabin
Joshua11:2 kple fia siwo nɔ tonyigba la dzi le dziehe le Araba
Joshua11:3 Eɖo du ɖe Kanaan fia siwo nɔ Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe akpa eveawo dzi
Joshua11:4 Dukɔ siawo katã kplɔ woƒe aʋakɔwo vɛ
Joshua11:5 Woƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Merɔn tsi dzidzi la gbɔ.
Joshua11:6 Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua be
Joshua11:7 Yosua kple eƒe amewo va dze futɔwo dzi le vo me le Merɔn tsi dzidzi la gbɔ.
Joshua11:8 Yehowa tsɔ aʋakɔ gã ma de asi na Israelviwo
Joshua11:9 Yosua kple eƒe amewo tu ata na futɔwo ƒe sɔwo
Joshua11:10 Esi wotrɔ gbɔna la
Joshua11:11 Wowu ame sia ame le Hazor du la me
Joshua11:12 Yosua dze fia mamlɛawo ƒe du bubuawo dzi. Wowu ameawo katã abe ale si Mose gblɔe da ɖi xoxo la ene.
Joshua11:13 Ke Yosua metɔ dzo du siwo nɔ togbɛwo dzi la ya o
Joshua11:14 Israelviwo ha du siwo wotsrɔ̃ la ƒe nuwo kple lãwo na wo ɖokuiwo
Joshua11:15 elabena nenemae Yehowa ɖo na eƒe dɔla
Joshua11:16 Ale Yosua ɖu anyigba blibo la dzi. Exɔ Negeb kple Gosenyigba kple Araba kple Israel ƒe tonyigbawo kple sɔsɔeƒewo.
Joshua11:17 Ale Israelviwo ƒe anyigba keke azɔ tso keke Halak to la gbɔ te ɖe Seir ŋu yi Baal Gad le Lebanon ƒe balime le Hermon to la te. Yosua wu teƒe mawo ƒe fiawo katã.
Joshua11:18 Yosua tsɔ ƒe adre wɔ nu siawo katã.
Joshua11:19 Israelviwo mewɔ ŋutifafa kple du aɖeke me tɔwo o
Joshua11:20 elabena Yehowa ɖo be dukɔ mawo nadi be yewoawɔ aʋa boŋ kple Israelviwo ɖe ŋutifafawɔwɔ teƒe. Eya ta wotsrɔ̃ wo nublanuimakpɔmakpɔtɔe abe ale si Yehowa ɖo na Mose ene.
Joshua11:21 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Joshua11:22 Wo dometɔ aɖeke megasusɔ ɖe Israelnyigba dzi o
Joshua11:23 Ale Yosua xɔ anyigba blibo la abe ale si Yehowa ɖo na Mose ene. Etsɔe na Israelviwo abe woƒe domenyinu ene

Joshua12:3 Anyigba si tso Araba yi Galilea ƒu la ƒe ɣetoɖoƒeliƒo dzi heyi anyigbeme ɖatɔ Araba ƒu si nye (Dzeƒu la) heɖo ta Bet Yesimot
Joshua12:4 Woɖu Ɔg

Joshua12:6 Mose kple Israelviwo tsrɔ̃ ame siawo xoxo
Joshua12:7 Fia siwo ƒe anyigba Yosua kple Israelviwo xɔ le Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe la ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye esiwo gbɔna. Anyigba la tso Baal Gad le Lebanon ƒe balime yi Balak to la gbɔ le Seir to la ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe. Yosua tsɔ anyigba sia na Israelviwo ƒe to bubuawo me tɔwo.

Joshua13:1 Yosua tsi heku amegã azɔ
Joshua13:2 “Anyigba siwo kpɔtɔ la woe nye: “Filisti kple Gesur dukɔwo ƒe anyigba
Joshua13:3 si tso Sixor tɔsisi la gbɔ le Egipte ƒe liƒo dzi heyi anyiehe ke
Joshua13:4 le dziehe; Kanaantɔwo ƒe anyigba la katã gali kpe ɖe Ara
Joshua13:5 Gebalitɔwo ƒe anyigba kple Lebanonyigba blibo la ɖo ta ɣedzeƒe
Joshua13:6 “Sidontɔwo
Joshua13:7 eye nàmae na Israel ƒe to asiekɛawo kple Manase ƒe to afã la abe ale si meɖo na wò ene.”
Joshua13:8 Manase ƒe to la ƒe afã kple Ruben ƒe viwo kple Gad ƒe viwo xɔ woƒe domenyinu le Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe ɣedzeƒe xoxo
Joshua13:9 Woƒe anyigba la nye teƒe si tso Areor
Joshua13:10 Sixɔn
Joshua13:11 Gilead kple anyigba si nye Gesuritɔwo kple Makatitɔwo tɔ kple Hermon to la
Joshua13:12 kple Ɔg
Joshua13:13 Ke Israelviwo menya Gesuritɔwo alo Makatitɔwo o
Joshua13:14 Ale si woma anyigba na Israel ƒe to vovovoawo la yi ale: Levitɔwo: Mose mena anyigba aɖeke Levitɔwo o
Joshua13:15 Ruben ƒe to: Mose na anyigba Ruben ƒe to la ɖe ƒome siwo le to la me la ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ nu.
Joshua13:16 Ruben ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba tso Aroer le Arnon tɔsisi la ƒe balime ƒe toga
Joshua13:17 Du siwo nɔ afi ma la woe nye Hesbon kple du bubu siwo le gbadzaƒe: Dibon
Joshua13:18 Yaza
Joshua13:19 Kiriataim
Joshua13:20 Bet Peor
Joshua13:21 Du siwo nɔ togbɛwo dzi kple Fia Sixɔn ƒe fiaɖuƒe me la hã nɔ Ruben ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi. Sixɔn nye Amoritɔwo ƒe fia si nɔ Hesbon. Mose wu Fia Sixɔn kple Midian fia bubu siawo: Evi
Joshua13:22 Israelviwo hã wu afakala Balaam si nye Beor ƒe vi la hã.
Joshua13:23 Yɔdan tɔsisi lae nye Ruben ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba la ƒe liƒo le ɣedzeƒe lɔƒo.
Joshua13:24 Gad ƒe to: Mose na anyigba Gad ƒe viwo ƒe to la ɖe ƒome siwo le to la me ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ nu.
Joshua13:25 Yazer kple Gilead ƒe duwo katã kple Amonyigba ƒe afã heyi Aroer le Raba gbɔ nɔ Gad ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba la me.
Joshua13:26 Anyigba la gatso Hesbon yi Ramat Mizpa kple Betonim
Joshua13:27 Teƒe siwo le anyigba sia me le Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe balime la woe nye: Bet Haram
Joshua13:28 Esiawoe nye du siwo wotsɔ na ƒome siwo le Gad ƒe to la me abe woƒe domenyinu ene.
Joshua13:29 Mose na anyigba Manase viwo ƒe to la ƒe afã le woƒe ƒomewo nu.
Joshua13:30 Ena anyigba wo tso Mahanaim. Basan blibo si nye Fia Ɔg ƒe fiaɖuƒe kple Yair kple Basan ƒe du blaade nɔ to sia ƒe anyigba me.

Joshua13:32 Aleae Mose ma anyigba si le Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe ɣedzeƒe
Joshua13:33 Mose mena anyigba aɖeke Levitɔwo o
Joshua14:1 Esiae nye ale si woma Kanaanyigba si le Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe la na Israelviwoe. Nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua
Joshua14:2 Abe ale si Yehowa ɖo na Mose ene la
Joshua14:3 Mose tsɔ to eve kple afã ƒe domenyinu na wo le Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe ɣedzeƒe
Joshua14:4 elabena Yosef ƒe viwo va zu to eve
Joshua14:5 Ale wowɔ se si Yehowa de na Mose la dzi pɛpɛpɛ le anyigba la mama me.
Joshua14:6 Kaleb nɔ ŋgɔ na ame dɔdɔ aɖewo tso Yuda ƒe to la me
Joshua14:7 Mexɔ ƒe blaene ɣe ma ɣi. Mose dɔ mí tso Kades Barnea be míatsa ŋku le Kanaanyigba la dzi. Esi míegbɔ la
Joshua14:8 ke nɔvinye ŋkutsala bubuawo ya do vɔvɔ̃ na ameawo

Joshua15:1 Anyigba si wotsɔ na Yuda ƒe viwo la ƒe anyigbemeliƒo dze egɔme tso Edom ƒe dzigbemeliƒo dzi

Joshua15:3 ɖo ta dziehe tso Akrabim to dzi mɔ la gbɔ heyi Zin. Eɖo ta dziehe to Kades Barnea
Joshua15:4 eye wòyi Azmon. Eto tɔʋu si le Egipte ƒe liƒo dzi la ŋu heyi ɖatɔ Domeƒu la. Esia nye Yuda ƒe anyigbemeliƒo.
Joshua15:5 Ɣedzeƒeliƒo la tso Dzeƒu la ŋu yi Yɔdan tɔsisi la nu. Anyigbemeliƒo la dze egɔme tso afi si Yɔdan tɔsisi la de nu Dzeƒu la me le

Joshua15:10 ɖo ta Edom ƒe to Seir gbɔ

Joshua15:12 Ke ɣetoɖoƒeliƒo enye ƒu gã la kple eŋu nyigbawo. Esia nye Yudaviwo ƒe liƒo godoo va kpe le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
Joshua15:13 Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua be wòatsɔ Yuda ƒe anyigba ƒe akpa aɖe na Kaleb
Joshua15:14 Esia ta Kaleb nya Anak ƒe vi etɔ̃awo
Joshua15:15 eye wòwɔ aʋa kple ame siwo nɔ Debir
Joshua15:16 Kaleb gblɔ be yeatsɔ ye vinyɔnu Aksa na ŋutsu si awɔ aʋa aɖu Kiriat Sefer dua dzi.

Joshua16:6 eye wòtso afi ma yi Domeƒu la ŋu. Mixmetat nɔ eƒe anyiehe lɔƒo. Liƒo la bi ɖo ta ɣedzeƒe; edze le Taanat Silo ŋu le Yanoa ƒe ɣedzeƒe

Joshua17:7 Manase ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba ƒe anyigbemeliƒo ɖo ta anyigbeme lɔƒo tso Aser ƒe liƒo dzi yi Mixmetat
Joshua17:8 Tapuanyigba nye Manase ƒe viwo tɔ
Joshua17:9 Manase ƒe viwo ƒe liƒo la to Tapua ƒe vudo la ŋu to Kana tɔʋu la ƒe dziehe yi Domeƒu la ŋu. Du geɖe siwo nɔ tɔʋu la ƒe dziehe la nye Efraim ƒe to la tɔ togbɔ be wonɔ Manase ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi hã.
Joshua17:10 Wotsɔ anyigba si le tɔʋu la ƒe dziehe heyi keke Domeƒu la ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe la na Efraim ƒe viwo

Joshua18:1 Esi Israelviwo xɔ anyigba vɔ megbe la
Joshua18:2 Womema anyigba na Israel ƒe to adre haɖe o.

Joshua18:4 Mitia ame etɔ̃ tso to ɖe sia ɖe me

Joshua18:6 Miŋlɔ nu tso anyigba la ƒe akpa adreawo ŋu tsɔ vɛ nam. Ekema mada akɔ ɖe edzi le Yehowa
Joshua18:7 Ke miɖo ŋku edzi be womama anyigba na Levitɔwo o
Joshua18:8 Ame siwo wotia la dze mɔ be woata anyigba la vɛ na Yosua ekema ate ŋu ama anyigba la na toawo to akɔdada le Yehowa ŋkume me.

Joshua18:14 Liƒo la trɔ tso afi ma ɖo ta dziehe
Joshua18:15 Anyigba la ƒe anyigbemeliƒo tso Kiriat Yearim du la to
Joshua18:16 heyi to si le Ben Hinom ƒe Balime le Refaim ƒe balime ƒe anyiehe gome. Etso afi ma

Joshua19:1 Simeon ƒe viwo nye to evelia si wona anyigbae. Yuda ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba ƒe akpa aɖe ge ɖe Simeon ƒe viwo tɔ me.
Joshua19:2 Du wuiadre kple wo ŋu kɔƒe siwo nɔ anyigba si wona Simeon ƒe viwo me la woe nye: Beerseba
Joshua19:3 Hazar Sual
Joshua19:4 Eltolad
Joshua19:5 Ziklag
Joshua19:6 Bet Lebaot kple Saruhen. Du asieke kple woƒe kɔƒeduwo.
Joshua19:7 Ain

Joshua19:9 Ale Simeon ƒe viwo ƒe domenyinu tso nu si wotsɔ na Yuda ƒe viwo gbã la me
Joshua19:10 To etɔ̃lia si wona anyigbae lae nye Zebulon ƒe viwo. Woƒe anyigba la ƒe liƒo dze egɔme tso Sarid ƒe anyigbeme.
Joshua19:11 Eƒo xlã tso afi sia yi ɣetoɖoƒe
Joshua19:12 Le go kemɛ dzi la
Joshua19:13 Eyi ŋgɔ ɖo ta Gat Hefer
Joshua19:14 Zebulon ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba ƒe anyieheliƒo to Hanaton hewu nu ɖe Ifta El ƒe balime.
Joshua19:15 Kata

Joshua19:17 To enelia si wona anyigbae lae nye Isaka ƒe viwo ƒe ƒomewo.

Joshua19:24 To atɔ̃lia si wona anyigbae lae nye Aser.

Joshua21:1 Levitɔwo ƒe kplɔlawo va Silo be yewoalé nya aɖe akpɔ kple nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua kple Israel ƒe to vovovoawo ƒe kplɔlawo.
Joshua21:2 Wogblɔ na takpekpe la be
Joshua21:3 Eya ta Israelviwo tsɔ du siwo dzi woɖu la dometɔ aɖewo kple woƒe lãnyiƒewo na Levitɔwo abe ale si Yehowa gblɔ ene.
Joshua21:4 Levi ƒome la ƒe akpa si tso Kohat ƒe hlɔ̃ me lae nye ame gbãtɔ siwo wona anyigbae. Aron ƒe dzidzimeviwo hã xɔ du wuietɔ̃ siwo nye: Yuda
Joshua21:5 Wotsɔ du ewo tso Efraim ƒe viwo ƒe duwo me na Kohat ƒe ƒome bubuawo.
Joshua21:6 Gerson ƒe viwo xɔ du wuietɔ̃ siwo wotia to akɔdada me tso du siwo le Basan la me. Isaka ƒe viwo
Joshua21:7 Merari ƒe viwo xɔ du wuieve tso Ruben ƒe viwo
Joshua21:8 Ale wowɔ ɖe nu si Yehowa ɖo na Mose la dzi
Joshua21:9 Esiawoe nye du siwo woxɔ tso Yuda ƒe viwo kple Simeon ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi
Joshua21:10 na Aron ƒe dzidzimeviwo
Joshua21:11 Wotsɔ Arba du
Joshua21:12 Ke wotsɔ agblenyigba siwo le dua kple kɔƒe siwo le eŋu la na Kaleb
Joshua21:13 Hekpe ɖe Hebron si nye sitsoƒeduwo dometɔ ɖeka ŋu la
Joshua21:14 Yatir
Joshua21:15 Holon
Joshua21:16 Ain
Joshua21:17 Wona du ene siawo wo
Joshua21:18 Anatɔt kple Almon kple lãnyiƒe siwo ƒo xlã wo.
Joshua21:19 Ale wotsɔ du wuietɔ̃ kple lãnyiƒe siwo ƒo xlã wo la na nunɔlawo
Joshua21:20 Wotsɔ du aɖewo tso Efraim ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi na ƒome bubu aɖewo tso Kohat hlɔ̃ la me.
Joshua21:21 Wotsɔ du ene siawo le Efraim tonyigba la dzi la na wo: Sekem si nye sitsoƒeduwo dometɔ ɖeka kple lãnyiƒe siwo ƒo xlã wo le Efraim ƒe tonyigba la dzi
Joshua21:22 Kibzaim kple Bet Horon kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo.
Joshua21:23 Wotsɔ du ene siawo
Joshua21:24 Aiyalon kple Gat Rimon kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo na wo tso Dan ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi.
Joshua21:25 Wotsɔ du eve na wo le Manase ƒe viwo ƒe to afã la ƒe anyigba dzi; du siawoe nye Taanak kple Gat Rimon kpe ɖe woƒe lãnyiƒewo ŋu.
Joshua21:26 Ale ƒome siwo tso Kohat hlɔ̃ la me la
Joshua21:27 Levitɔ bubu siwo tso Gerson hlɔ̃ la me la xɔ du eve kple woƒe lãnyiƒewo: le Manase ƒe viwo ƒe ɣedzeƒenyigba dzi. Du siawoe nye Golan le Basan
Joshua21:28 Woxɔ du ene siawo le Isaka ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi: Kision
Joshua21:29 Yarmut kple En Ganim
Joshua21:30 Woxɔ du ene siawo le Aser ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi: Misal
Joshua21:31 Helkat kple Rehob
Joshua21:32 Woxɔ du etɔ̃ le Naftali ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi: Kedes le Galilea si nye Sitsoƒeduwo dometɔ ɖeka kple Hamot Dor kple Kartan kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo siwo le du etɔ̃.
Joshua21:33 Ale ƒome vovovoawo tso Gerson ƒe hlɔ̃ la me xɔ du wuietɔ̃ kple woƒe lãnyiƒewo.
Joshua21:34 Levitɔ mamlɛawo
Joshua21:35 Dimna kple Nahalal kple woƒe lãnyiƒewo siwo nye du ene.
Joshua21:36 Woxɔ du ene
Joshua21:37 Kedemot kple Mefaat kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo le Ruben ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi siwo le du ene.
Joshua21:38 Woxɔ du ene le Gad ƒe viwo ƒe anyigba dzi: Ramot le Gilead si nye sitsoƒeduwo dometɔ ɖeka
Joshua21:39 Hesbon kple Yazer kple lãnyiƒe siwo ƒo xlã wo.
Joshua21:40 Ale du siwo katã wodzidze nu tsɔ na Merari ƒe hlɔ̃ siwo nye Levitɔwo ƒe ƒome mamlɛawo la le du wuieve.
Joshua21:41 Du siwo katã nɔ Levitɔwo si le Israelnyigba dzi la
Joshua21:42 Lãnyiƒewo ƒo xlã du siawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe
Joshua21:43 Ale Yehowa tsɔ anyigba si ŋugbe wòdo na wo tɔgbuiwo la katã na Israelviwo. Woyi ɖaɖu ameawo dzi
Joshua21:44 Yehowa na ŋutifafa wo abe ale si wòdo ŋugbe ene; ame aɖeke mete ŋu nɔ te ɖe wo nu o. Yehowa kpe ɖe wo ŋu woɖu woƒe futɔwo katã dzi.
Joshua21:45 Ale nu nyui siwo katã ŋugbe Yehowa do na wo la va eme nenema tututu.

Joshua22:4 Azɔ la
Joshua22:5 Mikpɔ egbɔ be mieyi se siwo Mose de na mi la wɔwɔ dzi

Joshua22:7 Mose tsɔ anyigba na Manase ƒe to afã la ɖe Basan

Joshua22:11 Ke esi Israelvi bubuawo se nu si wowɔ la

Joshua22:13 Gbã la

Joshua22:15 Esi woɖo Gilead la
Joshua22:16 “Yehowa ƒe ameha blibo la di be yeanya nu si ta miele nu vɔ̃ wɔm ɖe Israel ƒe Mawu la ŋu
Joshua22:17 “Ɖe nu vɔ̃ si míewɔ le Peor mesɔ gbɔ na mi oa? Míekɔ mía ɖokui ŋuti tso nu vɔ̃ ma ŋu haɖe va se ɖe egbe o
Joshua22:18 Ɖe miegale tɔtrɔm le Yehowa yome xoxoa? Elabena mienya be ne yewodze aglã ɖe Yehowa ŋu egbe la
Joshua22:19 Ne miehiã vɔsamlekpui
Joshua22:20 Ɖe mieɖo ŋku edzi be esime Akan
Joshua22:21 Ruben ƒe viwo kple Gad ƒe viwo kple Manase ƒe viwo ƒe afã ɖo eŋu na Israelviwo ƒe tatɔwo be
Joshua22:22 “Ŋusẽtɔ lae nye Yehowa
Joshua22:23 Ne míeda le Yehowa ƒe se dzi
Joshua22:24 Míewɔ nu sia
Joshua22:25 Yehowa wɔ Yɔdan tɔsisi la wònye liƒo le míawo kple mi Ruben ƒe viwo kple Gad ƒe viwo dome
Joshua22:26 eya tae míetu vɔsamlekpui aɖe
Joshua22:27 ke boŋ be wòanye dzesi anɔ míawo kple miawo siaa dome kple dzesi na dzidzime siwo ava kplɔ mí ɖo la be míesubɔa Yehowa le agbadɔ kɔkɔe sia ŋgɔ kple míaƒe nunanawo hena numevɔsawo kple ŋutifafavɔsawo. Míewɔ esia ale be miaƒe dzidzimeviwo magblɔ na míaƒe dzidzimeviwo be
Joshua22:28 Ne woagblɔ alea la
Joshua22:29 “Nede megbe xaa tso mía gbɔ be
Joshua22:30 Esi Finehas
Joshua22:31 Finehas si nye Eleaza vi gblɔ na wo be
Joshua22:32 Finehas kple ame dɔdɔ ewoawo trɔ yi Israelvi bubuawo gbɔ
Joshua22:33 Tete Israel blibo la tso aseye
Joshua22:34 Ruben ƒe viwo kple Gad ƒe viwo na ŋkɔ vɔsamlekpui la be

Joshua23:5 Yehowa

Joshua23:8 Ke midze Yehowa
Joshua23:9 Yehowa nya dukɔ triakɔwo ɖa le mia ŋgɔ

Joshua23:16 Ne miewɔ nubabla si Yehowa wɔ kpli mi dzi o

Judges3:1 Ale Yehowa gblẽ dukɔ aɖewo ɖe anyigba la dzi be yeado Israelvi siwo mekpɔ aʋawɔwɔ le Kanaanyigba dzi teƒe o la kpɔ.
Judges3:2 Ewɔ esia be yeafia nu Israelviwo ƒe dzidzime ɖe sia ɖe tso aʋawɔwɔ ŋu
Judges3:3 Ame siwo ganɔ anyigba la dzi kokoko woe nye Filistitɔwo ƒe du atɔ̃ me nɔlawo
Judges3:4 Wonye dodokpɔ na Israel be woakpɔe ɖa be Israelviwo awɔ se siwo Yehowa de na Mose
Judges3:5 Ale Israel nɔ Kanaantɔwo

Judges7:16 Gideon ma ame alafa etɔ̃ la ɖe akpa etɔ̃ me
Judges7:17 Ke eɖe eƒe ɖoɖowo me na wo hegblɔ be
Judges7:18 Ne nye kple nye amewo míeku míaƒe kpẽwo ko la
Judges7:19 Ale Gideon kple ame alafa ɖeka siwo nɔ eŋu la ɖo Midiantɔwo ƒe asaɖa la ƒe gbɔto le zãtitina esime woɖɔli dzɔlawo teti. Woku woƒe kpẽwo eye wogbã anyikplu siwo le wo si.
Judges7:20 Aʋalɔgo etɔ̃awo me nɔlawo hã ku kpẽawo
Judges7:21 Esi Gideon ƒe ameawo ɖe to ɖe asaɖa la la

Judges8:2 Ke Gideon ɖo eŋu be
Judges8:3 Mawu na mielé Oreb kple Zeb
Judges8:4 Gideon tso Yɔdan tɔsisi la azɔ kple eƒe aʋawɔla alafa etɔ̃awo (300). Ɖeɖi te wo ŋu gake woganɔ futɔwo nyam kokoko.
Judges8:5 Esi wova ɖo Sukɔt la
Judges8:6 Ke Sukɔt ƒe kplɔlawo ɖo eŋu be “Ɖe miaƒe asi su Zeba kple Zalmuna dzi xoxoa? Ne míena nuɖuɖu mi eye miete ŋu lé wo o la
Judges8:7 Gideon gblɔ na wo be
Judges8:8 Ale Gideon tso eme yi ɖabia nuɖuɖu le Penuel eye woawo hã gblɔ abe Sukɔt ƒe amewo ke ene.
Judges8:9 Gideon gagblɔ na woawo hã be
Judges8:10 Azɔ la Fia Zeba kple Fia Zalmuna kple woƒe aʋawɔla akpe wuiatɔ̃ (15
Judges8:11 Gideon trɔ azɔ to asimɔ si to Noba kple Yogbeha ƒe ɣedzeƒe eye wòdze Midiantɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ dzi esi womenɔ mɔ kpɔm na wo kura o.
Judges8:12 Fia eveawo si gake Gideon kplɔ wo ɖo va se ɖe esime wòlé wo eye wòtsrɔ̃ aʋakɔ blibo la.
Judges8:13 Le esia megbe la
Judges8:14 Elé ɖekakpui aɖe tso Sukɔt eye wòzi edzi be wòaŋlɔ Sukɔt ƒe kplɔlawo kple mawunua blaadre-vɔ-adreawo ŋkɔ na ye.
Judges8:15 Etrɔ va Sukɔt eye wògblɔ na wo be
Judges8:16 Tete wòlé dumemetsitsiawo eye wòtsɔ aŋɔkawo kple ŋuwo fia nunya woe.
Judges8:17 Emegbe la
Judges8:18 Le esia megbe la
Judges8:19 Gideon do ɣli be
Judges8:20 Azɔ Gideon ɖe gbe na Via ŋutsu tsitsitɔ
Judges8:21 Zeba kple Zalmuna gblɔ na Gideon be
Judges8:22 Israelviwo gblɔ na Gideon be
Judges8:23 Ke Gideon ɖo eŋu na wo be
Judges8:24 Egblɔ na wo be
Judges8:25 Woɖo eŋu be
Judges8:26 Sikatogɛ siwo wòbia la ƒe kpekpeme va le kilogram wuiasiekɛ kple afã
Judges8:27 Gideon tsɔ sika la wɔ kɔmewu eye wòtsɔe da ɖe Ofra
Judges8:28 Ale Israelviwo bɔbɔ Midiantɔwo ɖe anyi eye womegafɔ ta dzi kpɔ o. Ale ŋutifafa nɔ anyigba la dzi ƒe blaene sɔŋ le Gideon ƒe agbenɔɣi.
Judges8:29 Yerubaal
Judges8:30 Viŋutsu blaadre nɔ esi elabena eɖe srɔ̃ geɖewo.
Judges8:31 Ahiãvi aɖe hã nɔ esi le Sekem
Judges8:32 Gideon
Judges8:33 Esi Gideon ku teti ko la
Judges8:34 Israelviwo meɖo ŋku Yehowa
Judges8:35 Nenema ke wogbe dɔmenyowɔwɔ na Yerubaal
Judges9:1 Gbe ɖeka la Abimelek
Judges9:2 eye wòdo susu sia ɖe wo gbɔ be: Alekee
Judges9:3 Ale Abimelek nyruiawo yi dumemetsitsiwo gbɔ hetsɔ Abimelek ƒe nya la ɖo woƒe ŋkume. Woɖo be
Judges9:4 Ale wona gae tso esi wodzɔ le trɔ̃ Baal Berit subɔƒe la me eye fia Abimelek tsɔ ga sia ƒo gbevu aɖewo nu ƒu ɖe eɖokui ŋu.
Judges9:5 Ekplɔ wo yi fofoa ƒe aƒe me le Ofra eye wòna wowu Yerubaal ƒe vi blaadreawo ɖe kpe ɖeka dzi
Judges9:6 Esia megbe la
Judges9:7 Esi wogblɔ nya sia na Yotam la
Judges9:8 Gbe ɖeka la
Judges9:9 “Gake amiti ɖo eŋu na wo be
Judges9:10 “Emegbe la wogblɔ na gboti be
Judges9:11 “Ke gboti ɖo eŋu na wo be
Judges9:12 “Wogblɔ na wainka be
Judges9:13 “Ke wainka ɖo eŋu na wo be
Judges9:14 “Mlɔeba la
Judges9:15 “Ŋuti gblɔ na atiawo be
Judges9:16 Yotam yi edzi be
Judges9:17 Fofonye wɔ aʋa na mi
Judges9:18 ke mietso ɖe eŋu eye miewu via blaadre le kpe ɖeka dzi. Azɔ la
Judges9:19 Ne mieka ɖe edzi be yewowɔ nu dzɔdzɔe ɖe Yerubaal kple eƒe dzidzimeviwo ŋu la
Judges9:20 Ke ne miewɔ nu dzɔdzɔe ɖe Gideon ŋu o la
Judges9:21 Azɔ vɔvɔ̃ na nɔvia Abimelek ta la
Judges9:22 Le Abimelek ƒe fiaɖuɖu le Israel ƒe etɔ̃ megbe la
Judges9:23 Mawu na dzre va dzɔ ɖe Fia Abimelek kple Sekemtɔwo dome
Judges9:24 Le nya siwo va dzɔ me la
Judges9:25 Sekemtɔwo be ɖe mɔ si yi to la dzi la dzi na Abimelek. Esi wonɔ elalam be wòava yi la
Judges9:26 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Judges9:27 Le esime wonɔ nuŋeŋeŋkekenyui ɖum le Sekem le ƒe ma me le woƒe mawu ƒe gbedoxɔ me la
Judges9:28 Gaal do ɣli be
Judges9:29 Mitsɔm ɖo fiae eye enumake miakpɔ nu si adzɔ ɖe Abimelek dzi! Magblɔ na Abimelek be
Judges9:30 Ke esi dumegã Zebul se nya si Gaal gblɔ la
Judges9:31 Enumake eɖo du ɖe Abimelek le Aruma be
Judges9:32 Wò kple wò aʋakɔ miva be ɖe gbedzi le zã me
Judges9:33 eye ne ŋu ke ko la
Judges9:34 Abimelek kple eƒe amewo zɔ mɔ le zã me
Judges9:35 Esi ŋu ke
Judges9:36 Esi Gaal kpɔ wo la
Judges9:37 Gaal yi edzi be
Judges9:38 Tete Zebul biae be
Judges9:39 Enumake Gaal kplɔ Sekemtɔwo eye wowɔ aʋa kple Abimelek.
Judges9:40 Ke Abimelek ƒe amewo ɖu Gaal dzi. Sekemtɔ geɖewo xɔ abi eye womlɔ aʋagbe la dzi va se ɖe keke dua ƒe agbo nu ke.
Judges9:41 Abimelek nɔ Aruma ɣe ma ɣi. Zebul nya Gaal kple eƒe ƒometɔwo le Sekem eye meɖe mɔ be woaganɔ afi ma o.
Judges9:42 Le ŋufɔke la
Judges9:43 Ale wòma eƒe aʋawɔlawo ɖe akpa etɔ̃ eye wòɣla wo ɖe gbedzi. Esi Sekemtɔwo do ta ɖa la
Judges9:44 Abimelek da aʋalɔgo ɖeka ɖe dua ƒe agbo nu ale be Sekemtɔwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo mate ŋu atrɔ
Judges9:45 Wowɔ aʋa ŋkeke blibo la hafi Abimelek te ŋu xɔ du la. Ewu amewo eye wògbã du la.
Judges9:46 Esi Migdaltɔwo kpɔ nu si dzɔ la
Judges9:47 Esi Abimelek se be ameawo si yi mɔ la me la
Judges9:48 Abimelek yi Zalmɔn to dzi. Efɔ nake lé ɖe abɔta eye wòɖe gbe na eƒe ameawo bena woawɔ nu si tututu yewɔ.
Judges9:49 Ale ameawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe fɔ nake yi dua me. Abimelek tsɔ eƒe nake tu mɔ la ƒe gli ŋu eya ta ameawo hã wɔ nenema ke. Woli kɔ woƒe nakewo ɖe glia ŋu eye wode dzo nakekɔ la me. Ale ame abe akpe ɖeka ene
Judges9:50 Abimelek ho aʋa ɖe Tebez du la ŋu azɔ eye wòxɔe.
Judges9:51 Mɔ sesẽ aɖe nɔ dua me eya ta dua me tɔwo katã si yi eme. Wotu agbo la heyi mɔ la tame ke henɔ ŋku lém ɖe Abimelek kple eƒe amewo ŋu.
Judges9:52 Esi Abimelek va mɔ la te eye wònɔ dzadzram ɖo be yeatɔ dzoe la
Judges9:53 nyɔnu aɖe ɖe asi le nutukpe gã aɖe ŋu tso mɔ la tame ɖo ɖe anyigba eye kpea ge dze Abimelek dzi eye wogbã ta nɛ.
Judges9:54 Abimelek gblɔ na eƒe adekplɔvi be
Judges9:55 Esi Israelviwo kpɔ be Abimelek ku la
Judges9:56 Ale Mawu he to na Abimelek le nu vɔ̃ si wòwɔ ɖe fofoa ŋu
Judges9:57 Mawu na Sekemtɔwo hã kpe fu ɖe woƒe ŋutasesẽ ta
Judges10:1 Le Abimelek ƒe ku megbe la
Judges10:2 Enye ʋunudrɔ̃la na Israelviwo ƒe blaeve-vɔ-etɔ̃ eye esi wòku la
Judges10:3 Ʋunudrɔ̃la si kplɔe ɖo lae nye Yair
Judges10:4 Via ŋutsu blaetɔ̃awo doa tedzi ɖia tsa eye du blaetɔ̃ nɔ wo si le Gileadnyigba dzi
Judges10:5 Esi Yair ku la
Judges10:6 Israelviwo gawɔ nu si nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋkume. Wosubɔ Baalwo kple Astarɔtwo kple Aramtɔwo
Judges10:7 edo dziku ɖe wo ŋuti. Etsɔ wo dzra na Filistitɔwo kple Amonitɔwo
Judges10:8 ame siwo te wo ɖe to
Judges10:9 Wogawɔ aʋa kpli wo le Yuda
Judges10:10 eye mlɔeba la
Judges10:11 Yehowa ɖo eŋu be
Judges10:12 Sidontɔwo
Judges10:13 Gake miegagblẽam ɖi enuenu eye miesubɔa mawu bubuwo eya ta mibu ɖa le ŋkuta nam! Nyemagaɖe mi akpɔ o.
Judges10:14 Miyi miado ɣli na mawu yeye siwo mietia! Mina woaɖe mi le miaƒe xaxaɣiwo me!”
Judges10:15 Israelviwo gaɖe kuku na Mawu be
Judges10:16 Israelviwo trɔ le mawu bubuawo yome eye wosubɔ Yehowa ɖeɖe ko. Woƒe blanuiléle do nuxaxa na Yehowa.
Judges10:17 Le ɣe ma ɣi la
Judges10:18 Gilead ƒe kplɔlawo gblɔ be
Judges11:1 Yefta nye aʋawɔla sesẽ aɖe tso Gileadnyigba dzi. Dadaa nye gbolo eye fofoa ŋkɔe nye Gilead.
Judges11:2 Vi bubuwo nɔ Gilead si siwo srɔ̃a ŋutɔ dzi nɛ. Esi Gilead ƒe vi bubu siawo tsi la
Judges11:3 Ale Yefta si tso fofoa ƒe aƒe me yi Tobnyigba dzi. Eƒo gbevu aɖewo nu ƒu ɖe eɖokui ŋu eye wokplɔnɛ ɖo ɣe sia ɣi.
Judges11:4 Ɣeyiɣi sia mee Amonitɔwo ho aʋa ɖe Israelviwo ŋu.
Judges11:5 Gilead ƒe kplɔlawo ɖo du ɖe Yefta
Judges11:6 kple kukuɖeɖe be wòava kplɔ yewoƒe aʋakɔ la le aʋawɔwɔ kple Amonitɔwo me.
Judges11:7 Yefta bia wo be
Judges11:8 Woɖo eŋu be
Judges11:9 Yefta do ɣli be
Judges11:10 Woɖo eŋu be
Judges11:11 Ale Yefta lɔ̃ eye wòzu aʋafia kple Gilead fia. Woɖo kpe nya sia dzi le Yehowa kple ameawo katã ŋkume le Mizpa.
Judges11:12 Yefta ɖo du ɖe Amon fia be yedi be yeanya nu si ta wòle aʋa hom ɖe Israelviwo ŋu.
Judges11:13 Amon fia ɖo eŋu be anyigba la nye Amɔnitɔwo tɔ eye Israelviwo va fii esime wotso Egipte va ɖo. Eyi edzi be anyigba blibo la tso Arnon tɔsisi la ŋu yi Yabok tɔsisi la ŋu heyi Yɔdan tɔsisi la ŋu
Judges11:14 Yefta gaɖo amewo ɖe Amonitɔwo ƒe fia
Judges11:15 be
Judges11:16 esi Israelviwo tso Egipte
Judges11:17 woɖo du ɖe Edom fia nɔ mɔ biam be
Judges11:18 “ ‘Mlɔeba la
Judges11:19 Israel ɖo du ɖe Fia Sixɔn
Judges11:20 Fia Sixɔn mexɔ Israelviwo dzi se o eya ta wòna eƒe aʋakɔ wɔ aʋa kple Israelviwo le Yaza.
Judges11:21 Yehowa
Judges11:22 Israelviwo nɔ anyigba la katã dzi tso Arnon tɔsisi la ŋu le anyigbeme yi Yabok tɔsisi la ŋu le dzigbeme kple tso gbegbe la ŋu le ɣedzeƒe yi Yɔdan tɔsisi la ŋu le ɣetoɖoƒe.
Judges11:23 “ ‘Ale Yehowa
Judges11:24 Na nu sia nu si wò mawu Kemos na wò la nanye tɔwò eye nu sia nu si Yehowa
Judges11:25 Ke wò ɖe
Judges11:26 Ke wò ya nèle didim be yeaho nya sia ɖe dzi azɔ le ƒe alafa etɔ̃ megbe! Israel nɔ anyigba sia dzi ɣeyiɣi sia katã tso Hesbon va yi Aroer
Judges11:27 Kpɔ ɖa
Judges11:28 Amon fia meɖo to Yefta ƒe nya la o.
Judges11:29 Le ɣeyiɣi ma me la
Judges11:30 Yefta ɖe adzɔgbe na Yehowa be
Judges11:31 nu sia nu si ado to nye aƒe ƒe agbo me ava kpem ne meɖu Amonitɔwo dzi hetrɔ gbɔ la
Judges11:32 Yefta kplɔ eƒe aʋakɔ wowɔ aʋa kple Amonitɔwo. Yehowa na Israel ɖu dzi
Judges11:33 eye wowu Amonitɔwo tso keke Aroer va se ɖe Minit. Woxɔ du blaeve va keke Abel Keramin. Ale Israel ɖu Amonitɔwo dzi.
Judges11:34 Esi Yefta trɔ va eƒe aƒe me le Mizpa la
Judges11:35 Esi wòkpɔe la
Judges11:36 Eɖo eŋu nɛ be “Fofonye
Judges11:37 Gake wɔ nye didi sia ko dzi nam. Na ɣleti evem matsa le togbɛawo dzi afa konyi kple xɔ̃nyewo elabena nyemaɖe srɔ̃ akpɔakpɔ o.”
Judges11:38 Yefta ɖe mɔ nɛ eye wòyi toawo dzi; eya kple xɔlɔ̃awo nɔ afi ma kple konyifafa ɣleti eve.
Judges11:39 Le esia megbe la
Judges11:40 be ɖetugbiwo nayi aɖanɔ toawo dzi ŋkeke ene ƒe sia ƒe afa konyi le Yefta
Judges12:1 Efraim ƒe viwo ƒo ƒu aʋakɔ aɖe nu ɖe Zafɔn eye woɖo du ɖe Yefta be
Judges12:2 Yefta ɖo eŋu be
Judges12:3 Metsɔ nye agbe ke; míawo ɖeɖe míewɔ aʋa la eye Yehowa kpe ɖe mía ŋu míeɖu futɔ la dzi. Ɖe wòhiã be miawɔ aʋa kpli mí le nu sia ta?”
Judges12:4 Yefta yɔ Gilead ŋutsuwo ƒo ƒu eye woyi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Efraimtɔwo. Gileadtɔwo wu wo elabena Efraimtɔwo gblɔ be
Judges12:5 Gileadtɔwo xɔ Yɔdan tɔtsoƒe siwo ge ɖe Efraimnyigba dzi eye ne ame siwo tsi agbe le Efraimtɔwo dome gblɔ be
Judges12:6 wogblɔna nɛ be
Judges12:7 Yefta nye Israelviwo ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la ƒe ade. Esi Yefta
Judges12:8 Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la si kplɔ Yefta ɖo lae nye Ibzan
Judges12:9 Viŋutsu blaetɔ̃ kple vinyɔnu blaetɔ̃ nɔ esi. Etsɔ via nyɔnuwo na amedzroŋutsuwo woɖe eye wòkplɔ ɖetugbiwo tso dzronyigbawo dzi vɛ na via ŋutsuwo woɖe. Ibzan nye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la na Israel ƒe adre
Judges12:10 eye esi Ibzan la
Judges12:11 Le Ibzan yome la
Judges12:12 Esi Elon ku la
Judges12:13 Ʋunudrɔ̃la si kplɔ Elon ɖo lae nye Abdon
Judges12:14 Viŋutsu blaene kple tɔgbuiyɔvi blaetɔ̃ nɔ esi. Ame blaadre siawo doa tedzi blaadre. Abdon nye Israel ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la ƒe enyi.
Judges12:15 Esi Abdon
Judges13:1 Israelviwo gawɔ nu si nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋkume
Judges13:2 Ŋutsu aɖe nɔ Zora du la me
Judges13:3 Yehowa ƒe dɔla aɖe ɖe eɖokui fiae eye wògblɔ nɛ be
Judges13:4 Azɔ la
Judges13:5 elabena àfɔ fu eye àdzi ŋutsuvi. Talũhɛ maka eƒe ta ŋu o
Judges13:6 Tete nyɔnu la yi srɔ̃a gbɔ eye wògblɔ nɛ be
Judges13:7 Egblɔ nam be
Judges13:8 Tete Manoa do gbe ɖa na Yehowa be
Judges13:9 Mawu se Manoa ƒe gbedodoɖa eye Mawudɔla la gaɖe eɖokui fia srɔ̃a esime wònɔ agble me. Eya ɖeka koe nɔ afi ma: Manoa menɔ afi ma o
Judges13:10 eya ta nyɔnu la ƒu du sesĩe ɖagblɔ na srɔ̃a be
Judges13:11 Manoa ƒu du kple srɔ̃a yi ŋutsu la gbɔ eye Manoa biae be
Judges13:12 Ale Manoa biae be
Judges13:13 Yehowa ƒe dɔla ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Judges13:14 Mele be wòaɖu waintsetse alo ano wain alo aha muame o eye mele be wòaɖu nu makɔmakɔ aɖeke hã o. Ele be wòawɔ nu sia nu si ƒe se mede nɛ.”
Judges13:15 Manoa gblɔ na Yehowa ƒe dɔla la be
Judges13:16 Yehowa ƒe dɔla la ɖo eŋu be
Judges13:17 Manoa bia Yehowa ƒe dɔla la be “Wò ŋkɔ ɖe? Ale be ne wò nya la va eme la
Judges13:18 Eɖo eŋu be
Judges13:19 Manoa lé gbɔ̃vi aɖe kpe ɖe nuɖuvɔsa ŋu eye wòsa vɔ na Yehowa le agakpe aɖe dzi. Tete Yehowa wɔ nukunu aɖe le Manoa kple srɔ̃a ŋkume.
Judges13:20 Esi dzo ƒe aɖewo tso vɔsamlekpui la dzi ɖo ta dziŋgɔli me la
Judges13:21 Esi Yehowa ƒe dɔla la megaɖe eɖokui fia Manoa kple srɔ̃a o la
Judges13:22 Manoa do ɣli gblɔ na srɔ̃a be
Judges13:23 Ke srɔ̃a gblɔ nɛ be
Judges13:24 Esi wodzi ɖevia la
Judges13:25 Yehowa ƒe Gbɔgbɔ de asi edzidzedze me le Dan ƒe asaɖa me le Zora kple Estaol duawo dome.
Judges14:1 Gbe ɖeka la
Judges14:2 Esi wòtrɔ gbɔ la
Judges14:3 Dzilawo melɔ̃ ɖe edzi nɛ kura o
Judges14:4 Fofoa kple dadaa medze sii be Mawue nɔ mɔ trem na Filistitɔwo
Judges14:5 Gbe ɖeka esi Samson kple edzilawo yina Timna la
Judges14:6 Yehowa ƒe Gbɔgbɔ va edzi eye esi lãnu aɖeke menɔ esi o la
Judges14:7 Esi woɖo Timna la
Judges14:8 Esi Samson trɔ tso Timna gbɔna la
Judges14:9 Eɖe anyitsi la
Judges14:10 Azɔ la
Judges14:11 Esi Samson va ɖo la
Judges14:12 Samson gblɔ na wo be
Judges14:13 Ke ne miete ŋu ɖe egɔme o la
Judges14:14 Adzo si wòto lae nye
Judges14:15 Le ŋkeke enea gbe la
Judges14:16 Tete Samson srɔ̃ tsɔ eɖokui ƒu Samson dzi
Judges14:17 Nyɔnu la fa avi le azãɖuɖu ƒe ŋkeke adreawo katã me. Ale le ŋkeke adrea gbe la
Judges14:18 Ale hafi ɣe naɖo to le ŋkeke adrea gbe la
Judges14:19 Tete Aƒetɔ la ƒe Gbɔgbɔ va Samson dzi kple ŋusẽ
Judges14:20 Ale wotsɔ Samson srɔ̃ na ŋutsu si nɔ Samson ŋu le esime wòlé alɔ kple srɔ̃a.
Judges15:1 Le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe megbe
Judges15:2 Egblɔ na Samson be
Judges15:3 Nu sia do dɔmedzoe na Samson ŋutɔ eya ta wòblu ɖe wo ta gblɔ be
Judges15:4 Nu sia ta Samson yi ɖalé abei alafa etɔ̃
Judges15:5 Esi dzo tɔ akakati ɖe sia ɖe eye wòna abeiawo ƒu du yi Filistitɔwo ƒe agblewo me eye wotɔ dzo lu siwo womexa haɖe o kple wainkawo kpakple amitiwo.
Judges15:6 Esi Filistitɔwo bia be ame kae wɔ esia la
Judges15:7 Samson ka atam be
Judges15:8 Eya ta Samson dza ali kple ata na wo hewu ame geɖewo eye wòyi ɖanɔ agado aɖe me le Etam.
Judges15:9 Filistitɔwo va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yuda eye wokaka ɖe Lehi.
Judges15:10 Yudatɔwo bia wo be
Judges15:11 Ale Yuda ŋutsu alafa etɔ̃ (3
Judges15:12 Wogblɔ nɛ be
Judges15:13 Woɖo eŋu be
Judges15:14 Esi Samson kple Yuda ŋutsu siwo lée ɖo Lehi la
Judges15:15 Etsɔ tedzi kuku aɖe ƒe glãƒu si nɔ anyigba la eye wotsɔe wu Filistitɔ akpe ɖeka.
Judges15:16 Emegbe la Samson gblɔ be
Judges15:17 Esi wòwu nya siawo gbɔgblɔ nu la
Judges15:18 Tsikɔ de asi Samson wuwu me vevie eya ta wòdo gbe ɖa na Yehowa gblɔ be
Judges15:19 Ale Mawu na tsi do tso agakpe aɖe me eye esi Samson noe la
Judges15:20 Samson nye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la na Israel le ƒe blaeve siwo kplɔ nya siawo ɖo la me
Judges16:1 Gbe ɖeka la
Judges16:2 Wofi tofi na amewo be wokpɔ Samson le dua me eya ta wona nyanya duŋudzɔlawo. Ŋutsu geɖewo de xa ɖi nɛ zã blibo la le dua ƒe agbo nu
Judges16:3 Samson mlɔ anyi kple gbolo la va se ɖe zãtitina. Efɔ heyi dua ƒe agbo la gbɔ. Eho agbo la kple eƒe atiwo le tome kpe ɖe gametiawo ŋu
Judges16:4 Azɔ la
Judges16:5 Filistitɔwo ƒe kplɔla atɔ̃awo katã va yi Ɖelila gbɔ
Judges16:6 Nu sia na Delila ɖe kuku na Samson be wòagblɔ eƒe nya ɣaɣla la na ye. Egblɔ be
Judges16:7 Samson gblɔ nɛ be
Judges16:8 Ale wotsɔ datimeka yeye adre na Ɖelila eye esi Samson dɔ alɔ̃ la
Judges16:9 le esime ŋutsu aɖewo be ɖe xɔ evelia me. Esi Ɖelila blae vɔ ko la
Judges16:10 Emegbe la
Judges16:11 Samson ɖo eŋu be
Judges16:12 Ale esi Samson dɔ alɔ̃ la
Judges16:13 Delila gagblɔ nɛ be
Judges16:14 eye wòtsɔ ɖalénu lée. Azɔ edo ɣli be
Judges16:15 Ɖelila fa konyi be
Judges16:16 Mlɔeba la
Judges16:17 Ale Samson gblɔ nya sia nya nɛ be
Judges16:18 Delila dze sii bena egblɔ nyateƒe la na ye mlɔeba eya ta wòɖo du ɖe Filistitɔwo ƒe kplɔla atɔ̃awo. Egblɔ na wo be
Judges16:19 Ɖelila ble Samson nu wòdɔ alɔ̃ ɖe eƒe atata. Eyɔ ame aɖe vɛ
Judges16:20 Azɔ edo ɣli be
Judges16:21 Ale Filistitɔwo lée
Judges16:22 Ke sẽe ko la
Judges16:23 Azɔ la
Judges16:24 Esi ameawo kpɔe la
Judges16:25 Wain si wono la na wokpɔ dzidzɔ eye wogblɔ be
Judges16:26 Samson gblɔ na ɖekakpui si lé eƒe alɔnu le ekplɔm la be
Judges16:27 Amewo yɔ xɔ la taŋtaŋ; Filistitɔwo ƒe kplɔla atɔ̃awo kple ame bubu akpe etɔ̃ (3
Judges16:28 Samson do gbe ɖa na Aƒetɔ la hegblɔ be
Judges16:29 Samson tsɔ eƒe ŋusẽ katã tutu sɔtiawo sesĩe
Judges16:30 le esime wòdo gbe ɖa be
Judges16:31 Le esiawo megbe la
Judges17:1 Ŋutsu aɖe nɔ Efraim ƒe tonyigba dzi
Judges17:2 Gbe ɖeka la
Judges17:3 Mika trɔ ga la na dadaa eye dadaa gblɔ nɛ be
Judges17:4 Dadaa tsɔ klosalo alafa eve (200) na klosaloɖaŋuwɔla aɖe wòwɔ aklamakpakpɛ aɖe da ɖe Mika ƒe aƒe me.
Judges17:5 Legba la ƒe ha ƒomevi vovovowo nɔ Mika si eye wòtsɔ via ɖeka ɖo wo nunɔlae.
Judges17:6 Le ŋkeke mawo me la
Judges17:7 Ɖekakpui aɖe si nye Levitɔ la nɔ Betlehem le Yuda
Judges17:8 edzo le Betlehem be yeadi teƒe bubu aɖe anɔ. Le eƒe mɔzɔzɔ me la
Judges17:9 Mika biae be
Judges17:10 Mika gblɔ nɛ be
Judges17:11 Enɔ na Mika abe via ŋutsuwo dometɔ ɖeka ene.
Judges17:12 Mika kɔ ɖekakpui la ŋu eye wòzu nunɔla nɛ.
Judges17:13 Mika gblɔ be
Judges18:1 Fia aɖeke menɔ Israel ɣe ma ɣi o. Dan ƒe to la nɔ teƒe aɖe dim be yewoanɔ elabena womenya amewo ɖa le anyigba si woma na wo la dzi haɖe o
Judges18:2 eya ta Dan ƒe to la tia kalẽtɔ atɔ̃ tso Zora kple Estaol duwo me be woayi aɖatsa ŋku le anyigba si dzi wodi be yewoanɔ la dzi. Esi wova ɖo Efraim ƒe tonyigba dzi la
Judges18:3 Wolé to ɖe Levitɔ la ƒe gbegbɔgblɔ ŋu eye woɖe kpɔe hebiae be
Judges18:4 Egblɔ dɔ si wɔm wòle na Mika abe eƒe nunɔla ene la na wo.
Judges18:5 Wobia tso esi be
Judges18:6 Nunɔla la ɖo eŋu be
Judges18:7 Ale ame atɔ̃awo yi Lais du la me eye wokpɔ ale si ameawo le dedie le afi mae
Judges18:8 Ale ŋkutsalawo trɔ yi wo nɔviwo gbɔ le Zora kple Estaol. Wobia wo be
Judges18:9 Ŋkutsalawo ɖo eŋu be
Judges18:10 Ne mieyi la
Judges18:11 Ale ŋutsu alafa ade tso Dan ƒe to la me bla akpa eye wodze mɔ tso Zora kple Estaol.
Judges18:12 Gbã la
Judges18:13 Tso afi ma wolia to la yi Efraim to la ƒe anyigba dzi.
Judges18:14 Esi wova to Mika ƒe aƒe ŋu yina la
Judges18:15 Ale woge ɖe Levitɔ ɖekakpui la ƒe aƒe me le Mika ƒe teƒe hedo gbe nɛ.
Judges18:16 Ame alafa ade tso Dan ƒe to la me
Judges18:17 Ŋkutsala atɔ̃awo ge ɖe xɔ la me eye wolɔ aklamakpakpɛawo
Judges18:18 Esi Levitɔ la kpɔ be wotsɔ nu siawo la
Judges18:19 Wogblɔ nɛ be
Judges18:20 Levitɔ la lɔ̃ be yeayi kpli wo
Judges18:21 Wotsɔ woƒe viwo
Judges18:22 Esi wogblẽ Mika ƒe aƒe ɖe megbe ʋɛe ko la
Judges18:23 Esi wole ɣli dom le wo yome la Dan ƒe viwo trɔ gblɔ na Mika be
Judges18:24 Eɖo eŋu na wo be
Judges18:25 Dan ƒe to la ɖo eŋu be
Judges18:26 Ale Dan ƒe to la gaho ɖe edzi eye esi Mika kpɔ be ameawo sẽ wu ye akpa ta la
Judges18:27 Dan to la tsɔ Mika ƒe legbawo eye wokplɔ eƒe nunɔla la va ɖo Lais. Lais dua me tɔwo nɔ anyi le ŋutifafa me eye womenya be naneke le dzɔdzɔm o. Wodze wo dzi kple yi eye wotɔ dzo woƒe dua.
Judges18:28 Kpeɖeŋutɔ aɖeke menɔ anyi axɔ na wo o elabena woƒe teƒea didi tso Sidon gbɔ eye womedo ka kple ame bubu aɖekewo hã o. Du la nɔ balime si te ɖe Bet Rehob ŋu. Dan ƒe to la gbugbɔ du la tu nyuie eye wònɔ afi ma.
Judges18:29 Woyɔa du la tsã be Lais
Judges18:30 Wowɔ teƒe na legbawo eye wowɔ Gersom ƒe vi kple Mose ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi
Judges18:31 Ale Dan ƒe to la subɔ Mika ƒe legbawo ŋkeke ale si Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nɔ Silo.
Judges19:1 Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Judges19:2 Ke nyɔnuvi la do dɔmedzoe ɖe eŋu eye wòsi yi fofoa gbɔ le Betlehem
Judges19:3 Ŋutsu sia kplɔ subɔla ɖeka kple tedzi eve yi be yewoable ahiãvi la nu akplɔe agbɔe. Esi woɖo Betlehem la
Judges19:4 eye wòbia tso wo si be woanɔ yewo gbɔ vie. Ale wonɔ wo gbɔ ŋkeke etɔ̃ le dzidzɔ kple dzidzeme me. Woɖu nu
Judges19:5 Le ŋkeke enelia gbe la
Judges19:6 Ale wo kple eve la wonɔ anyi
Judges19:7 Ŋutsu la melɔ̃ ɖe edzi gbã o gake aƒea tɔ ƒoe ɖe enu va se ɖe esime wòlɔ̃.
Judges19:8 Esi ŋu ke la
Judges19:9 Gbe ma gbe ɣetrɔ esi Levitɔ la kple eƒe ahiãvi la kple subɔla la nɔ dzadzram ɖo na dzodzo la
Judges19:10 Ke ŋutsu la melɔ̃ be yeagatsi anyi zã ma me o
Judges19:11 Esi woɖo afi ma la
Judges19:12 Ŋutsu la ɖo eŋu be
Judges19:13 Eyi edzi be
Judges19:14 Ale woyi mɔzɔzɔ la dzi. Ɣe nɔ to ɖom esime wova ɖo Gibea
Judges19:15 Woɖo be yewoatsi afi ma adɔ
Judges19:16 Sẽe ko la
Judges19:17 Esi wòkpɔ be amedzroawo dro ɖe ablɔme la
Judges19:18 Levitɔ la ɖo eŋu be
Judges19:19 togbɔ be nuɖuɖu le mía si na míaƒe tedziwo eye nuɖuɖu kple wain hã sɔ gbɔ na nye ŋutɔ kple nye ahiãvi kple subɔla la hã hafi.”
Judges19:20 Ŋutsu tsitsi la gblɔ be
Judges19:21 Ŋutsu tsitsi la kplɔ wo yi aƒe mee
Judges19:22 Esi wonɔ dzidzɔ dom na wo ɖokui la
Judges19:23 Aƒea tɔ do ɖe wo ŋuti eye wògblɔ na wo be
Judges19:24 Mina maɖe asi le vinye ɖetugbi si menya ŋutsu haɖe o kple ŋutsu la ƒe ahiãvi ŋuti na mi. Makplɔ wo do goe eye miate ŋu awɔ nu sia nu kpli wo
Judges19:25 Ame vloawo meɖo toe o. Tete Levitɔ la he ahiãvi la do goe tso xɔ la me na wo. Ameawo wɔ fui
Judges19:26 eyi eƒe aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe me
Judges19:27 Esi Levitɔ la ʋu ʋɔa hena mɔdzedze la
Judges19:28 Egblɔ nɛ be
Judges19:29 Esi wòɖo aƒe la
Judges19:30 Ame sia ame si kpɔ nu sia la gblɔ be
Judges20:1 Ale Israelviwo katã tso Dan va se ɖe Beerseba kple Gileadnyigba dzi la ƒo ƒu abe ame ɖeka ene ɖe Yehowa ŋkume le Mizpa.
Judges20:2 Israelviwo ƒe towo katã ƒe kplɔlawo nɔ Mawu ƒe amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo la me kple asrafo akpe alafa ene (400
Judges20:3 Benyamin ƒe to la se nu tso Israelviwo ƒe aʋakɔ ƒe ƒuƒoƒo ɖe Mizpa ŋu. Israel Fiawo yɔ Levitɔ si ƒe ahiãvi wowu la be wòagblɔ nya si dzɔ tututu la na yewo.
Judges20:4 Levitɔ la gblɔ be
Judges20:5 Le zã ma me la
Judges20:6 Ale mefli ame kukua ɖe akpa wuieve me eye meɖo akpa ɖeka ɖe to ɖe sia ɖe le Israelnyigba dzi elabena ame siawo wɔ nu vɔ̃ vɔ̃ɖi aɖe.
Judges20:7 Azɔ la
Judges20:8 Ameawo katã gblɔ kple gbe ɖeka be
Judges20:9 Nu si míawɔ enye míadzidze nu ɖe wo dzi eye míatia ame aɖewo be woaho aʋa ɖe wo ŋu.
Judges20:10 Israelviwo ƒe ewolia ƒe ɖeka ana nuɖuɖu aʋawɔlawo eye ame mamlɛawo ayi aɖahe to na Gibeatɔwo le nu vɔ̃ vɔ̃ɖi si wowɔ ɖe nyɔnu la ŋu le Israelnyigba dzi la ta.”
Judges20:11 Ale dukɔ blibo la sɔ nu le dɔdeasi sia wɔwɔ me.
Judges20:12 Eye Israel toawo ɖo amewo ɖe Benyamin ƒe to la be woagblɔ na wo be
Judges20:13 Miɖe asi le nu vɔ̃ sia wɔlawo ŋu ale be
Judges20:14 Wotso woƒe duwo me va ƒo ƒu ɖe Gibea be yewoawɔ aʋa kple Israelviwo.
Judges20:15 Benyamin ƒe viwo ƒo ƒu ame siwo ta yi akpe blaeve-vɔ-ade (26
Judges20:16 Miawɔla alafa adre siwo nye aŋutrɔdala nyuiwo la nɔ ameawo dome
Judges20:17 Israelviwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo
Judges20:18 Hafi woadze aʋa la wɔwɔ gɔme la
Judges20:19 Esi ŋu ke la
Judges20:20 Israelviwo yi be woawɔ aʋa kple Benyamin ƒe viwo eye wodze aʋalɔgowo ɖe wo ŋu le Gibea.
Judges20:21 Benyamin ƒe viwo do tso Gibea eye wowu Israelvi akpe blaeve-vɔ-eve (22
Judges20:22 Ke Israelviwo de dzi ƒo na wo nɔewo eye wogaƒo ƒu ɖe teƒe si wonɔ le ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi.
Judges20:23 Israelviwo yi Yehowa gbɔ hefa avi nɛ va se ɖe fiẽ eye wobia Yehowa be
Judges20:24 Israelviwo gakpe aʋa kple Benyamin ƒe to la zi evelia.
Judges20:25 Gbe ma gbe la
Judges20:26 Israelʋakɔ blibo la yi Betel
Judges20:27 Israelviwo bia gbe Yehowa (le esime Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la nɔ afi ma
Judges20:28 eye Finehas
Judges20:29 Ale Israelvi aɖewo de xa ɖe teƒe vovovoawo ƒo xlã Gibea
Judges20:30 eye Israelviwo ho ɖe Benyaminviwo ŋu le ŋkeke etɔ̃a gbe hedze aʋa ɖe Gibea dzi abe tsã ene.
Judges20:31 Esi Benyamin ƒe to la do go le dua me be yewoakpe aʋa kpli wo la
Judges20:32 Benyamin ƒe to la do ɣli be
Judges20:33 Ke esi Israelviwo ƒe aʋalɔgo gãtɔ ɖo Baal Tama la
Judges20:34 eye wokplɔ Benyamin ƒe to la ɖo to megbe
Judges20:35 Ale Yehowa si Benyamin ƒe to la le Israelviwo ŋgɔ eye Israelviwo wu ame akpe blaeve vɔ atɔ̃ le Benyamin ƒe to la dome
Judges20:36 Israelviwo ƒe aʋalɔgo gãtɔ si yi megbe elabena woɖo ŋu ɖe woƒe aʋalɔgo si de xa ɖi ƒo xlã Gibea la ŋu.
Judges20:37 Ame siawo yi Gibea dua me eye wowu ame sia ame.
Judges20:38 Israel ŋutsuwo kple xadolawo ɖo gbe ɖi be ne wokpɔ dzudzɔ gã aɖe le dodom le dua me ko la
Judges20:39 ekema Israel ƒe aʋalɔgo gãtɔ me nɔlawo natrɔ awɔ aʋa ŋkume kple ŋkume kple Benyamin ƒe to la. Esi Benyamin ƒe to la wu ame blaetɔ̃ xoxo ta la
Judges20:40 Tete dzesi si woɖo da ɖi la dze na wo: dzudzɔ de asi tutu me kɔlikɔli le dua me. Esi Benyamin ƒe to la trɔ kɔ kpɔ megbe la
Judges20:41 Israelviwo trɔ ɖe wo ŋu azɔ. Benyamin ƒe to la tɔtɔ eye wosi ɖo ta gbedzi elabena wodze sii azɔ be yewotsrɔ̃ vɔ.
Judges20:42 Wosi le Israelviwo nu ɖo ta gbedzi
Judges20:43 Woɖe to ɖe Benyamin ƒe aʋakɔ la le Gibea ƒe ɣedzeƒe lɔƒo eye wowu wo dometɔ geɖewo le afi ma.
Judges20:44 Ame akpe wuienyie (18
Judges20:45 Agbetsilawo si yi gbedzi le Rimon kpe la gbɔ le esime wowu wo dometɔ ame akpe atɔ̃ le mɔa dzi eye wogawu ame akpe eve le Gidom gbɔ.
Judges20:46 Gbe ma gbe la
Judges20:47 Ke ame alafa ade si yi gbegbe la
Judges20:48 Israel ƒe aʋakɔ la trɔ azɔ ɖe dua gbɔ eye wowu Benyamin ƒe to la ƒe ŋutsuwo
Judges21:1 Israel ƒe kplɔlawo ka atam na Yehowa le Mizpa be yewomatsɔ yewoƒe ɖetugbiwo ana Benyamin ƒe to la ƒe ŋutsuwo woaɖe gbeɖegbeɖe o.
Judges21:2 Azɔ la
Judges21:3 Wofa avi gblɔ be
Judges21:4 Woɖi vɔsamlekpui aɖe le gbe ma gbe ƒe ŋdi kanya eye wosa akpedavɔ le edzi.
Judges21:5 Wogblɔ na wo nɔewo be
Judges21:6 Israelviwo katã fa konyi le ale si Benyamin ƒe to la tsrɔ̃ le wo dome la ta eye wogblɔ be
Judges21:7 Afi ka míakpɔ nyɔnuwo le na ŋutsu ʋɛ siwo tsi agbe esi míetsɔ Yehowa ka atam be míatsɔ míaƒe vinyɔnuwo na woƒe ɖekakpuiwo woaɖe o?”
Judges21:8 Eye wobia be
Judges21:9 Esi woxlẽ ameawo la
Judges21:10 Ale woɖe gbe na aʋawɔla kalẽtɔ akpe wuieve (12
Judges21:11 Miwu ŋutsuwo katã kple nyɔnu siwo katã dɔ ŋutsu gbɔ kpɔ.”
Judges21:12 Wokpɔ ɖetugbi alafa ene siwo medɔ ŋutsu gbɔ kpɔ o la le ame siwo nɔ Yabes Gilead la dome eye wokplɔ wo va asaɖa la me le Silo
Judges21:13 Israelvi bubuawo ɖo ame ɖe Benyamin ƒe to la ƒe ŋutsu siwo tsi agbe eye wole Rimon kpe la gbɔ.
Judges21:14 Wotsɔ ɖetugbi alafa eneawo na wo woɖe eye wotrɔ yi woƒe aƒewo me. Ke ɖetugbiawo mede ŋutsuawo katã nu o.
Judges21:15 Nublanuinya gã aɖee wònye le Israel le ŋkeke mawo me elabena Yehowa de mama Israel ƒe toawo dome.
Judges21:16 Israelviwo ƒe kplɔlawo gblɔ be
Judges21:17 Ele be míato mɔ aɖe nu adi srɔ̃ na wo kokoko ale be
Judges21:18 Ke míate ŋu atsɔ míawo ŋutɔ ƒe vinyɔnuwo na wo o elabena mí Israelviwo míeka atam be
Judges21:19 Ke ame aɖe ɖo ŋku Yehowa ƒe ŋkekenyui si woɖuna ƒe sia ƒe la dzi. Woɖua ŋkekenyui sia le Silo
Judges21:20 Wogblɔ na Benyamin ƒe to la ƒe ŋutsu siwo mekpɔ srɔ̃ ɖe haɖe o la be
Judges21:21 eye ne Silo ɖetugbiwo va yina ɣeɖuƒe la
Judges21:22 Ne wo fofowo kple wo nɔviŋutsuwo va nya he ge ɖe mía ŋu la
Judges21:23 Ale Benyamin ƒe to la ƒe ŋutsuwo wɔ ɖe nya si wogblɔ na wo la dzi
Judges21:24 Israelvi bubuawo hã trɔ yi wo de.
Judges21:25 Le ɣe ma ɣiwo me la

Ruth1:6 Azɔ Naomi ɖoe be yeatrɔ ayi ɖe aƒe le Israelnyigba dzi
Ruth1:7 Eya ta eya kple lɔ̃xoyɔvi eveawo dzra ɖo hedze mɔ ɖo ta aƒe.
Ruth1:8 Ke esi wonɔ mɔa dzi yina la

Ruth2:6 Dzikpɔla la ɖo eŋu be
