Ruth2:20 Naomi gblɔ na lɔ̃xoyɔvia be
Ruth2:21 Rut
Ruth2:22 Naomi gblɔ na lɔ̃xoyɔvia Rut be
Ruth2:23 Ale Rut lé eɖokui ɖe Boaz ƒe dɔlanyɔnuwo ŋu henɔ nukuwo fɔm va se ɖe esime lu kple ƒo ŋeɣi wu enu
Ruth3:1 Gbe ɖeka la
Ruth3:2 Ŋutsu si le nye susu me lae nye Boaz. Enyo dɔ me na mí ŋutɔ
Ruth3:3 eya ta wɔ ɖe nya si magblɔ na wò la dzi. Le tsi
Ruth3:4 Lé ŋku ɖe afi si wòamlɔ la ŋu
Ruth3:5 Rut ɖo eŋu be
Ruth3:6 Ale Rut yi lugbɔƒe la
Ruth3:7 Esi Boaz ɖu nu
Ruth3:8 Le zãtitina lɔƒo la
Ruth3:9 Ebiae be
Ruth3:10 Boaz do ɣli be
Ruth3:11 Azɔ la
Ruth3:12 Ke kuxi ɖeka aɖe le nya la ŋu. Enye nyateƒe be wò ƒometɔe menye
Ruth3:13 Tsi afi sia dɔ. Ne ŋu ke la
Ruth3:14 Ale Rut mlɔ Boaz ƒe afɔ nu va se ɖe fɔŋli. Efɔ kaba hafi ŋu ke nyuie
Ruth3:15 Boaz gagblɔ nɛ hã be
Ruth3:16 Esi wòɖo aƒe me la
Ruth3:17 eye wògblɔ kpe ɖe eŋu be
Ruth3:18 Tete Naomi gblɔ na Rut be
Ruth4:1 Boaz yi ɖanɔ dua ƒe ƒuƒoƒe
Ruth4:2 Wonɔ anyi
Ruth4:3 Boaz gblɔ na eƒe ƒometɔ la be
Ruth4:4 eye mekpɔ be ele be maƒo nu kpli wò tso eŋu
Ruth4:5 Boaz yi edzi be
Ruth4:6 Ŋutsu la ɖo eŋu be
Ruth4:7 Enye kɔnu le Israel ɣe ma ɣi be ne ame aɖe di be yeatsɔ yeƒe ɖuƒe na ame bubu la
Ruth4:8 Ale ŋutsu la ɖe eƒe afɔkpa esi wògblɔ na Boaz be
Ruth4:9 Ale Boaz gblɔ na ɖasefoawo kple ame siwo nɔ tsitre ƒo xlã wo la be
Ruth4:10 eye mexɔ Rut
Ruth4:11 Ale ame siwo katã nɔ agboa nu la gblɔ be
Ruth4:12 Wò dzidzimevi siwo Yehowa ana wò to nyɔnu sia dzi la nana wò ƒome nanɔ abe Perez
Ruth4:13 Ale Boaz ɖe Rut wòzu srɔ̃a
Ruth4:14 Nyɔnuwo gblɔ na Naomi be
Ruth4:15 nena wò agbenɔnɔ nazu yeye
Ruth4:16 Naomi xɔ ɖevi la da ɖe atata
Ruth4:17 Nyɔnu siwo nɔ afi ma la gblɔ be
Ruth4:18 Perez ƒe dzidzimeviwo yi ale: Perez dzi Hezron
Ruth4:19 Hezron dzi Ram
Ruth4:20 Aminadab dzi Nahson
Ruth4:21 Salma dzi Boaz
Ruth4:22 Obed dzi Yese
1Samuel1:1 Esiae nye Elkana
1Samuel1:2 Srɔ̃ eve nɔ Elkana si
1Samuel1:3 Elkana kple srɔ̃awo kple wo viwo zɔa mɔ ƒe sia ƒe yia Yehowa ƒe agbadɔ la me le Silo be woasubɔ Yehowa
1Samuel1:4 Ne ɣeyiɣi de be Elkana nasa vɔ la
1Samuel1:5 Ke enaa lã la ƒe akpa eve Hana ya elabena togbɔ be elɔ̃e hã la Yehowa tu eƒe vidzidɔ.
1Samuel1:6 Esi wònye be Yehowa tu eƒe vidzidɔ ta la
1Samuel1:7 Esia yia dzi ƒe sia ƒe. Nenye be Hana yi ɖe Yehowa ƒe aƒe me la
1Samuel1:8 Srɔ̃a Elkana bianɛ be
1Samuel1:9 Gbe ɖeka le Silo
1Samuel1:10 Hana nɔ nu xam vevie
1Samuel1:11 eye wòɖe adzɔgbe na Yehowa be
1Samuel1:12 Esime Hana nɔ gbe dom ɖa na Yehowa la
1Samuel1:13 Hana do gbea ɖa le eƒe dzi me
1Samuel1:14 Ale Eli biae be
1Samuel1:15 Hana ɖo eŋu gblɔ be
1Samuel1:16 Mègabu wò dɔlanyɔnu vɔ̃ɖi o. Nye xaxawo tae mele gbe dom ɖa le afi sia le nuxaxa blibo me.”
1Samuel1:17 Eli gblɔ be
1Samuel1:18 Hana gblɔ be
1Samuel1:19 Ƒome blibo la fɔ ŋdi kanya heyi ɖasubɔ Yehowa le Agbadɔ la me eye wotrɔ yi woƒe aƒe me le Rama. Elkana dɔ srɔ̃a Hana gbɔ eye Yehowa ɖo ŋku Hana dzi.
1Samuel1:20 Ale le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la
1Samuel1:21 Esi ƒe trɔ la
1Samuel1:22 Ke Hana meyi o. Egblɔ na srɔ̃a be
1Samuel1:23 Elkana lɔ̃ ɖe edzi hegblɔ be
1Samuel1:24 Esi wòtso no na ɖevia la
1Samuel1:25 Le vɔsa la megbe la
1Samuel1:26 Hana bia Eli be
1Samuel1:27 Meɖe kuku nɛ be wòana ɖevi siam eye wòna nu si mebiae lam.
1Samuel1:28 Eya ta mele ɖevi la tsɔm na Yehowa azɔ le eƒe agbemeŋkekewo katã me.” Ale Hana gblẽ ɖevia ɖe afi ma le Agbadɔ la me na Yehowa.
1Samuel2:1 Hana do gbe ɖa be
1Samuel2:2 “Ame aɖeke mele kɔkɔe abe Yehowa ene o! Bubu aɖeke megali o kpe ɖe ŋutiwò o. Eye Agakpe aɖeke meli abe míaƒe Mawu ene o.
1Samuel2:3 “Mèganɔ nu ƒom dadatɔe nenema o
1Samuel2:4 “Woŋe ŋusẽtɔwo ƒe aŋutrɔwo ke ame beliwo la
1Samuel2:5 Ame siwo ɖi ƒo tsã la
1Samuel2:6 “Yehowa wua ame gagbɔa agbe ame; enana woyia yɔ me eye wògafɔa ame tso yɔ me.
1Samuel2:7 Yehowa ɖoa ahedada ɖa eye eya kee gaɖoa hokpɔkpɔ ɖa; eyae bɔbɔa ame ɖe anyi eye eya kee gadoa ame ɖe dzi.
1Samuel2:8 Eyae ɖea ame dahe tso ke me eye wòfɔa hiãtɔ tso afi me enaa zikpui wo ɖe dziɖulawo xa eye wònaa wonyia dome kple bubu ƒe fiazikpui. “Elabena Yehowa tɔe nye anyigba ƒe gɔmeɖokpe; eya dzie wòɖo xexea me gɔme anyi ɖo.
1Samuel2:9 Adzɔ eƒe ame kɔkɔewo ƒe afɔ ŋu
1Samuel2:10 ame siwo tso ɖe Yehowa ŋu la
1Samuel2:11 Ale Elkana yi aƒe me le Rama
1Samuel2:12 Azɔ Eli viŋutsuwo nye nu tovo wɔlawo
1Samuel2:13 loo alo dea bubu nunɔlawo ƒe dɔdeasiwo na dukɔ la ŋu o. Ne ame aɖe va sa vɔ la
1Samuel2:14 Dɔla la tsɔa gaflo la ƒona ɖe gaze
1Samuel2:15 Gawu la
1Samuel2:16 Ne ame si le vɔ la sam gblɔ be
1Samuel2:17 Ale ɖekakpui siawo ƒe nu vɔ̃ tri akɔ le Yehowa ƒe ŋkume elabena wodoa vlo ameawo ƒe vɔ siwo wosana na Yehowa.
1Samuel2:18 Ke Samuel ya subɔna le Yehowa ŋkume
1Samuel2:19 Dadaa tɔa awu ʋlaya sue aɖe nɛ ƒe sia ƒe ne eya kple srɔ̃a gbɔna vɔsaƒe.
1Samuel2:20 Eli yraa Elkana kple srɔ̃a Hana gblɔna be
1Samuel2:21 Yehowa ve Hana nu wòdzi viŋutsu etɔ̃ kple vinyɔnu eve ɖe Samuel yome. Ale Samuel tsi ɖe edzi le Yehowa ƒe ŋkume.
1Samuel2:22 Eli zu amegãɖeɖi aɖe azɔ gake enya nu siwo katã viawo nɔa wɔwɔm ɖe Israel blibo la ŋu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me
1Samuel2:23 Egblɔ na viawo be
1Samuel2:24 Nya siwo sem mele tso mia ŋu la
1Samuel2:25 Ne ame aɖe wɔ nu vɔ̃ ɖe nɔvia amegbetɔ ŋu la
1Samuel2:26 Samuel
1Samuel2:27 Gbe ɖeka la
1Samuel2:28 Ɖe nyemetia mia tɔgbi Levi tso Israel towo katã dome be wòanye nunɔla nam
1Samuel2:29 Ekema nu ka ta miele ŋu klẽm ale ɖe vɔsanu bubu siwo ameawo tsɔna vanɛ nam la ŋu? Nu ka ta nède bubu viwòwo ŋu wu ŋunye? Nu nyui siwo Israel
1Samuel2:30 “Eya ta Yehowa
1Samuel2:31 Ɣeyiɣi la gbɔna esi maɖe wò kple fofowò ƒe aƒe ƒe ŋusẽ dzi akpɔtɔ ale be amegãɖeɖi aɖeke manɔ wò ƒomea me o
1Samuel2:32 eye àkpɔ xaxa le nye nɔƒe la me. Togbɔ be woawɔ nyui na Israel hã la
1Samuel2:33 Mia dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe si nyemeɖe ɖa le nye vɔsamlekpui ŋgɔ o la atsi agbe
1Samuel2:34 “ ‘Azɔ nu si ava dzɔ ɖe viwò ŋutsu eveawo
1Samuel2:35 Maɖo nunɔla nuteƒewɔla na ɖokuinye ame si awɔ ɖe nu si meɖo ɖe nye dzi me kple ta me la dzi. Mali ke eƒe aƒe la sesĩe eye wòasubɔ le nye amesiamina la ƒe ŋkume ɖaa.
1Samuel2:36 Ekema ame sia ame si susɔ ɖe wò ƒome la me ava de ta agu ɖe eŋkume abia klosaloga ɖeka alo abolo kakɛ aɖe kple kukuɖeɖe be
1Samuel3:1 Samuel
1Samuel3:2 Fifia
1Samuel3:3 Samuel hã mlɔ gbedoxɔ la me le afi si nubablaɖaka la nɔ. Ke esi wòsusɔ vie woatsi xɔmekaɖiwo la
1Samuel3:4 Yehowa yɔe be
1Samuel3:5 Efɔ eye wòƒu du yi Eli gbɔ hegblɔ be
1Samuel3:6 Yehowa gayɔe ake be
1Samuel3:7 Samuel medze si Yehowa haɖe o eye Yehowa meƒo nu nɛ kpɔ haɖe hã o.
1Samuel3:8 Yehowa gayɔ Samuel zi etɔ̃lia. Samuel gaƒu du yi Eli gbɔ eye wògagblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel3:9 eya ta wògblɔ na Samuel be
1Samuel3:10 Yehowa gayɔe abe tsã ene be
1Samuel3:11 Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel be
1Samuel3:12 Mawɔ nu dziŋɔ siwo katã ŋu meƒo nu tsoe na Eli.
1Samuel3:13 Metsɔ tohehe do ŋgɔ na Eli kple eƒe ƒome blibo la elabena viawo le busunuwo wɔm ɖe Mawu ŋu eye Eli megbe na wo o.
1Samuel3:14 Eya ta meka atam be vɔsawo kple nunanawo mate ŋu ana woatsɔ Eli kple viawo ƒe nu vɔ̃wo ake akpɔ o.”
1Samuel3:15 Samuel nɔ anyimlɔƒe va se ɖe ŋdi. Eʋu gbedoxɔ la ƒe ʋɔtru abe ale si wòwɔna ɖaa ene
1Samuel3:16 Ke Eli yɔe be
1Samuel3:17 Eli biae be
1Samuel3:18 Ale Samuel gblɔ nya sia nya si Yehowa gblɔ nɛ la na Eli eye Eli ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel3:19 Esi Samuel nɔ tsitsim la
1Samuel3:20 Eya ta Israel blibo la
1Samuel3:21 Yehowa gaɖea eɖokui fiana le Silo. Eɖe eɖokui fia Samuel eye wòƒo nu nɛ le afi ma. Ne Samuel ƒo nu la
1Samuel4:1 Eye Samuel ƒe nya de Israel blibo gbɔ. Le ɣeyiɣi ma me la
1Samuel4:2 Filistitɔwo ɖu Israelviwo dzi; wowu Israelvi akpe ene.
1Samuel4:3 Esi aʋa la ke la
1Samuel4:4 Ale wona woyi ɖatsɔ Yehowa
1Samuel4:5 Esi Israelviwo kpɔ be wotsɔ Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la gbɔnae la
1Samuel4:6 Filistitɔwo bia be
1Samuel4:7 dzidzi ƒo wo. Wodo ɣli be
1Samuel4:8 Ame kae ate ŋu aɖe mí tso Mawu ŋusẽtɔ si me? Mawu siawo kee tsrɔ̃ Egiptetɔwo kple dɔ vɔ̃wo esime Israel nɔ gbedzi.
1Samuel4:9 Oo
1Samuel4:10 Ale Filistitɔwo wɔ aʋa kple ŋusẽ eye wogaɖu Israelviwo dzi. Wowu Israelvi akpe blaetɔ̃ gbe ma gbe eye agbetsiawo si yi woƒe agbadɔwo me.
1Samuel4:11 Filistitɔwo xɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la eye wowu Hofni kple Finehas gbe ma gbe.
1Samuel4:12 Ŋutsu aɖe si tso Benyamin ƒe to la me la
1Samuel4:13 Eli nɔ lalam le mɔto be yease nya aɖe tso aʋa la ŋu elabena etsi dzimaɖeɖi ɖe Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la ƒe dedinɔnɔ ŋu. Esime ame dɔdɔ la tso aʋagbedzi va gblɔ nya si dzɔ la
1Samuel4:14 Eli bia be
1Samuel4:15 Azɔ Eli xɔ ƒe blaasiekɛ-vɔ-enyi eye eƒe ŋkuwo megale nu kpɔm nyuie o.
1Samuel4:16 Ame dɔdɔ la gblɔ na Eli be
1Samuel4:17 Ame dɔdɔ la ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel4:18 Esi ame dɔdɔ la gblɔ nya si dzɔ ɖe Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la dzi ko la
1Samuel4:19 Esi Eli ƒe toyɔvi
1Samuel4:20 Aɖabaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo do ŋgɔ na eƒe ku la
1Samuel4:21 Ena ŋkɔ ŋutsuvi la be
1Samuel4:22 Egblɔ be
1Samuel5:1 Filistitɔwo tsɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la tso aʋagbe la dzi le Ebenezer
1Samuel5:2 yi woƒe mawu Dagon
1Samuel5:3 Esi ame aɖewo yi be yewoakpɔe ɖa le ŋdi la
1Samuel5:4 ke esi ŋu gake la
1Samuel5:5 Le esia ta
1Samuel5:6 Yehowa ƒe asi sẽ ɖe Asdodtɔwo kple kɔƒe siwo ƒo xlã wo la me tɔwo dzi
1Samuel5:7 Esi ameawo dze si nu si de asi dzɔdzɔ ɖe wo dzi la
1Samuel5:8 Ale woyɔ takpekpe na Filistitɔwo ƒe dziɖulawo katã
1Samuel5:9 Ke esi wotsɔe yi afi mae ko la Yehowa ƒe asi va Gat du la dzi
1Samuel5:10 Ale wotsɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la ɖo ta Ekron. Ke esi Ekrontɔwo kpɔe wògbɔna wo gbɔ ko la
1Samuel5:11 Ale wogayɔ du atɔ̃awo kplɔlawo ƒo ƒui eye woɖe kuku na wo be woaɖo Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la ɖe eƒe dukɔ Israel ale be dua me tɔwo katã mava ku o. Dɔ la de asi amewo léle me ale vɔvɔ̃ ɖo ame sia ame le dua me.
1Samuel5:12 Ame siwo meku haɖe o la nɔ dɔ lém kutɔkutɔe
1Samuel6:1 Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la nɔ Filistitɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi ɣleti adre.
1Samuel6:2 Filistitɔwo yɔ woƒe nunɔlawo kple afakalawo ƒo ƒui eye wobia wo be
1Samuel6:3 Woɖo eŋu be
1Samuel6:4 Filistitɔwo bia be
1Samuel6:5 Miwɔ nuƒoƒoeawo kple afi siwo le miaƒe anyigba gblẽm la ƒe nɔnɔmewo eye miade bubu Israel ƒe Mawu la ŋu. Ɖewohĩ aɖe eƒe dɔmedzoe si wòda ɖe miawo ŋutɔ kple miaƒe mawuawo kple miaƒe anyigba dzi la ɖa.
1Samuel6:6 Nu ka ŋuti miesẽ miaƒe dzi me abe ale si Egiptetɔwo kple Farao wɔ ene? Esi wòwɔ fu wo la ɖe womeɖo Israelviwo ɖa be woadzo oa?
1Samuel6:7 “Miwɔ tasiaɖam yeye eye miatsii ɖe nyinɔ eve siwo dzi vi le ŋkeke siawo me eye wometsi keke ɖe wo ŋu kpɔ haɖe o la ŋuti. Milé wo viwo de kpo me.
1Samuel6:8 Mitsɔ Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la eye midae ɖe tasiaɖam la dzi
1Samuel6:9 gake miaƒe ŋku nanɔ eŋuti. Nenye be eyi ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe anyigba dzi ɖo ta Bet Semes la
1Samuel6:10 Ale wowɔ nu si wogblɔ na wo. Wotsi nyinɔ eve ɖe tasiaɖam la ŋu eye wotu wo viwo ɖe kpo me.
1Samuel6:11 Wotsɔ Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la kple aɖaka si me sikafiwo kple sikaƒoƒoeawo nɔ la da ɖe tasiaɖam la dzi.
1Samuel6:12 Enumake nyinɔawo dze mɔ tẽe ɖo ta Bet Semes henɔ xɔxlɔ̃m sesĩe le mɔa dzi
1Samuel6:13 Bet Semestɔwo nɔ lu xam le balime le ɣe ma ɣi eye esi wofɔ mo dzi kpɔ nubablaɖaka la
1Samuel6:14 Keke la ge ɖe ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Yosua
1Samuel6:15 Ame aɖewo tso Levi ƒe to la me ɖe nubablaɖaka la kple aɖaka si me sikalegeliawo kple sikaƒoƒoeawo nɔ la le keke la dzi eye woda wo ɖe agakpe la dzi. Bet Semestɔwo sa numevɔ kple akpedavɔ na Yehowa
1Samuel6:16 Esi Filistitɔwo lé ŋku ɖe nuwo ƒe yiyi ŋu sẽe la
1Samuel6:17 Sikaƒoƒoe atɔ̃ siwo Filistitɔwo ɖo ɖa abe fɔɖivɔsanu ene la nye nunana tso Asdod
1Samuel6:18 Woɖo sikafiawo ɖa abe avulévɔsanu ene na Yehowa ɖe Filistitɔwo ƒe du bubuwo ta
1Samuel6:19 Ke Yehowa wu Bet Semestɔ blaadre elabena wokpɔ nubablaɖaka la me. Dukɔ la fa konyi le ame geɖe siwo Yehowa wu la ta.
1Samuel6:20 Ameawo bia be
1Samuel6:21 Ale woɖo du ɖe Kiriat Yearimtɔwo kple kukuɖeɖe be
1Samuel7:1 Ale Kiriat Yearimtɔwo va tsɔ Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la yi ɖada ɖe Abinadab ƒe aƒe si le to dzi la me. Wokɔ via
1Samuel7:2 Nubablaɖaka la nɔ Kiriat Yearim ƒe blaeve. Israelviwo xa nu to ƒe siawo me elabena edze na wo abe ɖe Yehowa gblẽ wo ɖi ene.
1Samuel7:3 Samuel gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la be
1Samuel7:4 Ale woɖe asi le Baal kple Astarɔtwo ŋuti eye wosubɔ Yehowa ɖeɖe ko.
1Samuel7:5 Samuel gblɔ na wo be
1Samuel7:6 Wova kpe ta ɖe Mizpa
1Samuel7:7 Esi Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo se nya tso takpekpe gã si wowɔ le Mizpa ŋu la
1Samuel7:8 Wogblɔ na Samuel be
1Samuel7:9 Ale Samuel tsɔ alẽvi aɖe sa numevɔ na Yehowa eye wòɖe kuku nɛ be wòave Israel nu. Edo ɣli na Yehowa ɖe Israel nu eye Yehowa se eƒe gbedodoɖa.
1Samuel7:10 Esi Samuel nɔ numevɔ sam ko la
1Samuel7:11 Israel ŋutsuwo do go tso Mizpa heti Filistitɔwo yome kple du eye wonɔ wo wum le mɔ dzi va se ɖe Bet Kar ƒe anyigbe ke.
1Samuel7:12 Samuel tsɔ kpe aɖe da ɖe Mizpa kple Sen dome eye wòna ŋkɔe be
1Samuel7:13 Ale wobɔbɔ Filistitɔwo ɖe anyi eye womegaho aʋa ɖe Israelviwo ŋu kpɔ o elabena Yehowa tsi tsitre ɖe wo ŋu le Samuel ƒe agbemeŋkeke mamlɛawo katã me.
1Samuel7:14 Israelviwo gbugbɔ woƒe du siwo nɔ Ekron kple Gat dome eye wonɔ Filistitɔwo si me la xɔ. Israel ɖe nuto siwo ƒo xlã wo la hã tso Filistitɔwo ƒe asi me. Ale ŋutifafa nɔ Israel kple Amoritɔwo dome.
1Samuel7:15 Samuel yi eƒe dɔ dzi abe Israel ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la ene le eƒe agbemeŋkekewo katã me.
1Samuel7:16 Etsana ƒe sia ƒe drɔ̃a ʋɔnu gbã le Betel
1Samuel7:17 Egatrɔna vaa Rama elabena afi mae nye eƒe nɔƒe eye wògadrɔ̃a ʋɔnu le afi sia hã. Eɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa ɖe Rama.
1Samuel8:1 Esi Samuel tsi la
1Samuel8:2 Via ŋutsu gbãtɔ ŋkɔe nye Yoel eye evelia ŋkɔe nye Abiya ame siwo drɔ̃ ʋɔnu le Beerseba.
1Samuel8:3 Via ŋutsuwo meto wo fofo ƒe afɔtoƒe o. Woɖe asi le mɔ dzɔdzɔe ŋu
1Samuel8:4 Ale Israel ƒe kplɔlawo katã kpe ta heva Samuel gbɔ le Rama
1Samuel8:5 Wogblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel8:6 Ke esi wogblɔ be
1Samuel8:7 Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel be
1Samuel8:8 Tso esime mekplɔ wo dzoe le Egipte la
1Samuel8:9 Azɔ la
1Samuel8:10 Ale Samuel gblɔ nya siwo katã Yehowa gblɔ la na ame siwo le ebiam be wòana fia yewo.
1Samuel8:11 Egblɔ na wo be
1Samuel8:12 Atsɔ wo dometɔ aɖewo aɖo ame akpewo nu eye wo dometɔ aɖewo anɔ ame blaatɔ̃ aɖewo nu. Ɖewo aŋlɔ eƒe agblewo
1Samuel8:13 Axɔ mía vinyɔnuwo be woanye yeƒe amiʋeʋẽwɔlawo
1Samuel8:14 Axɔ miaƒe agbledenyigba nyuitɔwo
1Samuel8:15 Axɔ miaƒe agblemenukuwo kple miaƒe wain tsetsewo ƒe ewolia eye wòatsɔ wo ana eƒe dɔnunɔlawo kple eƒe subɔlawo.
1Samuel8:16 Axɔ miaƒe dɔlaŋutsuwo
1Samuel8:17 Axɔ miaƒe lãhawo ƒe ewolia eye miawo ŋutɔ miazu eƒe kluviwo.
1Samuel8:18 Ne ŋkeke ma va ɖo la
1Samuel8:19 Ke ameawo gbe toɖoɖo Samuel. Wogblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel8:20 Ekema míanɔ abe dukɔ bubuawo katã ene eye fia anɔ mía si
1Samuel8:21 Esi Samuel se nya siawo katã si ameawo gblɔ la
1Samuel8:22 Yehowa ɖo eŋu nɛ be
1Samuel9:1 Kis nye kesinɔtɔ kple bubume aɖe tso Benyamin ƒe to la me. Fofoae nye Abiel
1Samuel9:2 Saul nye Kis ƒe viŋutsu eye wònye ɖekakpui dzeɖekɛtɔ le Israel. Ekɔ wu ame sia ame le anyigba la dzi ale be ame kɔkɔtɔ siwo kplɔe ɖo la se abɔta ko nɛ.
1Samuel9:3 Gbe ɖeka Kis ƒe tedziwo bu eya ta wòɖo Saul kple subɔla aɖe ɖa be woayi aɖadi wo vɛ.
1Samuel9:4 Wotsa le afi sia afi le Efraim ƒe tonyigba la dzi kple Salisa nyigba kple Salim nuto me kple Benyamin ƒe anyigba blibo la dzi gake womete ŋu kpɔ wo o.
1Samuel9:5 Esi wogadi wo le Zuf nyigba la hã dzi la
1Samuel9:6 Ke subɔla la gblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel9:7 Saul ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel9:8 Subɔla la gblɔ be
1Samuel9:9 Tsã ne woyina nu bia ge Mawu le Israel la
1Samuel9:10 Esi wonɔ togbɛ aɖe liam ɖo ta dua me la
1Samuel9:11 Le ŋkeke mawo me la
1Samuel9:12 Woɖo eŋu be
1Samuel9:13 Ne mieɖo dua me teti ko la
1Samuel9:14 Ale woyi dua me eye esi woɖo agboa nu tututu ko la
1Samuel9:15 Do ŋgɔ la
1Samuel9:16 “Le etsɔ si gbɔna ƒe ɣe aleawo ɣi la
1Samuel9:17 Esi Samuel kpɔ Saul ko la
1Samuel9:18 Saul te ɖe Samuel ŋu eye wòbiae be
1Samuel9:19 Enumake Samuel ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel9:20 Mègatsi dzi le tedzi siwo bu ŋkeke etɔ̃e nye esi la ŋu kura o elabena wokpɔ wo xoxo. Ke Israel ƒe kesinɔnuwo katã zu tɔwò azɔ!”
1Samuel9:21 Saul ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel9:22 Samuel kple Saul kple subɔla la yi xɔ gã la me eye wòna nɔƒe wo ɖe kplɔ̃ ta. Wode bubu wo ŋu wu ame blaetɔ̃ bubu siwo wokpe.
1Samuel9:23 Samuel gblɔ na nuɖuɖudzikpɔla la be
1Samuel9:24 Ale nuɖuɖudzikpɔla la tsɔe va da ɖe Saul ƒe akɔme. Samuel gblɔ na Saul be
1Samuel9:25 Esi wotrɔ va dua me le nuɖuɖua megbe la
1Samuel9:26 Le ŋufɔke ƒe ŋdi kanya la
1Samuel9:27 Esi woɖo dua ƒe gbɔto la
1Samuel10:1 Tete Samuel tsɔ amigoe eye wòkɔ amia ɖe Saul ƒe tame
1Samuel10:2 Ne èdzo le gbɔnye egbea la
1Samuel10:3 “Hafi nàdo ɖe Tabɔr ƒe logoti gbɔ la
1Samuel10:4 Woado gbe na wò eye woana abolo eve wò. Xɔ aboloawo.

1Samuel10:6 Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ adze dziwò kple ŋusẽ

1Samuel10:8 Dze ŋgɔ nam nàyi Gilgal. Mava gbɔwò le afi ma ava sa numevɔ kple akpedavɔ. Gake ele be nàlalam ŋkeke adre va se ɖe esime mava be magblɔ nu si nàwɔ la na wò.”
1Samuel10:9 Esi Saul trɔ be yeadzo le Samuel gbɔ la
1Samuel10:10 Esi Saul kple subɔla la ɖo Gibea la

1Samuel11:1 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
1Samuel11:2 Nahas ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel11:3 Yabes ƒe ametsitsiwo ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel11:4 Esi dɔla aɖe va Gibea
1Samuel11:5 Saul kplɔ eƒe nyiwo tso agble gbɔna va aƒe me eye wòbia be
1Samuel11:6 Mawu ƒe Gbɔgbɔ ɖiɖi ɖe Saul dzi enumake eye wòdo dɔmedzoe vevie.
1Samuel11:7 Ewu nyitsu eve
1Samuel11:8 Saul xlẽ wo le Bezek eye Israelviwo le ame akpe alafa etɔ̃ kpe ɖe ame akpe blaetɔ̃ siwo tso Yuda la ŋu.
1Samuel11:9 Saul ɖo du ɖe Yabes Gileadtɔwo be
1Samuel11:10 Ale Yabestɔwo gblɔ na woƒe futɔwo be
1Samuel11:11 Saul va do ŋdi kanya kple eƒe aʋakɔ si wòma ɖe aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ me. Edze Amonitɔwo dzi kpata eye wòwu wo tso ŋdi ma va se ɖe ŋdɔ. Ame siwo tsi agbe la kaka ale gbegbe be wo dometɔ eve aɖeke menɔ teƒe ɖeka o.

1Samuel11:13 Ke Saul gblɔ be
1Samuel11:14 Samuel gblɔ na ameawo be

1Samuel13:1 Saul xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ esi wòzu fia eye wòɖu fia ƒe blaene-vɔ-eve
1Samuel13:2 etia aʋawɔla tɔxɛ akpe etɔ̃ (3
1Samuel13:3 Yonatan si Filistitɔwo ƒe dzɔlawo le Geba eye nya sia ɖi le Filistitɔwo ƒe anyigba blibo la dzi. Eye Saul ku aʋakpẽ le Israelnyigba blibo la dzi eye wòɖe gbeƒã be “Hebritɔwo katã nesee.”
1Samuel13:4 Ale Israel dukɔ la se nyadzɔdzɔ la be: Saul tsrɔ̃ Filistitɔwo ƒe dzɔlawo eye Israel zu nuɖianu na Filistitɔwo. Ale woyɔ Israel ƒe aʋakɔ blibo la ƒo ƒu ɖe Saul ŋu le Gilgal.
1Samuel13:5 Filistitɔwo ƒo ƒu aʋakɔ gã aɖe si me tasiaɖam akpe etɔ̃ (3
1Samuel13:6 Esi Israel ŋutsuwo kpɔ xaxa gã si me wonɔ kple ale si womimi woƒe aʋakɔ la ɖoe la
1Samuel13:7 Hebritɔ aɖewo gɔ̃ la tso Yɔdan tɔsisi la eye wosi yi Gad kple Gileadnyigbawo gɔ̃ hã dzi. Saul ya tsi Gilgal eye aʋakɔ siwo nɔ eŋu la dzo nyanyanya le vɔvɔ̃ ta.
1Samuel13:8 Elala ŋkeke adre abe ale si Samuel ɖoe nɛ ene
1Samuel13:9 Ale wògblɔ be
1Samuel13:10 Esi wòwu vɔsawo nu vɔ tetee ko la
1Samuel13:11 Samuel biae be
1Samuel13:12 Eya ta mesusui be azɔ la
1Samuel13:13 Samuel gblɔ be
1Samuel13:14 Ke azɔ la
1Samuel13:15 Tete Samuel dzo le Gilgal yi Gibea le Benyaminviwo ƒe anyigba dzi. Esi Saul xlẽ eƒe aʋawɔlawo la
1Samuel13:16 Saul kple Yonatan kple ame alafa ade siawo ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Gibea le Benyaminviwo ƒe anyigba dzi le esime Filistitɔwo ganɔ Mikmas.
1Samuel13:17 Filistitɔwo ƒe aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ ho tso woƒe asaɖa me be yewoayi aɖaha nuwo. Aʋalɔgo ɖeka ɖo ta Ofra le Sual nyigba dzi;
1Samuel13:18 aʋalɔgo evelia yi Bet Horon eye etɔ̃lia ɖo ta liƒo si le Zeboim ƒe balime te ɖe gbegbe la ŋu la dzi.
1Samuel13:19 Gbede aɖeke menɔ Israelnyigba blibo la dzi le ŋkeke mawo me o elabena Filistitɔwo gblɔ bena
1Samuel13:20 Eya ta ɣe sia ɣi si Israelviwo di be yewoanyre yewoƒe agbleŋlɔnuwo
1Samuel13:21 Nenye be wonyre agbleŋlɔnuawo la
1Samuel13:22 Ale yi alo akplɔ aɖeke menɔ Israel ƒe aʋakɔ blibo la si gbe ma gbe o negbe ɖekaɖeka siwo nɔ Saul kple Yonatan si ko.
1Samuel13:23 Azɔ Filistitɔwo ɖe asrafo aɖewo woyi ɖaxɔ mɔ si ɖo ta Mikmas.
1Samuel14:1 Gbe ɖeka la
1Samuel14:2 Saul kple eƒe aʋawɔla alafa adeawo (600) ƒo ƒu ɖe yevuboɖati la gbɔ le Migron.
1Samuel14:3 Nunɔla Ahiya si do akɔtawui hã nɔ ameawo dome. Ahiya nye Ahitub

1Samuel14:15 Nu sia na Filistitɔwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo kple nuhalawo sia vɔ̃ eye wotɔtɔ. Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la anyigba ʋuʋu sesĩe eye vɔvɔ̃ gaɖo futɔwo wu tsã elabena ŋɔdzi la tso Mawu gbɔ.
1Samuel14:16 Saul ƒe gbetakpɔlawo le Benyamin ƒe Gibea kpɔ nu wɔnuku aɖe: wokpɔ Filistitɔwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo nɔ sisim tso afii yi afi mɛ.

1Samuel14:18 Saul do ɣli gblɔ na Ahiya be

1Samuel14:22 Mlɔeba la

1Samuel14:24 Ale Israelviwo ɖo xaxa gã aɖe me gbe ma gbe elabena Saul bla ameawo kple atam be
1Samuel14:25 Aʋakɔ blibo la ge ɖe ave la me eye wokpɔ anyitsi le anyigba.
1Samuel14:26 Esi wole avea me la
1Samuel14:27 Ke Yonatan ya mese se si fofoa de o eya ta wòtsɔ eƒe atikplɔ tɔ anyitsia me heno eye ŋusẽ gaɖo eŋu.

1Samuel14:29 Yonatan gblɔ be

1Samuel14:32 Gbe ma gbe fiẽ la
1Samuel14:33 Ame aɖe gblɔ nya si dzɔ la na Saul be ameawo nɔ nu vɔ̃ wɔm ɖe Yehowa ŋu to nuɖuɖu me. Saul gblɔ be
1Samuel14:34 eye miagblɔ na ameawo be woahe nyiawo kple alẽwo ava wu le afi sia eye woatsyɔ ʋu le wo me ale be womawɔ nu vɔ̃ ɖe Yehowa ŋu to ʋuɖuɖu me o.” Ale ame ɖe sia ɖe kplɔ eƒe nyi ɖe asi yi le zã ma me eye wowu wo le afi ma.

1Samuel16:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel be “Va se ɖe ɣekaɣia nàfa konyi ɖe Saul ta esi megbee be magaɖu fia ɖe Israel dzi o? Azɔ la
1Samuel16:2 Samuel gblɔ be
1Samuel16:3 Ekema kpe Yese va vɔ la saƒe eye mafia nu si nàwɔ la wò. Àsi ami na ame si dzi matɔ asi la na wò.”
1Samuel16:4 Samuel wɔ ɖe Yehowa ƒe ɖoɖo sia dzi. Esi wòɖo Betlehem la
1Samuel16:5 Samuel ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel16:6 Esi wova ɖo teƒea la
1Samuel16:7 Ke Yehowa gblɔ na Samuel be
1Samuel16:8 Yese gblɔ na via Abinadab be wòado ɖe ŋgɔ eye wòazɔ le Samuel ŋkume. Ke Samuel gablɔ be “Yehowa metia ame sia hã o.”
1Samuel16:9 Emegbe Yese yɔ Sama
1Samuel16:10 Yese na Via ŋutsuvi adreawo to Samuel ŋkume yi gake Samuel gblɔ be; “Yehowa metia wo dometɔ aɖeke o.”
1Samuel16:11 Ale wòbia Yese be
1Samuel16:12 Ale Yese dɔ woɖakplɔe vɛ. Enye ɖekakpui
1Samuel16:13 Ale Samuel tsɔ lãdzo si me ami la le
1Samuel16:14 Ke Yehowa ƒe Gbɔgbɔ dzo le Saul dzi. Yehowa na be gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ aɖe dzea Saul dzi heɖea fu nɛ.
1Samuel16:15 Saul ƒe subɔlawo gblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel16:16 Míaƒe aƒetɔ neɖe gbe na eƒe dɔlawo woayi aɖadi ame aɖe si nya kasaŋkuƒoƒo nyuie la vɛ
1Samuel16:17 Saul lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be
1Samuel16:18 Subɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ be yenya ɖekakpui aɖe tso Betlehem
1Samuel16:19 Saul ɖo dɔlawo ɖe Yese hebiae be wòaɖo via David
1Samuel16:20 Yese meɖo David ɖa asi ƒuƒlu o
1Samuel16:21 Tso esi Saul kpɔ David ko la
1Samuel16:22 Saul ɖo ame ɖe Yese be
1Samuel16:23 Eye ne Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ la dze Saul dzi la
1Samuel17:1 Azɔ la
1Samuel17:2 Saul kple Israelviwo hã ƒo ƒu
1Samuel17:3 Ale Filistitɔwo kple Israelviwo nɔ to eve dzi dze ŋgɔ wo nɔewo eye balime la tso wo dome.
1Samuel17:4 Aʋakalẽtɔ aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Goliat
1Samuel17:5 Eɖɔ akɔbligakuku eye wòkpla akpoxɔnu si wowɔ kple akɔbli si ƒe kpekpeme nye kilogram blaatɔ̃-vɔ-adre.
1Samuel17:6 Edo akpoxɔnu si wowɔ kple akɔbli la ɖe afɔ eye wòlé akɔbli ƒe akplɔ didi aɖe ɖe abɔta.
1Samuel17:7 Eƒe akplɔti le abe abaladoti ene eye wowɔ akplɔ si le enu la kple gayibɔ si ƒe kpekpeme anye kilogram adre. Eƒe akpoxɔnutsɔla nɔ eŋgɔ.
1Samuel17:8 Goliat tsi tsitre eye wòdo ɣli ɖo ɖe Israelviwo ƒe aʋalɔgowo be
1Samuel17:9 Ne ete ŋu wɔ aʋa kplim eye wòwum la
1Samuel17:10 Tete Filistitɔ la yi edzi be
1Samuel17:11 Esi Saul kple Israel blibo la se nya siwo Filistitɔ la gblɔ la
1Samuel17:12 Azɔ la
1Samuel17:13 Yese viŋutsu tsitsitɔ etɔ̃ kplɔ Saul ɖo yi aʋa. Gbãtɔ ŋkɔe nye Eliab
1Samuel17:14 David nye viŋutsuvi suetɔ. Esime nɔvia tsitsitɔ etɔ̃awo nɔ Saul ƒe aʋakɔ la me la
1Samuel17:15 David dzona le Saul gbɔ enuenu heyina Betlehem ɖakpɔa fofoa ƒe alẽwo dzi.
1Samuel17:16 Goliat
1Samuel17:17 Azɔ la
1Samuel17:18 Tsɔ notsi babla lalã ewo yi na woƒe aʋalɔgoa ƒe amegã
1Samuel17:19 Wole Saul kple Israel ŋutsuwo dome le Ela balime me le aʋa wɔm kple Filistitɔwo.”
1Samuel17:20 David fɔ ŋdi kanya
1Samuel17:21 Israelviwo kple Filistitɔwo nɔ woƒe aʋalɔgowo me hedze ŋgɔ wo nɔewo.
1Samuel17:22 David gblẽ eƒe nuwo ɖe aʋawɔnuwo dzikpɔla gbɔ heƒu du yi ɖe aʋaŋgɔ eye wòdo gbe na nɔviawo.
1Samuel17:23 Esi wònɔ nu ƒom kple nɔviawo la
1Samuel17:24 Esi Israelviwo kpɔe ko la
1Samuel17:25 Azɔ la
1Samuel17:26 David bia ŋutsu siwo nɔ tsitre ɖe egbɔ la be
1Samuel17:27 Woawo hã gagblɔ nya siwo wogblɔ tsã va yi. Wogblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel17:28 Esi Eliab
1Samuel17:29 David biae be
1Samuel17:30 David zɔ yi ame bubu gbɔ
1Samuel17:31 Wose nya si David gblɔ eye woyi ɖagblɔe na Saul. Tete Saul dɔ ame ɖa woɖayɔe va egbɔe.
1Samuel17:32 David gblɔ na Saul be
1Samuel17:33 Saul ɖo eŋu nɛ be
1Samuel17:34 Gake David gblɔ na Saul be
1Samuel17:35 metia eyome ƒonɛ ƒua anyi heɖea alẽ la le eƒe nu me. Ke ne etrɔ ɖe ŋutinye la
1Samuel17:36 Wò dɔla wu dzata kple sisiblisi eya ta anɔ na Filistitɔ bolotɔ sia hã abe woawo ke ene elabena eɖe alɔme le Mawu gbagbe la ƒe aʋalɔgowo ŋu.
1Samuel17:37 Yehowa
1Samuel17:38 Ale Saul tsɔ eya ŋutɔ ƒe aʋawɔwu si ŋu akpoxɔnuwo le la do nɛ eye wòtsɔ kuku si wowɔ kple akɔbli la ɖɔ ɖe ta nɛ.
1Samuel17:39 David do gawu la
1Samuel17:40 Tete wòtsɔ eƒe atizɔti ɖe asi eye wotia kpe zɔzrɔ̃e atɔ̃ tso tɔʋu la me hetsɔ wo de alẽkplɔlawo ƒe akplo me eye wòtsɔ eƒe aŋetu ɖe asi hezɔ ɖe Filistitɔ la dzi.
1Samuel17:41 Goliat
1Samuel17:42 Ekpɔ David ɖa eye wòkpɔ be ɖevi dzaa aɖe ko wònye
1Samuel17:43 Goliat do ɣli bia David be
1Samuel17:44 Eyi edzi gblɔ be. “Te va afi sia eye matsɔ wò lã ana dziƒoxeviwo kple gbemelãwo!”
1Samuel17:45 David do ɣli gblɔ na Filistitɔ la be
1Samuel17:46 Egbe la
1Samuel17:47 Ale ame siwo katã ƒo ƒu ɖe afi sia la woanyae be menye yi alo akplɔ Yehowa tsɔna ɖea ame o
1Samuel17:48 Esi Filistitɔ la gbɔna be yeadze David dzi la
1Samuel17:49 Eƒo asi ɖe eƒe alẽkplɔgolo la me
1Samuel17:50 Ale David ɖu Filistitɔ la dzi kple aŋetu kple kpe ɖeka
1Samuel17:51 David ƒu du yi ɖe Filistitɔ la gbɔ
1Samuel17:52 Tete Israel kple Yuda ŋutsuwo lũ ɖe eme kple ɣli eye woti Filistitɔwo yome va se ɖe Gat kple Ekron ƒe agbowo nu. Filistitɔwo ƒe kukuawo kaka ɖe Saaraim kple Gat mɔ dzi va se ɖe Ekron ke.
1Samuel17:53 Israelviwo trɔ le Filistitɔwo yome eye wova ha nuwo le woƒe asaɖa me.
1Samuel17:54 David tsɔ Filistitɔ la ƒe ta eye wòtsɔe yi Yerusalem ke etsɔ Filistitɔ la ƒe aʋawɔnuwo da ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe agbadɔ me.
1Samuel17:55 Esi Saul kpɔ David wòyina aʋa wɔ ge kple Goliat la
1Samuel17:56 Fia Saul gblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel17:57 Esi David trɔ tso Filistitɔ la wuƒe gbɔ teti ko la Abner kplɔe va Fia Saul gbɔe le esime Filistitɔ la ƒe ta ganɔ David si ko.
1Samuel17:58 Saul bia David be
1Samuel18:1 Esi Fia Saul wu eƒe nuƒoƒo kple David nu la
1Samuel18:2 Saul na David tsi egbɔ tso gbe ma gbe eye megana wòtrɔ yi aƒe me o.
1Samuel18:3 Yonatan ka atam na David be yewoanye xɔlɔ̃wo ɖaa elabena elɔ̃e abe eya ŋutɔ ɖokui ene.
1Samuel18:4 Etsɔ awu ʋlaya si wòdo
1Samuel18:5 David zu Saul ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ tɔxɛ eye wòwɔa dɔ sia dɔ si wòde asi nɛ la nyuie. Saul tsɔe ɖo aʋafiae ɖe eƒe aʋakɔwo nu eye nu sia dze asrafoawo kple ame bubuawo siaa ŋu.
1Samuel18:6 Esi ŋutsuawo trɔ gbɔna va aƒe le David ƒe Filistitɔ la wuwu vɔ megbe la
1Samuel18:7 Esi wonɔ ɣea ɖum la wodzi ha be
1Samuel18:8 Saul do dɔmedzoe vevie elabena hagbe la mevivi enu o. Egblɔ le eɖokui me be
1Samuel18:9 Tso gbe ma gbe dzi la
1Samuel18:10 Esi ŋu ke la
1Samuel18:11 Saul gblɔ le eɖokui me be
1Samuel18:12 Saul ʋã ŋu David elabena Yehowa li kple David hegblẽ eya Saul ɖi.
1Samuel18:13 Ale Saul megaɖe mɔ be David nado ɖe yeƒe ŋkume o. Eɖiɖii
1Samuel18:14 Ke nu sia nu si wòwɔna la dzea edzi nɛ elabena Yehowa li kplii.
1Samuel18:15 Saul de dzesi David ƒe dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ
1Samuel18:16 ke Israel kple Yuda blibo la lɔ̃e elabena enɔ ŋgɔ na wo le woƒe aʋawɔwɔ me.
1Samuel18:17 Gbe ɖeka la
1Samuel18:18 David gblɔ le eɖokui me be
1Samuel18:19 Esi azã la su na srɔ̃ɖeɖea la
1Samuel18:20 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
1Samuel18:21 Saul gagblɔ le eɖokui me be
1Samuel18:22 Saul bla nu kple eƒe amewo be woable David be fia la kple yewo siaa yewolɔ̃e ŋutɔ eye yewobu be anyo be wòalɔ̃ ɖe susu si fia la do ɖa la dzi eye wòazu fia la ƒe toyɔvi.
1Samuel18:23 Ke David ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel18:24 Esi Saul ŋumewo gblɔ nya si David gblɔ la
1Samuel18:25 Saul gblɔ na wo be
1Samuel18:26 Nya sia trɔ na David eya ta hafi ŋkekea naɖo na srɔ̃ɖeɖea la
1Samuel18:27 David kple eƒe amewo yi ɖawu Filistitɔ alafa eve (200) eye wòtsɔ woƒe aʋanuyiwo yi na Fia Saul. Ale Fia Saul tsɔ via nyɔnuvi
1Samuel18:28 Esi Saul kpɔ ale si Yehowa nɔ kple David kple ale si ameawo katã lɔ̃e hã la
1Samuel18:29 egavɔ̃ David wu tsã eye eƒe fulélee nu ganɔ sesẽm ɖe edzi wu gbe sia gbe.
1Samuel18:30 Ɣe sia ɣi si Filistitɔwo ho aʋa ɖe Israelviwo ŋu la
1Samuel19:1 Azɔ la
1Samuel19:2 Yonatan gblɔ ɖoɖo si fofoa wɔ ɖe eŋu la nɛ. Egblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel19:3 Mana be nye kple fofonye míava afi ma eye maƒo nu nɛ tso ŋuwò. Ekema magblɔ nya sia nya si mase tso egbɔ la na wò.”
1Samuel19:4 Le ŋufɔke ƒe ŋdi esi Yonatan nɔ dze ɖom kple fofoa la
1Samuel19:5 Ɖe nèŋlɔ ɣeyiɣi si wòtsɔ eƒe agbe ke
1Samuel19:6 Mlɔeba la
1Samuel19:7 Yonatan yɔ David emegbe eye wòka nya si dzɔ la ta nɛ. Ekplɔ David yi Saul gbɔ eye wo dome ganɔ abe tsã ene.
1Samuel19:8 Le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe megbe la
1Samuel19:9 Ke gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ aɖe tso Yehowa gbɔ va Saul dzi
1Samuel19:10 Saul di be yeatsɔ yeƒe akplɔ amimii ɖe gli ŋu
1Samuel19:11 Saul ɖo asrafowo ɖa be woadzɔ David ƒe aƒe ŋu ne edo go tso eƒe xɔ me ŋdi ko la
1Samuel19:12 Ale Mixal kpe ɖe srɔ̃a ŋu wòɖi to fesre to hesi.
1Samuel19:13 Mixal tsɔ ametikpakpɛ aɖe da ɖe David ƒe aba dzi
1Samuel19:14 Esi asrafoawo va be woalé David ayi na Saul la
1Samuel19:15 Saul gblɔ ɖo ɖa be woakɔ David kple eƒe abati la vɛ ale be yeate ŋu awui.
1Samuel19:16 Ke esi wova be woakɔe kple abatia la
1Samuel19:17 Saul bia via Mixal be
1Samuel19:18 Ale David si yi Rama ɖakpɔ Samuel eye wògblɔ nu siwo katã Saul wɔ ɖe eŋu la nɛ eye Samuel kplɔ David yi Nayɔt.
1Samuel19:19 Esi Saul se be David nɔ Nayɔt le Rama la
1Samuel19:20 eɖo asrafowo ɖa be woalée vɛ. Ke esi woɖo afi ma eye wokpɔ Samuel kple nyagblɔɖila bubuwo nɔ nya gblɔm ɖi la
1Samuel19:21 Esi Saul se nya si dzɔ la
1Samuel19:22 Azɔ Saul ŋutɔ yi Rama eye esi wòɖo vudo la gbɔ le Seku la
1Samuel19:23 Ke esi wòyina Nayɔt la
1Samuel19:24 Edze eƒe awuwo hetsi amama to ŋkeke kple zã blibo la me eye wògblɔ nya ɖi kple Samuel ƒe nyagblɔɖilawo. Eŋumewo tsi yaa eye wobia be
1Samuel20:1 Azɔ la
1Samuel20:2 Yonatan ɖo eŋu nɛ be
1Samuel20:3 Ke David ka atam hegblɔ be
1Samuel20:4 Yonatan gblɔ na David be
1Samuel20:5 Ale David gblɔ be
1Samuel20:6 Ne fofowò mekpɔm o eye wòbia tanye la
1Samuel20:7 Ke ne egblɔ be
1Samuel20:8 Ke wò ya la
1Samuel20:9 Yonatan ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel20:10 David biae be
1Samuel20:11 Yonatan gblɔ be
1Samuel20:12 Yonatan gblɔ na David be
1Samuel20:13 Ne edo dɔmedzoe eye wòdi be yeawu wò la
1Samuel20:14 Ɖo ŋku edzi be ele be nàɖe Yehowa ƒe lɔlɔ̃ kple dɔmenyo afia menye nye ɖeka ko le nye agbenɔɣi me o
1Samuel20:15 ke boŋ na vinyewo hã ne Yehowa tsrɔ̃ wò futɔwo katã.”
1Samuel20:16 Ale Yonatan bla nu kple David ƒe ƒometɔwo eye David ka atam be fiƒode dziŋɔ aɖe nava ye kple yeƒe ƒometɔwo dzi ne yewomewɔ nubabla la dzi o.
1Samuel20:17 Ke Yonatan na David gaka atam nɛ azɔ kple eƒe lɔlɔ̃ nɛ elabena elɔ̃e abe eɖokui ene.
1Samuel20:18 Yonatan gblɔ be
1Samuel20:19 Ame sia ame anɔ tawò biam tso nyitsɔ
1Samuel20:20 Mava da aŋutrɔ etɔ̃ ɖe kpeawo ŋgɔ abe nane medzidze le dadam ene.
1Samuel20:21 Emegbe maɖo ɖekakpui aɖe ɖa be wòayi aɖatsɔ aŋutrɔawo vɛ nam. Ne èse megblɔ be
1Samuel20:22 Ke ne megblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel20:23 Yehowa nana míawɔ míaƒe ŋugbedodowo na mía nɔewo dzi elabena Yehowae nye avuléla le mía dome tegbetegbe.”
1Samuel20:24 Ale David ɣla eɖokui ɖe gbedzi eye esi ɣleti yeyea ƒe ŋkekenyui la ɖo edzi la
1Samuel20:25 Enɔ gli ŋu afi si wònɔna ɖaa. Yonatan nɔ anyi dze ŋgɔe eye Abner nɔ Saul xa
1Samuel20:26 Saul megblɔ nya aɖeke tso nu sia ŋu gbe ma gbe o elabena ebu be nya aɖee anya dzɔ alo David ŋu mekɔ o.
1Samuel20:27 Ke esi eƒe teƒe gaɖi gbɔlo le ŋkeke evelia dzi la
1Samuel20:28 Yonatan ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel20:29 Egblɔ be
1Samuel20:30 Saul do dɔmedzoe ŋutɔ
1Samuel20:31 Ŋkeke ale si ɖekakpui ma le agbe la
1Samuel20:32 Yonatan biae be
1Samuel20:33 Tete Saul da akplɔ Yonatan be yeawui. Nu sia na Yonatan dze sii azɔ be menye fefenya ye fofo gblɔ be ele be David naku o.
1Samuel20:34 Yonatan dzo le kplɔ̃ la ŋu kple dɔmedzoe eye wògbe nuɖuɖu ŋkeke blibo la elabena fofoa ƒe ŋukpenanuwɔnawo ɖe David ŋu vee ŋutɔ.
1Samuel20:35 Esi ŋu ke la
1Samuel20:36 Egblɔ na ŋutsuvi la be
1Samuel20:37 Esi wòsusɔ vie ɖevia naɖo afi si aŋutrɔ la dze la
1Samuel20:38 Ƒu du sesĩe; netsɔ! Mègatɔ o!” Ale ŋutsuvi la fɔ aŋutrɔawo eye wòƒu du yi eƒe aƒetɔ gbɔ.
1Samuel20:39 Ke ŋutsuvi la ya mese nu si Yonatan wɔ la gɔme o; Yonatan kple David koe se egɔme.
1Samuel20:40 Yonatan tsɔ eƒe dati kple aŋutrɔ na ŋutsuvi la eye wògblɔ nɛ be wòatsɔ wo ayi dua me.
1Samuel20:41 Esi ŋutsuvi la dzo teti ko la
1Samuel20:42 Mlɔeba la
1Samuel21:1 David yi Nɔb dua me be yeakpɔ Abimelek
1Samuel21:2 David da alakpa na Ahimelek be
1Samuel21:3 Nuɖuɖu aɖe le asiwòa? Na abolo atɔ̃ alo nu bubu ɖe sia ɖe si nàte ŋui lam.”
1Samuel21:4 Nunɔla la ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel21:5 David do eŋu be
1Samuel21:6 Ale
1Samuel21:7 Eva eme be wosika Doeg
1Samuel21:8 David bia Ahimelek ne akplɔ alo yi aɖe le esi si ŋu dɔ yeate ŋu awɔ. Eɖe eme nɛ be
1Samuel21:9 Nunɔla la ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel21:10 David ɖe abla dzo elabena enɔ vɔvɔ̃m na Saul eye wòyi Fia Akis gbɔ le Gat.
1Samuel21:11 Ke David ƒe afi ma nɔnɔ medzɔ dzi na Akis ƒe aʋakplɔlawo o. Wobia be
1Samuel21:12 David se nya siawo eye wòvɔ̃ nu si Gat fia Akis ate ŋu awɔe.
1Samuel21:13 Ale wòwɔ eɖokui abe tsukunɔ ene! Ete fli ɖe ʋɔtruwo ŋu eye wòna ade do tso eƒe nu me hetsyɔ ɖe eƒe ge me.
1Samuel21:14 Fia Akis gblɔ na eƒe subɔlawo be
1Samuel21:15 Tsukunɔ ƒe koe si le wɔyem tae miekplɔ ame sia vɛ be woava anɔ nu siawo ƒomevi wɔm le nye ŋkutaa? Ɖe wòdze be miakplɔ ame sia ƒomevi va nye aƒe mea?”
1Samuel22:1 Ale David dzo le Gat eye wòsi yi Adulam ƒe agado me; le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe megbe la
1Samuel22:2 Tete ame siwo nɔ hiãkame aɖe me abe fenyilawo ene alo ame siwo nu tɔxɛ aɖe nɔ fu ɖem na la de asi egbɔ vava me va se ɖe esime wòva zu tatɔ na ame abe alafa ene ene.
1Samuel22:3 Emegbe la
1Samuel22:4 Ale wonɔ Moab nyigba dzi le David ƒe agado la me nɔɣi la katã.
1Samuel22:5 Gbe ɖeka la
1Samuel22:6 Esi wòva ɖo afi ma tetee ko la
1Samuel22:7 Esi wòse nya sia la
1Samuel22:8 Esia tae mietsi tsitre ɖe ŋunyea? Mia dometɔ aɖeke megblɔ nam kpɔ be nye ŋutɔ vinye le David dzi o. Miexa nu ɖe nunye gɔ̃ hã o. Mibu eŋu kpɔ! Nye ŋutɔ vinye nado ŋusẽ David be woade xa ɖe ŋunye abe ale si wòwɔ egbea ene.”
1Samuel22:9 Ke Doeg
1Samuel22:10 Abimelek bia nu Yehowa nɛ
1Samuel22:11 Ale Fia Saul ɖo du ɖe nunɔla Ahimelek
1Samuel22:12 Saul gblɔ na Abimelek be
1Samuel22:13 Saul biae be
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelek ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel22:15 Menye esiae nye zi gbãtɔ si mebia nya Mawu tso eŋu o! Menyo be nàtsɔ nya ɖe nye kple nye ƒometɔwo ŋu alea o elabena míenya naneke tso nya sia si nètsɔ ɖe mía ŋu la ŋu o.”
1Samuel22:16 Fia Saul do ɣli be
1Samuel22:17 Eɖe gbe na eƒe asrafowo be
1Samuel22:18 Fia la ɖe gbe na Doeg be
1Samuel22:19 Le esia yome la
1Samuel22:20 Eye Ahitub vi
1Samuel22:21 Esi Abiata gblɔ nu si Saul wɔ na David la
1Samuel22:22 David do ɣli gblɔ na Abiata be
1Samuel22:23 Nɔ gbɔnye le afi sia. Mègavɔ̃ o elabena ame si le nye ku dim lae le wò hã tɔ di ge; ànɔ dedie le gbɔnye.”
1Samuel23:1 Gbe ɖeka la
1Samuel23:2 eya ta David bia Yehowa be
1Samuel23:3 Ke David ƒe amewo gblɔ be
1Samuel23:4 David gabia gbe Yehowa eye wògaɖo eŋu be
1Samuel23:5 Woyi Keila eye wowu Filistitɔ geɖewo
1Samuel23:6 Ale Abiata
1Samuel23:7 Eteƒe medidi hafi Saul se be David nɔ Keila o. Saul do ɣli be
1Samuel23:8 Eya ta Saul na be eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la nayi Keila aɖaɖe to ɖe David kple eƒe ameawo.
1Samuel23:9 Ke David se nu tso Saul ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋu eye wògblɔ na nunɔla Abiata be wòatsɔ eƒe kɔmewu la vɛ eye wòabia nu si yewoawɔ la tso Yehowa gbɔ.
1Samuel23:10 David gblɔ be
1Samuel23:11 Ɖe Keilatɔwo atsɔm ade asi nɛa? Ɖe Saul anya va abe ale si mese enea? Oo
1Samuel23:12 David bia be
1Samuel23:13 Ale David kple eƒe amewo
1Samuel23:14 Azɔ la
1Samuel23:15 Gbe ɖeka esi David nɔ Hores le Zif gbegbe la
1Samuel23:16 Fiavi Yonatan yi David di ge azɔ. Edo goe le Hores eye wòdo ŋusẽe le eƒe mawudzixɔse me.
1Samuel23:17 Yonatan ka ɖe edzi na David bena “Mègavɔ̃ o
1Samuel23:18 Ale wo ame evea gabla nu ɖe woƒe xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔ dzi. David nɔ Hores ke Yonatan trɔ yi aƒe.

1Samuel23:20 Amegã
1Samuel23:21 Saul gblɔ be
1Samuel23:22 Miyi ne miaka ɖe afi si wòle kple ame siwo kpɔe le afi ma la dzi elabena menya be ayetɔ gã aɖee wònye.
1Samuel23:23 Mikpɔ afi si tututu wòbe ɖo eye miatrɔ ava gblɔe nam. Ekema mayi kpli mi eye ne anya nɔ afi ma lɔƒo ko la
1Samuel23:24 Ale wodo ŋgɔ na Saul yi Zif. David kple eƒe amewo nɔ Maon gbegbe si le Araba le Yesimo ƒe dziehe lɔƒo.
1Samuel23:25 Saul kple eƒe amewo dze wo yome eye esi wogblɔ esia na David la
1Samuel23:26 Saul nɔ to aɖe ƒe akpa ɖeka ŋu eye David hã nɔ to ma ke ƒe akpa evelia ŋu. Esi wòsusɔ vie Saul kple eƒe amewo naɖe to ɖe David kple eƒe amewo la
1Samuel23:27 Le ɣe ma ɣi tututu la
1Samuel23:28 Eya ta Saul ɖe asi le David yometiti ŋu eye wòtrɔ yi be yeawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔwo. Tso ɣe ma ɣi dzi la
1Samuel23:29 David yi ɖanɔ En Gedi ƒe agadowo me azɔ.
1Samuel24:1 Esi Saul wɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔwo eye wòtrɔ gbɔ la
1Samuel24:2 Saul kplɔ asrafo tɔxɛ akpe etɔ̃ ɖe asi tso Israel eye wòyi ɖadi David le agakpewo dome le En Gedi gbedzi.
1Samuel24:3 Saul yi ɖe agado aɖe le afi si mɔ la to alẽkpo aɖewo dome le la me be yeade afɔdzi
1Samuel24:4 David ƒe amewo do dalĩ nɛ be
1Samuel24:5 Ke eƒe dzitsinya de asi fuɖeɖe nɛ me.
1Samuel24:6 Egblɔ na eƒe amewo be
1Samuel24:7 David ka mo na eƒe amewo kple nya siawo eye meɖe mɔ na wo wowu Saul o. Ale Saul do go le agado la me eye wòdzo.
1Samuel24:8 Tete David do go le agado la me eye wòdo ɣli ɖo ɖe Saul yome be
1Samuel24:9 David do ɣli na Saul be
1Samuel24:10 Wò ŋutɔ èkpɔe kple wò ŋkuwo le egbeŋkeke sia dzi ale si Yehowa tsɔ wò de asi nam le agadoa me eye nye ame aɖewo ƒoe ɖe nunye be mawu wò
1Samuel24:11 Kpɔe ɖa
1Samuel24:12 “Yehowa nedrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le nye kpli wò dome eye Yehowa neɖo vɔ̃ siwo katã nèwɔ ɖe ŋunye la teƒe na wò. Ke nye ya nye asi maka ŋutiwò o.
1Samuel24:13 Lododo xoxo aɖe gblɔ be
1Samuel24:14 “Ame ka ŋutie Israel fia do go ɖo? Ame ka yome tim nèle? Avu kukua? Alo axɔ̃ ɖeka ŋua?
1Samuel24:15 Yehowa ŋutɔ nanye míaƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la eye wòadrɔ̃ nya le mía dome. Yehowa nebu nye nya ŋu eye wòaʋli tanye
1Samuel24:16 Esi David wu nya siawo gbɔgblɔ nu la
1Samuel24:17 Egblɔ na David be
1Samuel24:18 Ègblɔ nyui si nèwɔ nam la fifi laa. Yehowa tsɔm de asiwò me
1Samuel24:19 Ne ame aɖe do go eƒe futɔ la
1Samuel24:20 Azɔ la medze sii be èle fia ɖu ge kokoko eye Israel fiaɖuƒe la ali ke ɖe asiwò me.
1Samuel24:21 Le Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ me
1Samuel24:22 Ale David ka atam la na Saul. Tete Saul trɔ dzo yi aƒe me ke David kple eƒe ameawo gbugbɔ yi mɔ sesẽ la me.
1Samuel25:1 Le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe megbe la
1Samuel25:2 Lãnyiƒe nɔ kesinɔtɔ aɖe si tso Maon la si le afi ma te ɖe Karmel ŋu. Alẽ akpe etɔ̃ (3
1Samuel25:3 Eŋkɔe nye Nabal. Srɔ̃a nye nyɔnu dzetugbe aɖe si ƒe tagbɔ kɔ; eŋkɔe nye Abigail. Nabal nye Kaleb ƒe dzidzimevi
1Samuel25:4 Esi David se be Nabal nɔ fu kom na eƒe alẽwo la
1Samuel25:5 eɖo eƒe ɖekakpui ewo ɖe Karmel be woado gbe na Nabal eye woagblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel25:6 “Mawu nana wò kple wò ƒometɔwo miakpɔ dzidzedze eye nu sia nu si nye mia tɔ la nadzi ɖe edzi na mi.
1Samuel25:7 Wogblɔ nam be èle fu kom na wò alẽwo kple gbɔ̃wo. Le ɣeyiɣi si me wò alẽkplɔlawo nɔ mía dome la
1Samuel25:8 Wò ɖekakpuiwo ate ŋu aɖi ɖase le nya sia ŋu na wò. Mele nye amewo ɖom ɖa be woabia nunana aɖe tso gbɔwò elabena ŋkekenyui aɖe va tu mí. Míeɖe kuku
1Samuel25:9 Ɖekakpuiawo va gblɔ David ƒe nya la na Nabal.
1Samuel25:10 Ke Nabal bia be
1Samuel25:11 Ɖe matsɔ nye abolo kple nye tsi kple lã si mewu na nye fukolawo la ana ameha aɖe si tso afi si nyemenya oa?”
1Samuel25:12 Ale David ƒe ɖekakpuiawo trɔ gbɔ va gblɔ nya siwo Nabal gblɔ la nɛ.
1Samuel25:13 David ŋutɔ tsɔ eƒe yi eye wòɖe gbe na eƒe amewo hã be woatsɔ woƒe yiwo. Ame alafa ene (400) dze mɔ kple David eye ame alafa eve (200) tsi anyi henɔ woƒe nuwo ŋu dzɔm.
1Samuel25:14 Nabal ƒe amewo dometɔ ɖeka yi ɖagblɔ na Nabal srɔ̃
1Samuel25:15 Ke ame siawo wɔ nyui na mí. Womewɔ nuvevi aɖeke mi o. Le ɣeyiɣi si katã míenɔ gbegbea kpli wo la
1Samuel25:16 Wonye kpɔtɔtɔ ƒo xlã mí zã kple keli esime míenɔ míaƒe alẽhawo dzi kpɔm le wo gbɔ.
1Samuel25:17 Anyo be nàbu ta me kaba
1Samuel25:18 Abigail ɖe abla enumake
1Samuel25:19 Egblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo be
1Samuel25:20 Esi wònɔ eƒe tedzia dom va ɖo to aɖe ƒe balime la
1Samuel25:21 Fifi laa ko David gblɔ be
1Samuel25:22 Mawu nefia David eye wòagafiae ɖe edzi ɖaa ne hafi etsɔ ŋdi naɖo la
1Samuel25:23 Esi Abigail kpɔ David la
1Samuel25:24 Edze klo ɖe eƒe afɔ nu hegblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel25:25 Nye aƒetɔ
1Samuel25:26 Aƒetɔ
1Samuel25:27 Azɔ la
1Samuel25:28 Tsɔ vo si meda be medo dzi heva afi sia la kem. Yehowa aɖo eteƒe na wò kokoko
1Samuel25:29 Ne amewo ati wò agbe yome hã la
1Samuel25:30 Ne Yehowa wɔ nyui siwo katã ŋugbe wòdo na wò eye nèzu Israel Fia la
1Samuel25:31 ekema
1Samuel25:32 David ɖo eŋu na Abigail be
1Samuel25:33 Míada akpe na Mawu le susu nyui si wòna wò la ta! Meda akpe na wò be nèɖem tso amewo ƒe ʋukɔkɔɖi kple nye asitsɔtsɔ bia hlɔ̃e la me
1Samuel25:34 elabena metsɔ Yehowa
1Samuel25:35 David xɔ Abigail ƒe nunana la eye wògblɔ nɛ be wòatrɔ ayi aƒe eye megavɔ̃ o elabena yemawu srɔ̃a o.
1Samuel25:36 Esi Abigail ɖo aƒe me la
1Samuel25:37 Esi aha la kɔ le mo nɛ la
1Samuel25:38 Le ŋkeke ewo megbe la
1Samuel25:39 Esi David se be Nabal ku la
1Samuel25:40 Esi dɔlawo va ɖo Karmel eye wogblɔ nu si ta wova na Abigail la
1Samuel25:41 elɔ̃ ɖe eƒe biabia la dzi enumake. Tete wòtsi tre
1Samuel25:42 Edzra ɖo kaba
1Samuel25:43 David ɖe srɔ̃ bubu
1Samuel25:44 Ke Fia Saul zi via nyɔnu Mixal
1Samuel26:1 Zifitɔwo va Saul gbɔ le Gibea eye wogblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel26:2 Ale Saul yi Zif gbegbe kple eƒe ame akpe etɔ̃ (3
1Samuel26:3 Saul ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe mɔ si ɖo ta Hakila tɔgbɛ si dze ŋgɔ Yesimon mɔto
1Samuel26:4 eɖo ŋkutsalawo ɖe gbea dzi eye woɖo kpe edzi nɛ be Saul va ɖo afi ma vavã.
1Samuel26:5 David yi enumake eye wòde dzesi afi si tututu Saul kple Abner
1Samuel26:6 David bia Ahimelek
1Samuel26:7 Ale David kple Abisai yi Saul ƒe aʋakɔ la gbɔ le zã me. Wokpɔ Saul wòdɔ alɔ̃ eye wòtsɔ eƒe akplɔ tu anyigba le eƒe tagbɔ. Ke Abner kple eƒe aʋakɔ la ɖe to ɖee godoo.
1Samuel26:8 Abisai do dalĩ na David be
1Samuel26:9 Ke David gblɔ na Abisai be
1Samuel26:10 Gbe ɖeka la
1Samuel26:11 Ke Yehowa melɔ̃ be mawu ame si eya ŋutɔ tia be wòanye fia o. Nu si míawɔ enye míatsɔ eƒe akplɔ kple eƒe tsinoze eye míadzo le afi sia!”
1Samuel26:12 Ale David tsɔ akplɔ la kple tsinoze la dzoe ke ame aɖeke mekpɔ wo o eye ame aɖeke menyɔ hã o elabena Yehowa na wodɔ alɔ̃ yi eme ʋĩi.
1Samuel26:13 Wolia to si le go kemɛ la va se ɖe esime woɖo didiƒe aɖe.
1Samuel26:14 Azɔ la
1Samuel26:15 David ɖo eŋu fewuɖutɔe be
1Samuel26:16 Esia menyo kura o! Metsɔ Yehowa ka atam na wò be ele be nàku le wò ŋudzɔmanɔmanɔ ta. Afi ka fia la ƒe akplɔ kple eƒe tsinoze si nɔ eƒe tagbɔ la le?”
1Samuel26:17 Saul dze si David ƒe gbe eye wòbiae be
1Samuel26:18 Eye wòyi edzi be
1Samuel26:19 Azɔ la
1Samuel26:20 Eya ta azɔ la
1Samuel26:21 Enumake Saul ʋu eme be
1Samuel26:22 David gblɔ na Saul be
1Samuel26:23 Yehowa ŋutɔ axe fe na ame si wɔ nyui kple ame si wɔ nuteƒe. Ao
1Samuel26:24 Azɔ la
1Samuel26:25 Saul gblɔ na David be
1Samuel27:1 Ale David nɔ bubum le eɖokui me be
1Samuel27:2 Ale David kple ame alafa ade (600) siwo le eŋu la dzo heyi Akis
1Samuel27:3 David kple eƒe amewo nɔ Gat le fia Akis gbɔ. Ame sia ame kplɔ eƒe aƒemetɔwo ɖe asi eye David hã kplɔ srɔ̃a eveawo: Ahinoam tso Yezreel kple Abigail tso Karmel
1Samuel27:4 Esi Saul se be David si yi Gat la
1Samuel27:5 Gbe ɖeka David gblɔ na Akis be
1Samuel27:6 Ale Fia Akis tsɔ Ziklag na David eye wòzu Yuda fia ƒe du va se ɖe egbe.
1Samuel27:7 David kple eƒe amewo nɔ Ziklag le Filistitɔwo dome
1Samuel27:8 Wonɔa Gesuritɔwo
1Samuel27:9 Womenana ame aɖeke tsia agbe le du siwo dzi wodzena la me o. Wohaa woƒe alẽwo
1Samuel27:10 Akis biaa David be
1Samuel27:11 David mena ŋutsu alo nyɔnu aɖeke tsia agbe o
1Samuel27:12 Fia Akis xɔ David dzi se eye wòbu be Israelviwo alé fui azɔ. Fia la bu be
1Samuel28:1 Le ŋkeke mawo me la
1Samuel28:2 David ɖo eŋu nɛ be
1Samuel28:3 Azɔ la
1Samuel28:4 Filistitɔwo ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Sunem
1Samuel28:5 Esi Saul kpɔ Filistitɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ la
1Samuel28:6 Ebia nu si wòawɔ la Yehowa
1Samuel28:7 Ale Saul gblɔ na eƒe subɔlawo be
1Samuel28:8 Ale Saul trɔ eƒe nɔnɔme hedo awu dzodzro aɖe le eƒe fiawu teƒe. Eyi ɖe ŋɔliyɔla la ƒe aƒe me le zã me kple eƒe subɔla eve. Saul gblɔ na ŋɔliyɔla la be
1Samuel28:9 Gake nyɔnu la gblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel28:10 Saul tsɔ Yehowa ka atam nɛ be
1Samuel28:11 Nyɔnu la biae be
1Samuel28:12 Esi nyɔnu la kpɔ Samuel la
1Samuel28:13 Fia Saul gblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel28:14 Saul bia be
1Samuel28:15 Samuel bia Saul be
1Samuel28:16 Samuel ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel28:17 Yehowa wɔ nya si wògblɔ ɖi to dzinye la dzi. Yehowa vuvu fiaɖuƒe la le asiwò me eye wòtsɔe na hawòviwo dometɔ ɖeka
1Samuel28:18 Esiawo katã va dziwò elabena mèwɔ Yehowa ƒe ɖoɖowo dzi esi wòdo dɔmedzoe kaɖikaɖi ɖe Amalekitɔwo ŋu o.
1Samuel28:19 Yehowa atsɔ wò kple Israel blibo la ade asi na Filistitɔwo eye etsɔ la wò kple viwò ŋutsuwo miava nɔ gbɔnye le afii. Yehowa atsɔ Israel ƒe aʋakɔ la hã ade asi na Filistitɔwo.”
1Samuel28:20 Saul mlɔ anyigba hedra ɖe anyigba azɔ
1Samuel28:21 Esi ŋɔliyɔla la kpɔ ale si vɔvɔ̃ ɖoe la egblɔ be
1Samuel28:22 Azɔ la
1Samuel28:23 Ke Saul be
1Samuel28:24 Nyivi dami aɖe nɔ nyɔnu la si
1Samuel28:25 eye wòtsɔ nuɖuɖu la vɛ na fia la kple eŋumewo woɖu eye wodzo le zã la me.
1Samuel29:1 Azɔ la
1Samuel29:2 Esime Filistitɔwo ƒe aʋakplɔlawo nɔ woƒe aʋalɔgowo kplɔm va yina la
1Samuel29:3 Filistitɔwo ƒe aʋakplɔlawo bia be
1Samuel29:4 Ke Filistitɔwo ƒe kplɔlawo do dɔmedzoe eye wogblɔ be
1Samuel29:5 Ame sia ŋue nyɔnuwo dzi ha le
1Samuel29:6 Ale Fia Akis yɔ David kple eƒe amewo eye wògblɔ na wo be
1Samuel29:7 Meɖe kuku
1Samuel29:8 David bia Akis be
1Samuel29:9 Akis metrɔ eƒe tameɖoɖo o. Egagblɔ be
1Samuel29:10 Mifɔ ŋdi kanya eye miadzo ne agu dze ko.”
1Samuel29:11 Ale David kple eƒe amewo fɔ ŋdi kanya be yewoatrɔ ayi Filistitɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi eye Filistitɔwo hã dzo yi Yezreel.
1Samuel30:1 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃ megbe esi David kple eƒe amewo ɖo wo nɔƒe le Ziklag du la me la
1Samuel30:2 eye wokplɔ woƒe nyɔnuwo kple wo viwo dzoe.
1Samuel30:3 Esi David kple eƒe amewo kpɔ du la ƒe gbagbã kple nu si dzɔ ɖe wo srɔ̃wo kple wo viwo dzi la
1Samuel30:4 wofa avi va se ɖe esime avifafa glo wo.
1Samuel30:5 David srɔ̃ eveawo
1Samuel30:6 Nyadzɔdzɔ sia te ɖe David dzi ŋutɔ
1Samuel30:7 David gblɔ na nunɔla Abiata
1Samuel30:8 David bia Yehowa be
1Samuel30:9 David kple eƒe ame alafa adeawo (600) va ɖo Besor tɔʋu la to
1Samuel30:10 elabena ɖeɖi te ame alafa eve ŋu ale gbegbe be womate ŋu atso tɔʋu la o. Ke David kple ame alafa ene yi Amalekitɔwo yometiti dzi.
1Samuel30:11 Wokpɔ Egipte ŋutsu aɖe le gbe me eye wokplɔe vɛ na David. Wona nui wòɖu eye wona tsii wòno.
1Samuel30:12 Wotsɔ gbotsetsebolo eve kple waintsetse ƒuƒu eve nɛ. Esi wòɖu nu siawo la
1Samuel30:13 David biae be. “Ame kae nènye eye afi ka nètso?” Ɖekakpui la ɖo eŋu be
1Samuel30:14 Míede ɖaha Keretitɔwo ƒe dziehe kple Yuda ƒe anyigba kple Kaleb nyigba ƒe dziehe
1Samuel30:15 David biae be
1Samuel30:16 Ale ɖekakpui la kplɔ wo yi afi si Amalekitɔwo ƒu asaɖa anyi do. Wokaka ɖe gbedzi henɔ nu ɖum
1Samuel30:17 David kple eƒe amewo dze wo dzi eye wowu wo katã le zã ma me kple ŋufɔke. Wowu ame sia ame negbe ɖekakpui alafa ene siwo do kposɔwo la koe te ŋu si.
1Samuel30:18 David xɔ nu sia nu si Amalekitɔwo ha. Exɔ srɔ̃a eveawo hã.
1Samuel30:19 Naneke mebu o; woxɔ ɖevi kple tsitsi
1Samuel30:20 David ƒe amewo kplɔ Amalekitɔwo ƒe lãhawo dzoe eye wogblɔ na David be
1Samuel30:21 Esi wova ɖo Besor tɔʋu la to la
1Samuel30:22 Ke gbevu aɖewo nɔ ame siwo de ɖawɔ aʋa la dome gblɔ be
1Samuel30:23 Ke David gblɔ be
1Samuel30:24 Ame kae alɔ̃ ɖe nya si gblɔm miele la dzi? Míama nuawo eye míama wo sɔsɔe
1Samuel30:25 Tso gbe ma gbe dzi la
1Samuel30:26 Esi wova ɖo Ziklag la
1Samuel30:27 Woɖo nunanawo ɖe ametsitsiwo tso du siawo me: Betel
1Samuel30:28 Aroer
1Samuel30:29 Rakal
1Samuel30:30 Horma
1Samuel30:31 kple Hebron. Eɖo nunana ɖe teƒe siwo eya kple eƒe amewo de.
1Samuel31:1 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
1Samuel31:2 Filistitɔwo ɖe Saul kple viawo ɖe nu eye wowu viawo; Yonatan
1Samuel31:3 Aʋa la nu sẽ ŋutɔ na Saul eye esi aŋutrɔdalawo tui la wode abi eŋu vevie.
1Samuel31:4 Saul gblɔ na eƒe akpoxɔnutsɔla be
1Samuel31:5 Esi akpoxɔnutsɔla la kpɔ be Saul ku la
1Samuel31:6 Ale Saul
1Samuel31:7 Esi Israelvi siwo le balime la godo kple esiwo le Yɔdan tɔsisi la godo se be yewo nɔviwo si eye wowu Saul kple via ŋutsuawo la
1Samuel31:8 Esi ŋu ke eye Filistitɔwo yi be woaɖe nuwo le Israel ƒe ame kukuwo ŋu la
1Samuel31:9 Woɖe Saul ƒe aʋawu le eŋu
1Samuel31:10 Wotsɔ Saul ƒe akpoxɔnu la da ɖe Astarɔt ƒe gbedoxɔ me eye wotsɔ eƒe ŋutilã ku gli aɖe ŋu le Bet Sean.
1Samuel31:11 Esi Yabes Gileadtɔwo se nu si Filistitɔwo wɔ Saul la
1Samuel31:12 aʋawɔlawo katã tso du ma me zɔ mɔ to zã blibo la me yi Bet Sean. Woɖe Saul kple viawo ƒe ŋutilã kukuawo le glia ŋu le Bet Sam eye wotsɔ wo va Yabes Gilead hetɔ dzo wo.
1Samuel31:13 Woɖi woƒe afi ɖe logoti la te le Yabes eye wotsi nu dɔ ŋkeke adre.
2Samuel1:1 Le Saul ƒe ku megbe la. David trɔ va Ziklag le esime wòɖu Amalekitɔwo dzi vɔ megbe eye wònɔ afi ma ŋkeke eve.
2Samuel1:2 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃a gbe la
2Samuel1:3 David biae be
2Samuel1:4 David yi edzi be
2Samuel1:5 Tete David bia ɖekakpui si tsɔ du la vɛ nɛ la be: “Aleke nèwɔ nya be Saul kple via Yonatan ku?”
2Samuel1:6 Ɖekakpui la ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel1:7 Esime wònye kɔ la
2Samuel1:8 “Ebiam be
2Samuel1:9 “Tete wògblɔ nam be
2Samuel1:10 “Ale mete ɖe eŋu hewui elabena menyae be ale si wòdze anyii la
2Samuel1:11 David kple eƒe amewo dze woƒe awuwo esi wose nya sia.
2Samuel1:12 Wofa konyi
2Samuel1:13 David bia ɖekakpui si gblɔ nya la nɛ be
2Samuel1:14 David biae be
2Samuel1:15 Enumake David yɔ eƒe amewo dometɔ ɖeka eye wògblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel1:16 Elabena David gblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel1:17 David kpa konyifaha sia tso Saul kple via Yonatan ŋu
2Samuel1:18 eye wòde se na Yuda ŋutsuwo be woafia aŋutrɔ ƒe konyifaha sia abe ale si woŋlɔe ɖe Yasar ƒe agbalẽ me ene.
2Samuel1:19 “Oo
2Samuel1:20 “Migagblɔe le Gat o; migaɖe gbeƒãe le Askelon ƒe ablɔwo dzi o. Ne menye nenema o la
2Samuel1:21 “Oo
2Samuel1:22 “Yonatan ƒe aŋutrɔ metrɔ gbɔ ƒuƒlu eye Saul ƒe yi metrɔ gbɔ numagblemagblẽ tso aʋatsilawo ƒe ʋu me kple kalẽtɔwo ƒe ŋutilã ŋu o
2Samuel1:23 Saul kple Yonatan
2Samuel1:24 “O Israel vinyɔnuwo
2Samuel1:25 “Aleke kalẽtɔwo tsi aʋa ale! Eye wowu Yonatan le wò toawo dzi.
2Samuel1:26 Nɔvinye Yonatan
2Samuel1:27 “Aleke kalẽtɔwo tsi aʋa ale! Eye woƒe aʋawɔnuwo katã hã tsrɔ̃ ale!”
2Samuel2:1 Le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la
2Samuel2:2 Ale David kplɔ srɔ̃awo
2Samuel2:3 eƒe amewo kple wo srɔ̃wo kple wo viwo katã eye woyi Hebron.
2Samuel2:4 Yuda ƒe kplɔlawo va ɖo David fiae ɖe Yuda ƒe dukɔ ƒoƒuwo nu. Esi David se be Yabes Gileadtɔwo ɖi Saul la
2Samuel2:5 eɖo du ɖe wo be
2Samuel2:6 Yehowa nave mia nu eye wòatsɔ eƒe lɔlɔ̃ ƒe ɖeɖefia kple nyateƒe aɖo eteƒe na mi. Nye hã mave mia nu le nu si miewɔ la ta.
2Samuel2:7 Azɔ la
2Samuel2:8 Ke Abner
2Samuel2:9 be wòaɖu fia ɖe Gilead
2Samuel2:10 Exɔ ƒe blaene hafi woɖoe fiae eye wòɖu Israel dzi ƒe eve. Ke Yuda ƒe viwo nɔ David yome
2Samuel2:11 eye wòɖu fia le Hebron ɖe Yuda dzi ƒe adre kple afã.
2Samuel2:12 Gbe ɖeka la
2Samuel2:13 eye Aʋafia Yoab
2Samuel2:14 Abner gblɔ na Yoab be
2Samuel2:15 Ale aʋakɔ eveawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe tia ɖekakpui wuieve na Benyamin kple Saul vi Is Boset eye wuieve bubu na David.
2Samuel2:16 Ame sia ame lé nɔvia ƒe ɖa eye wòtɔ yi axadame na nɔvia. Ale wo katã ku. Woyɔa teƒe ma le Gibeon va se ɖe egbe be “Yi ƒe gbedzi.”
2Samuel2:17 Aʋakɔ eveawo de asi aʋawɔwɔ me azɔ eye hafi zã nado la
2Samuel2:18 Yoab nɔviŋutsuwo
2Samuel2:19 eye eya ɖeka kplɔ Abner ɖo. Medze ɖe ɖusi alo mia me le Abner yome o.
2Samuel2:20 Esi Abner nye kɔ kpɔ megbe eye wòkpɔ Asahel wògbɔna la
2Samuel2:21 Abner gblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel2:22 Abner gado ɣli gblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel2:23 Ke egbe
2Samuel2:24 Azɔ la
2Samuel2:25 Abner ƒe aʋawɔlawo tso Benyamin ƒe to la me ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe to la tame.
2Samuel2:26 Abner do ɣli gblɔ na Yoab be
2Samuel2:27 Yoab ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel2:28 Tete Yoab ku kpẽ eye eƒe amewo dzudzɔ Israel ƒe aʋakɔ la yometiti.
2Samuel2:29 Gbe ma gbe fiẽ la
2Samuel2:30 Yoab trɔ le Abner yome eye ekple eƒe amewo hã trɔ yi aƒe. Esi wòxlẽ eƒe amewo kpɔ la
2Samuel2:31 Ke Abner ƒe ame alafa etɔ̃ blaade (360)
2Samuel2:32 Yoab kple eƒe amewo kɔ Asahel ƒe kukua yi Betlehem eye woɖii ɖe fofoa xa. Le esia megbe la
2Samuel3:1 Aʋawɔwɔ didi aɖe nɔ edzi yim le Saul ƒe aƒe kple David aƒe dome. David ƒe aƒe la nɔ ŋusẽ kpɔm ɖe edzi le esime Saul ƒe aƒe ya nɔ gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔm ɖe edzi.
2Samuel3:2 Wodzi ŋutsuviwo na David esi wònɔ Hebron. Via ŋutsu tsitsitɔe nye Amnon
2Samuel3:3 Via ŋutsu eveliae nye Kileab
2Samuel3:4 Eneliae nye Adoniya
2Samuel3:5 Adeliae nye Itream eye dadae nye Egla. Wodzi ŋutsu ade siawo na Fia David le Hebron.
2Samuel3:6 Esi aʋa la nɔ edzi yim la
2Samuel3:7 Ewɔ nɔƒe si wòkpɔ la ŋu dɔ eye wòdɔ Saul ƒe ahiãvi aɖe si woyɔna be Rizpa
2Samuel3:8 Abner do dɔmedzoe le Is Boset ƒe nyawo ta hegblɔ bena
2Samuel3:9 Mawu nafia fu Abner vevie ne nyemewɔ nu si Yehowa do ŋugbe
2Samuel3:10 ne nyemexɔ fiaɖuƒe la tso Saul ƒe aƒe me eye ne nyemeɖo David ƒe fiazikpui la gɔme anyi ɖe Israel kple Yuda dzi
2Samuel3:11 Is Boset meɖo eŋu o elabena enɔ vɔvɔ̃m na Abner.
2Samuel3:12 Abner dɔ amewo ɖe David gbɔ be woagblɔ nɛ be yeaɖe asi le Israel ƒe fiaɖuƒe ŋu nɛ ale be wòawɔ ye yeazu aʋafia gã anɔ Israelʋakɔ la kple Yudaʋakɔ la ƒe ƒuƒoƒo nu.
2Samuel3:13 David ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel3:14 Ale David ɖo du ɖe Is Boset be
2Samuel3:15 Ale Is Boset xɔ Mikal le srɔ̃a Paltiel si nye Lais vi la si.
2Samuel3:16 Paltiel dze srɔ̃a yome nɔ avi fam va se ɖe keke Bahurim
2Samuel3:17 Abner wɔ takpekpe kple Israel ƒe kplɔlawo eye wòɖo ŋku edzi na wo be
2Samuel3:18 Egblɔ na wo be
2Samuel3:19 Abner ƒo nu kple Benyamin ƒe viwo ƒe kplɔlawo hã. Emegbe la
2Samuel3:20 Esi Abner kplɔ ame blaeve ɖe asi va David gbɔ le Hebron la
2Samuel3:21 Esi Abner nɔ dzodzom la
2Samuel3:22 Esi Abner trɔ dzo teti ko la
2Samuel3:23 Esi wògblɔ na Yoab be Abner
2Samuel3:24 Yoab yi Fia la gbɔ eye wògblɔ be
2Samuel3:25 Ènya Abner
2Samuel3:26 Yoab dɔ amewo ɖa be woana Abner natrɔ agbɔ. Ame dɔdɔawo tu Abner le Sira ƒe vudo la gbɔ eye wòtrɔ gbɔ kpli wo. Ke David menya naneke tso nu sia ŋu o.
2Samuel3:27 Esi Abner va ɖo Hebron la
2Samuel3:28 Emegbe
2Samuel3:29 Eƒe ʋu nava Yoab kple fofoa ƒe aƒe la katã ƒe ta dzi. Na be ame si ŋu abi makumaku alo kpodɔ le alo nuwɔamitɔ alo ame si tsi yinu loo alo dɔwuitɔ magbe Yoab ƒe aƒemenɔnɔ gbeɖe o.”
2Samuel3:30 Yoab kple nɔvia Abisai wowu Abner elabena ewu wo nɔviŋutsu Asahel le aʋa le Gibeon.
2Samuel3:31 David gblɔ na Yoab kple ame siwo katã le eŋu la be
2Samuel3:32 Woɖi Abner ɖe Hebron eye fia la fa avi hehehe le Abner ƒe yɔdo to
2Samuel3:33 Fia David dzi konyifaha sia na Abner be
2Samuel3:34 Womebla wò asiwo hafi o. Womede ga wò afɔwo hafi o. Èku abe ale si wokuna le ŋutasẽlawo ƒe asi me ene.” Eye ameawo katã gafa avi nɛ.
2Samuel3:35 Ale wo katã wova eye woƒoe ɖe David nu be wòaɖu nane esi zã medo haɖe o. Ke David ka atam be
2Samuel3:36 Ameawo katã de dzesi nya sia eye wokpɔ ŋudzedze le eŋu; le nyateƒe me la
2Samuel3:37 Ale dukɔ blibo la
2Samuel3:38 David gblɔ na eƒe amewo be
2Samuel3:39 eye togbɔ be menye Mawu ƒe amesiamina hã la
2Samuel4:1 Esi Saul ƒe viŋutsu
2Samuel4:2 Azɔ la
2Samuel4:3 elabena ame siwo tso Beerot la si yi Gitaim eye wonɔ afi ma abe amedzrowo ene va se ɖe egbe.
2Samuel4:4 Fia Saul ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi aɖe si nye ŋutsuvi tekunɔ aɖe la li; fofoae nye Yonatan eye eŋkɔe nye Mefiboset. Exɔ ƒe atɔ̃ esime wowu Saul kple Yonatan le aʋa me le Yezreel. Esi wose aʋa la me nyawo la
2Samuel4:5 Rekab kple Baana
2Samuel4:6 Woge ɖe aƒea me abe lu tsɔ ge woyi le titinaxɔ me ene; wotɔ hɛ dɔme nɛ eye wosi dzo.
2Samuel4:7 Woyi aƒea me esime wòmlɔ anyi ɖe eƒe xɔ gã me. Esime wowui la
2Samuel4:8 Wotsɔ Is Boset ƒe ta na Fia David hegblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel4:9 Ke David ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel4:10 be esi ame aɖe gblɔ nam be Saul ku eye yee wui kple susu be dzidzɔnya aɖe gblɔm yele nam la
2Samuel4:11 Ekema nu ka ta nyemabia hlɔ̃ ame vɔ̃ɖi siwo wu ame nyui la le eya ŋutɔ ƒe aƒe me le eƒe aba dzi o mahã? Ele be mabia eƒe ʋu tso miaƒe asi me eye matsrɔ̃ mi ɖa le anyigba dzi.”
2Samuel4:12 Ale David ɖe gbe na eƒe ɖekakpuiwo eye wowu wo
2Samuel5:1 Emegbe la
2Samuel5:2 Tsã esi Saul nye fia le mia nu hã la
2Samuel5:3 Esi Israel ƒe dumegãwo va kpe ta le Fia David gbɔ le Hebron la
2Samuel5:4 David xɔ ƒe blaetɔ̃ esi wòzu fia. Eɖu fia ƒe blaene.
2Samuel5:5 Le Hebron la
2Samuel5:6 Azɔ la
2Samuel5:7 Ke David kple eƒe amewo ɖu wo dzi eye woxɔ Zion mɔ sesẽ la si woyɔna azɔ be
2Samuel5:8 David gblɔ gbe ma gbe be
2Samuel5:9 Ale David va nɔ mɔ la me hena ŋkɔe be
2Samuel5:10 Ale David ƒe ŋkɔ kple ŋusẽ de dzi elabena Yehowa
2Samuel5:11 Azɔ la
2Samuel5:12 Azɔ la
2Samuel5:13 Esi David ʋu yi Hebron la
2Samuel5:14 Vi siwo wodzi na Fia David le Yerusalem la ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye: Samua
2Samuel5:15 Ibhar
2Samuel5:16 Elisama
2Samuel5:17 Esi Filistitɔwo se be David zu Israel fia yeyea la
2Samuel5:18 Filistitɔwo va do eye wokaka ɖe Refaim balime.
2Samuel5:19 David bia Yehowa be
2Samuel5:20 Ale David yi ɖawɔ aʋa kpli wo le Baal Perazim eye wòɖu wo dzi. Egblɔ be
2Samuel5:21 Filistitɔwo gblẽ woƒe legbawo ɖe anyi eye David kple eƒe amewo fɔ wo.
2Samuel5:22 Ke Filistitɔwo trɔ va eye wogakaka ɖe Refaim balime.
2Samuel5:23 Esi David bia Yehowa be nu ka yeawɔ hã la
2Samuel5:24 Ne èse gbeɖiɖi aɖe le atiawo tame abe asrafowoe le azɔli zɔm ene la
2Samuel5:25 Ale David wɔ nu si Yehowa ɖo nɛ eye wòsi Filistitɔwo tso keke Gibeon va se ɖe Gezer.
2Samuel6:1 David gaƒo ƒu ame tiatia akpe blaetɔ̃ tso Israel dukɔ blibo la me.
2Samuel6:2 David kple eƒe ameawo katã dze mɔ tso Baala Yuda be woaɖakɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la tso afi ma vɛ. Woyɔa Yehowa Ŋusẽkatãtɔ
2Samuel6:3 Wokɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la da ɖe tasiaɖam yeye aɖe dzi eye wokɔe tso Abinadab ƒe aƒe si le toa ŋu la me. Ame siwo tutu tasiaɖam la woe nye Abinadab ƒe viŋutsuwo
2Samuel6:4 Ahio nɔ zɔzɔm le ŋgɔ
2Samuel6:5 David kple Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la katã nɔ dzidzɔ kpɔm
2Samuel6:6 Esi woɖo Nakon ƒe lugbɔƒe la
2Samuel6:7 Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Uza ŋu heƒoe ƒu anyi wòku enumake ɖe mabumabu nu si wòwɔ la ta
2Samuel6:8 David do dɔmedzoe ɖe Yehowa ŋu le nu si wòwɔ Uza la ta eye wòna ŋkɔ teƒe ma be “Perez Uza” si gɔmee nye
2Samuel6:9 David vɔ̃ Mawu eye wòbia be “Aleke Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la ava aƒee?”
2Samuel6:10 Nu sia na David ɖo ta me be yemakɔe ayi eɖokui gbɔ le David ƒe Du la me o
2Samuel6:11 Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la nɔ afi ma ɣleti etɔ̃ eye Yehowa yra Obed Edom kple eƒe aƒemetɔwo katã.
2Samuel6:12 Esi Fia David se nya sia be
2Samuel6:13 Ne ame siwo kɔ nubablaɖaka la ɖe afɔ zi ade la
2Samuel6:14 David ɖu ɣe kple eƒe ŋusẽ katã le Yehowa ŋkume le esime wòdo awu ʋlaya si wotɔ kple aklala biɖibiɖi.
2Samuel6:15 Ale Israel kɔ Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la va aƒee kple aseyetsotso kple kpẽkuku geɖe.
2Samuel6:16 Esi Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la va ɖo David ƒe du la me la
2Samuel6:17 Wokɔ Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka la da ɖe agbadɔ si David tu nɛ me eye David sa numevɔ kple akpedavɔ na Yehowa.
2Samuel6:18 Esi David sa numevɔ kple akpedavɔ vɔ la
2Samuel6:19 eye wòtsɔ abolo ɖeka
2Samuel6:20 David hã yi eƒe aƒe me eye wòyra eƒe aƒemetɔwo. Mixal va do goe eye wògblɔ na David fewuɖutɔe be
2Samuel6:21 David ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel6:22 Ɛ̃
2Samuel6:23 Ale Mixal tsi ko le eƒe agbemeŋkekewo katã me.
2Samuel7:1 Azɔ la
2Samuel7:2 David gblɔ na Nyagblɔɖila Natan be
2Samuel7:3 Natan ɖo eŋu nɛ be
2Samuel7:4 Ke Yehowa gblɔ na Natan le zã ma me be
2Samuel7:5 “Yi nàgblɔ na nye dɔla David be
2Samuel7:6 Nyemenɔ xɔ aɖeke me kpɔ o
2Samuel7:7 Afi sia afi si meɖe zɔ kple Israelviwo yi la
2Samuel7:8 “Azɔ la
2Samuel7:9 Menɔ kpli wò le afi sia afi si nède eye metsrɔ̃ wò futɔwo. Mana wò ŋkɔ nagade dzi wu ale si wòle fifia ale be nànye ame xɔŋkɔtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka le xexea me!
2Samuel7:10 Mana teƒe aɖe nye amewo
2Samuel7:11 alo abe ale si wowɔ tso esime meɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo ɖe nye dukɔ
2Samuel7:12 Ne wò ɣeyiɣi de le anyigba sia dzi eye nèku la
2Samuel7:13 Eyae anye ame si atu gbedoxɔ nam eye mana eƒe fiaɖuƒe nanɔ anyi ɖaa.
2Samuel7:14 Manye fofo nɛ eye eya hã anye vi nam. Ne ewɔ nu vɔ̃ la
2Samuel7:15 ke nye lɔlɔ̃ maɖe ɖa le edzi abe ale si meɖee ɖa le Saul
2Samuel7:16 Wò aƒe kple wò fiaɖuƒe anɔ anyi tegbee le ŋkunye me
2Samuel7:17 Ale Natan gblɔ nya sia nya si Yehowa gblɔ la na David.
2Samuel7:18 Ale Fia David ɖanɔ anyi ɖe Yehowa ŋkume eye wòdo gbe ɖa be
2Samuel7:19 Abe esia ɖe mesɔ gbɔ le wò ŋkume o ene la
2Samuel7:20 “Nya kae gale David si wòagblɔ na wò? Elabena
2Samuel7:21 Le wò nya la ta kple wò lɔlɔ̃nu me
2Samuel7:22 “Oo Aƒetɔ Yehowa
2Samuel7:23 Azɔ la
2Samuel7:24 Èɖo wò dukɔ
2Samuel7:25 “Azɔ la
2Samuel7:26 ale be wò ŋkɔ nanye gã tegbee. Ekema amewo agblɔ be
2Samuel7:27 “Oo Yehowa Dziƒoʋakɔwo ƒe Aƒetɔ
2Samuel7:28 Oo

2Samuel8:1 Le esia megbe la
2Samuel8:2 Eɖu Moabtɔwo hã dzi eye wòna Moabtɔwo mlɔ anyi ɖe wo nɔewo xa le fliwo me. Etsɔ dzidzeka dzidze wo eye wòma wo ɖe akpa etɔ̃ me. Ewu ameawo ƒe akpa eve
2Samuel8:3 Eɖu Zoba fia Hadadezer
2Samuel8:4 David lé sɔdola akpe wuiadre (17
2Samuel8:5 Esi Aramtɔwo tso Damasko va be yewoakpe ɖe Zoba fia Hadadezer ŋu la
2Samuel8:6 David da asrafo aɖewo ɖe Damasko si nye Aramtɔwo ƒe fiadu la me. Ale Aramtɔwo zu David tenɔlawo eye wodzɔa adzɔga nɛ ƒe sia ƒe. Ale Yehowa na David ɖua dzi le afi sia afi si wòayi.
2Samuel8:7 David tsɔ sikakpoxɔnu siwo ŋu dɔ Fia Hadadezer ƒe aʋakɔwo wɔ la va Yerusalem.
2Samuel8:8 Etsɔ akɔbli gbogbo aɖe hã tso Teba kple Berotai siwo nye Fia Hadadezer ƒe du gãwo la me yi Yerusalem.
2Samuel8:9 Esi Hamat fia
2Samuel8:10 eɖo Via ŋutsu Yoram ɖe David gbɔ be wòado gbe nɛ
2Samuel8:11 Fia David kɔ nunana siawo katã ŋu na Yehowa
2Samuel8:12 tso Edom kple Moab
2Samuel8:13 Ale David ƒe ŋkɔ ɖi hoo. Esi wòtrɔ gbɔ la
2Samuel8:14 eye wòda asrafo aɖewo ɖe Edom ƒe teƒe ɖe sia ɖe. Ale Edomtɔwo zu David teviwo. Yehowa na wòɖua dzi le afi sia afi si wòayi.
2Samuel8:15 David ɖu Israel blibo la dzi kple dzɔdzɔenyenye eye wòwɔ nyui na ame sia ame.

2Samuel8:17 Zadok
2Samuel8:18 Benaya
2Samuel9:1 David bia be
2Samuel9:2 Azɔ la
2Samuel9:3 Fia la biae be “Ame aɖeke megale Saul ƒe aƒe me si maɖe Mawu ƒe amenuveve afia oa?” Ziba ɖo eŋu na fia la be
2Samuel9:4 Fia la biae be
2Samuel9:5 Ale Fia David na wokplɔe tso Lo Debar vɛ tso Makir
2Samuel9:6 Esi Mefiboset
2Samuel9:7 David gblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel9:8 Mefiboset tsyɔ mo anyi gblɔ be
2Samuel9:9 David yɔ Saul ƒe subɔla Ziba eye wògblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel9:10 Wò kple viwòwo kple wò subɔlawo miade agble ɖe anyigba la dzi nɛ eye miatsɔ nukuawo vɛ ale be wò aƒetɔ ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi nakpɔ nuɖuɖu. Ke Mefiboset
2Samuel9:11 Ziba gblɔ na fia la be
2Samuel9:12 Viŋutsuvi sue aɖe nɔ Mefiboset si; eŋkɔe nye Mika. Ziba ƒe aƒemetɔwo katã zu Mefiboset ƒe subɔlawo.
2Samuel9:13 Ke Mefiboset ya nɔ Yerusalem
2Samuel10:1 Le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la
2Samuel10:2 David gblɔ be
2Samuel10:3 Amonitɔwo ƒe amegãwo gblɔ na woƒe kplɔla Hanun be
2Samuel10:4 Ale Hanun lé David ƒe amewo
2Samuel10:5 Esi David se nya sia la
2Samuel10:6 Esi Amonitɔwo kpɔ be yewozu David ƒe ketɔwo la
2Samuel10:7 Esi David se nya sia la
2Samuel10:8 Amonitɔwo va nɔ woƒe dua ƒe agbo nu hena aʋawɔwɔ le esime Aramtɔwo tso Zoba kple Rehob kple ame siwo tso Tob kple Maaka nɔ wo ɖokui si le gbedzi.
2Samuel10:9 Yoab kpɔ be wodze aʋa ɖe ye ŋgɔ kple ye megbe siaa
2Samuel10:10 Ena akpa evelia si nɔ nɔvia Abisai ƒe kpɔkplɔ te la kpe aʋa kple Amonitɔwo.
2Samuel10:11 Yoab gblɔ na nɔvia be
2Samuel10:12 Lé dzi ɖe ƒo
2Samuel10:13 Ale Yoab kple eƒe aʋakɔwo lũ ɖe Aramtɔwo dzi be woakpe aʋa kpli wo eye Aramtɔwo si le wo nu.
2Samuel10:14 Esi Amonitɔwo kpɔ be Aramtɔwo nɔ sisim la
2Samuel10:15 Esime Aramtɔwo kpɔ be Israelviwo ɖu yewo dzi la
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezer na Aramtɔwo tso tɔsisi la godo yi Helam eye wonɔ Sobak
2Samuel10:17 Esi wogblɔ nya sia na David la
2Samuel10:18 Ke Aramtɔwo gasi le Israelviwo nu. David wu Aramtɔwo ƒe sɔdola alafa adre (700) kple afɔzɔla akpe blaene (40
2Samuel10:19 Esi Hadadezer ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔwo kpɔ be woɖu Aramtɔwo dzi la wona ta eye wozu David tenɔlawo. Tso ɣe ma ɣi la
2Samuel11:1 Le Adame esi fiawo ƒe aʋawɔɣi ɖo la
2Samuel11:2 Gbe ɖeka le ɣetrɔ me la
2Samuel11:3 ale wòdɔ ame ɖa be woakpɔe ɖa be nyɔnu kae mahã. Amea de gbɔ va gblɔ nɛ be nyɔnu lae nye Batseba
2Samuel11:4 Enumake David na woyɔe nɛ. Le ɣeyiɣi sia me tututu la
2Samuel11:5 Emegbe esi Batseba kpɔ be yefɔ fu la eɖo ame ɖe David hegblɔe nɛ.
2Samuel11:6 Ale David dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Yoab be
2Samuel11:7 Esi Uria va ɖo la
2Samuel11:8 Emegbe la
2Samuel11:9 Ke Uria meyi aƒe me o; etsi fiasã la ƒe agbonu kple fia la ƒe subɔlawo.
2Samuel11:10 Esi David se nu si Uria wɔ la
2Samuel11:11 Uria ɖo eŋu na David be
2Samuel11:12 David gblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel11:13 David kpee ɖe fiẽnuɖukplɔ̃ ŋu eye wòna wòno aha mu gake egagbe aƒemeyiyi eye wògatsi fiasã la ƒe agbo nu dɔ.
2Samuel11:14 Esi ŋu ke la
2Samuel11:15 Fia la ɖo na Yoab to agbalẽ la me be wòaɖo Uria ɖe afi si aʋa la sẽ le eye wòana amewo nade megbe le eŋu ale be woawui!
2Samuel11:16 Ale Yoab ɖo Uria ɖe teƒe aɖe si te ɖe du si ŋu woɖe to ɖe afi si wònya be futɔwo ƒe aʋawɔla sesẽwo nɔ.
2Samuel11:17 Ale wowu Uria
2Samuel11:18 Yoab ɖo du ɖe David tso aʋa la ƒe yiyime ŋuti.
2Samuel11:19 Egblɔ na ame si wòdɔ la be
2Samuel11:20 ɖewohĩ ado dɔmedzoe abia wò be
2Samuel11:21 Mieɖo ŋku ale si wowu Abimelek
2Samuel11:22 Ale ame dɔdɔ la yi Yerusalem eye wògblɔ nya la na David.
2Samuel11:23 Egblɔ be
2Samuel11:24 Glidzinɔlawo ho aʋa ɖe mía ŋu
2Samuel11:25 David gblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel11:26 Esi Batseba se be ye srɔ̃ Uria ku la
2Samuel11:27 eye esi konyifaɣi la wu nu la
2Samuel12:1 Ale Yehowa ɖo Nyagblɔɖila Natan ɖa be wòagblɔ ŋutinya sia na David be
2Samuel12:2 Alẽwo kple nyiwo nɔ kesinɔtɔ la si fũu
2Samuel12:3 ke alẽvi ɖeka pɛ koe nɔ ame dahe la ya si eye eya kple viawo kpɔa dzidzɔ le alẽvi la ŋu ŋutɔ. Ame dahe la nana alẽvi la ɖua nu le eya ŋutɔ ƒe agba me eye wònoa nu le eƒe kplu nu. Elénɛ ɖe abɔ abe via nyɔnuvie wònye ene.
2Samuel12:4 “Gbe ɖeka la
2Samuel12:5 David do dɔmedzoe eye wòka atam be
2Samuel12:6 Ele be wòatsɔ alẽ ene aɖo ɖeka si wòfi la teƒe le eƒe nublanuimakpɔmakpɔ ta.”
2Samuel12:7 Tete Natan gblɔ na David be
2Samuel12:8 metsɔ eƒe fiasã
2Samuel12:9 Ke nu ka ta nèdo vlo Yehowa ƒe sewo eye nèwɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi sia ɖo? Èwu Uria
2Samuel12:10 Eya ta tso azɔ dzi la
2Samuel12:11 “ ‘Meka atam be le nu si nèwɔ ta la
2Samuel12:12 Èwɔe le bebeme ke nye ya mawɔ nu sia ɖe ŋuwò le gaglãgbe
2Samuel12:13 David ʋu eme nublanuitɔe na Natan be
2Samuel12:14 gake èna mɔnukpɔkpɔ gã aɖe Yehowa ƒe futɔwo be woado vlo Yehowa eye woagblɔ busunyawo ɖe eŋu eya ta viwò la aku.”
2Samuel12:15 Natan trɔ yi aƒe me. Yehowa na Uria srɔ̃ ƒe vidzĩ si wòdzi na David la dze dɔ kutɔkutɔe.
2Samuel12:16 David ɖe kuku na Mawu be wòana ɖevi la natsi agbe
2Samuel12:17 Ametsitsi siwo le eƒe aƒe me la kpɔ egbɔ be woana wòafɔ aɖu nu
2Samuel12:18 Le ŋkeke adrea gbe la
2Samuel12:19 Ke esi David kpɔ wo wonɔ dalĩ dom na wo nɔewo la
2Samuel12:20 David fɔ le anyigba
2Samuel12:21 Nu sia wɔ nuku na eŋumewo eye wogblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel12:22 David ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel12:23 Ke nu ka ta magatsi nu adɔ esi wòku? Ɖe mate ŋu ana wòagbɔ agbea? Egbɔe mayi
2Samuel12:24 David fa akɔ na Batseba eye esi wògadɔ egbɔ la
2Samuel12:25 eye wòɖo du kple yayra ɖee to Nyagblɔɖila Natan dzi
2Samuel12:26 Azɔ la
2Samuel12:27 Yoab ɖo amewo ɖa be woagblɔ na David be
2Samuel12:28 Azɔ la
2Samuel12:29 Ale David kplɔ aʋakɔ blibo la yi Raba
2Samuel12:30 Eɖe fiakuku le ta na Fia la. Fiakuku la ƒe kpekpemee nye sika talento ɖeka eye wotɔ kpe xɔasiwo ɖe eŋu. Wotsɔe ɖɔ na David. Elɔ afunyinu geɖewo tso du la me.
2Samuel12:31 Ekplɔ dua me nɔlawo dzoe eye wode dɔ sesẽwo wɔwɔ asi na wo be woawɔ kple laxalaxawo

2Samuel18:32 Fia la bia Kustɔ la be
2Samuel18:33 Fia la de asi avifafa me enumake. Eyi eƒe xɔ me le xɔ tame. Efa avi hegblɔ be
2Samuel19:1 Du ɖo Yoab gbɔ kaba be fia la nɔ avi fam na Absalom.
2Samuel19:2 Esi amewo se be fia la nɔ nu xam vevie la
2Samuel19:3 Aʋakɔ blibo la te ɖɔɖɔɖɔ va dua me abe ɖe woɖu wo dzi eye wogbɔ kple ŋukpe ene.
2Samuel19:4 Fia la tsyɔ asi mo
2Samuel19:5 Yoab yi Fia la gbɔ le eƒe xɔ me eye wògblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel19:6 Èle fiafiam be yelɔ̃ ame siwo lé fu ye eye yelé fu ame siwo lɔ̃ ye. Edze abe míexɔ asi le gbɔwò kura o ene. Nenye ɖe Absalom le agbe eye mí katã míeku la
2Samuel19:7 Azɔ
2Samuel19:8 Fia la tso eye wòyi ɖanɔ dua ƒe agbonu. Esi amewo se be
2Samuel19:9 Wode asi nyahehe me le wo ɖokuiwo dome henɔ gbɔgblɔm be
2Samuel19:10 Míesi ami na Absalom abe míaƒe fia ene
2Samuel19:11 Fia David ɖo du sia ɖe Zadok kple Abiata
2Samuel19:12 Miawoe nye nɔvinyewo
2Samuel19:13 Migblɔ na Amasa be
2Samuel19:14 Amasa ɖe nya me na Yuda ƒe kplɔlawo katã eye wolɔ̃ abe ame ɖeka ene. Woɖo du ɖe fia la be
2Samuel19:15 Ale fia la dze mɔ ɖo ta Yerusalem. Esi wòva ɖo Yɔdan tɔsisi la to la
2Samuel19:16 Simei
2Samuel19:17 Ame akpe ɖeka tso Benyamin ƒe viwo dome nɔ eŋu. Ziba
2Samuel19:18 Wo katã wona kpekpeɖeŋu fia la kple eƒe aƒemetɔwo kple aʋawɔlawo eye wokpe ɖe wo ŋu ale si woate ŋui. Esi fia la va yina la
2Samuel19:19 eye wòɖe kuku nɛ be
2Samuel19:20 elabena medze si nye nu vɔ̃ eya ta meva afi sia egbe. Nyee nye ame gbãtɔ tso Yosef ƒe to la me be mado dzaa na wò nye aƒetɔ la egbea.”
2Samuel19:21 Abisai
2Samuel19:22 David blu ɖe eta gblɔ be
2Samuel19:23 Fia la trɔ ɖe Simei ŋu eye wògblɔ be
2Samuel19:24 Mefiboset
2Samuel19:25 Esi wòtso Yerusalem va be yeakpe fia la la
2Samuel19:26 Eɖo eŋu be
2Samuel19:27 Ke Ziba gblẽ nye ŋkɔ gblɔ be
2Samuel19:28 Ku koe nye kple nye ƒometɔwo katã míakpɔ mɔ na tso gbɔwò hafi
2Samuel19:29 David gblɔ be
2Samuel19:30 Ke Mefiboset gblɔ na fia la be
2Samuel19:31 Barzilai
2Samuel19:32 Azɔ la
2Samuel19:33 Fia la gblɔ na Barzilai be
2Samuel19:34 Ke Barzilai ɖo eŋu na fia la be
2Samuel19:35 Egbe mexɔ ƒe blaenyi; ɖe magate ŋu ade vovototo nu si nyo kple nu si menyo o la domea? Ɖe nuɖuɖu kple nunono agasɔ aɖe dzi na wò dɔla abe tsã enea? Alo ɖe ŋutsu kple nyɔnu hadzihawo ƒe ha agasɔ to me nam abe tsã enea? Nu ka wɔ nye aƒetɔ
2Samuel19:36 Ke wò dɔla atso Yɔdan tɔsisi la kpli wò
2Samuel19:37 Meɖe kuku
2Samuel19:38 Fia la gblɔ be
2Samuel19:39 Ale ameawo katã tso Yɔdan tɔsisi la kple fia la. Fia la kpla asi kɔ na Barzilai
2Samuel19:40 Fia la kplɔ Kimham ɖe asi eye woyi Gilgal. Ame geɖewo tso Yuda kple Israelviwo ƒe afã nɔ afi ma be yewoaxɔe.
2Samuel19:41 Ke Israelviwo fa konyi na fia la be ame siwo tso Yuda koe kpe ɖe eya ŋutɔ kple eƒe aƒemetɔwo ŋu le Yɔdan tɔsisi la tsotso me.
2Samuel19:42 Yuda ƒe viwo ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel19:43 Israelviwo ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel20:1 Seba nye yakame aɖe eye wòganye Bikri
2Samuel20:2 Ke Israel ŋutsuwo katã gblẽ David ɖi eye wodze Seba
2Samuel20:3 Esi wòɖo eƒe fiasã me le Yerusalem la
2Samuel20:4 Fia la gblɔ na Amasa be wòaƒo Yuda ƒe aʋawɔlawo nu ƒu le ŋkeke etɔ̃ me eye wòana yeanya.
2Samuel20:5 Ale Amasa yi ɖana nyanya aʋawɔlawo gake nu sia wɔwɔ xɔ wu ŋkeke etɔ̃ si wonae.
2Samuel20:6 David gblɔ na Abisai be
2Samuel20:7 Ale Abisai kple Yoab kple ame ɖeka tso Yoab ƒe aʋawɔlawo dome kple fia la ŋutɔ ŋudzɔla dze Seba
2Samuel20:8 Esi wova ɖo agakpe gã si le Gibeon gbɔ la
2Samuel20:9 Yoab te ɖe Amasa ŋu hebiae be
2Samuel20:10 Amasa mekpɔ yi ɖaɖɛ si Yoab lé kple miasi la o. Ale Yoab nyrɔ yi la ɖe dɔme nɛ flo
2Samuel20:11 Yoab ƒe aʋakplɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka do ɣli gblɔ na Amasa ƒe aʋawɔlawo be
2Samuel20:12 Ke Amasa ƒe kukua mlɔ eƒe ʋu me le mɔa titina. Esi Yoab ƒe aʋakplɔlawo kpɔ be ameawo nɔ ƒu ƒom na ame kuku la kpɔkpɔ la
2Samuel20:13 Esi wohe ame kuku la le mɔa dzi la
2Samuel20:14 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
2Samuel20:15 Esi Yoab ƒe aʋawɔlawo va ɖo la
2Samuel20:16 Ke nyɔnu nyanu aɖe tso dua me yɔ Yoab gblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel20:17 Esi wòte ɖe eŋu la
2Samuel20:18 Nyɔnu la gblɔ nɛ be
2Samuel20:19 Èle du tsitsi aɖe si me nɔlawo lɔ̃a ŋutifafa eye wowɔa nuteƒe na Israel la gbãm. Ɖe nàgblẽ nu si nye Yehowa tɔa?”
2Samuel20:20 Yoab ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel20:21 nu si dim mele koe nye ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Seba
2Samuel20:22 Ale nyɔnu la yi ameawo gbɔ kple eƒe aɖaŋu nyui la. Wotso ta le Seba
2Samuel20:23 Yoab nye aʋafia gãtɔ Israelʋakɔ la. Benaya nɔ fia la ŋu dzɔlawo
2Samuel20:24 Adoram kpɔa dɔwɔlawo dzi. Yehosafat
2Samuel20:25 Seve nye nuŋlɔla eye Zadok kple Abiata nye nunɔlawo.
2Samuel20:26 Ira
2Samuel21:1 Dɔ to ƒe etɔ̃ sɔŋ le David ƒe fiaɖuɣi. David do gbe ɖa na Yehowa ɖe eta eye Yehowa gblɔ na David be
2Samuel21:2 Ale Fia David yɔ Gibeontɔwo ƒo ƒu. Womenye Israelviwo o
2Samuel21:3 David bia wo be
2Samuel21:4 Gibeontɔwo ɖo eŋu be
2Samuel21:5 Woɖo eŋu na fia la be
2Samuel21:6 na woatsɔ via ŋutsu adre na mí eye míawu wo le Yehowa ŋkume le Gibea si nye Saul
2Samuel21:7 Ena Yonatan ƒe viŋutsu Mefiboset
2Samuel21:8 Ke etsɔ Rizpa ƒe viŋutsu eveawo
2Samuel21:9 Gibeontɔwo he wo ɖe ati ŋu le toa dzi le Yehowa ŋkume. Ale wo ame adreawo katã ku zi ɖeka le luxaɣi la ƒe gɔmedzedze.
2Samuel21:10 Rizpa
2Samuel21:11 Esi David se nu si Rizpa
2Samuel21:12 eyi ɖaxa Saul kple Yonatan ƒe ƒuwo le Yabes Gileadtɔwo gbɔ. Yabes Gileadtɔwo fi wo le ablɔ me le Bet Sean
2Samuel21:13 David lɔ Saul kple Yonatan ƒe ƒuwo eye wòƒo ƒu Saul ƒe vi adreawo hã ƒe ƒuwo.
2Samuel21:14 Woɖi Saul kple Yonatan ƒe ƒuwo ɖe Saul fofo
2Samuel21:15 Filistitɔwo gaho aʋa ɖe Israelviwo ŋu gbe ɖeka. David kple eƒe amewo wɔ aʋa la ale gbegbe be ɖeɖi te David ŋu eye wògbɔdzɔ.
2Samuel21:16 Filistitɔwo ƒe ame dzɔatsu aɖe si nye Rafa ƒe dzidzimevi
2Samuel21:17 Ke Abisai
2Samuel21:18 Emegbe
2Samuel21:19 Le aʋa bubu si wogawɔ kple Filistitɔwo le Gob la
2Samuel21:20 Le aʋa bubu aɖe si wowɔ le Gat me la
2Samuel21:21 ɖu fewu le Israel ŋu ale Yonatan
2Samuel21:22 Ame ene siawo nye Rafa ƒe dzidzimeviwo tso Gat eye wotsi David kple eƒe amewo ƒe asi me.
2Samuel22:1 David dzi ha sia na Yehowa le esime wòɖee tso Saul kple eƒe futɔ bubuawo ƒe asi me.
2Samuel22:2 Egblɔ be: “Yehowae nye nye agakpe
2Samuel22:3 Nye Mawu nye nye agakpe
2Samuel22:4 “Meyɔ Yehowa
2Samuel22:5 Ku ƒe ƒutsotsoewo ƒo xlãm
2Samuel22:6 Tsiẽƒe ƒe kawo blam eye ku ƒe mɔtetrewo ɖi kpem.
2Samuel22:7 “Ke meyɔ Yehowa le nye xaxa me
2Samuel22:8 Tete anyigba dzo nyanyanya eye wòʋuʋu; dziƒo ƒe agunuwo ke hã ʋuʋu heyeheye eye wodzo kpekpekpe elabena dzi kui.
2Samuel22:9 Dzudzɔ do tso eƒe ŋɔtime; dzo ƒe aɖewo do tso eƒe nu me eye dzoka xɔxɔwo kplɔe ɖo.
2Samuel22:10 Ema dziŋgɔli ɖe eve
2Samuel22:11 Ede Kerubiwo dzi eye wòdzo dzo. Eɖo asagba ɖe ya ƒe aʋalawo dzi.
2Samuel22:12 Ewɔ viviti nɔ eme abe agbadɔ ene eye lilikpo yibɔ si dzaa tsi lae ƒo xlãe
2Samuel22:13 dzoka xɔxɔwo do tso eƒe keklẽ me le eŋgɔ.
2Samuel22:14 Yehowa ɖe gbe tso dziƒo; eye Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la na wose eƒe gbe.
2Samuel22:15 Eda eƒe aŋutrɔ eye wòkaka eƒe futɔwo
2Samuel22:16 Atsiaƒu ƒe balimewo dze gaglãa eye anyigba ƒe gɔmeɖoɖo tsi ƒuƒlu le Yehowa ƒe nyaheɖeameŋu kple gbɔgbɔ si do tso eƒe ŋɔtime ta.
2Samuel22:17 “Edo asi ɖa tso dziƒo lém
2Samuel22:18 tso nye futɔ ŋusẽtɔwo ƒe asi me
2Samuel22:19 Woƒo ɖe dzinye le nye dzɔgbevɔ̃egbe gake Yehowa nye nye kpeɖeŋutɔ.
2Samuel22:20 Eɖem tsɔ da ɖe teƒe gbadza; eɖem elabena nye nu nyo eŋu.
2Samuel22:21 “Yehowa nɔ kplim le nye dzɔdzɔenyenye nu eye wòwɔ nyui nam le esi nye asi me dza ta.
2Samuel22:22 Melé Yehowa ƒe mɔwo me ɖe asi. Nyemewɔ vɔ̃ hetrɔ le nye Mawu yome o;
2Samuel22:23 Eƒe sewo katã le ŋkunye me; eye nyemetrɔ le eƒe ɖoɖowo yome o.
2Samuel22:24 Nyemeɖi fɔ le eŋkume o eye mete ɖokuinye ɖa tso nu vɔ̃ gbɔ.
2Samuel22:25 Eya ta Yehowa wɔ nyui nam le nye dzɔdzɔenyenye kple esi nye asi me dza le eŋkume la ta.
2Samuel22:26 “Èwɔa nuteƒe na nuteƒewɔla eye nèfiaa ɖokuiwò fɔmaɖilae na ame si ŋu fɔɖiɖi mele o.
2Samuel22:27 Ame si dza le eƒe dzi me la
2Samuel22:28 Èɖea ame siwo bɔbɔa wo ɖokui ke wò ŋku le dadalawo ŋu
2Samuel22:29 Wò
2Samuel22:30 Mate ŋu alũ ɖe aʋakɔ dzi to wò kpekpeɖeŋu me eye le nye Mawu ta mate ŋu ati kpo aflɔ gli.
2Samuel22:31 “Mawu ya ƒe mɔwo de blibo
2Samuel22:32 Elabena ame kae ganye Mawu kpe ɖe Yehowa ŋu? Ame kae ganye Agakpe? Ɖe menye míaƒe Mawu la koe oa?
2Samuel22:33 Mawue nye nye mɔ sesẽ
2Samuel22:34 Ewɔ nye afɔwo abe zi tɔwo ene eye wòna metea ŋu tsia tsitre ɖe teƒe kɔkɔwo.
2Samuel22:35 Efia aʋawɔwɔ nye asiwo eye nye asiwo ate ŋu abɔ dati si wowɔ kple akɔbli.
2Samuel22:36 Ètsɔ wò dziɖuɖu ƒe akpoxɔnu la nam. Ebɔbɔ ɖokuiwò be nàdo kɔkɔm.
2Samuel22:37 Èkeke mɔ le tenye
2Samuel22:38 “Meti nye futɔwo yome eye metsrɔ̃ wo; nyemetrɔ le wo yome o
2Samuel22:39 Metsrɔ̃ wo gudugudu eye ɖeke magate ŋu afɔ o. Wodze anyi ɖe nye afɔ nu
2Samuel22:40 elabena wòe na ŋusẽm hena aʋa la wɔwɔ
2Samuel22:41 Èna nye futɔwo trɔ megbe dem helé du tsɔ eye metsrɔ̃ nye futɔwo.
2Samuel22:42 Wodo ɣli be Yehowa naxɔ na yewo gake ame aɖeke mexɔ na wo o elabena Yehowa metɔ na wo o.
2Samuel22:43 Metu wo
2Samuel22:44 “Èɖem tso ame siwo va dze dzinye la si me
2Samuel22:45 Ne wose ŋkɔnye ko la
2Samuel22:46 Dzi ɖena le wo katã ƒo eye wotsɔa dzodzo nyanyanya hedoa goe le woƒe mɔ sesẽwo me.
2Samuel22:47 “Yehowa li tegbee! Woakafu nye Agakpe la! Woado Mawu
2Samuel22:48 Eyae nye Mawu
2Samuel22:49 Èɖeam tso nye futɔwo ƒe asi me
2Samuel22:50 eya ta ele be makafu wò
2Samuel22:51 “Ena dziɖuɖu geɖe eƒe fia la

2Samuel23:4 anɔ abe ŋdikekeli ene
2Samuel23:5 “Ɖe nye aƒe mele dzɔdzɔe le Mawu ŋkume oa? Ɖe mebla nu mavɔ si le dedie la kplim oa? Ɛ̃
2Samuel23:6 Ke woaɖe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo katã ɖe aga abe ŋutiwo wonye ene. Ŋuti si womefɔna kple asi o.
2Samuel23:7 Ame si di be yeafɔ ŋuti la tsɔa nu lénɛ

2Samuel23:9 Ame Sesẽ Etɔ̃awo dometɔ eveliae nye Eleazar

2Samuel23:11 Ame si kplɔe ɖo lae nye Sama
2Samuel23:12 Sama ɖeka tɔ ɖe bligble la titina eye wòxɔe hewu Filistitɔwo. Yehowa na wòɖu dzi gã aɖe.

2Samuel23:21 Le ɣeyiɣi bubu hã la
