Job4:20 Wogbãa wo gudugudu le fɔŋli kple zã dome
Job4:21 Ɖe womehoa woƒe agbadɔkawo
Job5:1 “Ne àlɔ̃ la
Job5:2 Tosesẽ wua bometsila eye ŋubiã wua numanyala.
Job5:3 Nye ŋutɔ mekpɔ bometsila wònɔ ke tom gake kasia woƒo fi de eƒe aƒe.
Job5:4 Dedinɔnɔ le adzɔge ke na viawo
Job5:5 Dɔwuitɔwo ɖua nuku si wòxa
Job5:6 Elabena fukpekpe medoa go tso ke me alo dzɔgbevɔ̃e medona tso anyigba tume o.
Job5:7 Gake abe ale si dzoxi dzona yia dzii ene la
Job5:8 “Ke nenye nyee wònye la
Job5:9 Ewɔa dzesi siwo gɔme womate ŋu ase o eye wòwɔa nukunu siwo womate ŋu axlẽ o.
Job5:10 Enana tsi dzana ɖe anyigba dzi
Job5:11 Edoa ɖokuibɔbɔlawo ɖe dzi eye wòkɔa ame siwo le nu xam la dana ɖe dziɖeɖi me.
Job5:12 Egblẽa ayetɔwo ƒe ɖoɖowo me
Job5:13 Eléa nunyalawo le woƒe ayemenuwɔwɔwo me eye wòkplɔa ame drãwo ƒe nu drã wɔwɔ dzonae.
Job5:14 Viviti dona ɖe wo le ŋkeke me eye wotsaa asi blukɔ me abe zã mee ene.
Job5:15 Eɖea hiãtɔwo tso yi si le woƒe nu me la me eye wòɖea wo le ŋusẽtɔwo ƒe fego me.
Job5:16 Ale mɔkpɔkpɔ ɖoa hiãtɔ si eye nu madzɔmadzɔ miaa eƒe nu.
Job5:17 “Woayra ŋutsu si Mawu ɖɔna ɖo eya ta mègado vlo Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe amehehe o.
Job5:18 Elabena edea abi ame ŋu eye wògablanɛ
Job5:19 Aɖe wò le dzɔgbevɔ̃e ade me eye le adrelia me la
Job5:20 Aɖe wò le ku ƒe asi me le dɔŋɔli eye le aʋa me la
Job5:21 Aɖe wò le aɖeɖiƒoame me
Job5:22 Wò la àko nu ne gbegblẽ kple dɔwuame le nu gblẽm eye màvɔ̃ anyigbadzilã wɔadãwo o.
Job5:23 Elabena wò kple kpe siwo le agble me la miabla nu eye lã wɔadãwo anɔ anyi kpli wò le ŋutifafa me.
Job5:24 Ànyae be wò agbadɔ le dedie eye ne èxlẽ wò nunɔamesiwo la
Job5:25 Ànyae be viwòwo asɔ gbɔ eye wò dzidzimeviwo asɔ agbɔ abe gbe mumu le anyigba dzi ene.
Job5:26 Ànɔ agbe wòade edeƒe
Job5:27 “Míedo esia kpɔ eye wònye nyateƒe. Eya ta see ne nànɔ agbe ɖe eŋu.”
Job6:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Job6:2 “Ne ɖe woada nye vevesese eye woada nye fukpekpewo ɖe nudanu me ɖe!
Job6:3 Vavã woakpe wu ke si katã le ƒuta
Job6:4 Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe aŋutrɔwo le nye lãme
Job6:5 Ɖe gbetedzi xlɔ̃na ne ele gbe mumu gbɔ alo nyi xlɔ̃na ne wotsɔ gbe ƒuƒu nɛ be wòaɖua?
Job6:6 Ɖe woaɖu nu vɔvɔ dzemademee alo ɖe koklozi ƒe ɣia vivinaa?
Job6:7 Megbe be nyemaɖui o
Job6:8 “O
Job6:9 ne Mawu ɖe wòalɔ̃ agbãm gudugudu eye wòaɖe ka eƒe asi ɖe dzinye
Job6:10 Ekema esia aganye akɔfafa nam ko kple nye dzidzɔ le vevesese si nu mele tsotsom o la me be
Job6:11 “Ŋusẽ kae gale asinye be maganɔ mɔ kpɔm? Mɔnukpɔkpɔ kawoe gali ta magbɔ dzi ɖi?
Job6:12 Kpe ƒe ŋusẽe le asinyea? Akɔblie nye nye ŋutilãa?
Job6:13 Ɖe ŋusẽ aɖe le asinye be makpe ɖe ɖokuinye ŋu
Job6:14 “Ele na xɔlɔ̃wo be woakpe ɖe ame si ƒo dzi ɖe le la ŋu togbɔ be egbe nu le Ŋusẽkatãtɔ vɔvɔ̃ gbɔ hã.
Job6:15 Ke womate ŋu aɖo dzi ɖe nɔvinye ŋutsuwo ŋu o elabena wole abe tɔʋu si miena le kuɖiɣi ene alo abe tɔʋu si ɖɔna gbagbana
Job6:16 ne tsikpe si le ete doe ɖe dzi
Job6:17 gake eƒe sisi nu tsona ne kuɖiɣi ɖo eye dzoxɔxɔ nana wòmiena la ene.
Job6:18 Asihawo ɖea asi le woƒe mɔwo ŋu hedzea gbe toa tagba eye wokuna ɖe mɔ dzi.
Job6:19 Asiha siwo tso Tema la le tsi dim
Job6:20 Ke woƒe dzi tsi dzi elabena kakaɖedzi nɔ wo si hafi gake esi wova ɖo afi ma la
Job6:21 Azɔ miawo hã mieɖee fia be
Job6:22 Ɖe megblɔ kpɔ be
Job6:23 miɖem le ketɔ la ƒe asi me alo mixɔm le ŋutasẽla ƒe fegomea?’
Job6:24 “Mifia num eye mazi ɖoɖoe; mifia afi si meda ƒu le lam.
Job6:25 Aleke nyateƒenyawo mehe venae o! Ke nu ka miaƒe nyahehewo ɖe fia?
Job6:26 Ɖe miedi be yewoaɖɔ nya si megblɔ la ɖo eye miawɔ ame si ƒo dzi ɖe le la ƒe nyawo abe yaƒoƒo enea?
Job6:27 Miadzidze nu gɔ̃ hã ɖe tsyɔ̃eviwo dzi eye miatsɔ mia xɔlɔ̃wo gɔ̃ hã aɖɔli nue.
Job6:28 “Azɔ la
Job6:29 Miɖe asi
Job6:30 Ɖe vɔ̃ɖivɔ̃ɖi aɖe le nye nuyiwo dzia? Ɖe nye nu made dzesi beble oa?”
Job7:1 “Ɖe menye dɔ sesẽ mee amegbetɔ le le anyigba dzi oa? Ɖe eƒe ŋkekewo mele abe agbatetsɔla tɔ ene oa?
Job7:2 Abe ale si kluvi dina be zã nedo kaba alo agbatetsɔla kpɔa mɔ na eƒe fetu vevie ene la
Job7:3 nenemae wotsɔ ɣleti siwo me fukpekpe le kple zã siwo me hiãtuame le la nam.
Job7:4 Ne memlɔ anyi la
Job7:5 Nye ŋutilã dze abi kple nyẽ helé dzɔbu eye nye ŋutigbalẽ wó gblogblogblo hele tsi ƒaƒã tsyɔm.
Job7:6 “Nye ŋkekewo le du ɖim wu avɔlɔ̃ʋu eye wowua enu mɔkpɔkpɔmanɔmee.
Job7:7 O Mawu
Job7:8 Ŋku si le kpɔyem fifia la magakpɔm akpɔ o
Job7:9 Abe ale si lilikpo buna eye enu va yinae ene la
Job7:10 Magatrɔ ava eƒe aƒe me akpɔ o
Job7:11 “Eya ta nyemazi ɖoɖoe o
Job7:12 Nyee nye atsiaƒu alo lã dziŋɔ si le atsiaƒu ƒe gogloƒe be
Job7:13 Ne mebu be nye aba afa akɔ nam eye suɖi aɖe nye konyifafa dzi akpɔtɔ la
Job7:14 ekema ètsɔa drɔ̃ewo doa vɔvɔ̃ nam eye nètsɔa ŋutegawo doa ŋɔdzi nam.
Job7:15 Ale be melɔ̃ kudɔƒoƒo kple ku wu nye ŋutilã sia.
Job7:16 Menyɔ ŋu nye agbe
Job7:17 “Nu kae nye amegbetɔ be nèdo kɔkɔe alea
Job7:18 be nèléa ŋku ɖe eŋu ŋdi sia ŋdi eye nèdonɛ kpɔ aɖabaƒoƒo ɖe sia ɖe?
Job7:19 Ɖe màgaɖe ŋku ɖa le ŋunye alo ana gbɔdzɔem aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka hɔ̃ɔ gɔ̃ hã oa?
Job7:20 Ne mewɔ nu vɔ̃ ɖe
Job7:21 Nu ka ta mèɖe ŋku ɖa le nye dzidadawo ŋu eye mètsɔ nye nu vɔ̃wo kem o? Elabena esusɔ vie mamlɔ ke me
Job8:1 Tete Suhitɔ
Job8:2 “Va se ɖe ɣe ka ɣie nànɔ nya siawo gblɔm? Wò nyawo nye yaƒoƒo sesẽ ɖeɖe ko.
Job8:3 Ɖe Mawu atso afia ŋkunɔa? Ɖe Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la atrɔ nya dzɔdzɔe abua?
Job8:4 Esi viwòwo wɔ nu vɔ̃ ɖe eŋu la
Job8:5 Gake ne àkpɔ Mawu dzi ɖa
Job8:6 ekema ne èle dzadzɛe
Job8:7 Wò gɔmedzedze anɔ sue gake emegbe àdzi asɔ gbɔ ɖe edzi.
Job8:8 “Bia dzidzime siwo do ŋgɔ
Job8:9 elabena míawo la
Job8:10 Ɖe womafia nu wò
Job8:11 Ɖe keti miena
Job8:12 Esi wogale mumu ko eye womeɖo sisi me haɖe o la
Job8:13 Aleae wòvaa emee na ame siwo katã ŋlɔ Mawu be eye nenemae Mawumavɔ̃lawo ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ tsrɔ̃nae.
Job8:14 Nu si ŋu wòɖo dzi ɖo la meɖo ŋusẽ o eye nu si wòde mee la nye yiyiɖɔ.
Job8:15 Ede me eƒe ɖɔ eye wòlã
Job8:16 Ɖeko wòle abe ati si wode tsii nyuie le ŋdɔgbe ene ekekea eƒe alɔwo ɖe abɔa me
Job8:17 eƒe kewo blana ɖe agakpe geɖewo ŋu eye wodia teƒe le kpewo dome.
Job8:18 Gake ne wohoe le enɔƒe la
Job8:19 Vavã eƒe agbe yrɔna eye atiku bubuwo miena ɖe eteƒe.
Job8:20 “Enye nyateƒe be Mawu megbea ame si ŋu fɔɖiɖi mele o alo doa ŋusẽ nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo ƒe asi o.
Job8:21 Ke hã la
Job8:22 Ŋukpe alé wò futɔwo eye ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe agbadɔwo maganɔ anyi o.”
Job9:1 Hiob ɖo eŋu nɛ gblɔ be
Job9:2 “Vavã menya be esia nye nyateƒe
Job9:3 Togbɔ be anye ame ƒe didi be yeahe nya kplii hã la
Job9:4 Eƒe nunya de to
Job9:5 Emli towo ɖa gake womenya o eye wòtrɔ wo bu anyi le eƒe dziku me.
Job9:6 Eʋuʋu anyigba le enɔƒe eye wòna eƒe sɔtiwo ʋuʋu kpekpekpe.
Job9:7 Eƒoa nu na ɣe eye meklẽna o
Job9:8 Eya ɖekae keke dziƒowo me eye wòzɔa ƒutsotsoewo dzi.
Job9:9 Eyae wɔ ɣletivi siwo woyɔna be
Job9:10 Ewɔ nu dzɔtsu siwo me dzodzro meli o eye wòwɔ nukunu siwo mele xexlẽme o.
Job9:11 Ne eva to ŋunye yi la
Job9:12 Ne exɔ nu le ame si sesẽtɔe la
Job9:13 Mawu meɖoa asi eƒe dziku dzi o
Job9:14 “Eya ta aleke nye ya mate ŋu aɖe ɖeklemie? Afi ka makpɔ nyawo le atsɔ ahe nya kplii?
Job9:15 Togbɔ be nyemedze agɔ o hã la
Job9:16 Ne meyɔe eye wòtɔ nam gɔ̃ hã la
Job9:17 Atsɔ ahomya agbãm gudugudu eye wòadzi nye abiwo ɖe edzi dzodzro.
Job9:18 Maɖe mɔ nam be magakpɔ gbɔdzɔe o
Job9:19 Ne ŋusẽ ƒe nya wònye la
Job9:20 Ne nyemeɖi fɔ o gɔ̃ hã la
Job9:21 “Togbɔ be nyemeɖi fɔ o hã la
Job9:22 Wo katã le ɖeka eya ta megblɔ be
Job9:23 Ne ameƒoti he ku vɛ kpata la
Job9:24 Ne anyigba aɖe ge ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe asi me la
Job9:25 “Nye ŋkekewo le du ɖim wu duƒula
Job9:26 Wozɔ mii va yi abe aƒlaʋuwo ene eye abe hɔ̃woe de agba anyi be yewoaƒo nu le anyigba ene.
Job9:27 Ne megblɔ be
Job9:28 ekema nye fukpekpewo katã doa ŋɔdzi nam elabena menyae be màbum fɔmaɖilae o.
Job9:29 Esi wobum fɔɖilae xoxo ɖe
Job9:30 Ne mele tsi kple tsiledzalẽ eye metsɔ nunyadzalẽ klɔ asi gɔ̃ hã la
Job9:31 aganyrɔm ɖe anyiʋe me
Job9:32 “Menye amee wònye abe nye ene ne maɖo nya ŋu nɛ
Job9:33 Ne ame aɖe ɖe wòli aƒo nu le mía dome
Job9:34 ame si aɖe Mawu ƒe ameƒoti ɖa le ŋutinye
Job9:35 Ekema maƒo nu na eya amea mavɔmavɔ̃e
Job10:1 “Nye agbe le ŋu nyɔm na nye ŋutɔ
Job10:2 Magblɔ na Mawu be
Job10:3 Ɖe wòle nuwò vivim be yele teyem ɖe to
Job10:4 Ŋutilãmeŋkue le tawòa? Ɖe nèkpɔa nu abe ale si amegbetɔ kodzogbea kpɔa nu enea?
Job10:5 Ɖe wò ŋkekewo le abe kodzogbeawo tɔ ene alo wò ƒewo le abe amegbetɔ tɔ ene
Job10:6 be nàtsa adi nye vodadawo
Job10:7 evɔ nènya be nyemedze agɔ o eye ame aɖeke mate ŋu axɔm le wò asi me oa?
Job10:8 “ ‘Wò asiwoe wɔm eye womem. Ɖe nàtrɔ azɔ atsrɔ̃ma?
Job10:9 Ɖo ŋku edzi be anyie nètsɔ mem. Ɖe nàgatrɔm azɔ mazu anyia?
Job10:10 Ɖe mètrɔm kɔ ɖe anyi abe notsi ene eye nèna mebla abe notsi babla ene oa?
Job10:11 Ɖe mèfa ayi kple lãkusi ɖe ŋunye eye nètem ƒo ƒu ɖe nye ƒuwo kple lãmekawo ŋuti oa?
Job10:12 Èna agbem henyo dɔ me nam eye le wò ametakpɔkpɔ la ta nèdzɔ nye gbɔgbɔ ŋuti.
Job10:13 “ ‘Ke esiae nèɣla ɖe wò dzi me eye menya be esia le wò susu me be
Job10:14 Ne mewɔ nu vɔ̃ la
Job10:15 Ne meɖi fɔ la
Job10:16 Ne mefɔ mo dzi la
Job10:17 Èɖoa ɖasefo bubuwo ŋunye eye nèdoa dziku ɖe ŋutinye ɖe edzi
Job10:18 “ ‘Ke nu ka ŋuti nèna medo tso danye ƒe dɔ me? Ɖe meku ɖe danye ƒe dɔ me la
Job10:19 Ɖe nyemedzɔ o alo wokɔm tso danye ƒe dɔ me yi yɔdo mee la
Job10:20 Ɖe nye ŋkeke ʋɛawo mewu nu kloe vɔ oa? Ɖe mo ɖa le ŋunye ale be nye hã makpɔ dzidzɔ vi aɖe
Job10:21 hafi ayi demagbɔnugbe
Job10:22 anyigba si dzi zã do blukɔ kpekpekpe le
Job11:1 Naamatitɔ
Job11:2 “Ɖe woagbe nya siawo ŋu ɖoɖo na wòa? Ɖe woabe nyawɔla sia tɔ dzɔa?
Job11:3 Ɖe wò nya dzodzro siawo ade ga nu na amewoa? Ɖe ame aɖeke meli aka mo na wò ne èle fewu ɖum oa?
Job11:4 Ègblɔ na Mawu be ‘Kpɔtsɔtsɔ mele nu siwo dzi mexɔ se la ŋu o eye medza le ŋkuwòme.’
Job11:5 O
Job11:6 ne wòaɖe nunya ƒe nu ɣaɣlawo afia wò elabena mo evee li na nunya. Vavã
Job11:7 “Àte ŋu ase Mawu ƒe nya goglowo gɔmea? Àte ŋu adzro Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe mlɔenuwo ke mea?
Job11:8 Wokɔkɔ wu dziƒowo
Job11:9 Wodidi wu anyigba eye wokeke wu atsiaƒu.
Job11:10 Ke ne eva do
Job11:11 Vavã enyaa alakpatɔwo eye ne ekpɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi la
Job11:12 Gake abe ale si gbetedzi mate ŋu adzi vi wòanye amegbetɔ o ene la
Job11:13 “Ke hã la
Job11:14 ne èɖe nu vɔ̃ siwo le wò asi me la ɖa eye ne mèɖe mɔ na nu vɔ̃ɖi aɖeke be wòanɔ wò agbadɔ me o la
Job11:15 ekema àkɔ wò mo dzi ŋukpemanɔmee
Job11:16 Le nyateƒe me la
Job11:17 Wò agbe me akɔ wu ŋdɔkutsu dzati eye viviti anɔ na wò abe ŋdikekeli ene.
Job11:18 Ànɔ dedie elabena mɔkpɔkpɔ li
Job11:19 Àmlɔ anyi eye ame aɖeke mava do ŋɔdzi na wò o; ale ame geɖewo ava bia amenuveve tso gbɔwò.
Job11:20 Ke ɖeɖi ate ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe ŋkuwo ŋu
Job12:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Job12:2 “Mewɔ nuku be miawo koe nye amewo eye ne mieku la nunya aku kpli mi o!
Job12:3 Gake susu le asinye abe miawo ke ene. Mienyo wum o. Ame ka menya nu siawo katã o?
Job12:4 “Togbɔ be meyɔ Mawu eye wòtɔ nam hã la
Job12:5 Ŋutsu siwo li le dziɖeɖi me la do vlo dzɔgbevɔ̃etɔ eye nenema ke woawɔ na ame siwo ƒe afɔ ɖiɖi.
Job12:6 Adzohawo ƒe agbadɔwo li le ŋutifafa me eye ame siwo do dziku na Mawu la li le dedinɔnɔ me. Nenema kee nye ame siwo tsɔa woƒe mawu ɖe woƒe asi me.
Job12:7 “Ke bia gbemelãwo
Job12:8 Alo ƒo nu na anyigba
Job12:9 Nu siawo katã dometɔ kae menyae be
Job12:10 Nuwɔwɔ ɖe sia ɖe ƒe agbe le eƒe asi me eye amegbetɔwo katã ƒe gbɔgbɔ hã le eƒe asi me.
Job12:11 Ɖe to medoa nyawo kpɔ abe ale si aɖe ɖɔa nuɖuɖu kpɔe ene oa?
Job12:12 Ɖe menye amegãɖeɖiwo gbɔe nunya tso aƒe ɖo oa? Ɖe agbe didi mehea gɔmesese vɛ oa?
Job12:13 “Mawu tɔe nye nunya kple ŋusẽ; aɖaŋudede kple gɔmesese hã nye etɔ.
Job12:14 Nu si wògbã kɔ ɖi la
Job12:15 Ne eɖo asi tsidzadza dzi la
Job12:16 Etɔe nye ŋusẽ kple dziɖuɖu
Job12:17 Ekplɔa dumegãwo dzonae amama eye wònana Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo zua bometsilawo.
Job12:18 Eɖea atsyɔ̃ɖonu siwo fiawo dona la ɖa eye wòtsɔa avɔ kakɛ sana ɖe ali na wo.
Job12:19 Ekplɔa nunɔlawo dzonae amama eye ame siwo li ke tso gbe aɖe gbe ke la emua wo ƒua anyi.
Job12:20 Edea ga nu na aɖaŋuɖola siwo ŋu woɖoa dzi ɖo eye wòɖea dumegãwo ƒe sidzedze ɖa.
Job12:21 Edoa ŋunyɔ bubumewo eye wòxɔa lãnu le kalẽtɔwo si.
Job12:22 Eɖea nu goglo siwo le viviti me la ɖe go eye wòhea blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi vaa kekeli me.
Job12:23 Eyae naa dukɔwo xɔa ŋkɔ eye eya kee tsrɔ̃a wo. Eyae dzia dukɔwo ɖe edzi eye eya kee kakaa wo.
Job12:24 Exɔa susu le anyigbadzifiawo si eye wònana wonɔa tsaglalã tsam le gbegbe.
Job12:25 Wotsaa asi blukɔ me afi si akaɖi mele o eye wònana wonɔa ya mum abe ame siwo mu aha ene.”
Job13:1 “Nye ŋkuwo kpɔ nu siawo katã
Job13:2 Nu si nènya la
Job13:3 Gake medi vevie be maƒo nu kple Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la eye mahe nya kple Mawu.
Job13:4 Ke miawo la
Job13:5 Ne mi katã miahaɖo to ɖe! Le mia gbɔ la
Job13:6 Mise ɖokuinyenuɖeɖe azɔ
Job13:7 Ɖe miaƒo nu baɖa ɖe Mawu nua? Ɖe miaƒo nu bebletɔe ɖe enua?
Job13:8 Ɖe miebe yewoade edzia? Ɖe miebe yewoaxɔ nya ɖe Mawu nua?
Job13:9 Anyo na mi ne edo mi kpɔa? Miate ŋu ablee abe ale si miable amewo enea?
Job13:10 Le nyateƒe me
Job13:11 Ɖe eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe mado ŋɔdzi na mi oa? Ɖe eƒe ŋɔdzi malé mi oa?
Job13:12 Miaƒe nya tsitsiwo nye lododo gbɔlowo eye dedinɔnɔ ƒe gli siwo mieɖo la nye anyigliwo ko.
Job13:13 “Mizi ɖoɖoe ne miana mɔm maƒo nu
Job13:14 Nu ka ŋuti metsɔ ɖokuinye de xaxa me eye metsɔ nye agbe ɖo nye asiƒome?
Job13:15 Togbɔ be ele wu ye ge hã la
Job13:16 Vavã esia ava zu ɖeɖe nam elabena mawumavɔ̃la aɖeke mate kpɔ be yeado ɖe eŋkume o!
Job13:17 Miɖo to miase nye nyawo nyuie
Job13:18 Azɔ meɖo nye nyawo ɖe ɖoɖo nu vɔ
Job13:19 Ɖe ame aɖe ate ŋu atsɔ nya ɖe ŋunyea? Ne ame aɖe ate ŋui la
Job13:20 “O Mawu
Job13:21 Te wò asi ɖa xaa tso gbɔnye eye nàdzudzɔ vɔvɔ̃dodo nam kple wò ŋɔdzinuwo.
Job13:22 Ekema yɔm eye matɔ alo maƒo nu eye nàɖo eŋu.
Job13:23 Nu vɔ̃ kple nu gbegblẽ nenie mewɔ? Ɖe nye vodada kple nu vɔ̃ fiam.
Job13:24 Nu ka tae nèɣla wò mo eye nèbum wò futɔe?
Job13:25 Ɖe nàwɔ funyafunya aŋgba si ya lɔ ɖe nua? Ɖe nàti atsa yomea?
Job13:26 Elabena èŋlɔ nu vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖi ɖe ŋunye eye nèna nye ɖekakpuimenu vɔ̃wo va dzinye.
Job13:27 Ède gakɔsɔkɔsɔ nye afɔwo
Job13:28 “Ale mevɔ le eme abe nu si ƒaƒã alo avɔ si gbagblaʋui ɖu la ene.”
Job14:1 “Amegbetɔ si nyɔnu dzi ƒe agbemeŋkekewo le kpuie eye woyɔ fũu kple fukpekpe.
Job14:2 Ekena abe seƒoƒo ene eye wòyrɔna
Job14:3 Ɖe nàke ŋku ɖe esia tɔgbi ŋua? Ɖe nàkplɔe va ʋɔnui le ŋkuwòmea?
Job14:4 Ame ka ate ŋu aɖe nu dzadzɛ tso nu si medza o la me? Ɖeka pɛ teti hã o!
Job14:5 Èɖo ame ƒe ŋkekewo ɖi xoxo; èɖo eƒe ɣletiwo da ɖi eye nèɖo liƒo siwo dzi mate ŋu agbɔ o la ɖi nɛ.
Job14:6 Eya ta ɖe ŋku ɖa le eŋu eye nàɖe asi le eŋu va se ɖe esime eƒe ɣeyiɣi de abe agbatedɔwɔla ene.
Job14:7 “Mɔkpɔkpɔ li na ati gɔ̃ hã
Job14:8 Eƒe kewo anya do xoxo ɖe tome eye eƒe takpo aku ɖe tome
Job14:9 ke hã la
Job14:10 Gake ne amegbetɔ ya ku la
Job14:11 Abe ale si atsiaƒu ɖia ke alo tsi miena le tɔsisi me wòƒuna kplakplakpla ene la
Job14:12 nenemae amegbetɔ mlɔa anyie eye megafɔna o va se ɖe esime dziƒo nu ava yi. Amegbetɔwo magafɔ alo anyɔ tso woƒe alɔ̃dɔdɔ me o.
Job14:13 “O
Job14:14 Ne ame ku la
Job14:15 Àyɔm eye matɔ
Job14:16 Ekema àxlẽ nye afɔɖeɖewo
Job14:17 Woatre nye dzidadawo nu ɖe akplo me eye àtsyɔ nu nye nu vɔ̃wo dzi.
Job14:18 “Gake abe ale si ke ɖena le to te wòŋena dzea eme eye agakpe ʋãna le eteƒe ene la
Job14:19 abe ale si tsi nyia kpewoe eye tsidzadza kplɔa ke si le anyigba dzonae ene la
Job14:20 Èdzea edzi kple ŋusẽ zi ɖeka eye ɖe wòvɔnae nye ekema; ètrɔa eƒe dzedzeme henyanɛ dzonae.
Job14:21 Ne wode bubu via ŋutsuwo ŋu hã la
Job14:22 Negbe eya ŋutɔ ƒe veve si sem wòle le ŋutilã me koe eye eya ŋutɔ fana na eɖokui.”
Job15:1 Temanitɔ
Job15:2 “Ɖe nunyala aɖo nya ŋu kple susu gbɔlo alo ana ɣedzeƒeya xɔdzo nayɔ eƒe dɔ mea?
Job15:3 Ɖe wòatsɔ nya manyatalenuwo ahe nya alo atsɔ nuƒoƒo si nye nya dzodzro ahe nyaea?
Job15:4 Kura gɔ̃ hã la
Job15:5 Wò nu vɔ̃e ƒoe ɖe nuwò ale nètia ayetɔwo ƒe aɖe.
Job15:6 Wò ŋutɔ wò nue bu fɔ wò
Job15:7 “Wòe nye ame gbãtɔ si wodzi kpɔa? Ɖe wodzi wò hafi togbɛwo va dzɔa?
Job15:8 Èse Mawu ƒe aɖaŋudede kple toa? Gbɔwò ko nunya tso aƒe ɖoa?
Job15:9 Nu ka nènya si míawo ya míenya o? Nu ka gɔmee nèse esi gɔme míawo míese o?
Job15:10 Ta ƒowɔ tɔwo kple amegãɖeɖiwo le mía dzi
Job15:11 Ɖe Mawu ƒe akɔfanamenya siwo wògblɔ bɔlɔɔ la
Job15:12 Nu ka ŋuti wò dzi kplɔ wò dzoe
Job15:13 ale be nènyɔ wò dziku ɖe Mawu ŋu eye nètrɔ nya siawo kɔ ɖi tso wò nu me?
Job15:14 “Nu kae nye amegbetɔ be
Job15:15 Ne Mawu meka ɖe eƒe kɔkɔetɔwo dzi o eye dziƒowo gɔ̃ hã medza le eƒe ŋkume o
Job15:16 aleke wòahanye amegbetɔ si nye aɖi
Job15:17 “Ɖo tom ne maɖe nu me na wò; na magblɔ nu si teƒe mekpɔ la na wò
Job15:18 nu si nunyalawo ɖe gbeƒãe eye womeɣla naneke si woxɔ tso wo fofowo gbɔ o
Job15:19 ame siwo ko wotsɔ anyigba la na
Job15:20 Ame vɔ̃ɖi kpea fuwo ƒe fu le eƒe agbemeŋkekewo katã me
Job15:21 Gbeɖiɖi siwo ŋu ŋɔdzi le la yɔ eƒe tome fũu eye ne wòdze abe nuwo ɖe wole afɔ tsɔm ene la
Job15:22 Dzi ɖe le eƒo be mate ŋu asi le viviti la nu o elabena wotsɔe de asi na yi.
Job15:23 Ele tsaglalã tsam le nuɖuɖu dim abe akaga ene elabena enya be vivitidogbe la tu aƒe kpokploe.
Job15:24 Xaxa kple vevesese na ŋɔdzi lé eya amea ŋutɔ eye wova dze edzi abe fia si le klalo na aʋakpekpe ene.
Job15:25 Elabena eŋlɔ kɔ do ɖe mo na Mawu eye wòdze aglã ɖe Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ŋu
Job15:26 helũ ɖe edzi ɖekematsɔlemetɔe kple akpoxɔnu titri sesẽ aɖe.
Job15:27 “Togbɔ be eda ami ɖe mo gbɔ eye wòlolo ɖe ali gbɔ hã la
Job15:28 anɔ du gbagbãwo kple xɔ siwo me ame aɖeke mele o la me
Job15:29 Magakpɔ hotsui o eye eƒe kesinɔnuwo maganɔ anyi alo eƒe nunɔamesiwo nagbagba ɖe anyigba dzi o.
Job15:30 Masi le viviti la nu o
Job15:31 Megable eɖokui
Job15:32 Hafi eƒe ɣeyiɣi nade la
Job15:33 Anɔ abe wainka si ŋu wogbe waintsetse gbogbowo katã le la ene alo abe amiti si dudu eƒe seƒoƒowo ene.
Job15:34 Elabena mawumavɔ̃lawo ƒe ha madzi ɖe edzi o eye dzo afia ame siwo lɔ̃a zãnuxɔxɔ ƒe agbadɔwo.
Job15:35 Wofɔa fukpekpe ƒe fu
Job16:1 Hiob ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Job16:2 “Mese nya siawo tɔgbi wòsɔ gbɔ
Job16:3 Miaƒe nuƒo legbe
Job16:4 Nenye miawoe le tenyeƒe la
Job16:5 Maƒo nu ade dzi ƒo na mi eye akɔfanya siwo ado tso nunye la ana miaƒe dzi adze eme.
Job16:6 “Gake ne meƒo nu la
Job16:7 O Mawu
Job16:8 Èna meɖi ku
Job16:9 Yehowa ƒom
Job16:10 Amewo ke woƒe nuwo baa hedo ɣli ɖe tanye. Woƒo tome nam fewuɖutɔe eye wowɔ ɖeka ɖe ŋunye.
Job16:11 Mawu dem asi na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo eye wòkɔm ƒu gbe ɖe ŋutasẽlawo ƒe fego me.
Job16:12 Nuwo nɔ edzi dzem nam nyuie gake ekakam. Elé kɔʋume nam hegbãm gudugudugudu. Etsɔm wɔ ade si minyam wòle
Job16:13 eƒe aŋutrɔdalawo ɖe to ɖem. Eŋɔ nye ayikuwo nublanuimakpɔmakpɔtɔe eye wòna nye vevego gbã hekɔ ɖe anyigba.
Job16:14 Eva ƒo ɖe dzinye enuenu eye wòlũ ɖe dzinye abe kalẽtɔ ene.
Job16:15 “Metɔ akpanya hetsyɔ na nye ŋutilã eye metsɔ nye mo de ke me.
Job16:16 Avifafa na nye mo biã dzẽe
Job16:17 evɔ nye asiwo mewɔ nu tovo aɖeke o eye nye gbedodoɖa hã dza hafi.
Job16:18 “O
Job16:19 Azɔ gɔ̃ hã la
Job16:20 Tanyeʋlila nye xɔ̃nye
Job16:21 Eɖea kuku na Mawu ɖe ame ta abe ale si ame ɖea kuku ɖe xɔlɔ̃a tae ene.
Job16:22 “Ƒe ʋɛ aɖewo koe ava yi hafi madze mɔ ayi demagbɔnugbe.
Job17:1 Nu te nye gbɔgbɔ ŋu belibelibeli
Job17:2 Vavãe
Job17:3 “O Mawu
Job17:4 Ètu woƒe susu ɖe gɔmesese ŋu eya ta màna woƒe alɔ nade dzi o.
Job17:5 Ne ame aɖe gbe exɔlɔ̃wo ɖe nu si woanae ta la
Job17:6 “Mawu tsɔm wɔ lodonue na ame sia ame
Job17:7 Nuxaxa na be nye ŋkuwo dzi tsyɔ eye nye ameti blibo la mele abe vɔvɔli ene.
Job17:8 Ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe mo wɔ yaa le esia ta; dɔ me ve ame maɖifɔwo ɖe mawumavɔ̃lawo ŋuti.
Job17:9 Ke hã la
Job17:10 “Mi katã mitrɔ va ko
Job17:11 Nye ŋkekewo va yi
Job17:12 Ame siawo trɔ zã wòzu ŋkeke
Job17:13 Ne aƒe si ko mele mɔ kpɔm na la nye yɔdo
Job17:14 ne megblɔ na zãnuxɔxɔ be
Job17:15 ekema afi ka nye mɔkpɔkpɔ la le?
Job17:16 Ɖe wòayi ɖe ku ƒe agbowo mea? Ɖe nye kplii míayi tome ɖekaea?”
Job18:1 Tete Suhitɔ
Job18:2 Ɣe ka ɣi miadzudzɔ nya siawo gbɔgblɔ? Midze nunya ekema míate ŋu aƒo nu.
Job18:3 Nu ka ŋuti wobu mí movitɔwoe eye wobu mí bometsilawoe le wò ŋkume?
Job18:4 Wò ame si vuvu ɖokuiwò kɔ ɖi le wò dziku me
Job18:5 “Wotsia ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe akaɖi eye eƒe dzo megabina o.
Job18:6 Kekeli si le eƒe agbadɔ me la doa viviti eye akaɖi si le eƒe axadzi la hã tsina.
Job18:7 Megatea ŋu ɖea abla o eye eya ŋutɔ ƒe nuɖoɖowo ƒunɛ anyi.
Job18:8 Eƒe afɔ ɖoa ɖɔ me eye wòƒoa dablibɛ le ɖɔkawo me.
Job18:9 Mɔ léa afɔkpodzi nɛ eye mɔ̃ka blanɛ sesĩe.
Job18:10 Wolɔa ke kɔna ɖe mɔka dzi nɛ le anyigba eye wotrea mɔ ɖe eƒe mɔ me.
Job18:11 Ŋɔdzidodowo doa vodzi nɛ le akpa sia akpa eye wokplɔa eƒe afɔɖeɖe ɖe sia ɖe ɖo.
Job18:12 Dzɔgbevɔ̃e tsi dzi vevie be yeadzɔ ɖe edzi eye gbegblẽ le klalo be yeava edzi ne edze anyi.
Job18:13 Eɖu eƒe ŋutilã ƒe akpa aɖewo eye ku ƒe ŋgɔgbevi vuvu eƒe ŋutinuwo
Job18:14 Woɖee ɖa le eƒe agbadɔ si nye eƒe sitsoƒe la me eye wokplɔe yina na ŋɔdziwo ƒe fia.
Job18:15 Dzo bibi xɔ aƒe ɖe eƒe agbadɔ me eye aŋɔka bibi kaka ɖe eƒe nɔƒe.
Job18:16 Eƒe kewo yrɔna le ete ke eye eƒe aŋgbawo yrɔna le eƒe tame.
Job18:17 Woŋlɔnɛ be le anyigba dzi eye eƒe ŋkɔ buna le amewo dome.
Job18:18 Wonyanɛ tso kekeli nu yina ɖe viviti me eye woɖenɛ ɖa le xexea me.
Job18:19 Vi alo dzidzimevi menɔa esi le eƒe amewo dome o eye ame aɖeke metsia agbe le teƒe si wònɔ va yi o.
Job18:20 Ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo ƒe nu ku le nu si dzɔ ɖe edzi ta eye vɔvɔ̃ ɖo ɣedzeƒetɔwo.
Job18:21 Vavãe
Job19:1 Hiob ɖo eŋu be
Job19:2 “Va se ɖe ɣe ka ɣie miawɔ funyafunyam eye miatsɔ miaƒe nyawo agbãm?
Job19:3 Zi ewo sɔŋue nye esi miedo vlom eye mieti kpo dze dzinye ŋumakpemakpetɔe.
Job19:4 Nenye nyateƒee be metra mɔ la
Job19:5 Nenye vavãe miebe yewoakɔ mia ɖokuiwo ɖe dzi agbɔ tanye
Job19:6 ekema minyae be Mawu dze agɔ le dzinye eye wòtsɔ eƒe ɖɔ ƒo xlãm.
Job19:7 “Togbɔ be mefa avi sesĩe be
Job19:8 Exe nye mɔ be nyemate ŋu ato edzi ayi o
Job19:9 Eklo bubu le ŋunye eye wòɖe fiakuku le tanye.
Job19:10 Evuvum kɔ ɖi le akpa sia akpa va se ɖe esime medzo
Job19:11 Eƒe dziku bi ɖe ŋunye eye wòbum ɖe eƒe ketɔwo dome.
Job19:12 Eƒe aʋakɔwo lũ ɖe eme kple ŋusẽ
Job19:13 “Eɖe nɔvinye ŋutsuwo ɖa le ŋunye eye wòklã nye kple xɔ̃nyewo dome keŋkeŋkeŋ.
Job19:14 Nye ƒometɔwo dzo le gbɔnye eye nye ame nyanyɛwo ŋlɔm be.
Job19:15 Ame siwo va dze gbɔnye kple nye nyɔnudɔlawo bum amedzroe eye mezu du bubu me tɔ le wo ŋkume.
Job19:16 Meyɔ nye dɔla gake metɔ o togbɔ be metsɔ nye nu ɖe kuku nɛ hafi.
Job19:17 Nye nu me le ʋeʋẽm ɖe nye ŋutɔ srɔ̃nye eye mele ŋu nyɔm na nye ŋutɔ nɔvinye ŋutsuwo.
Job19:18 Ŋutsuvi suewo gɔ̃ hã koam eye ne meva do la
Job19:19 Mele ŋu nyɔm na xɔ̃nye veviwo katã eye ame siwo melɔ̃ la
Job19:20 Mezu ŋutilã kple ƒu ɖeɖe
Job19:21 “Mikpɔ nye nublanui
Job19:22 Nu ka ta mieti yonyeme abe ale si Mawu ti yonyemee ene? Nye ŋutilã si mieɖu la mesɔ gbɔ na mi oa?
Job19:23 “O nenye ɖe woaŋlɔ nye nyawo ɖi
Job19:24 nenye ɖe woatsɔ gayibɔnuŋlɔnu aɖee ɖe akɔblikpe dzi alo woaɖee ɖe agakpe dzi tegbee hã la
Job19:25 Menya be nye Xɔnametɔ le agbe
Job19:26 Eye ne nye ŋutigbalẽ vuvu keŋkeŋkeŋ hã la
Job19:27 Nye ŋutɔ makpɔe
Job19:28 “Ne miegblɔ be
Job19:29 ekema yi nedo vɔvɔ̃ na miawo ŋutɔ elabena dziku atsɔ yi ahe toe eye mianya be ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ li.”
Job20:1 Tete Naamatitɔ
Job20:2 “Nu siwo le fu ɖem na nye susue dɔm be maɖo eŋu na wò elabena metsi dzi le ɖokuinye me ŋutɔ.
Job20:3 Mese mokaname aɖe si ɖe bubu le ŋunye
Job20:4 “Meka ɖe edzi be ènya ale si wònɔ tso blema
Job20:5 ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe nukoko nu mesena yina o
Job20:6 Togbɔ be eƒe dada yi ɖatɔ dziƒo
Job20:7 atsrɔ̃ gbidii abe eya ŋutɔ ƒe afɔdzi ene eye ame siwo kpɔe la agblɔ be
Job20:8 Edzona dzona abe drɔ̃e ene
Job20:9 Ŋku si kpɔe la magakpɔe akpɔ o
Job20:10 Ele be viawo nawɔ ɖɔɖɔɖo anyo dɔ me na ame dahewo
Job20:11 Ɖekakpuimeŋusẽ dzodzoe si yɔ eƒe ƒuwo me la aku kplii ayi ke me.
Job20:12 “Togbɔ be nu vɔ̃ɖi vivi le eƒe nu me
Job20:13 togbɔ be mate ŋu aɖe asi le eŋu o eye wòbe ɖe nu me nɛ hã la
Job20:14 eƒe nuɖuɖu ave le eƒe dɔ me
Job20:15 Atu kesinɔnu siwo wòmi la aƒu gbe. Mawu ana eƒe dɔgbowo nadzɔ wo katã aƒo ɖi.
Job20:16 Eno da ƒe aɖi eye ƒli ƒe aɖi awui.
Job20:17 Makpɔ gome le tɔʋu kple tɔsisi siwo me anyitsi kple notsi babla le sisim le la me o.
Job20:18 Maɖu nu siwo ŋu wòdze agbagba le o
Job20:19 elabena ete ame dahewo ɖe to wozu hiãtɔwo eye wòxɔ aƒe siwo metu o.
Job20:20 “Vavã makpɔ gbɔdzɔe le eƒe nudzodzrowo me o eye maɖe eɖokui to eƒe nunɔamesiwo dzi o.
Job20:21 Naneke masusɔ nɛ esi wòavuvu o eƒe kesinɔnuwo matɔ ɖi o.
Job20:22 Le eƒe nukpɔkpɔ gbogboawo dome la
Job20:23 Ne eƒe ƒodo yɔ nyuie la Mawu atrɔ eƒe dziku bibi akɔ ɖe edzi eye wòana eƒe dɔmedzoe nadza ɖe edzi.
Job20:24 Togbɔ be esi le gayibɔlãnu nu hã la
Job20:25 Eɖee do goe tso eƒe lãme eye wòho eƒe tsutsyɔeƒe le eƒe aklã me. Ŋɔdzi alée
Job20:26 eye viviti tsiɖitsiɖi le eƒe kesinɔnuwo lalam. Dzo si womeƒlɔ ɖo o la afiae eye wòabi nu si susɔ ɖe eƒe agbadɔ me la keŋkeŋkeŋ.
Job20:27 Dziƒo aɖe eƒe vodada ɖe go eye anyigba atso ɖe eŋu.
Job20:28 Tsiɖɔɖɔ akplɔ eƒe aƒe adzoe eye le Mawu ƒe dɔmedzoeŋkeke la dzi la
Job20:29 Esia nye gomekpɔkpɔ si Mawu ɖo ɖi na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo
Job21:1 Hiob ɖo nya ŋu nɛ be
Job21:2 “Ɖo to nyuie nàse nye nyawo
Job21:3 Migbɔ dzi ɖi nam
Job21:4 “Amegbetɔe mele konyi fam na? Nu ka ta nyemagbe dzigbɔɖeanyi o?
Job21:5 Mikpɔm ɖa
Job21:6 Ne mebu nu sia ŋuti la ŋɔ dziam eye nye ameti blibo la medzona nyanyanya.
Job21:7 Nu ka ta ame vɔ̃ɖiwo nɔa agbe
Job21:8 Wonɔa agbe
Job21:9 Woƒe aƒewo me le dedie
Job21:10 Woƒe nyitsuwo megbea asiyɔyɔ o
Job21:11 Woɖea wo viwo doa goe abe lãha ene eye wo vi suewo nɔa fefem henɔa ɣe ɖum.
Job21:12 Wodzia ha ɖe asiʋuiwo kple kasaŋkuwo ŋu eye wotua aglo ɖe kpẽ ƒe ɖiɖi ŋu.
Job21:13 Woɖua woƒe ƒewo le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ me eye woyia yɔ me le ŋutifafa me
Job21:14 gake wogblɔna na Mawu be
Job21:15 Ame kae nye Ŋusẽkatãtɔ be míasubɔe? Viɖe ka míakpɔ ne míedo gbe ɖa nɛ?’
Job21:16 Evɔa woƒe dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ mele woawo ŋutɔ ƒe asi me o
Job21:17 “Ke hã la
Job21:18 Zi nenie wole abe gbe ƒuƒu si ya lɔ ɖe nu alo atsa si ahom lɔ ɖe nu ene?
Job21:19 Wogblɔ be
Job21:20 Eya ŋutɔ ƒe ŋkuwo nekpɔ eƒe gbegblẽ
Job21:21 elabena ɖe wòtsɔ ɖe le eme na ƒometɔ siwo wògblẽ ɖe megbe esi ɣleti siwo woɖo ɖi nɛ la wu nua?
Job21:22 “Ɖe ame aɖe ate ŋu afia gɔmesese Mawu
Job21:23 Ame aɖe ku esi eƒe agbe ɖo vivime
Job21:24 eƒe ŋutilã kpɔ nunyiame nyuitɔ eye ƒutomemi yɔ eƒe ƒuwo me fũu.
Job21:25 Ame bubu ku le eƒe luʋɔ ƒe nuxaxa me eye mese vivi na nu vivi aɖeke kpɔ o.
Job21:26 Ke wo ame evea mlɔ kasanu le ke me
Job21:27 “Menya nu siwo susum miele la nyuie kple nu vɔ̃ɖi siwo ɖom miele be miadze agɔ le dzinye.
Job21:28 Miegblɔ be
Job21:29 Miebia gbe mɔzɔlawo kpɔ oa? Mietsɔ ɖeke le woƒe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ si wogblɔ fia mi la me be
Job21:30 woɖea ame vɔ̃ɖi le dzɔgbevɔ̃egbe
Job21:31 Ame kae ɖe eƒe agbe vlo si nɔm wòle la ɖe mo nɛ kpɔ? Ame kae ɖoa nu tovo si wòwɔ la teƒe nɛ?
Job21:32 Wokɔnɛ yia yɔdo gbɔe eye wodzɔa eƒe yɔdokpe ŋu.
Job21:33 Ke siwo le balime la vivi enu
Job21:34 “Eya ta aleke miate ŋu awɔ atsɔ miaƒe bometsinyawo afa akɔ nam mahã? Naneke mele miaƒe nyaŋuɖoɖowo me wu alakpa o!”
Job22:1 Temanitɔ
Job22:2 “Ɖe ame anye viɖenu na Mawua? Ɖe nunyala gɔ̃ hã anye viɖenu nɛa?
Job22:3 Dzidzɔ ka wòanye na Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ne ènye ame dzɔdzɔe? Eye viɖe ka wòakpɔ ne fɔɖiɖi mele wò mɔwo ŋu o?
Job22:4 “Wò Mawuvɔvɔ̃ tae wòka mo na wò hetsɔ nya ɖe ŋuwòa?
Job22:5 Ɖe wò nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ mekpe ŋutɔ oa? Ɖe nuwuwu li na wò nu vɔ̃woa?
Job22:6 Èbia megbedanu tso nɔviwò ŋutsuwo si susumanɔmetɔe eye nèɖe avɔ le amewo ŋu wotsi amama.
Job22:7 Mèna tsi ame siwo nu ti kɔ na la wono o eye nète nuɖuɖu dɔwuitɔwo
Job22:8 evɔ nèhenye ŋusẽtɔ
Job22:9 Èɖo ahosiwo ɖa asi ƒuƒlu eye nèɖe tsyɔ̃eviwo ƒe ŋusẽ ɖa.
Job22:10 Eya ta mɔkawo ɖe to ɖe wò ɖo eya ta dzɔgbevɔ̃e ƒo ɖe dziwò kpoyi hedo ŋɔdzi na wò
Job22:11 eya ta viviti do ale gbegbe be màgate ŋu akpɔ nu o eye eya tae tɔɖɔɖɔ va tsyɔ dziwò ɖo.
Job22:12 “Ɖe Mawu mele dziƒo kɔkɔtɔ oa? Ɖe mekpɔ ale si ɣletivi kɔkɔtɔwo kɔkɔe oa?
Job22:13 Gake ègblɔ be
Job22:14 Lilikpo dodowo xe eŋkume eya ta mekpɔa mí ne ele tsatsam le dziƒo ƒe agbo sesẽwo me o.’
Job22:15 Ɖe nàgalé mɔ xoxo si dzi ame vɔ̃ɖiwo zɔ va yi la me ɖe asia?
Job22:16 Wokplɔ wo dzoe hafi woƒe ɣeyiɣi de eye tsiɖɔɖɔ kplɔ woƒe gɔmeɖokpewo dzoe.
Job22:17 Wogblɔ na Mawu be
Job22:18 Evɔ wònye eyae tsɔ nu nyuiwo yɔ xɔ na wo fũu
Job22:19 Ame dzɔdzɔewo kpɔ woƒe gbegblẽ eye dzi dzɔ wo
Job22:20 ‘Wotsrɔ̃ míaƒe futɔwo vavã eye dzo va fia woƒe kesinɔnuwo.’
Job22:21 “Tsɔ ɖokuiwò na Mawu eye nànɔ ŋutifafa me kplii
Job22:22 Xɔ nufiame tso eƒe nu me
Job22:23 Ne ètrɔ va Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la gbɔ la
Job22:24 eye nètsɔ wò dzonu veviwo kɔ ɖe ke me
Job22:25 ekema Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la anye wò sika kple klosalo nyuitɔ.
Job22:26 Ekema le nyateƒe me la
Job22:27 Àdo gbe ɖa nɛ
Job22:28 Nu si nèɖo la
Job22:29 Ne woɖiɖi amewo ɖe anyi
Job22:30 Aɖe ame si ŋu fɔɖiɖi le gɔ̃ hã
Job23:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu be
Job23:2 “Egbe gɔ̃ hã nye konyifafa do gã ɖe edzi
Job23:3 Nenye ɖe manya afi si makpɔe le
Job23:4 Matsɔ nye nya aɖo eŋkume eye nye nu me ayɔ fũu kple nya siwo matsɔ aɖe ɖokuinye nu
Job23:5 Ne makpɔ ale si wòaɖo eŋu nam eye mabu nya si wòagblɔ la ŋuti.
Job23:6 Ɖe wòatsi tsitre ɖe ŋunye kple ŋusẽ gã aɖea? Ao
Job23:7 Afi ma ame dzɔdzɔe ate ŋu atsɔ eƒe nyawo aɖo eŋkume le eye woaɖem tegbee tso nye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la ƒe asi me.
Job23:8 “Gake ne meyi ɣedzeƒe la
Job23:9 Ne ele dɔ wɔm le anyiehe la
Job23:10 Gake enya mɔ si dzi mele
Job23:11 Nye afɔwo le eƒe afɔtoƒewo yome kplikplikpli
Job23:12 Nyemete ɖe aga tso eƒe nuyiwo ƒe sededewo gbɔ o
Job23:13 “Ke eya ɖekae li
Job23:14 Ena se siwo wòde ɖi la va eme ɖe ŋutinye eye ɖoɖo siawo tɔgbi gale esi ɖe ŋunye.
Job23:15 Esia ta ŋɔ dzim le eŋkume eye ne mebu esiawo katã ŋuti la
Job23:16 Mawu na dzi ɖe le ƒonye
Job23:17 Ke hã la
Job24:1 “Nu ka ŋuti Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la meɖo ɣeyiɣiwo ɖi hena ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ o? Nu ka ta ame siwo nyae la nanɔ mɔ kpɔm na ŋkeke siawo dzodzro?
Job24:2 Amewo ɖea liƒokpewo ɖa
Job24:3 Wokplɔa tsyɔ̃eviwo ƒe tedziwo dzonae eye woxɔa ahosi ƒe nyi abe awɔbanu ene.
Job24:4 Wotutua asi hiãtɔwo ɖa le mɔƒome eye wozia ame dahe siwo katã le anyigba dzi la dzi be woasi abe.
Job24:5 Ame dahewo ɖoa gbe nɔa nuɖuɖu dim abe gbetedziwo le gbegbe ene eye kuɖiɖinyigbawo dia nuɖuɖu na wo viwo.
Job24:6 Woŋe gbe le agblewo dzi na lãwo eye wofɔa nuku siwo ge la le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe waingblewo me.
Job24:7 Esi avɔ mele wo si o ta la womlɔ anyi ƒuƒlu le zã me eye naneke meli woatsyɔ le vuvɔ me o.
Job24:8 Tsi ƒoa wo tea wo ŋu nyuie le towo dzi
Job24:9 Woɖea tsyɔ̃evi le no nu eye woxɔa ame dahe ƒe vi ɖe fe si wònyi la nu.
Job24:10 Esi wònye avɔ mele wo si o ta la
Job24:11 Wole amiti ƒe ku tum le te dzi
Job24:12 Ame siwo le kudɔ ƒom ƒe ŋeŋe de dzi le dua me kɔtɔɔ eye ame siwo xɔ abi la ƒe luʋɔwo le ɣli dom be woaxɔ na yewo
Job24:13 “Ame aɖewo li siwo tsi tsitre ɖe kekeli la ŋu
Job24:14 Ne viviti do la
Job24:15 Ahasitɔ ƒe ŋku nɔa viviti lalam
Job24:16 Le viviti me la
Job24:17 Ke wo katã la
Job24:18 “Evɔ la
Job24:19 Abe ale si dzoxɔxɔ kple kuɖiɖi kplɔa tsikpe si lolõ la dzonae ene la
Job24:20 Vidzidɔ ŋlɔa wo be
Job24:21 Wohaa konɔwo kple vimanɔsitɔwo eye womekpɔa nublanui na ahosiwo o.
Job24:22 Gake Mawu kplɔa kalẽtɔwo dzonae kple eƒe ŋusẽ. Togbɔ be woli ke hã la
Job24:23 Ɖewohĩ ana woaɖe dzi ɖi abu be yewole dedie gake eƒe ŋkuwo le woƒe mɔwo ŋu.
Job24:24 Wodoa wo ɖe dzi ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe
Job24:25 “Ne mele alea o la
Job25:1 Bildad
Job25:2 “Dziɖuɖu kple ŋɔdzi nye Mawu tɔ
Job25:3 Ɖe woate ŋu axlẽ eƒe aʋakɔwoa? Ame ka tame eƒe kekeli meklẽ ɖo o?
Job25:4 Ekema aleke amegbetɔ anye dzɔdzɔetɔ le Mawu ŋkume? Aleke amegbetɔ
Job25:5 Ne ɣleti ƒe keklẽ menye naneke nɛ o eye ɣletiviwo hã medza le eŋkume o la
Job25:6 aleke amegbetɔ si nye ŋɔvi kple ame vi si nye ŋɔ la ayi nane nye ge le eŋkume!”
Job26:1 Hiob ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Job26:2 “Miekpe ɖe ame beli la ŋu ŋutɔ! Miekpe ɖe ame gblɔe la ƒe abɔ ŋu ŋutɔ!
Job26:3 Aɖaŋu kae nye esi nèna ame si si nunya mele o! Eye sidzedze kae nye gã si nèɖe fia!
Job26:4 Ame kae kpe ɖe ŋuwò be nègblɔ nya siawo? Eye ame ka ƒe gbɔgbɔe ƒo nu to dziwò?
Job26:5 “Ame kukuwo le vevesese gã aɖe me
Job26:6 Ku le ƒuƒlu le Mawu ŋkume
Job26:7 Ekeke dzigbeme ƒe lilikpowo ɖe teƒe siwo naneke mele o eye wòna anyigba le yame
Job26:8 Eŋlɔ tsiwo ɖe lilikpowo me
Job26:9 Etsɔ nu tsyɔ ɣleti si sɔ tegblẽe la ƒe ŋkume eye wòkeke eƒe lilikpowo ɖe edzi.
Job26:10 Eɖe liƒo na dzite ɖe tsiwo dzi eye wòde mama kekeli kple viviti dome.
Job26:11 Ne ele mo kam na nuwɔwɔwo la
Job26:12 Ena atsiaƒu dze agbo to eƒe ŋusẽ dzi eye wòfli Rahab kakɛkakɛ to eƒe nya dzi.
Job26:13 Ena dziŋgɔli me kɔ to eƒe ŋɔtimegbɔgbɔ dzi eye eƒe asi ŋɔ da vɔ̃ɖi si ɖiɖi va yina.
Job26:14 Esiawoe nye eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ƒe sue aɖe ko eye aleke dalĩ si wodo le eŋuti miese la le bɔlɔe ale! Eya ta ame kae ate ŋu ase eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe gbeɖeɖe gɔme?”
Job27:1 Tete Hiob yi eƒe nuƒoa dzi be
Job27:2 “Meta Mawu si gbe afiatsotso nam la ƒe agbe kple Ŋusẽkatãtɔ
Job27:3 zi ale si agbe le menye
Job27:4 nye nuyi magblɔ nya vɔ̃ɖi o eye nye aɖe magblɔ beblenya aɖeke o.
Job27:5 Nyemalɔ̃ gbeɖe be tɔwò dzɔ o va se ɖe esi maku la
Job27:6 Malé nye dzɔdzɔenyenye me ɖe asi ɖaa eye nyemaɖe asi le eŋu akpɔ o. Zi ale si mele agbe la
Job27:7 “Nye futɔwo nenɔ abe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ene eye nye ketɔwo abe ame madzɔmadzɔwo ene!
Job27:8 Elabena mɔkpɔkpɔ kae le ame vlo si ne wolãe ɖa eye Mawu ɖe eƒe agbe ɖa?
Job27:9 Ɖe Mawu ase eƒe ɣlidodo
Job27:10 Ɖe eƒe nu anyo Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ŋua? Ɖe wòayɔ Mawu ɣe sia ɣia?
Job27:11 “Mafia nu mi tso Mawu ƒe ŋusẽ ŋuti eye nyemaɣla Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe mɔwo ɖe mi o.
Job27:12 Miawo ŋutɔ miekpɔ esiawo katã. Ekema nu kae nye nuƒo manyatalenu gbogbo siawo?
Job27:13 “Esia nye gome si Mawu ɖo ɖi na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo kple domenyinyi si ŋutasẽla xɔna tso Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la gbɔ.
Job27:14 Aleke ke viawo sɔ gbɔe hã la
Job27:15 Dɔvɔ̃ awu ame siwo susɔ nɛ eye woƒe ahosiwo mafa na wo o.
Job27:16 Togbɔ be eli kɔ klosalo abe ke ene
Job27:17 ame dzɔdzɔewo ado nu siwo wòli kɔe eye ame maɖifɔwo ama eƒe klosalo.
Job27:18 Xɔ si wòtu la anɔ abe gbagblaʋui ƒe azi si wòƒo teti ko la ene eye wòanɔ abe zãɖialawo ƒe agbadɔ si wòwɔ la ene.
Job27:19 Emlɔ anyi abe hotsuitɔ ene gake esusɔ vie maganɔ nɛ nenema o elabena esi wòʋu eƒe ŋkuwo la
Job27:20 Ŋɔdzi ƒona ɖe edzi abe tɔɖɔɖɔ ene eye ahom kplɔnɛ dzonae le zã me.
Job27:21 Ɣedzeƒeya kɔe dzoe eye wòdzo
Job27:22 Etsɔ eɖokui xlã ɖe edzi nublanuimakpɔmakpɔtɔe
Job27:23 Esi akpe ɖe eta fewuɖutɔe eye wònyae ɖa le enɔƒe.”
Job28:1 “Klosalokuƒe li eye teƒe li si wololõa sika le.
Job28:2 Wokua gayibɔ le tome eye wokpɔa akɔbli ne wololõ akɔblikpe.
Job28:3 Amegbetɔ ɖo seƒe na viviti
Job28:4 Eɖe do wògoglo yi eme ʋĩi hedidi tso amenɔƒe gbɔ
Job28:5 Anyigba si me wokpɔa nuɖuɖu tsonae lae wotrɔ le tome abe dzo me wòto ene.
Job28:6 Woɖea safirkpe tso eƒe kpe siwo wogbã la me eye woɖea sika tso eƒe kewɔ me.
Job28:7 Xe ƒonuwo menya toƒe ɣaɣla ma o eye aʋako aɖeke ƒe ŋku mekpɔe kpɔ o
Job28:8 Gbemelã siwo dana la meka afɔ afi ma kpɔ o
Job28:9 Ame ƒe asi gbã kpe sesẽawo eye wòna towo te dze go.
Job28:10 Eɖea mɔ ɖe kpeawo tome eye eƒe ŋkuwo kpɔa eƒe nu xɔasi vovovowo katã.
Job28:11 Etsana le tsidzɔƒewo eye wòhea nu ɣaɣlawo vaa kekeli nu.
Job28:12 “Ke afi ka woakpɔ nunya le? Afi ka gɔmesese nɔna?
Job28:13 Amegbetɔ mese eƒe nuvãnyenye gɔme o
Job28:14 Gogloƒe gblɔ be
Job28:15 Womate ŋu aƒlee kple sika nyuitɔ alo woada klosalo ɖe eƒe home nu o.
Job28:16 Màte ŋu aƒlee kple sika adodoe si tso Ofir alo kple kpe xɔasiwo
Job28:17 Sika alo kristalkpe masɔ kplii o eye womatsɔ sikanuwo gɔ̃ hã aɖɔlii o.
Job28:18 Womayɔ sui kple adzagba ƒe ŋkɔwo gɔ̃ hã ɖe eŋu o elabena nunya ƒe asixɔxɔ kɔ wu gbloti tɔ sãsãsã.
Job28:19 Womatsɔ Kuskpe xɔasi
Job28:20 “Ekema afi ka nunya tso? Afi ka nye gɔmesese ƒe nɔƒe?
Job28:21 Eɣla ɖe nu gbagbe ɖe sia ɖe ƒe ŋkukpɔƒe eye woɣlae ɖe dziƒoxeviwo gɔ̃ hã.
Job28:22 Tsiẽƒe kple ku gblɔ be
Job28:23 Mawue nya egbɔmɔ eye eya koe nya afi si wòle.
Job28:24 Elabena eyae tea ŋu kpɔa anyigba ƒe mlɔenu ke
Job28:25 Esi wòɖo ya ƒe ŋusẽ anyi
Job28:26 esi wòwɔ se na tsidzadza
Job28:27 enye kɔ kpɔ nunya
Job28:28 Tete wògblɔ na amegbetɔ be
Job29:1 Hiob yi eƒe nuƒoƒo dzi be
Job29:2 “O
Job29:3 esi eƒe akaɖi klẽ ɖe nye ta dzi eye eƒe kekeli na mezɔ to blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi me!
Job29:4 O
Job29:5 esi Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ganɔ kplim ko eye vinyewo ƒo xlãm
Job29:6 esi nye toƒe nye notsi kpeke ɖeɖe eye amitimi ɖuɖu bababa tso agakpe me nam.
Job29:7 “Ne meyi dua ƒe agbo nu
Job29:8 ɖekakpuiawo kpɔam
Job29:9 dumegãwo tɔna ne wole nu ƒom hetsɔa asi ɖoa nu.
Job29:10 Gbɔgblɔ buna ɖe ame ŋkutawo eye woƒe aɖe léna ɖe woƒe nu me.
Job29:11 Ame sia ame si ɖo tom la kafuam eye ame siwo kpɔm la ƒoa nu nyui tso ŋutinye
Job29:12 elabena mexɔna na hiãtɔ siwo le ɣli dom be woakpe ɖe yewo ŋu kple tsyɔ̃evi si si kpeɖeŋutɔ mele o.
Job29:13 Ame si le kukum la ƒe yayra vaa dzinye eye menana ahosi ƒe dzi kpɔa dzidzɔ.
Job29:14 Metsɔ dzɔdzɔenyenye do abe awu ene eye nuteƒewɔwɔ nye nye awu ʋlaya kple tablanu.
Job29:15 Menye ŋku na ŋkuagbãtɔ kple afɔ na tekunɔ.
Job29:16 Menye tɔ na hiãtɔwo eye mexɔa nya ɖe amedzrowo nu.
Job29:17 Meŋea tsyo na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo eye meɖea nu si woda adzoe la le woƒe aɖutame.
Job29:18 “Mebu be
Job29:19 Nye kewo aƒo ɖe to
Job29:20 Nye ŋutikɔkɔe anɔ yeye zum ɣe sia ɣi le ŋunye eye dati anɔ yeye ɖaa le asinyeme.’
Job29:21 “Amewo ɖoa tom henɔa nye asinu kpɔm
Job29:22 Ne meƒo nu la
Job29:23 Wonɔa lalayem abe ale si wolalana na tsidzadza ene eye woxɔa nye nyawo dea wo ɖokui me abe ale si wonoa kelemetsi ene.
Job29:24 Womexɔnɛ sena ne meko nu na wo o
Job29:25 Metiaa mɔ si woato la na wo
Job30:1 “Ke azɔ la
Job30:2 Nu ka woƒe alɔkpa sesẽ la wɔ nam
Job30:3 Hiã kple dɔwuame na wowɔ ɖeƒomevie hele tsatsam le dzogbe kple kuɖiɖinyigbawo dzi le zã me.
Job30:4 Le gbe me woda amagbewo eye woƒe nuɖuɖue nye dɔli ƒe ke.
Job30:5 Woɖe wo ɖa le wo nɔvi amegbetɔwo ƒe ha me eye wodo ɣli ɖe wo ta abe fiafitɔwo wonye ene.
Job30:6 Wozi wo dzi be woanɔ tɔʋu siwo mie la me
Job30:7 Wole xɔxlɔ̃m le gbe me eye woƒo ta kpli ɖe avekawo te.
Job30:8 Wonya wo le anyigba la dzi abe ame ɖigbɔ̃wo kple yakamewo ƒe dzidzimeviwo ene.
Job30:9 “Ke azɔ la
Job30:10 Wonyɔa ŋum
Job30:11 Esi azɔ Mawu lã nye datika
Job30:12 Wo detɔwo tso ɖe ŋutinye le nye ɖusime
Job30:13 Wogbã nye mɔ
Job30:14 Wolũ ɖe dzinye abe gli gbagbã mee woto ene eye wozɔ to gbagbãƒewo va ƒo ɖe dzinye.
Job30:15 Ŋɔdzidodowo nye tsyɔ dzinye
Job30:16 “Azɔ nye agbe nu va le yiyim eye hiãŋkekewo lém.
Job30:17 Zã ŋɔa nye ƒuwo eye nye vevesese manyagblɔ nu metsona o.
Job30:18 Mawu tsyɔ eƒe ŋusẽ triakɔ la dzinye abe avɔ ene
Job30:19 Ekɔm ƒu gbe ɖe ba me eye mezu ke kple dzofi.
Job30:20 “O Mawu
Job30:21 Ètrɔ dze dzinye nublanuimakpɔmakpɔtɔe eye nètsɔ wò alɔkpa sesẽ ɖu dzinyee.
Job30:22 Èƒom tsa
Job30:23 Menya be àhem ayi ku me
Job30:24 “Vavãe
Job30:25 Ɖe nyemefa avi ɖe ame siwo ɖo xaxa me la ŋu oa? Ɖe nye luʋɔ mexa nu ɖe ame dahewo ŋuti oa?
Job30:26 Gake esi mekpɔ mɔ na nyui la
Job30:27 Dzoxɔxɔ si le edzi yim le menye la metɔna o
Job30:28 Nye amea menyɔ tsiɖitsiɖitsiɖi le yiyim gake menye ɣee ɖum o
Job30:29 Meva zu nɔviŋutsu na amegãxiwo kple hati na golowo.
Job30:30 Nye ŋutigbalẽ nyɔ tsiɖitsiɖitsiɖi hele fofom le ŋutinye eye asrã dze dzinye kple dzoxɔxɔ gã aɖe.
Job30:31 Nye kasaŋku do konyifagbe eye nye dze le avigbe dom.
Job31:1 “Mebla nu kple nye ŋku be megakpɔ ɖetugbi aɖeke ahiãdzetɔe o.
Job31:2 Elabena nu kae nye amegbetɔ tɔ gome tso Mawu si le dziƒo la gbɔ kple eƒe domenyinu tso Ŋusẽkatãtɔ si le dziƒo ʋĩi la gbɔ?
Job31:3 Ɖe menye gbegblẽ wònye na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo kple dzɔgbevɔ̃e na nu tovo wɔlawo oa?
Job31:4 Ɖe mekpɔ nye mɔwo eye wòxlẽ nye afɔɖeɖe ɖe sia ɖe oa?
Job31:5 “Nenye be mezɔ le aʋatsokaka me alo nye afɔ ɖe abla ɖe amebeble ŋuti la
Job31:6 ekema Mawu nedam le nudanu nyuitɔ dzi eye wòanya be nyemeɖi fɔ o.
Job31:7 Nenye be nye afɔ tra le mɔ la dzi
Job31:8 ekema ame bubuwo neɖu nu siwo meƒã eye woneho nye nukuwo le bo dzi.
Job31:9 “Ne nyɔnu aɖe flu nye dzi alo mede xa ɖe nye aƒelika ƒe ʋɔtru nu la
Job31:10 ekema srɔ̃nye netu bli na ŋutsu bubu eye ŋutsu bubuwo nedɔ kplii.
Job31:11 Elabena esia anye ŋukpenanu kple nu vɔ̃ si dze na ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃.
Job31:12 Enye dzo si bina hena gbegblẽ
Job31:13 “Ne nyemetso afia nyui na nye dɔlaŋutsuwo kple dɔlanyɔnuwo ne wotsɔ nya ɖe ŋunye o la
Job31:14 nu ka mawɔ ne Mawu bia gbem? Ŋuɖoɖo ka mana ne eyɔm be mana akɔnta?
Job31:15 Ɖe menye ame si wɔm ɖe vidzidɔ me lae wɔ woawo hã oa? Ɖe menye eya koe wɔ mí ame evea katã ɖe mía dadawo ƒe dɔ me oa?
Job31:16 “Nenye be mete hiãtɔwo woƒe didiwo alo mena nu te ahosiwo ƒe ŋkuwo ŋu
Job31:17 nenye be nye ɖeɖe meɖu nye abolo heku ŋɔ tsyɔ̃evi la
Job31:18 evɔ la tso nye ɖekakpuime ke
Job31:19 Ne mekpɔ ame aɖe wòle tsɔtsrɔ̃m le avɔmanɔamesi ta alo hiãtɔ si mekpɔ awu ne wòado o
Job31:20 eye eƒe dzi meyram be metsɔ avɔ si wowɔ kple nye alẽwo ƒe fu nɛ be wòade dzo lãme nɛ o
Job31:21 ne mekɔ nye asi dzi ɖe tsyɔ̃evi ŋu
Job31:22 ekema na be nye abɔ nage le abɔgba ŋu eye wòaŋe le ekpeƒe.
Job31:23 Elabena gbegblẽ si tso Mawu gbɔ la le ŋɔ dzim nam
Job31:24 “Nenye ɖe meɖo dzi ɖe sika ŋu alo megblɔ na sika nyuitɔ be
Job31:25 nenye ɖe mekpɔ dzidzɔ le nye kesinɔnu gbogboawo ta
Job31:26 nenye ɖe mede bubu ɣe ŋuti le ale si wòle keklẽm alo ɣleti le ale si wòle yiyim kple atsyɔ̃
Job31:27 ale be woflu nye dzi le adzame eye metsɔ nye asi wɔ dzesi na wo be melɔ̃ wo
Job31:28 ekema esiawo hã anye nu vɔ̃ siwo wòle be woahe ayi ʋɔnu
Job31:29 “Nenye ɖe mekpɔ dzidzɔ le nye futɔ ƒe dzɔgbevɔ̃e me dzedze ŋu alo dzɔ dzi le hiã siwo tui ta la
Job31:30 Gake nyemeɖe mɔ na nye nu be wòawɔ nu vɔ̃ to ɖiŋudodo na eƒe agbe me o.
Job31:31 Nenye ɖe ame siwo le aƒenye me la se megblɔ kpɔ be
Job31:32 elabena mele na amedzro aɖeke be wòatsi mɔto adɔ o elabena nye ʋɔtru le ʋuʋu ɖi ɣe sia ɣi na mɔzɔlawo.
Job31:33 Nenye ɖe meɣla nye nu vɔ̃ abe ale si amewo wɔna ene
Job31:34 elabena mevɔ̃ na ameha la ŋutɔ eye mevɔ̃ na dukɔ la ƒe vlododo ale gbegbe be
Job31:35 “O
Job31:36 Vavã malée ɖe nye abɔta eye maɖɔe ɖe ta abe fiakuku ene.
Job31:37 Mana nutsotsoe tso nye afɔɖeɖe ɖe sia ɖe ŋuti eye mate ɖe eŋu abe fiavi ene.
Job31:38 “Nenye ɖe nye anyigba fa avi ɖe ŋutinye eye eƒe boliƒowo yɔ kple aɖatsi
Job31:39 nenye be meɖu eƒe kutsetsewo femaxee alo mena dɔwɔla siwo le agblea dzi la ƒe gbɔgbɔ gbã gudugudugudu la
Job31:40 ekema aŋɔkawo nemie nam ɖe lu teƒe eye gbe wuwluiwo nemie ɖe ƒo teƒe.” Esiae nye Hiob ƒe nyawo ƒe nuwuwu.
Job32:1 Ale ŋutsu etɔ̃ siawo dzudzɔ nyaŋuɖoɖo na Hiob
Job32:2 Tete dzi ku Buzitɔ
Job32:3 Edo dziku ɖe exɔlɔ̃ etɔ̃awo hã ŋu elabena mɔ aɖeke meli si dzi woato abu fɔ Hiob o
Job32:4 Azɔ la
Job32:5 Gake esi wòkpɔ be nya aɖeke megale ame etɔ̃awo si o la
Job32:6 Ale Buzitɔ
Job32:7 Mebu be
Job32:8 Gake gbɔgbɔ si le ame me
Job32:9 Menye tsitsiawo koe nye nunyalawo o eye menye amegãxoxowo koe se nu si le dzɔdzɔe la gɔme o.
Job32:10 “Eya ta megblɔ be
Job32:11 Menɔ lalam esi mienɔ nu ƒom
Job32:12 Meɖo to mi nyuie gake mia dometɔ aɖeke mete ŋu ɖee fia be Hiob dze agɔ o eye mia dometɔ aɖeke mete ŋu ɖo eƒe nyahehewo ŋu o.
Job32:13 Migagblɔ be
Job32:14 Gake Hiob metsɔ nya ɖe ŋunye o eye nyematsɔ miaƒe nyahehewo aɖo nya ŋu nɛ o.
Job32:15 “Woƒe mo wɔ yaa
Job32:16 Ɖe magalala
Job32:17 Nye hã magblɔ tɔnye sinua; nye hã magblɔ nu si menya
Job32:18 elabena nya le asinye fũu
Job32:19 Elabena le menye la
Job32:20 Ele nam be maƒo nu ne makpɔ gbɔdzɔe
Job32:21 Nyemade ame aɖeke dzi alo aflu ame aɖeke o
Job32:22 elabena ne mebi le amefuflu me la
Job33:1 “Ke azɔ la
Job33:2 Kpɔ ɖa
Job33:3 Nye nyawo tso dzi vavã me eye nye nu agblɔ nu si menya le anukware me.
Job33:4 Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔe wɔm
Job33:5 eya ta ɖo nya ŋu nam
Job33:6 Ɖeko mele abe wò ene le Mawu ŋkume
Job33:7 Vɔvɔ̃ nam megado dzikatsoƒo na wò alo nye asi nakpe le dziwò o.
Job33:8 “Gake ègblɔ wòge ɖe nye to me eye mese nya siwo tututu nègblɔ la be
Job33:9 ‘Medza eye nu vɔ̃ mele ŋutinye o
Job33:10 Ke hã la
Job33:11 Etsɔ nye afɔ de kunyowu me eye eƒe ŋkuwo le nye mɔwo katã ŋu kplikplikpli.’
Job33:12 “Gake magblɔe na wo be
Job33:13 Nu ka ŋutie nèle nya hem kplii be
Job33:14 Elabena Mawu ƒoa nu to mɔ sia alo ekemɛ dzi togbɔ be amegbetɔ mekpɔe dze sii o hã.
Job33:15 Le drɔ̃e me
Job33:16 ava ƒo nu ɖe to me na wo
Job33:17 be wòana amegbetɔ natrɔ tso vɔ̃wɔwɔ me eye wòaɖee tso dada me
Job33:18 ne wòadzra eƒe luʋɔ ɖo tso yɔdo ƒe asi me eye eƒe agbe magatsrɔ̃ ɖe yi nu o.
Job33:19 “Alo eƒoa ame le dɔbadzi kple ƒutomevevesese si nɔa edzi ɖaa
Job33:20 ale be eya ameti bliboa nyɔa ŋu nuɖuɖu eye eƒe luʋɔ doa vlo nuɖuɖu vivitɔ gɔ̃ hã.
Job33:21 Eƒe ŋutilã vɔ le eme eye eƒe ƒu siwo ŋu lã nɔ tehetehe la dze go azɔ.
Job33:22 Eƒe luʋɔ te ɖe yɔdo ŋu kpokploe
Job33:23 Ke hã la
Job33:24 heve enu
Job33:25 tete eƒe ŋutilã zua yeye abe ɖevi tɔ ene eye wògaɖoa eƒe nɔnɔme me abe eƒe ɖekakpuimeŋkekewo me ene.
Job33:26 Edoa gbe ɖa na Mawu eye wòkpɔa amenuveve tso egbɔ
Job33:27 Tete wòvaa amewo gbɔ
Job33:28 Eɖe nye agbe tso yɔdomeyiyi me
Job33:29 “Mawu wɔa nu siawo katã na ame
Job33:30 be wòaɖe eƒe luʋɔ tso tsiẽƒe
Job33:31 “Ƒu to anyi
Job33:32 Ne nya aɖe le asiwò la
Job33:33 Gake ne mele eme o la
Job34:1 Tete Elihu gblɔ be
Job34:2 “Mise nye nyawo
Job34:3 elabena to doa nyawo kpɔ abe ale si aɖe ɖɔa nuɖuɖu kpɔe ene.
Job34:4 Mina míadze si nu si le dzɔdzɔe la na mía ɖokui eye mina míasrɔ̃ nu si nyo la ɖekae.
Job34:5 “Hiob gblɔ be
Job34:6 Togbɔ be tɔnye dzɔ hã la
Job34:7 Ame kae le abe Hiob
Job34:8 Edea ha kple nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo eye wòbɔa ha kple ame vɔ̃ɖiwo.
Job34:9 Elabena egblɔ be
Job34:10 “Eya ta miɖo tom
Job34:11 Ewɔna na ame ɖe nu si wòwɔ la nu eye wòhea nu si eƒe nuwɔnawo dze na la vaa edzii.
Job34:12 Mele be wòava ame ƒe ta me gɔ̃ hã be Mawu awɔ nu gbegblẽ alo be Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la atso afia ŋkunɔ o.
Job34:13 Ame kae tsɔe ɖo anyigbadzikpɔlae? Ame kae tsɔe ɖo xexea me katã nu?
Job34:14 Ne enye eƒe tameɖoɖo eye wòɖo asi eƒe gbɔgbɔ kple agbegbɔgbɔ dzi la
Job34:15 amegbetɔwo katã atsrɔ̃ eye ame atrɔ azu anyi.
Job34:16 “Ne gɔmesese le asiwò la
Job34:17 Ɖe ame si tsri afia nyui tsotso la ate ŋu akplɔ dua? Ɖe nàbu fɔ dzɔdzɔetɔ kple Ŋusẽtɔ la?
Job34:18 Ɖe menye Eyae nye ame si gblɔ na fiawo be
Job34:19 ame si medea amegãwo dzi o eye mewɔa nyui na kesinɔtɔwo
Job34:20 Wokuna kpata le zãtitina
Job34:21 “Eƒe ŋkuwo le amegbetɔwo ƒe mɔwo ŋu
Job34:22 Teƒe doblukɔ alo teƒe doviviti tsiɖitsiɖitsiɖi aɖeke meli si nu tovo wɔlawo asi abe ɖo o.
Job34:23 Mehiã be Mawu nado amegbetɔwo kpɔ ayi ŋgɔ alo woava eŋkume wòadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wo o.
Job34:24 Mekua nya gɔme hafi kakaa ŋusẽtɔwo
Job34:25 Elabena eƒe ŋku le woƒe nuwɔnawo ŋu eya ta etua asi wo ƒua anyi le zã me
Job34:26 Ehea to na wo ɖe woƒe vɔ̃ɖivɔ̃ɖi ta
Job34:27 elabena wotrɔ le eyome eye womegatsɔ ɖeke le eme na eƒe mɔ aɖeke o.
Job34:28 Wona ame dahewo ƒe konyifafa va eŋkume
Job34:29 Ke ne ezi ɖoɖoe kpoo la
Job34:30 be maɖe mɔ na Mawumavɔ̃la wòaɖu fia o eye be maɖe mɔ nɛ wòaɖo mɔ na ameawo o.
Job34:31 “Tsɔe be ame aɖe gblɔ na Mawu be
Job34:32 Fia nu si nyemate ŋu akpɔ o lam
Job34:33 Ɖe Mawu aɖo eteƒe na wò le wò didi nu
Job34:34 “Nugɔmeselawo gblɔe eye nunyala siwo se nye nyawo la gblɔ nam be
Job34:35 ‘Hiob ƒoa nu nugɔmemasemasetɔe eye susu mele eƒe nyawo me o.’
Job34:36 O
Job34:37 Etsɔ aglãdzedze kpe ɖe eƒe nu vɔ̃ ŋuti
Job35:1 Tete Elihu yi eƒe nuƒoa dzi be
Job35:2 “Èsusu be esia le dzɔdzɔea? Ègblɔ be
Job35:3 gake nèhele ebiam be
Job35:4 “Medi be maɖo eŋu na wò kple xɔ̃wò siwo le gbɔwò.
Job35:5 Wu mo dzi nàkpɔ dziƒo ɖa
Job35:6 Ne èwɔ nu vɔ̃ la
Job35:7 Ne ènye dzɔdzɔetɔ la
Job35:8 Ame abe wò ene ko dzie wò vɔ̃ɖivɔ̃ɖi awɔ dɔ ɖo eye amegbetɔviwo ko dzie wò dzɔdzɔenyenye awɔ dɔ ɖo.
Job35:9 “Amewo le ɣli dom le teteɖeanyi ƒe agba kpekpewo te
Job35:10 gake ɖeke mebia be
Job35:11 ame si fiaa nu geɖewo mí
Job35:12 Ne amewo le ɣli dom nɛ la
Job35:13 Vavã
Job35:14 Ne meɖo to emawo o la
Job35:15 Gawu la
Job35:16 Ale Hiob ke eƒe nu hegblɔ nya dzodzrowo eye wòlɔ nya siwo me gɔmesese aɖeke mele o la kɔ ɖi gleglegle.”
Job36:1 Elihu yi edzi be
Job36:2 “Kpɔ nye asinu vie eye maɖee afia wò be nya geɖewo li magblɔ ɖe Mawu nu.
Job36:3 Mexɔa nye gɔmesese tso afi aɖeke ɖaa
Job36:4 Kakaɖedzi nenɔ asiwò be
Job36:5 “Mawu nye Ŋusẽtɔ
Job36:6 Menana ame vɔ̃ɖiwo nɔa agbe o
Job36:7 Meɖea eƒe ŋku ɖa le ame dzɔdzɔewo ŋu o
Job36:8 Ke ne wode ga amewo
Job36:9 egblɔa nu si wowɔ la na wo
Job36:10 Enana woɖoa to ɖɔɖɔɖo eye wòɖea gbe na wo be woatrɔ le woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi la me.
Job36:11 Ne woɖo to eye wosubɔe la
Job36:12 Ke ne womeɖo to o la
Job36:13 “Fuléle le dzi me na Mawumavɔ̃lawo
Job36:14 Wokuna le woƒe ɖekakpui dzodzoe me
Job36:15 Ke eɖea ame siwo le fu kpem la le woƒe fukpekpewo me eye wòƒoa nu na wo le woƒe xaxa me.
Job36:16 “Ele nuwò blem be nàdo go tso xaxa ƒe glã me
Job36:17 Ke azɔ la
Job36:18 Kpɔ nyuie be ame aɖeke metsɔ kesinɔnuwo ble nuwòe o eye zãnu si le kpekpem segee la nana nàdze ɖe aga o.
Job36:19 Ɖe wò kesinɔnuwo alo wò kutrikuku veviwo katã alé wò ɖe asi be màɖo xaxa me oa?
Job36:20 Wò dzi megatsi dzi ɖe zã ƒe dodo ŋu ne nàhe amewo ado goe le woƒe aƒewo me o.
Job36:21 Kpɔ nyuie be mètrɔ ɖe nu vɔ̃ɖi
Job36:22 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job36:23 Ame kae tia mɔ siwo wòato la nɛ alo gblɔ nɛ be
Job36:24 Ɖo ŋku edzi
Job36:25 Amegbetɔwo katã kpɔe eye agbagbeawo ɖea ŋku ɖee tso adzɔge.
Job36:26 Mawu lolo loo
Job36:27 “Ehea tsi si le gegem toŋtoŋtoŋ la ƒoa ƒu
Job36:28 lilikpowo hã lolõa tsi si le wo me
Job36:29 Ame kae ase ale si wòkeke lilikpowo
Job36:30 Kpɔ ale si wòkaka eƒe dzikedzo ƒo xlã eɖokui eye wòblu atsiaƒu ƒe gogloƒewo ke hã ɖa.
Job36:31 Aleae wòkplɔa dukɔwoe eye wònaa nuɖuɖu wo le agbɔsɔsɔ me.
Job36:32 Etsɔa dzikedzo yɔa eƒe asiwo mee eye wòdɔnɛ be wòake dzo ɖe nu si wòɖoe na la dzi.
Job36:33 Eƒe dziɖegbe ɖea gbeƒã ahom si gbɔna
Job37:1 “Esia na nye dzi lã kpo eye wòti kpo le enɔƒe.
Job37:2 O ɖo to! Ɖo to eƒe gbe ƒe gbeɖeɖe kple bublu si le dodom tso eƒe nu me.
Job37:3 Eɖe asi le eƒe dzokeke ŋu ɖe yame katã eye wòɖoe ɖe anyigba ƒe mlɔenu ke hã
Job37:4 Eƒe gbeɖeɖe kplɔa esia ɖo
Job37:5 Mawu ƒe gbe bluna le nukumɔwo dzi
Job37:6 Egblɔna na tsikpe be
Job37:7 Ale be amegbetɔ siwo katã wòwɔ la nanya eƒe dɔwɔwɔ
Job37:8 Gbemelãwo sina bena eye wonɔa woƒe dowo me.
Job37:9 Ahom tsoa eƒe xɔa me vana eye ya sesẽwo hea vuvɔ vɛ.
Job37:10 Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ hea fafa gã aɖe vɛ eye tsi gbanawo dzi zua tsikpe.
Job37:11 Enyɔa tsi ɖe lilikpowo me
Job37:12 Le eƒe mɔfiafia nu wotrɔa trɔgodoe le anyigba la katã ŋkume
Job37:13 Ehea lilikpowo vɛ be woahe to na amewo alo be woade tsi anyigba
Job37:14 “Hiob
Job37:15 Ènya ale si Mawu léa lilikpowo ɖe asii
Job37:16 Ènya ale si lilikpowo wɔ hafi le yamea
Job37:17 Wò ame si le fifia tem le wò awuwo me
Job37:18 àte ŋu akpe ɖe eŋu le dziŋgɔli ƒe keke ɖe yame me
Job37:19 “Gblɔ nu si míagblɔ nɛ la na mí
Job37:20 Wonegblɔ nɛ be medi be maƒo nua? Ɖe ame aɖe abia be wonemi ye agbagbea?
Job37:21 Azɔ la
Job37:22 Edo tso anyiehe kple sikatsyɔ̃ɖoɖo. Mawu ɖiɖi va le ŋɔdzi ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe me.
Job37:23 Ame aɖeke matu Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la o elabena togbɔ be eƒe ŋusẽ de dzi bobobo
Job37:24 Eya ta amewo dea bubu eŋu elabena ɖe medea bubu ame siwo katã ƒe dzi me nunya le la ŋu oa?”
Job38:1 Tete Yehowa ɖo nyawo ŋu na Hiob to ahom me be
Job38:2 “Ame ka nye esi tsɔ viviti tsyɔ nye aɖaŋudede dzi kple nya siwo gɔmesese meli na la o?
Job38:3 Tso nàbla ali dzi abe ŋutsu ene
Job38:4 “Afi ka nènɔ esi meɖo anyigba ƒe gɔmeɖokpewo anyi? Gblɔe nam
Job38:5 Ame kae dzidze eƒe kekeme kple didime? Ànyae godoo! Ame kae tsɔ dzidzeka ɖo eŋu?
Job38:6 Nu ka dzi woɖo egɔme anyi ɖo? Alo ame kae ɖo eƒe dzogoedzikpe
Job38:7 esi ŋukeɣletiviwo le ha dzim ɖekae eye Mawudɔlawo katã do dzidzɔɣli?
Job38:8 “Ame kae do ʋɔ ɖe atsiaƒu nu esi wòdo go kpoyi tso dadaa ƒe dɔ me
Job38:9 esi metsɔ lilikpo wɔ eƒe awudodoe heblae ɖe viviti tsiɖitsiɖitsiɖi me
Job38:10 esi meɖo seɖoƒe nɛ
Job38:11 esi megblɔ be
Job38:12 “Èɖe gbe na ŋdi kpɔ tso esi wò ŋkekewo dze egɔme alo na fɔŋli nya eƒe nɔƒe
Job38:13 be wòalé anyigba ƒe toga
Job38:14 Anyigba trɔ eƒe nɔnɔme abe anyi le nutrenu te ene
Job38:15 Woxɔ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe kekeli le wo si eye woŋe woƒe abɔ si wodo ɖe dzi.
Job38:16 “Èzɔ mɔ yi ɖe atsiaƒu ƒe vudo me alo zɔ le gogloƒe ƒe nudiƒewo kpɔa?
Job38:17 Wofia ku ƒe agbowo wò kpɔa? Èkpɔ ku ƒe vɔvɔli ƒe agbowo kpɔa?
Job38:18 Èse anyigba ƒe kekeme gɔmea? Gblɔe nam
Job38:19 “Afi ka mɔ si yi kekeli ƒe nɔƒe la to? Eye afi kae nye viviti nɔƒe?
Job38:20 Àte ŋu akplɔ wo ayi wo nɔƒewoea? Ènya toƒe si yi ɖe wo nɔƒea?
Job38:21 Meka ɖe edzi be ènyae elabena wodzi wò ye ma ɣi xoxo! Ƒe geɖewoe nye esia esi nèle agbe!
Job38:22 “Ège ɖe sno ƒe nudzraɖoƒe alo kpɔ kpetsi ƒe nudzraɖoƒe
Job38:23 esi meɖo ɖi na xaxaɣi
Job38:24 Afi ka mɔ si wotona yia teƒe si dzikedzo kakana le alo teƒe si wokakaa ɣedzeƒeya le ɖe anyigba blibo la dzi la to?
Job38:25 Ame kae ɖo toƒe na tsi gã siwo dzana kple mɔ na ahom sesẽwo
Job38:26 be woade tsi anyigba si dzi ame mele o kple gbegbe si ame menɔ o
Job38:27 be wòaɖi kɔ na kuɖiɖinyigba gbɔlo eye wòamie gbe fɛ̃wo?
Job38:28 Fofo le tsidzadza sia? Ame kae nye tɔ na ahũdzadza?
Job38:29 Ame ka ƒe dɔ mee tsikpe do tso? Ame kae dzi zãmu si dzana tso dziƒo
Job38:30 esi tsiwo do kpe abe ahlihã ene eye gogloƒewo tame zu tsikpe?
Job38:31 “Àte ŋu abla Atifieŋu siwo le keklẽma? Àte ŋu atu Avutɔ ƒe kawoa?
Job38:32 Àte ŋu akplɔ ŋukeɣletiviwo ado goe ne woƒe dodoɣi ɖo alo akplɔ koklonɔ kple viawoa?
Job38:33 Ènya dziƒo ƒe sewoa? Àte ŋu aɖo Mawu ƒe fiaɖuɖu anyi ɖe anyigba dzia?
Job38:34 “Àte ŋu akɔ gbe dzi ado ɣli na lilikpowo
Job38:35 Wòe ɖo dzikedzo ɖe eƒe mɔ dzia? Ɖe wova gblɔna na wò be
Job38:36 Ame kae tsɔ nunya na dzi alo gɔmesese na susu?
Job38:37 Ame ka sie nunya le be wòaxlẽ lilikpowo? Ame kae ate ŋu aviã tsizɔ siwo le dziƒo
Job38:38 ne anyigba do kpe eye anyikɔ siwo le anyigba la lé ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu?
Job38:39 “Wòe daa ade na dzatanɔ eye nèdia nuɖuɖu na dzatawo
Job38:40 eye womlɔ woƒe dowo me alo le adeklo dzi le ave mea?
Job38:41 Ame kae dia nuɖuɖu na akpaviãwo
Job39:1 “Ènya ɣeyiɣi si todzigbɔ̃wo dzia via? Ènɔa eteƒe hafi zinɔ fɔa fua?
Job39:2 Èxlẽa ɣletiwo va se ɖe woƒe vidziɣia? Ènya ɣeyiɣi si wodzia via?
Job39:3 Wodzea klo hedzia vi eye woƒe kuléle wua nu.
Job39:4 Wo viwo tsina eye ŋusẽ ɖoa wo ŋu le gbe me
Job39:5 “Ame kae na ablɔɖe gbetedzi? Ame kae tu kae?
Job39:6 Metsɔ gbegbe nɛ be wòanye eƒe aƒe kple dzeƒi gbadza la nɛ be wòanye enɔƒe.
Job39:7 Hoowɔwɔ si le edzi yim le dua me la le kokoe ɖim nɛ eye mele tasiaɖamkula ƒe ɣlidodo sem o.
Job39:8 Etsana le togbɛwo dzi dia gbeɖuƒe eye wòtsaa ŋu na gbe mumu ɖe sia ɖe.
Job39:9 “Ɖe to si le gbe me la alɔ̃ asubɔ wòa? Atɔ ɖe wò gbeɖuƒe le zã mea?
Job39:10 Àte ŋu ade kae ɖe agbleŋlɔnu ŋua? Alɔ̃ anɔ yowòme aŋlɔ balimea?
Job39:11 Ɖe nàɖo ŋu ɖe eŋu le eƒe ŋusẽ gã la ta? Àtsɔ wò dɔ kpekpewo agble ɖe eƒe asi mea?
Job39:12 Àte ŋu aɖo dzi ɖe eŋu be atsɔ wò lu agbɔe na wò dedie eye wòaƒoe ƒu ɖe wò lugbɔƒea?
Job39:13 “Golo ƒoa eƒe aʋala kpakpakpa dzidzɔtɔe gake womate ŋu atsɔe asɔ kple damixe ƒe fu kple aʋalã o.
Job39:14 Eɖaa eƒe azi ɖe anyigba
Job39:15 eye metsɔ ɖeke le eme be
Job39:16 Esẽa ŋuta le viawo ŋu abe menye eyae dzi wo o ene eye metsɔa ɖeke le eme ne eƒe agbagbadzedze zu dɔ vlo o.
Job39:17 Elabena Mawu mena nunyae alo na susu nyuie o.
Job39:18 Ke hã la
Job39:19 “Wòe na ŋusẽ sɔ alo wòe tsɔ kɔdza de kɔ nɛa?
Job39:20 Wòe na wòtia kpo abe ʋetsuvi ene eye wòdoa ŋɔdzi kple eƒe ŋɔtimegbɔgbɔa?
Job39:21 Etsɔa eƒe afɔkli kaa nu ŋɔdzitɔe
Job39:22 Vɔvɔ̃ doa nukokoe nɛ eye mevɔ̃a naneke o
Job39:23 Aŋutrɔwo le wo nɔewo lɔm le eƒe axadzi
Job39:24 Ele anyigba ɖum esi wògli kple dzidzɔ manyagblɔ
Job39:25 Edo ɣli be
Job39:26 “Ɖe aʋako dzona yia dzi ʋĩi le wò nunya nu eye wòkekea eƒe aʋalã heɖoa ta dziehea?
Job39:27 Ɖe hɔ̃ dzona yia dzi ʋĩi le wò gbeɖeɖe nu eye wòwɔa eƒe atɔ ɖe kɔkɔƒea?
Job39:28 Enɔa togbɛ kɔkɔ dzi eye wòtsia afi ma le zã me
Job39:29 Afi ma wòdia eƒe nuɖuɖu tsonae eye eƒe ŋku kpɔnɛ le adzɔge ke.
Job39:30 Ʋu nye nuɖuɖu na viawo eye afi si aʋatsilawo le la
Job40:1 Yehowa gblɔ na Hiob be
Job40:2 “Ɖe ame si le nya hem kple Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la aɖɔe ɖoa? Ame si tsɔ nya ɖe Mawu ŋu la neɖo eŋu nɛ!”
Job40:3 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu na Yehowa be
Job40:4 “Aleke nye ame si medze o la maɖo nya ŋu na wòe? Metsɔ nye asi ɖo nye nu.
Job40:5 Meƒo nu zi ɖeka gake nyemekpɔ ŋuɖoɖo o; meƒo nu zi evelia eya ta nyemagaƒo nu o.”
Job40:6 Tete Yehowa ƒo nu na Hiob tso ahom me be
Job40:7 “Bla ali dzi abe ŋutsu ene
Job40:8 “Ɖe nàdo vlo nye afiatsotsoa? Ɖe nàbu fɔm
Job40:9 Ɖe wò abɔ le abe Mawu tɔ ene eye wò gbe ate ŋu ablu abe etɔ enea?
Job40:10 Ekema tsɔ ŋutikɔkɔe kple atsyɔ̃ ɖɔ na ɖokuiwò eye nàtsɔ bubu kple gãnyenye ado na ɖokuiwò.
Job40:11 Trɔ wò dɔmedzoe ƒe nuwɔwɔ kɔ ɖi bababa
Job40:12 Nye kɔ kpɔ dadala ɖe sia ɖe ne nàbɔbɔe ɖe anyi eye nàgbã ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖe afi si wole.
Job40:13 Ɖi wo katã ɖe ke me eye nàɣla woƒe mo ɖe yɔdo me.
Job40:14 Ekema nye ŋutɔ maʋu eme na wò be
Job40:15 “Kpɔ atiglinyi si mewɔ kpe ɖe ŋutiwò la ɖa
Job40:16 Eƒe ŋusẽ le alime nɛ eye ŋusẽ kae nya gã si le eƒe ƒodo ƒe lãmekawo me!
Job40:17 Eƒe asike le nyenyem abe sedati ene
Job40:18 Eƒe ƒuwo le abe akɔbliga si me do le la ene eye eƒe afɔtiwo le abe gakpo ene.
Job40:19 Eyae nye gbãtɔ le Mawu ƒe nuwɔwɔwo dome gake Ewɔla ate ŋu azɔ ɖe edzi kple yi.
Job40:20 Togbɛwo tsɔa woƒe kutsetsewo vɛ nɛ eye gbemelãwo katã fena le egbɔ.
Job40:21 Emlɔa anyi ɖe ati dama te eye wòɣlaa eɖokui ɖe aƒla siwo le sime la me.
Job40:22 Atiawo doa vɔvɔli ɖe edzi heɣlanɛ eye keti siwo le tɔʋuwo to la ƒoa xlãe.
Job40:23 Ne tɔwo dze agbo la
Job40:24 Ɖe ame aɖe ate ŋu alée kple eƒe ŋku alo aɖo mɔ nɛ
Job41:1 “Àte ŋu atsɔ ƒu aɖe lo le tɔ me alo atsɔ ka abla eƒe aɖe ɖe nu me nɛa?
Job41:2 Àte ŋu ade ka ŋɔti me nɛ alo atsɔ ƒu aŋɔ eƒe glã?
Job41:3 Anɔ kukuɖeɖe na wò dzi ɖaa be nàkpɔ nublanui nɛa? Aƒo nu na wò kple gbe blewua?
Job41:4 Awɔ ɖoɖo kpli wò be nàkplɔe wòanye wò kluvi le eƒe agbe me katã?
Job41:5 Àte ŋu amlae abe xevi ene alo atsɔe ada ɖe avɔ dzi na viwò nyɔnuviwoa?
Job41:6 Ɖe asitsalawo atsɔ woƒe adzɔnuwo aɖɔliia? Ɖe woamae ɖe asitsalawo domea?
Job41:7 Àte ŋu atsɔ gaƒliwo aŋɔ eƒe ŋutigbalẽ alo atsɔ akplɔ atɔ eƒe ta?
Job41:8 Ne èka asi eŋuti la
Job41:9 Mɔkpɔkpɔ be yeate ŋu aɖu edzi nye beble elabena ne èkpɔe teti gɔ̃ hã la
Job41:10 Ame aɖeke medzi ŋɔ de enu ne wòanyɔe o. Ekema ame kae ate ŋu anɔ te ɖe nunye?
Job41:11 Ame kae tre nu nanam bena maɖo eteƒe nɛ mahã? Nu sia nu si le ɣea te la nye tɔnye.
Job41:12 “Nyemagbe nuƒoƒo le eƒe ata
Job41:13 Ame ka ate ŋu aɖe awu si wòdo ɖe edzi la le eŋu? Ame ka ate ŋu ado ɖe egbɔ kple gaƒli?
Job41:14 Ame ka ate ŋu ake eƒe nu
Job41:15 Akpoxɔnuwo ɖo ɖe eƒe dzimegbe eye woɖo ɖe wo nɔewo nu
Job41:16 ɖe sia ɖe lé ɖe nɔvia ŋu ale gbegbe be
Job41:17 Wolé ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu sesĩe
Job41:18 Eƒe nyenye kea dzo miamiamia eye eƒe ŋkuwo le abe ŋdi ƒe kekeli ene.
Job41:19 Dzoxiwo dona tso eƒe nu me
Job41:20 Dzudzɔ dona le eƒe ŋɔtime abe ale si tsize si woɖo aƒladzo dzi la fiena tua dzudzɔe ene.
Job41:21 Eƒe gbɔgbɔ dea dzo aka me eye dzo bibi dona tso eƒe nu me.
Job41:22 Ŋusẽ le eƒe kɔ me eye dɔmedzoe le eŋgɔ.
Job41:23 Eƒe ayi mlɔ wo nɔewo dzi eye wolé ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu sesĩe
Job41:24 Eƒe akɔta do akpa abe kpe ene eye wòsẽ abe te si dzi wotua nu le la ene.
Job41:25 Ne etso la
Job41:26 Yi si kaa eŋu la mewɔa nanekee o
Job41:27 Gayibɔ le nɛ abe gbe ƒuƒu ene eye akɔbli le abe ati si nyunyɔ la ene.
Job41:28 Mesina le aŋutrɔwo nu o eye akafokpewo le nɛ abe blitsro ene.
Job41:29 Kpo le nɛ abe gbe ƒuƒu ene eye ne yi le gbe dom la
Job41:30 Eƒe dɔme le abe ze gbagbã dzaglidzagliwo ene eye woɖea fli ɖe ba me abe luƒomɔ ene.
Job41:31 Enana gogloƒewo fiena wlɔwlɔwlɔ abe aŋɔɖaze ene eye wòblua atsiaƒu me abe amiɖaze me blum wole ene.
Job41:32 Egblẽa mɔ si le dzo dzam la ɖe emegbe eye wòtrɔa atsiaƒu wòzua futukpɔ ɣi
Job41:33 Naneke mele anyigba dzi sɔ kplii o
Job41:34 Eklẽa ŋku ɖe nu siwo katã doa wo ɖokui ɖe dzi eye wònye fia ɖe nu siwo katã dana la dzi.”
Job42:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu na Yehowa be:
Job42:2 “Azɔ menya be àte ŋu awɔ nu sia nu
Job42:3 Èbia be
Job42:4 “Ègblɔ be
Job42:5 Nye towo se nya le ŋuwò
Job42:6 eya ta nu siwo katã megblɔ la kpe ŋu nam eye megbe wo le ke kple afi me.”
Job42:7 Esi Yehowa gblɔ nya siawo na Hiob vɔ la
Job42:8 eya ta azɔ mitsɔ nyitsu adre kple agbo adre
Job42:9 Ale Temanitɔ
Job42:10 Esi Hiob do gbe ɖa ɖe exɔlɔ̃awo ta vɔ la
Job42:11 Nɔviŋutsuwo kple nɔvia nyɔnuwo katã kple eƒe ame nyanyɛwo katã va egbɔ eye woɖu nu kplii le eƒe aƒe me. Wofa akɔ nɛ
Job42:12 Yehowa yra Hiob fifia wu tsã. Alẽ akpe wuiene (14
Job42:13 Viŋutsu adre kple vinyɔnu etɔ̃ hã nɔ esi.
Job42:14 Ena ŋkɔ nyɔnuvi gbãtɔ be
Job42:15 Womegakpɔ nyɔnu aɖeke le anyigba blibo la dzi wòdze tugbe de Hiob ƒe vinyɔnuwo nu o. Wo fofo na domenyinu wo ɖe wo nɔviŋutsuwo xa.
Job42:16 Le esia megbe la
Job42:17 Ale Hiob tsi
Psalms1:1 Woayra ame si mezɔna ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo nu alo nɔa tsitre ɖe nu vɔ̃ wɔlawo ƒe mɔ dzi loo alo nɔa anyi ɖe fewuɖulawo dome o
Psalms1:2 ke boŋ ekpɔa dzidzɔ le Yehowa ƒe se la ŋu

Psalms18:24 Yehowa wɔ nyui nam le nye dzɔdzɔenyenye kple esi nye asi me dza le eŋkume la ta.
Psalms18:25 Èwɔa nuteƒe na nuteƒewɔla
Psalms18:26 Ame si dza le eƒe dzi me la
Psalms18:27 Èɖea ame siwo bɔbɔa wo ɖokui
Psalms18:28 Wò
Psalms18:29 Mate ŋu alũ ɖe aʋakɔ dzi to wò kpekpeɖeŋu me
Psalms18:30 Mawu ya ƒe mɔwo de blibo
Psalms18:31 Elabena ame kae ganye Mawu kpe ɖe Yehowa ŋu? Ame kae ganye Agakpe
Psalms18:32 Mawue nye nye mɔ sesẽ
Psalms18:33 Ewɔ nye afɔwo abe zi tɔwo ene
Psalms18:34 Efia aʋawɔwɔ nye asiwo
Psalms18:35 Ètsɔ wò dziɖuɖu ƒe akpoxɔnu la nam
Psalms18:36 Èkeke mɔ le tenye
Psalms18:37 Meti nye futɔwo yome
Psalms18:38 Metsrɔ̃ wo be womagate ŋu afɔ gbeɖe o
Psalms18:39 Wòe na ŋusẽm hena aʋa la wɔwɔ
Psalms18:40 Èna nye futɔwo trɔ megbe dem helé du tsɔ
Psalms18:41 Wodo ɣli be Yehowa naxɔ na yewo
Psalms18:42 Metu wo memie abe ʋuʋudedi si ya lɔ ɖe nu la ene
Psalms18:43 Èɖem tso ame siwo va dze dzinye la ƒe asi me
Psalms18:44 Ne wose ŋkɔnye ko la
Psalms18:45 Dzi ɖena le wo katã ƒo
Psalms18:46 Yehowa li tegbee! Woakafu nye Agakpe la! Woado Mawu
Psalms18:47 Eyae nye Mawu si biaa hlɔ̃ nam
Psalms18:48 ame si ɖeam tso nye futɔwo ƒe asi me. Èkɔm ɖe dzi gbɔ nye futɔwo ta
Psalms18:49 O! Yehowa
Psalms18:50 Ena dziɖuɖu gãwo eƒe fia la; eɖe amenuveve si nu meyi o la fia David
Psalms19:1 Dziƒo ɖe Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ɖe go
Psalms19:2 Tso ŋkeke yi ŋkeke
Psalms19:3 Nuƒoƒo alo gbegbɔgblɔ aɖeke meli si me womese woƒe gbe le o.
Psalms19:4 Woƒe gbe ɖina le anyigba dzi afi sia afi
Psalms19:5 eye wòle abe ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃e le go dom tso eƒe agbadɔ me ene. Ele abe duƒula si le dzidzɔ kpɔm be wòalé eƒe mɔ atsɔ ene.
Psalms19:6 Ɣe dzena tso dziƒo ƒe go ɖeka dzi
Psalms19:7 Yehowa ƒe se la de blibo
Psalms19:8 Yehowa ƒe mɔwo dzɔ
Psalms19:9 Yehowa ƒe sewo me kɔ; wonɔa anyi ɖaa. Yehowa ƒe sewo li ke sesĩe
Psalms19:10 Woxɔ asi wu sika kple sika nyuitɔ; wovivina wu anyitsi kple anyitsi si woɖe le anyito me.

Psalms19:12 Ame kae ate ŋu ade dzesi nu gbegblẽ si wòwɔ? Tsɔ nye vodada siwo metsɔ ɣla la kem.
Psalms19:13 Ɖe wò dɔla tso lɔlɔ̃nuwɔwɔ ƒe nu vɔ̃wo hã me; womaɖu dzinye akpɔ o. Ekema mazu fɔɖiɖi manɔŋutɔ

Psalms34:2 Nye luʋɔ aƒo adegbe le Yehowa me
Psalms34:3 Mido kɔkɔ Yehowa kplim; mina míawɔ ɖeka ado eƒe ŋkɔ ɖe dzi.

Psalms34:5 Ame siwo tsɔ woƒe ŋku da ɖe edzi la aklẽ
Psalms34:6 Hiãtɔ sia yɔe

Psalms34:14 Mite ɖa le vɔ̃ gbɔ

Psalms34:16 ke Yehowa klẽa ŋku ɖe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo be wòaɖe wo ɖa le anyigba dzi
Psalms34:17 Ame dzɔdzɔewo do ɣli
Psalms34:18 Yehowa tsɔ ɖe ame siwo ƒe dzi gbã gudugudu la gbɔ
Psalms34:19 Ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe fukpekpewo sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ
Psalms34:20 ekpɔa eƒe ƒuwo katã ta
Psalms34:21 Dzɔgbevɔ̃e awu ame vɔ̃ɖi
Psalms34:22 Yehowa ɖea eƒe dɔlawo
Psalms35:1 O! Yehowa
Psalms35:2 Tso
Psalms35:3 Tsɔ akplɔ nueveetɔ kple nuɖekɛtɔ ɖe yonyemetilawo ŋuti. Gblɔ na nye luʋɔ be
Psalms35:4 Ame siwo le nye agbe yome tim la
Psalms35:5 Wonenɔ abe bli ƒe atsa si ya lɔ ɖe nu ene
Psalms35:6 woƒe mɔ dzi nedo viviti
Psalms35:7 Esi nyemewɔ naneke wo o
Psalms35:8 gbegblẽ neƒo ɖe wo dzi kpoyi
Psalms35:9 Ekema nye luʋɔ atso aseye le Yehowa me
Psalms35:10 Nye ameti blibo la katã mado ɣli be
Psalms35:11 Ɖasefo ŋutasẽlawo zɔ va ŋgɔgbe
Psalms35:12 Wotsɔ vɔ̃ ɖo nyui teƒe nam
Psalms35:13 Gake ne wodze dɔ la
Psalms35:14 menɔa yiyim kpokpokpo le nuxaxa me abe xɔ̃nye alo nɔviŋutsu fam mele ene. Medea mo to abe danye ƒe ku fam mele ene.
Psalms35:15 Gake ne mekli nu la
Psalms35:16 Woɖua fewu le ŋunye vevesesetɔe
Psalms35:17 O! Aƒetɔ
Psalms35:18 Ekema mada akpe na wò le ameha gã la dome
Psalms35:19 Mègana ame siwo nye nye futɔwo la nakpɔ dziɖuɖu ƒe dzidzɔ ɖe ŋunye yakatɔe o
Psalms35:20 Womeƒoa nu ŋutifafatɔe o
Psalms35:21 Wokea woƒe nu baa ɖe ŋutinye hegblɔna be
Psalms35:22 O! Yehowa
Psalms35:23 Nyɔ
Psalms35:24 Tso afia nam le wò dzɔdzɔenyenye la ta
Psalms35:25 Mègana woabu be
Psalms35:26 Ame siwo katã le dzidzɔ kpɔm tso nye xaxa ŋuti la
Psalms35:27 Ke ame siwo dzɔ dzi be nètso afia nam la nedo dzidzɔɣli kple aseyetsoɣli. Wonenɔ gbɔgblɔm ɖaa be
Psalms35:28 Nye aɖe aƒo nu le wò dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋuti
Psalms36:1 Yehowa ƒe gbedeasi aɖe le nye dzi me tso ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe nu vɔ̃ wɔwɔ ŋuti. Mawuvɔvɔ̃ aɖeke mele woƒe ŋkuwo me o.
Psalms36:2 Elabena le eya ŋutɔ ŋkume
Psalms36:3 Eƒe numenyawo vɔ̃ɖi
Psalms36:4 Eɖoa nu vɔ̃ɖi le eƒe aba dzi
Psalms36:5 O! Yehowa
Psalms36:6 Wò dzɔdzɔenyenye le abe to gãwo ene
Psalms36:7 Wò lɔlɔ̃ si meʋãna o la xɔ asi loo! Ame siwo ŋuti bubu le kple ame siwo ŋuti mele o
Psalms36:8 Wò aƒemenu gbogboawo nye nuɖuɖu na wo
Psalms36:9 Elabena gbɔwòe agbe ƒe tsitsetse la le

Psalms37:1 Mègadzo nyanyanya le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ta
Psalms37:2 elabena esusɔ vie woayrɔ abe gbe ene
Psalms37:3 Ɖo dzi ɖe Yehowa ŋu
Psalms37:4 Yehowa ƒe nu nenyo ŋuwò ekema ana nu siwo wò dzi di la wò.
Psalms37:5 Tsɔ wò mɔwo gblẽ ɖe Yehowa ƒe asi me; ɖo dzi ɖe eŋu
Psalms37:6 Ana wò dzɔdzɔenyenye nàdze abe ŋdikekeli ene
Psalms37:7 Zi kpoo le Yehowa ŋkume
Psalms37:8 Ɖe asi le dziku ŋu
Psalms37:9 Woatsrɔ̃ ame vlowo gake ame siwo tsɔ woƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ de Yehowa me la
Psalms37:10 Esusɔ vie ko ame vɔ̃ɖi la maganɔ anyi o
Psalms37:11 Ke ame fafawo anyi anyigba la ƒe dome
Psalms37:12 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖo nugbe ɖe ame dzɔdzɔewo ŋu heɖu aɖukli ɖe wo ŋuti.
Psalms37:13 Ke Aƒetɔ la le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo kom
Psalms37:14 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖe woƒe yi
Psalms37:15 Gake woƒe yiwo aŋɔ woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dziwo
Psalms37:16 Nu ʋɛ si le ame dzɔdzɔewo si la nyo wu kesinɔnu gbogbo siwo le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo si
Psalms37:17 elabena woaŋe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe ŋusẽ
Psalms37:18 Ame siwo ŋuti fɔɖiɖi mele o la ƒe ŋkekewo le nyanya na Yehowa
Psalms37:19 Le ŋkeke vɔ̃wo dzi la
Psalms37:20 Ke ame vɔ̃ɖi ya atsrɔ̃. Yehowa ƒe futɔwo anɔ abe gbe ƒe seƒoƒo ene
Psalms37:21 Ame vɔ̃ɖi doa nugbana
Psalms37:22 Ame siwo Yehowa yra la anyi anyigba la ƒe dome
Psalms37:23 Ŋutsu si ƒe mɔwo dze Yehowa ŋu la
Psalms37:24 ne ekli nu hã la
Psalms37:25 Tsã la
Psalms37:26 Woawo boŋ vea ame nu ɣe sia ɣi
Psalms37:27 Tsri nu vɔ̃ɖi
Psalms37:28 Elabena Yehowa lɔ̃a nu dzɔdzɔe wɔlawo
Psalms37:29 Ame dzɔdzɔe anyi anyigba la ƒe dome
Psalms37:30 Nunyanya doa go tso ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe nu me
Psalms37:31 Eƒe Mawu ƒe se le eƒe dzi me
Psalms37:32 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo de xa ɖi na ame dzɔdzɔewo

Psalms38:4 Nye dzidada kɔ gbɔ tanye abe agba kpekpe si nyemate ŋu atsɔ o la ene.

Psalms70:2 Ŋukpe kple tɔtɔ neva ame siwo le nye agbe yome tim la dzi. Ame siwo le nye gbegblẽ dim la negbugbɔ ɖe megbe kple ŋukpe.
Psalms70:3 Na be ame siwo le gbɔgblɔm be
Psalms70:4 Ke ame siwo dia wò la netso aseye; woakpɔ dzidzɔ le mewò
Psalms70:5 Ke nye la
Psalms71:1 O! Yehowa
Psalms71:2 Xɔ nam
Psalms71:3 Nye sitsoƒe ƒe agakpe
Psalms71:4 O! Nye Mawu
Psalms71:5 Elabena tso ɣe aɖe ɣi ke
Psalms71:6 Tso nye dzigbe ke
Psalms71:7 Mezu nu maɖinu na ame geɖewo
Psalms71:8 Wò kafukafu yɔ nye nu me

Psalms71:10 Elabena nye futɔwo ƒo nu tsi tsitre ɖe ŋunye
Psalms71:11 Wogblɔ be

Psalms71:16 Mava aɖe gbeƒã wò nu dzɔatsuwo
Psalms71:17 O! Mawu; tso nye ɖekakpuime ke
Psalms71:18 O! Mawu

Psalms71:21 Àdzi nye bubu ɖe edzi

Psalms71:23 Nye nuyiwo ado dzidzɔɣli

Psalms72:1 O! Mawu
Psalms72:2 Adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na wò dukɔ la le dzɔdzɔenyenye me
Psalms72:3 Towo atsɔ kesinɔnuwo vɛ na wò dukɔ
Psalms72:4 Aʋli ame siwo ƒe dzi gbã la ta
Psalms72:5 Zi ale si ɣe kple ɣleti li la
Psalms72:6 Anɔ abe tsidzadza ɖe anyigba si dzi woƒo gbe le kple agbafie si dza ɖe anyigba hede tsii ene.
Psalms72:7 Ame dzɔdzɔewo ayi ŋgɔ le eƒe ɣeyiɣiwo me
Psalms72:8 Aɖu fia tso atsiaƒu ƒe go sia dzi ayi go kemɛ dzi
Psalms72:9 Dukɔ siwo le gbegbe la ade ta agu nɛ
Psalms72:10 Tarsis fia kple didiƒe ƒutatɔwo ahe adzɔ vɛ nɛ
Psalms72:11 Fiawo katã ade ta agu nɛ
Psalms72:12 elabena aɖe hiãtɔ si le avi fam kple wɔmenɔ si xɔnametɔ aɖeke meli na o.
Psalms72:13 Akpɔ nublanui na ame gblɔewo kple hiãtɔwo
Psalms72:14 Aɖe wo le teteɖeanyi kple ŋutasesẽ me
Psalms72:15 Fia la nenɔ agbe tegbee! Wonetsɔ Seba sika nɛ. Amewo nedo gbe ɖa ɖe eta ɖaa
Psalms72:16 Bli nedo agbogbo ɖe anyigba la katã dzi; eye neʋã ɖe togbɛwo katã dzi. Blitiawo netri abe Lebanontɔwo ene
Psalms72:17 Eƒe ŋkɔ nenɔ anyi ɖaa
Psalms72:18 Woakafu Yehowa Mawu
Psalms72:19 Woakafu eƒe ŋkɔ si ŋu ŋutikɔkɔe le la tso mavɔ me yi ɖe mavɔ me; eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe neyɔ anyigba blibo la dzi. Amen
Psalms72:20 Esiawo wu Yese ƒe vi
Psalms73:1 Vavã

Psalms73:4 Hiãkame aɖeke mele wo dzi o
Psalms73:5 Wovo tso agba siwo tena ɖe amewo dzi la me
Psalms73:6 Eya ta dada nye woƒe kɔga
Psalms73:7 Dzidada dona tso woƒe dzi si ku atri la me
Psalms73:8 Woɖua fewu
Psalms73:9 Woƒe nuwo xɔ dziƒo wɔ wo tɔe
Psalms73:10 Eya ta woƒe amewo trɔ ɖe wo gbɔ

Psalms73:24 Èkplɔm le wò aɖaŋudede nu
Psalms73:25 Ame kae le dziƒo nam
Psalms73:26 Nye ŋutilã kple nye dzi nu ava yi

Psalms74:1 O! Mawu
Psalms74:2 Ɖo ŋku ame siwo nèƒle le blema
Psalms74:3 Trɔ ɖe gli siwo gbã ɖikaɖika la ŋu
Psalms74:4 Wò futɔwo le gbe ɖem le afi si nèdo go mí le; wova tsi woƒe aflaga ɖe teƒe la be wòanye dzesi anɔ afi ma.
Psalms74:5 Wole nu wɔm abe ŋutsu siwo lé fia ɖe asi le ave dodowo me be woalã atiwo ene.
Psalms74:6 Wotsɔ woƒe fiawo kple yiwo dza aɖaŋu siwo wowɔ ɖe gliawo ŋu.
Psalms74:7 Wotɔ dzo wò kɔkɔeƒe la wòbi va anyigba
Psalms74:8 Wogblɔ le woƒe dzi me be
Psalms74:9 Womegawɔa nukunu aɖeke na mí o; womegblẽ nyagblɔɖila aɖeke ɖi o eye mía dometɔ aɖeke menya ɣeyiɣi si nu sia nu ava yi o.

Psalms74:11 Nu ka ta nèhe wò asi
Psalms74:12 Ke wò la

Psalms74:15 Wòe ʋu nu le tsitsetsewo kple tɔʋuwo nu wosi bababa
Psalms74:16 Ŋkeke nye tɔwò
Psalms74:17 Wòe ɖo liƒo na anyigba
Psalms74:18 O! Yehowa

Psalms74:20 Tsɔ ɖe le wò nubabla la me

Psalms77:4 Èna nye ŋkuwo gbe miamia; fuɖeɖewo sɔ gbɔ ale gbegbe be nyemate ŋu aƒo nu o.
Psalms77:5 Mebu gbe aɖe gbe ŋkekewo kple blemaƒewo ŋu.

Psalms77:7 “Ɖe Aƒetɔ la agbe ame tegbetegbea? Ɖe magave ame nu akpɔ oa?
Psalms77:8 Ɖe eƒe lɔlɔ̃ si meʋãna o la vɔ tegbetegbea? Ɖe eƒe ŋugbedodo vɔ hena ɣeyiɣiawo katã?

Psalms78:1 O! Nye dukɔ
Psalms78:2 Make nye nu
Psalms78:3 Nu siwo míese
Psalms78:4 Míawo míaɣlae ɖe mía viwo o

Psalms78:6 ale be dzidzime megbetɔwo hã nanya wo
Psalms78:7 Ekema woatsɔ woƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ ada ɖe Mawu dzi
Psalms78:8 Ke womanɔ abe wo fofo kɔlialiatɔwo
Psalms78:9 Togbɔ be aŋutrɔwo le Efraimtɔwo si hã la
Psalms78:10 Womelé Mawu ƒe nubabla me ɖe asi o

Psalms78:12 Ewɔ nukunu le wo fofowo ŋkume le Egiptenyigba dzi
Psalms78:13 Ema atsiaƒu
Psalms78:14 Etsɔ lilikpo kplɔ woe le ŋkeke me
Psalms78:15 Efe agakpe me le gbegbe
Psalms78:16 Ena tsi do tso agakpe me eye tsi la si bababa abe tɔsisiwo ene.

Psalms78:19 Woƒo nu tsi tsitre ɖe Mawu ŋu be
Psalms78:20 Esi wòtsɔ nu ƒo agakpe la
Psalms78:21 Esi Yehowa se wo ŋkɔ la
Psalms78:22 elabena womexɔ Mawu dzi se
Psalms78:23 Ke hã la
Psalms78:24 ena mana dza tso dziƒo na dukɔ la be woaɖu
Psalms78:25 Amegbetɔ ɖu mawudɔlawo ƒe nuɖuɖu
Psalms78:26 Etu ka ɣedzeƒeya tso dziƒo
Psalms78:27 Ena lã dza ɖe wo dzi abe ʋuʋudedi ene
Psalms78:28 Ena woge dze woƒe asaɖa me
Psalms78:29 Ale woɖui ʋuu heɖi ƒo taŋ
Psalms78:30 Ke hafi nuɖuɖu si wodzro la navɔ
Psalms78:31 Mawu ƒe dɔmedzoe bi ɖe wo ŋu; ewu ame sesẽwo le wo dome
Psalms78:32 To nu siawo katã gbɔ hã la
Psalms78:33 Ale wòna woƒe ŋkekewo wu nu nanekemakpɔkpɔe
Psalms78:34 Ɣe sia ɣi si ke Mawu wu wo ko la
Psalms78:35 Woɖoa ŋku edzi be Mawue nye woƒe Agakpe
Psalms78:36 Ke emegbe la
Psalms78:37 Woƒe dziwo meku ɖe eŋu vavã o
Psalms78:38 Gake ekpɔ nublanui na wo; etsɔ woƒe vodadawo ke wo
Psalms78:39 Eɖo ŋku edzi be ŋutilã ko wonye
Psalms78:40 Zi nenie womedze aglã ɖe eŋu le gbedzi
Psalms78:41 Enuenu wotea Mawu kpɔna
Psalms78:42 Womeɖo ŋku eƒe ŋusẽ dzi
Psalms78:43 gbe si gbe wòɖe eƒe nukudzesiwo fia le Egipte kple eƒe nukudɔwo fia le Zoan nuto me o.
Psalms78:44 Etrɔ woƒe tɔsisiwo wozu ʋu
Psalms78:45 Eɖo togbato ƒe ha gã aɖe ɖe wo dome
Psalms78:46 Etsɔ woƒe nukuwo na ʋetrawo kple woƒe kutsetsewo na ʋetsuviwo.
Psalms78:47 Egblẽ woƒe waingblewo kple kpetsi
Psalms78:48 Etsɔ woƒe nyihawo na kpetsi
Psalms78:49 Eɖo eƒe dɔmedzoe nyanyra
Psalms78:50 Eɖe mɔ ɖi na eƒe dɔmedzoe; meɖe woƒe agbe tso ku me o
Psalms78:51 Ewu Egiptetɔwo ƒe ŋgɔgbevi siwo nye woƒe ŋutsunyenye ƒe kutsetse gbãtɔwo le Ham gbadɔwo te.
Psalms78:52 Gake ekplɔ eƒe dukɔ la abe lãhawo ene
Psalms78:53 Ekplɔ wo le dedinɔnɔ me
Psalms78:54 Ale wòkplɔ wo va eƒe anyigba kɔkɔe la ƒe liƒo dzi
Psalms78:55 Enya dukɔwo le wo ŋgɔ
Psalms78:56 Ke wote Mawu kpɔ
Psalms78:57 Abe wo fofowo ene la
Psalms78:58 Wotsɔ woƒe nuxeƒewo do dɔmedzoe nɛ
Psalms78:59 Esi Mawu se wo ŋkɔ la
Psalms78:60 Ale wògblẽ agbadɔ si le Silo la ɖi
Psalms78:61 Eɖo nubablaɖaka si nye eƒe ŋusẽ la ɖe aboyome
Psalms78:62 Etsɔ eƒe dukɔ de asi na yi
Psalms78:63 Ena dzo fia eƒe ɖekakpuiwo
Psalms78:64 Wotsɔ woƒe nunɔlawo de asi na yi
Psalms78:65 Tete Aƒetɔ la nyɔ tso alɔ̃ me abe ale si aha kɔna le mo na ame si no wain mu la ene.

Psalms85:3 Èɖe asi le wò dzikudodo helĩhelĩ ŋuti eye nèdzudzɔ dɔmedzoe kaɖikaɖi dodo.
Psalms85:4 O! Mawu
Psalms85:5 Ɖe nàdo dɔmedzoe ɖe mía ŋu ɖikaa? Ɖe nàdidi wò dɔmedzoe la wòazɔ ato dzidzimewo katã mea?
Psalms85:6 Màgagbɔ agbe mí

Psalms119:1 Woayra ame siwo kpɔtsɔtsɔ mele woƒe mɔwo ŋu o
Psalms119:2 Woayra ame siwo léa eƒe ɖoɖowo me ɖe asi
Psalms119:3 Womewɔa vɔ̃ aɖeke o; ke boŋ wozɔna le eƒe mɔwo dzi.
Psalms119:4 Èwɔ se siwo dzi wòle be woawɔ ɖo blibo la da ɖi.
Psalms119:5 O! Ɖe nye mɔwo li ke sesĩe le wò sewo dzi wɔwɔ me la
Psalms119:6 Ekema ŋu makpem ne mebu wò sewo katã ŋu o.
Psalms119:7 Makafu wò le dzi dzɔdzɔe me

Proverbs17:1 Abolo ƒuƒlu sue ɖuɖu si ŋu ŋutifafa kple dziɖeɖi kpe ɖo la nyo wu aƒe si me yɔ fũu kple agbeɖuɖu eye dzre kpe ɖe eŋu.
Proverbs17:2 Dɔla nyanu aɖu aƒetɔ ɖe viŋutsu ŋukpenanuwɔla dzi eye ama domenyinu la kpli wo abe wo nɔviŋutsu wònye ene.
Proverbs17:3 Sonu li na klosalo eye dzokpo li na sika
Proverbs17:4 Ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖoa to nuyi vɔ̃ɖiwo eye aʋatsotɔ ƒua to anyi ɖe aɖe si gblẽa ame ŋu la ŋu.
Proverbs17:5 Ame si ɖea alɔme le ame dahe ŋuti la doa vlo woƒe Wɔla eye ame si kpɔa dzidzɔ be dzɔgbevɔ̃e dzɔ la
Proverbs17:6 Ame si ku amegã la ƒe fiakukue nye viawo ƒe viwo eye dzilawo nye atsyɔ̃ na wo viwo.
Proverbs17:7 Nuyi siwo doa wo ɖokuiwo ɖe dzi la medzena bometsila kaka alakpanuyiwo nahayi dziɖula dze ge o!
Proverbs17:8 Zãnu nye kpe xɔasi na ame si nae
Proverbs17:9 Ame si tsɔ nu tsyɔ vodada dzi la doa lɔlɔ̃ ɖe ŋgɔ eye ame si gawɔ nu si wòwɔ va yi la maa xɔlɔ̃ veviwo dome.
Proverbs17:10 Mokaname dea ta me na ame si si sidzedze le wu nu si ƒoƒo alafa ɖeka nye na bometsila.
Proverbs17:11 Ame vɔ̃ɖi la ɖoe kplikpaa be yeadze aglã eya ta woadɔ dumegã sẽŋuta ɖe eŋu.
Proverbs17:12 Enyo be nàdo go sisiblisi si ŋu woɖe viwo le wu esi nàdo go bometsila le eƒe bometsitsi me.
Proverbs17:13 Ne ŋutsu tsɔ vɔ̃ ɖo nyui teƒe la
Proverbs17:14 Dzregɔmetoto le abe ale si woŋɔa tɔʋu ene; eya ta ɖe asi le nya ŋu hafi wòava zu dzre.
Proverbs17:15 Afiatsotso na agɔdzela
Proverbs17:16 Ŋudɔwɔnu ka ga nye le bometsila ƒe asi me
Proverbs17:17 Xɔlɔ̃ lɔ̃a ame ɣeawo katã ɣi
Proverbs17:18 Ame manyanu ƒua asi akɔ eye wòdoa ŋugbe tsɔa eɖokui daa megbee na ehavi si nyi fe.
Proverbs17:19 Ame si lɔ̃ dzrewɔwɔ la lɔ̃a nu vɔ̃ eye ame si de agbo kɔkɔ eƒe aƒe nu la le gbegblẽ dim.
Proverbs17:20 Ame si si dzi dovo le la nu medzea edzi nɛ o eye ame si si alakpaɖe le la gena ɖe fukpekpe me.
Proverbs17:21 Viŋutsu si tsi bome la hea veve vɛ
Proverbs17:22 Dzi si kpɔa dzidzɔ la nye atike nyui
Proverbs17:23 Ame vɔ̃ɖi xɔa zãnu le bebeme be wòatrɔ nya dzɔdzɔe atsyɔ anyi.
Proverbs17:24 Ame si si sidzedze le la ƒe ŋku nɔa nunya ŋu
Proverbs17:25 Viŋutsu tsibome hea nuxaxa vɛ na fofoa kple veve vɛ na ame si dzii.
Proverbs17:26 Menyo be woahe to na fɔmaɖila alo aƒo dɔnunɔla ɖe eƒe nuteƒewɔwɔ ta o.
