Proverbs23:35 Àgblɔ be
Proverbs24:1 Mègabiã ŋu ame vɔ̃ɖiwo o
Proverbs24:2 elabena woƒe dzi ɖoa nu tovo eye woƒe nuyiwo ƒoa nu tso nu gbegblẽ wɔwɔ ŋuti.
Proverbs24:3 Nunya wotsɔna tua xɔe eye gɔmesese wotsɔna ɖoa egɔme anyie
Proverbs24:4 to sidzedze me wotsɔa nu nyui tɔxɛ siwo mebɔ o kple kesinɔnu nyuiwo yɔa woƒe xɔwo mee.
Proverbs24:5 Ŋusẽ gã aɖe le nunyala si eye ame si si gɔmesese le la dzia eƒe ŋusẽ ɖe edzi.
Proverbs24:6 Èhiã nufiame hafi adze aʋa eye hafi dziɖuɖu nava la
Proverbs24:7 Nunya kɔ boo na bometsila akpa; le amehawo dome
Proverbs24:8 Ame si ɖo vɔ̃ be yeawɔ lae woyɔna be ame vɔ̃ɖi.
Proverbs24:9 Bometsinuwo ɖoɖo nye nu vɔ̃ eye amewo tsria fewuɖula.
Proverbs24:10 Ne èʋuʋu le xaxaɣi la
Proverbs24:11 Ɖe ame siwo wokplɔ yina wuwu ge eye xɔ na ame siwo le yiyim sɔgɔsɔgɔ yina ɖe ku me.
Proverbs24:12 Ne ègblɔ be
Proverbs24:13 Vinye
Proverbs24:14 Nyae hã be
Proverbs24:15 Mègade xa ɖe ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe aƒe ŋu o
Proverbs24:16 elabena togbɔ be ame dzɔdzɔe adze anyi zi adre hã la
Proverbs24:17 Mègakpɔ dziɖuɖu ƒe dzidzɔ ne wò futɔ dze anyi o
Proverbs24:18 elabena Yehowa akpɔe
Proverbs24:19 Mègadzo nyanyanya le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ta alo aʋã ŋu ŋutasẽla o
Proverbs24:20 elabena mɔkpɔkpɔ aɖeke meli na ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖe etsɔ si gbɔna ŋuti o eye woatsi ŋutasẽlawo ƒe akaɖi.
Proverbs24:21 Vinye
Proverbs24:22 elabena ame eve mawo ana gbegblẽ naƒo ɖe wo dzi kpoyi eye ame kae nya dzɔgbevɔ̃e si woate ŋu ahe vɛ?
Proverbs24:23 Esiawo hã nye nunyalawo ƒe nyagbɔgblɔwo: Akpa ɖeka dzi dede le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me menyo o.
Proverbs24:24 Ame si agblɔ na fɔɖila be
Proverbs24:25 Ke eme anyo na ame siwo abu fɔ agɔdzela eye yayra gãwo ava wo ameawo dzi.
Proverbs24:26 Nyaŋuɖoɖo ɖe ɖoɖo nu le abe nugbugbɔ ene.
Proverbs24:27 Wu wò gotadɔwo nu eye nàdzra wò agble me ɖo
Proverbs24:28 Mègaɖu ɖasefo ɖe hawòvi ŋu dzodzro alo atsɔ wò nuyiwo aka aʋatsoe o.
Proverbs24:29 Mègagblɔ be
Proverbs24:30 Meto kuviatɔ kple ame manyanu ƒe waingble ŋu yi;
Proverbs24:31 ŋu vu tsyɔ afi sia afi
Proverbs24:32 Metsɔ nye dzi ɖo nu si mekpɔ la ŋu eye mesrɔ̃ nu tso nu si mekpɔ la me.
Proverbs24:33 Dɔ alɔ̃ vie
Proverbs24:34 tete ahedada aƒo ɖe dziwò abe adzodala ene
Proverbs25:1 Esiawoe nye Solomo ƒe lododo bubu siwo Yuda fia Hezekia ƒe dɔdzikpɔlawo ŋlɔ da ɖi.
Proverbs25:2 Enye Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe be wòaɣla nya; eye fiawo ƒe bubue nye be woaku nya me.
Proverbs25:3 Abe ale si dziƒo kɔe eye anyigba gogloe ene la
Proverbs25:4 Ɖe ɖi ɖa le klosalo ŋu
Proverbs25:5 Ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖa le fia la ŋkume ekema eƒe fiazikpui ali ke to dzɔdzɔenyenye me.
Proverbs25:6 Mègado ɖokuiwò ɖe dzi le fia la ŋkume o eye mègaʋli nɔƒe le amegãwo dome o.
Proverbs25:7 Enyo be wòagblɔ na wò be
Proverbs25:8 mègatsɔ dzitsitsi ahee va ʋɔnui o elabena nu ka nàwɔ le nuwuwua ne hawòvi la do ŋukpe wò?
Proverbs25:9 Ne èle nya hem kple hawòvi la
Proverbs25:10 ne menye nenema o la
Proverbs25:11 Nya si wogblɔ dedie la
Proverbs25:12 Ŋutsu nunyala ƒe mokaname le na to si le esem la abe sikatogɛ alo sikatsyɔ̃ɖonu aɖe ene.
Proverbs25:13 Dɔla nuteƒewɔla le na ame siwo dɔe la abe ale si sno fanae le nuŋeɣi ene; enana eƒe aƒetɔwo ƒe gbɔgbɔ gbɔna ɖe eme.
Proverbs25:14 Ŋutsu si ƒoa adegbe le nunana siwo mena o ŋu la le abe lilikpododo kple ya si medzaa tsi o la ene.
Proverbs25:15 Dzigbɔɖie wotsɔna blea fia nue eye aɖe bɔbɔe ate ŋu agbã ƒu.
Proverbs25:16 Ne èke ɖe anyitsi ŋu la
Proverbs25:17 Mègaƒo afɔɖi hawòvi ƒe aƒe me o
Proverbs25:18 Ŋutsu si ɖi aʋatsoɖase ɖe ehavi ŋu la le abe kpo
Proverbs25:19 Dziɖoɖo ɖe nuteƒemawɔla ŋu le xaxaɣiwo le abe aɖu vovo alo afɔ tutu ene.
Proverbs25:20 Ame si dzi ha na dzi kpekpe tɔ la le abe ame si ɖe awu kpekpe ɖi le vuvɔwɔgbe alo “vinigae” wokɔ ɖe “soɖa” dzi ene.
Proverbs25:21 Ne dɔ le wò ketɔ wum la
Proverbs25:22 Ne èwɔ esia la
Proverbs25:23 Abe ale si anyieheya hea tsidzadza vɛ ene la
Proverbs25:24 Enyo be woanɔ dzogoe dzi le xɔta wu be woanɔ aƒe ɖeka me kple srɔ̃nyɔnu dzrewɔla.
Proverbs25:25 Abe ale si tsi fafɛ faa akɔ na luʋɔ gbɔdzɔe ene la
Proverbs25:26 Ame dzɔdzɔe si na mɔ ame vɔ̃ɖi la le abe tsitsetse si me blu alo vudo si me wolɔ gbe kɔ ɖo la ene.
Proverbs25:27 Menyo be woano anyitsi fũu alo wònye nu dzeame be ame nadi eya ŋutɔ ƒe bubu o.
Proverbs25:28 Ame si meɖua eɖokui dzi o la le abe du si ŋu wogbã gli le la ene.
Proverbs26:1 Abe ale si sno dzanae le dzomeŋɔli alo tsi dzanae le nuŋeɣi ene la
Proverbs26:2 Abe ale si atsutsrɔe dzonae alo sagbadrɛ saa agbae ene la
Proverbs26:3 Sɔƒoka li na sɔ
Proverbs26:4 Mègaɖo nya ŋu na bometsila le eƒe bometsitsi nu o
Proverbs26:5 Ɖo nya ŋu na bometsila le eƒe bometsitsi nu
Proverbs26:6 Dudede asi na bometsila le abe ame ŋutɔ ƒe afɔ lalã alo dzɔgbevɔ̃e nono ene.
Proverbs26:7 Abe ale si atatututɔ ƒe afɔ nɔa yamee ene la
Proverbs26:8 Abe ale si wotsɔa kpe dea akafomee ene la
Proverbs26:9 Abe ale si ŋuti nɔna le ahamula ƒe asimee ene la
Proverbs26:10 Ame si daa aŋutrɔ bometsila dzodzro la le abe ame si dɔa dɔ ame si le eme tsom la ene.
Proverbs26:11 Abe ale si avu trɔna gayia nu si wòdzɔ gbɔe ene la
Proverbs26:12 Èkpɔ ame aɖe si nye nunyala le eya ŋutɔ ŋkume kpɔa? Mɔkpɔkpɔ geɖe li na bometsila wu eya amea.
Proverbs26:13 Kuviatɔ gblɔna be
Proverbs26:14 Abe ale si ʋɔtru trona le eƒe megbega mee ene la
Proverbs26:15 Kuviatɔ tsɔ eƒe asi de nuɖugba me gake kuvia ɖoe ale gbegbe be
Proverbs26:16 Kuviatɔ nye nunyala le eya ŋutɔ ƒe ŋkume
Proverbs26:17 Ame si le eme tsom gake de nu dzrenya si metsɔ egbɔ o me la le abe ame si lé towo kple eve na avu ene.
Proverbs26:18 Abe ale si aɖaʋatɔ daa akakati bibi alo aŋutrɔ si ŋu aɖi le la ene la
Proverbs26:19 nenemae nye ame si ble ehavi eye emegbe wògblɔ nɛ be
Proverbs26:20 Ne nake meli o la
Proverbs26:21 Abe ale si aka léa dzo eye nake doa dzo ene la
Proverbs26:22 Amenyagblɔla ƒe nyawo vivina abe nuɖuɖu vivi si woka de nu me la ene; eyina ɖe ame ƒe dɔgbowo me ke.
Proverbs26:23 Abe ale si wofaa sikatsi ɖe anyikplu ŋu ene la
Proverbs26:24 Ame baɖa tsɔa eƒe nuyi trɔa eɖokui bubue
Proverbs26:25 Togbɔ be eƒe nyawo nya le sesem hã la
Proverbs26:26 Eƒe susu baɖa aɣla ɖe beble megbe
Proverbs26:27 Ne ame aɖe ɖe ʋe la
Proverbs26:28 Alakpaɖe léa fu ame siwo ŋuti wòle abi demii
Proverbs27:1 Mègaƒo adegbe le etsɔ si gbɔna ŋu o elabena mènya nu si ŋkeke la ahe vɛ o.
Proverbs27:2 Na ame bubu nakafu wò
Proverbs27:3 Kpe nye nu kpekpe eye ke nye agba kpekpe gake bometsila ƒe dzikudoname kpena wu wo ame evea.
Proverbs27:4 Dziku la ŋutasẽlae eye dɔmedzoe la agbodzelae
Proverbs27:5 Mokaname le ame dome nyo wu lɔlɔ̃ si woɣla.
Proverbs27:6 Àte ŋu aka ɖe xɔlɔ̃ ƒe abideameŋu dzi gake ketɔ ƒe nugbugbɔ dzina ɖe edzi.
Proverbs27:7 Ƒoɖila doa vlo anyitsi
Proverbs27:8 Ame si tra tso eƒe aƒe me la le abe xevi si bu eƒe atɔmemɔ ene.
Proverbs27:9 Ami ʋeʋĩ kple dzudzɔdonu ʋeʋĩ doa dzidzɔ na dzi
Proverbs27:10 Mègagblẽ xɔ̃wò alo fofowò xɔlɔ̃ ɖi o
Proverbs27:11 Vinye
Proverbs27:12 Nunyala kpɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e gbɔna eye wòɣla eɖokui gake bometsila le yiyim eye wòkpe fu ɖe eta.
Proverbs27:13 Xɔ avɔ le ame si da megbe na amedzro la si
Proverbs27:14 Ne ŋutsu aɖe le eƒe aƒelika yram kple ɣli le ŋdi kanya la
Proverbs27:15 Srɔ̃nyɔnu dzrewɔla le abe tsitrɔnu si le ɖuɖum madzudzɔmadzudzɔe le tsidzagbe ene.
Proverbs27:16 Asiɖoɖo edzi le abe asiɖoɖo ya dzi ene alo asitsɔtsɔ ku ami ene.
Proverbs27:17 Abe ale si ga nyrea ga ene la
Proverbs27:18 Ame si lé be na eƒe gboti nyuie la aɖu eƒe tsetsea eye woade bubu ame si kpɔ eƒe aƒetɔ dzi la ŋu.
Proverbs27:19 Abe ale si ame ƒe mo dzena le tsi dzii ene la
Proverbs27:20 Ku kple tsiẽƒe meɖia ƒo gbeɖe o nenema kee nye ame ƒe ŋku.
Proverbs27:21 Sonu li na klosalo
Proverbs27:22 Togbɔ be èto bometsila le to me
Proverbs27:23 Ka ɖe edzi be wò alẽhawo ƒe nɔnɔme le nyanya na wò eye wò ŋku le wò lãhawo ŋu ɖaa;
Proverbs27:24 elabena kesinɔnuwo menɔa anyi ɖikaa o eye fiakuku hã menɔa anyi hena dzidzimewo katã o.
Proverbs27:25 Ne woƒo gbe eye gbe mumu mie ɖe eteƒe
Proverbs27:26 ekema alẽviawo ana avɔ wò eye gbɔ̃wo anye ga si nàtsɔ aƒle agblee.
Proverbs27:27 Gbɔ̃notsi anɔ asiwò fũu be wò kple wò aƒemetɔwo miano eye wòanye nunyiame na wò dɔlanyɔnuwo.
Proverbs28:1 Ame vɔ̃ɖi la léa du tsɔna
Proverbs28:2 Dziɖulawo sɔ gbɔ ɖe dukɔ si me aglãdzedze le
Proverbs28:3 Dziɖula si tea hiãtɔwo ɖe anyi la le abe tsidzadza si ɖe anyigba eye megblẽ nuɖuɖu aɖeke ɖi o la ene.
Proverbs28:4 Ame siwo gbe nu le sea gbɔ la kafua ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ke sedziwɔlawo tsia tsitre ɖe wo ŋu.
Proverbs28:5 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo mesea afiatsotso nyui gɔme o gake ame siwo dia Yehowa ya sea egɔme nyuie.
Proverbs28:6 Enyo be nànye hiãtɔ si ƒe zɔzɔme ŋu fɔɖiɖi mele o
Proverbs28:7 Ame si léa sea me ɖe asi la nye vi nyanu gake ame si dea ha kple nutsuɖulawo la doa ŋukpe fofoa.
Proverbs28:8 Ame si dzi eƒe kesinɔnuwo ɖe edzi to demegaxɔxɔ me la
Proverbs28:9 Ne ame aɖe doa toku sea la
Proverbs28:10 Ame si kplɔ nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla to mɔ vɔ̃ dzi la
Proverbs28:11 Kesinɔtɔ nye nunyala le eya ŋutɔ gbɔ gake hiãtɔ si si sidzedze le la kpɔa egɔme.
Proverbs28:12 Ne ame dzɔdzɔe ɖu dzi la
Proverbs28:13 Nu medzea edzi na ame si ɣla eƒe nu vɔ̃ o
Proverbs28:14 Woayra ŋutsu si vɔ̃a Yehowa ɣe sia ɣi
Proverbs28:15 Ŋutasẽla si le ame dahewo dzi ɖum la le abe dzata si le gbe tem alo sisiblisi si le ade tam ene.
Proverbs28:16 Dziɖula tamesesẽtɔ menyaa nu o
Proverbs28:17 Hlɔ̃dola si hlɔ̃dodo la zu agba na la anye tsatsala va se ɖe eƒe kugbe; ame aɖeke megakpe ɖe eŋu o.
Proverbs28:18 Ame si fɔɖiɖi mele eƒe zɔzɔme ŋu o la anɔ dedie
Proverbs28:19 Ame si ŋlɔ eƒe agble la akpɔ nuɖuɖu geɖe
Proverbs28:20 Woayra ŋutsu nuteƒewɔla fũu
Proverbs28:21 Amedzidede menyo o gake ame ayi aɖawɔ vɔ̃ ɖe abolo kakɛ ta.
Proverbs28:22 Ŋutsu nuvela tsi dzi ɖe hotsuikpɔkpɔ ŋu
Proverbs28:23 Ame si ka mo na ŋutsu la
Proverbs28:24 Ame si da adzo fofoa alo dadaa hegblɔ be
Proverbs28:25 Ŋutsu ŋubiala hea mama vɛ ke ame si ɖoa dzi ɖe Yehowa ŋu la
Proverbs28:26 Ame si ɖoa dzi ɖe eɖokui ŋu la
Proverbs28:27 Ame si naa nu hiãtɔ la
Proverbs28:28 Ne tamesesẽtɔ zu dziɖula la
Proverbs29:1 Ame si woka mo na zi gede gake wògbe lia kɔ la
Proverbs29:2 Ne ame dzɔdzɔewo le dzi ɖum la
Proverbs29:3 Ame si lɔ̃a nunya la hea dzidzɔ vɛ na fofoa
Proverbs29:4 To afia nyui tsotso me fia hea dedinɔnɔ vɛ na dukɔ
Proverbs29:5 Ame si do fuflugba na ehavi la le ɖɔ ɖom na eya ŋutɔ ƒe afɔ.
Proverbs29:6 Ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe nu vɔ̃ denɛ mɔ me
Proverbs29:7 Ame dzɔdzɔewo tsɔa ɖe le afiatsotso na hiãtɔwo me gake ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ya metsɔa ɖeke le eme o.
Proverbs29:8 Fewuɖulawo dea ʋunyaʋunya du me
Proverbs29:9 Nunyala yi ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe kple bometsila
Proverbs29:10 Hlɔ̃dolawo lé fu ŋutsu nuteƒewɔla eye wodina be yewoawu dzi dzadzɛ tɔ.
Proverbs29:11 Bometsila ɖea eƒe dziku katã fiana
Proverbs29:12 Ne dziɖula ɖo to beblenyawo la
Proverbs29:13 Nu ɖeka sia le hiãtɔ kple ameteɖetola siaa si
Proverbs29:14 Ne fia drɔ̃ ʋɔnu na hiãtɔ ɖe dzɔdzɔenyenye dzi la
Proverbs29:15 Ameƒoti si wotsɔna ɖɔa ame ɖoe la fiaa nunya ame
Proverbs29:16 Ne ame vɔ̃ɖiwo le dzi ɖum la
Proverbs29:17 Ne èhe viwò ŋutsuvi la
Proverbs29:18 Afi si ɖeɖefia mele o la
Proverbs29:19 Numenya ɖeɖe mate ŋu aɖɔ dɔla ɖo o
Proverbs29:20 Èkpɔ ame si ƒoa nu blablablaa? Mɔkpɔkpɔ geɖe li na bometsila wu eya amea gɔ̃ hã.
Proverbs29:21 Ne ŋutsu aɖe wɔ vi na eƒe subɔviŋutsu tso eƒe ɖevime la
Proverbs29:22 Ŋutsu dɔmedzoetɔ dea dzre amewo dome eye ame si doa dziku kabakaba la wɔa nu vɔ̃ geɖe.
Proverbs29:23 Ŋutsu si dana la ɖua ŋukpe
Proverbs29:24 Ame si wɔ ɖeka kple fiafitɔ la nye eya ŋutɔ ƒe futɔ; wonana wòkaa atam eye mekpɔ mɔ akɔ nu le edzi o.
Proverbs29:25 Vɔvɔ̃ si le ame aɖe me lae nyea mɔ nɛ
Proverbs29:26 Ame geɖewo dina be yewoado ɖe dziɖula ŋkume
Proverbs29:27 Nu gbegblẽ wɔla nye ŋunyɔ na ame dzɔdzɔe eye nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla nye ŋunyɔ na ame vɔ̃ɖi.
Proverbs30:1 Yake vi Agur ƒe nyagblɔɖi. Ŋutsu sia gblɔ na Itiel
Proverbs30:2 “Nyee tsi bome wu le amewo dome; ame ƒe nugɔmesese mele asinye o.
Proverbs30:3 Nyemesrɔ̃ nunya alo nya naneke le Kɔkɔetɔ la ŋu o.
Proverbs30:4 Ame kae lia yi dziƒo gagbɔ kpɔ? Ame kae lɔ ya ɖe eƒe asiƒome? Ame kae bla tsiwo katã ɖe eƒe awu ʋlaya me? Ame kae ɖo anyigba ƒe mlɔenu ke anyi? Eŋkɔ ɖe
Proverbs30:5 “Kpɔtsɔtsɔ mele Mawu ƒe nya aɖeke ŋu o; enye akpoxɔnu na ame siwo sii tso.
Proverbs30:6 Mègatsɔ nya kpe eƒe nyawo o
Proverbs30:7 “O Yehowa
Proverbs30:8 Te aʋatsokaka kple alakpa ɖa xaa tso gbɔnye
Proverbs30:9 Ne menye nenema o la
Proverbs30:10 “Mègagblẽ dɔla ŋu na eƒe aƒetɔ o
Proverbs30:11 “Ame aɖewo li
Proverbs30:12 ame siwo dza le woawo ŋutɔ ƒe ŋkume
Proverbs30:13 ame siwo si ŋku gã le ɣe sia ɣi
Proverbs30:14 ame siwo ƒe aɖu le abe yi ene eye woƒe glãwo le abe hɛ ɖaɖɛwo ene
Proverbs30:15 “Vinyɔnu eve le axɔ̃ si
Proverbs30:16 woawoe nye
Proverbs30:17 “Ŋku si ɖua fewu le fofoa ŋu
Proverbs30:18 “Nu etɔ̃ li siwo wɔ nuku nam akpa
Proverbs30:19 hɔ̃ ƒe mɔ le yame
Proverbs30:20 “Esiae nye nyɔnu ahasitɔ ƒe mɔ. Eɖua nu hetutua nuto gblɔna be
Proverbs30:21 “Nu etɔ̃ tee anyigba ʋuʋuna le kpekpekpe
Proverbs30:22 woawoe nye
Proverbs30:23 ne nyɔnu si ame aɖeke melɔ̃ eƒe nya o
Proverbs30:24 “Nu ene le anyigba dzi le sue
Proverbs30:25 anyidiwo nye nuwɔwɔ si ŋu ŋusẽ sue aɖe ko le
Proverbs30:26 kpetomefiwo nye lã siwo ŋu ŋusẽ sue aɖe ko le
Proverbs30:27 Fia mele ʋetsuviwo si o
Proverbs30:28 woate ŋu alé adoglo kple asi
Proverbs30:29 “Nu etɔ̃e zɔa agozɔli eye nu enee zɔna abe fia ene:
Proverbs30:30 dzata si nye gã le lã wɔadãwo dome eye medoa megbefɔ le naneke gbɔ o;
Proverbs30:31 koklotsu
Proverbs30:32 “Ne ètsi bome hedo ɖokuiwò ɖe dzi alo ɖo nu vɔ̃ɖi aɖe la
Proverbs30:33 Elabena abe ale si ne woƒo nyinotsi wòzua bɔta eye ne wofia ŋɔti ʋu dona ene la
Proverbs31:1 Fia Lemuel ƒe nyawo
Proverbs31:2 “Oo vinye
Proverbs31:3 Mègagblẽ wò ŋusẽ ɖe nyɔnuwo ŋu kple wò lãmeka ɖe ame siwo gblẽa fiawo dome la ŋu o.
Proverbs31:4 “O Lemuel
Proverbs31:5 Ne menye nenema o la
Proverbs31:6 Tsɔ aha muame na ame siwo le tsɔtsrɔ̃m kple wain na ane siwo le nuxaxa me
Proverbs31:7 na woanoe aŋlɔ woƒe ahedada be eye womagaɖo ŋku woƒe hiãtuame dzi akpɔ o.
Proverbs31:8 “Ƒo nu ɖe ame siwo mate ŋu aƒo nu ɖe wo ɖokui nu o la nu eye nàʋli amemanɔsitɔwo ƒe ablɔɖe ta.
Proverbs31:9 Ƒo nu eye nàdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu dzɔdzɔe
Proverbs31:10 Ame ka akpɔ srɔ̃nyɔnu si ƒe agbe dze ame ŋu? Exɔ asi wu adzagba.
Proverbs31:11 Srɔ̃a kana ɖe edzi blibo eye nu sia nu si ŋu asixɔxɔ le la mevena le egbɔ o.
Proverbs31:12 Le nyɔnu sia ƒe agbemeŋkekewo katã me la
Proverbs31:13 Edia ɖetifu kple avemeka eye wòwɔa dɔ kple eƒe asiwo faa.
Proverbs31:14 Ele abe asiʋu ene eye wòhea nuɖuɖu tso didiƒe vaa aƒee.
Proverbs31:15 Efɔna ne ŋu mekpɔ ke o
Proverbs31:16 Ebua ta me le agble ŋu eye wòƒlenɛ
Proverbs31:17 Ewɔa dɔ kple ŋkubiã eye eƒe alɔwo sẽna ɖe eƒe dɔwo ŋu.
Proverbs31:18 Ekpɔa egbɔ be yeƒe asitsatsa ɖe vi geɖe eye yeƒe akaɖi metsina le zã me o.
Proverbs31:19 Ɖetifutreti le eƒe asi me eye wòtsɔa eƒe asibidɛwo léa ɖetitrekekee.
Proverbs31:20 Eʋua asi na ame dahewo eye wòdoa asi ɖe hiãtɔwo gbɔ.
Proverbs31:21 Ne snodzaɣi ɖo la
Proverbs31:22 Elɔ̃a abadzivɔ na eƒe aba eye wòdoa aklala biɖibiɖi ƒe awu kple awu blɔ.
Proverbs31:23 Wodea bubu srɔ̃a ŋu le dua ƒe agbonu ne enɔ anyigba la dzi dumegãwo dome.
Proverbs31:24 Etɔa aklala biɖibiɖi ƒe awuwo dzrana eye wòdzraa alidziblanu na asitsalawo.
Proverbs31:25 Edo ŋusẽ kple bubu abe awu ene eye ate ŋu ako ŋkeke siwo gbɔna.
Proverbs31:26 Eƒoa nu kple nunya eye nufiame anukwaretɔ le eƒe aɖe dzi.
Proverbs31:27 Ekpɔa eƒe aƒekɔ ƒe nyawo gbɔ nyuie eye meɖua kuviabolo o.

Ecclesiastes1:1 Esiawoe nye Nyagblɔla Solomo
Ecclesiastes1:2 Le nye nugɔmesese nu la
Ecclesiastes1:3 Viɖe kae ame kpɔna tso agbagba siwo katã wòdzena le ɣea te la me?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Dzidzime ɖeka nu va yina eye bubu vana
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ɣe hã dzena eye wòɖoa to; eɖea abla yia afi si wòdze tso.
Ecclesiastes1:6 Ya ƒona ɖoa ta dziehe eye wòtrɔna yia anyiehe. Etrɔna toa eme madzudzɔmadzudzɔe eye wògatrɔna yia afi si wòdze egɔme tsoe.
Ecclesiastes1:7 Tɔsisiwo katã sina yia atsiaƒu me
Ecclesiastes1:8 Nuwo katã le dagbadagba dzi eye amegbetɔ mate ŋu aƒo nu le eŋu wòade edeƒe o: nukpɔkpɔ meɖia kɔ na ŋku o abe ale si nyasese meɖia ƒo na to o ene.
Ecclesiastes1:9 Nu siwo nɔ anyi va yi la
Ecclesiastes1:10 Nane koŋ li si ŋu woate ŋu agblɔ le be
Ecclesiastes1:11 Womegaɖoa ŋku blematɔwo dzi o; nenema ke ame siwo woava dzi la
Ecclesiastes1:12 Nye
Ecclesiastes1:13 Medze agbagba be manya nu tso nu siwo katã wowɔna le ɣea te la ŋu. Medze sii be dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ aɖeke mele nu si Mawu ɖo na amegbetɔ be wòawɔ la me o.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Mekpɔ dɔ siwo katã wowɔna le ɣea te eye kpɔ ɖa

Ecclesiastes2:1 Megblɔ na ɖokuinye be
Ecclesiastes2:2 elabena megblɔ be enye movidzɔdzɔ be woanɔ nu kom ɖaa; nyui kae doa go tso eme?
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ale le tamebubu geɖe megbe la
Ecclesiastes2:4 Mewɔ nu gãwo na ɖokuinye: metu xɔwo
Ecclesiastes2:5 mewɔ abɔwo kple yaxɔƒewo
Ecclesiastes2:6 Meɖe tsitawo ale be mate ŋu aku tsi tso wo me ade ati siwo medo ɖe ave aɖe me.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Meƒle kluviwo kple kosiwo
Ecclesiastes2:8 Mena fiawo kple dutatɔwo dzɔ klosalo kple sika nam. Meɖo ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo ƒe hadzihawo
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ale mexɔ ŋkɔ wu Fia bubu ɖe sia ɖe si nɔ Yerusalem kpɔ. Gawu la
Ecclesiastes2:10 Mewɔ nu sia nu si dze ŋunye eye nyemehe ɖokuinye ɖa tso dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ aɖeke ƒomevi gbɔ o. Dɔ sesẽ wɔwɔ gɔ̃ hã do dzidzɔ nam. Le nyateƒe me la
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ke esi melé ŋku ɖe nu siwo katã mete kpɔ ŋu la
Ecclesiastes2:12 Azɔ la
Ecclesiastes2:13 Mekpɔe be viɖe le nunya ŋu wu bometsitsi abe ale si kekeli nyo wu viviti ene.
Ecclesiastes2:14 Nunyala kpɔa nu le esime bometsila zɔa viviti me. Ke mede dzesii be nu ɖeka ma ke koe dzɔna ɖe nunyala kple bometsila siaa dzi.
Ecclesiastes2:15 Eya ta megblɔ le nye dzi me be ale si bometsila aku la
Ecclesiastes2:16 elabena nunyala kple bometsila siaa le kuku ge eye woaŋlɔ wo ame eveawo be keŋkeŋ le ŋkeke siwo gbɔna la me.
Ecclesiastes2:17 Eya ta azɔ la
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nu si gate ɖe dzinyee nye magblẽ nye dagbadagbawo katã ƒe metsonu ɖi na ame bubuwo.
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ame kae anya do ŋgɔ ne vinye ŋutsu anye nunyala loo alo bometsila? Evɔa
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ale metrɔ be mana dzi naɖe le ƒonye le dɔ siwo katã mewɔ le ɣea te la ŋu
Ecclesiastes2:21 elabena ame aɖe li si tsɔ nunya kple gɔmesese kple aɖaŋu wɔ eƒe dɔe
Ecclesiastes2:22 elabena nu ka ame kpɔna tso eƒe dagbadagba kple eƒe dzi ƒe agbagbadzedze le dɔ siwo katã wòwɔna le ɣea te ŋu la me?
Ecclesiastes2:23 Kpɔ ɖa
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ale metso nya me be naneke meli si nyo na amegbetɔ wu be wòaɖu nu
Ecclesiastes2:25 elabena ame kae ate ŋu ato Mawu megbe aɖu nu alo aɖu agbe?
Ecclesiastes2:26 Elabena Mawu naa nunya

Ecclesiastes5:5 Ne èzi kpi

Ecclesiastes5:7 Gɔmesese mele drɔ̃ekuku geɖewo kple nya sɔgbɔwo me o eya ta nɔ anyi le Mawuvɔvɔ̃ me.

Ecclesiastes5:14 alo kesinɔnu si wobu to dzɔgbevɔ̃e me
Ecclesiastes5:15 Ame si ɖoa ŋu ɖe dɔwɔna sia tɔgbi ŋu la

Ecclesiastes6:2 Nya siae nye Mawu tsɔ kesinɔnu geɖe kple bubu na ame aɖewo

Ecclesiastes7:16 eya ta mègawɔ nu dzɔdzɔe akpa o eye mèganya nu tso eme akpa o. Nu ka ta nàwu ɖokuiwò?
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ke mègavɔ̃ɖi akpa loo alo nàtsi bome akpa o! Nu ka ta nàku hafi wò azã nasu?
Ecclesiastes7:18 Lé fɔ ɖe dɔdeasi ɖe sia ɖe si le ŋuwò la ŋu

Ecclesiastes7:21 Mègade xa ɖi hena nyasese o
Ecclesiastes7:22 Wò ŋutɔ ènya zi geɖe siwo nèƒoa fi dea amewoe!
Ecclesiastes7:23 Medze agbagba ɖe sia ɖe be manya nu. Megblɔ be

Ecclesiastes8:2 Mebe nàɖo to fia la
Ecclesiastes8:3 Mèganɔ kplakplakpla dzi be yeadzo le fia la ŋkume o. Mègade nya madzɔmadzɔ dzi o
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ŋusẽ gã aɖe da megbe na fia ƒe sededewo
Ecclesiastes8:5 Womehea to na ame siwo wɔa eƒe sewo dzi la o. Nunyalawo adi ɣeyiɣi kple mɔnukpɔkpɔ awɔ fia ƒe sewo dzi.
Ecclesiastes8:6 Togbɔ be ame ƒe nukpekeamewo ate ɖe edzi vevie hã la

Ecclesiastes9:1 Megalé ŋku ɖe nuwo ŋu nyuie
Ecclesiastes9:2 Nu ɖeka ma koe li na ame dzɔdzɔewo kple ame vɔ̃ɖiwo
Ecclesiastes9:3 Esiae nye nu vɔ̃ɖi si le nu sia nu si dzɔna le ɣea te la ŋu: nu ɖeka ma koe dzɔna ɖe amewo katã dzi. Gawu la
Ecclesiastes9:4 Agbagbeawo si ko mɔkpɔkpɔ le. “Enyo be ame nanye avu gbagbe wu wòanye dzata kuku.”
Ecclesiastes9:5 Elabena agbagbeawo nya nu ɖeka sia be yewole kuku ge ke kukuawo ya menya naneke o eye womeɖoa ŋku naneke dzi hã o.
Ecclesiastes9:6 Nu sia nu si wowɔ le woƒe agbenɔɣi
Ecclesiastes9:7 Eya ta ɖu nu
Ecclesiastes9:8 Do awu nyuiwo eye mègana ɖamemi navɔ le wò ta me o.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Ɖu agbe kple nyɔnu si nèlɔ̃ la
Ecclesiastes9:10 Nu sia nu si nàwɔ ko la
Ecclesiastes9:11 Megalé ŋku ɖe nuwo ŋu le xexe blibo la me eye mede dzesii be ame si ƒua du sesĩe wu ame bubu ɖe sia ɖe la meɖua dzi le duɖimekekewo katã me ɣe sia ɣi o eye ame sesẽtɔ meɖua dzi le aʋawɔwɔ me ɣe sia ɣi o. Megakpɔe be enuenu la
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ame aɖeke menyaa gbe si gbe dzɔgbevɔ̃e adzɔ ɖe ye dzi o. Edzɔna ko abe tɔmelã si woɖe le ɖɔ me alo xevi si woɖe le mɔ me ene.
Ecclesiastes9:13 Nu bubu si gawɔ dɔ tɔxɛ ɖe dzinye esi melé ŋku ɖe amegbetɔwo ƒe nyawo ŋu lae nye:
Ecclesiastes9:14 Du sue aɖe nɔ anyi; ame ʋɛ aɖewo koe nɔ eme. Fia gã aɖe va kple eƒe aʋakɔ
Ecclesiastes9:15 Nunyala aɖe si nye ŋutsu dahe aɖe la nɔ du sia me. Enya nu si wòawɔ aɖe dua. Ewɔe
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ale medze sii be togbɔ be nunya xɔ asi wu ŋusẽ hã la
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ke nunyala ƒe nya si wògblɔna dzaa la
Ecclesiastes9:18 Nunya nyo wu aʋawɔnuwo
Ecclesiastes10:1 Nudzodzoe kukuwo ana amiʋeʋĩ si ʋẽna lĩlĩlĩ la ƒe atukpa blibo ɖeka gɔ̃ hã naʋẽ kũu! Ɛ̃
Ecclesiastes10:2 Nunyala ƒe dzi nana wòwɔa nyui ke bometsila ƒe dzi nana wòwɔa nu vɔ̃.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Àte ŋu adze si bometsila le ale si wòle zɔzɔm le ablɔ dzi la me!
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ne wò amegã do dɔmedzoe ɖe ŋuwò la
Ecclesiastes10:5 Megade dzesi nu vɔ̃ɖi aɖe tso fiawo kple dziɖulawo ŋu esi melé ŋku ɖe nuwo ƒe yiyi me le xexea me ŋu.
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mekpɔe be wona ŋusẽ gã bometsilawo hetsɔ wo ɖo amewo nu eye wometsɔ bubuteƒe na kesinɔtɔwo abe ale si dze ene o.
Ecclesiastes10:7 Gawu la

Ecclesiastes10:9 Ame si gbãa kpe la

Ecclesiastes10:11 Ne da ɖu ame hafi wosa gbe de daa la
Ecclesiastes10:12 Nya si tso nunyala ƒe nu me nyea amenuvenya
Ecclesiastes10:13 Eƒe nyawo ƒe gɔmedzedze nyea numanyamanya eye eƒe nyawo ƒe nuwuwu nyea tsukuku vɔ̃ɖi.
Ecclesiastes10:14 Bometsila nyaa nu sia nu tso etsɔ si gbɔna la ŋu eye wòƒoa nu tso nu si wònya la ŋu tsitotsito! Ke ame ka tututu ate ŋu anya nu si le dzɔdzɔ ge?
Ecclesiastes10:15 Dɔ sue aɖe ko wɔwɔ nana ɖeɖi tea eŋu ale gbegbe be ŋusẽ meganɔa eŋu hena dua me yiyi o.
Ecclesiastes10:16 Babaa na dukɔ si ƒe fia nye ɖevi eye eƒe kplɔlawo mua aha ŋdi kanya gbe sia gbe.
Ecclesiastes10:17 Woayra dukɔ si ƒe fia nye bubume
Ecclesiastes10:18 Kuviawɔwɔ nana xɔ ƒe daɖedziwo nyena ɖe eme

Ecclesiastes10:20 Mègado ɖiŋu na fia la le wò susu me ke gɔ̃ hã o; mègaƒo fi de kesinɔtɔ le wò xɔ gã me ke gɔ̃ hã o

Ecclesiastes11:2 Ma wò nunanawo ɖe akpa adre alo akpa enyi me elabena ɖewohĩ wò ŋutɔ ahiã kpekpeɖeŋu geɖe le ŋkeke siwo ava la me.
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ne tsi sɔ gbɔ ɖe lilikpowo me la

Isaiah4:1 Gbe ma gbe la
Isaiah4:2 Gbe ma gbe la
Isaiah4:3 Ame siwo susɔ ɖe Zion
Isaiah4:4 Aƒetɔ la aklɔ ɖiƒoƒo ɖa le Zion nyɔnuwo ŋu. Aklɔ ʋu si kɔ ɖe Yerusalem la ɖa kple nuteƒewɔwɔ ƒe gbɔgbɔ kple dzo ƒe gbɔgbɔ.
Isaiah4:5 Ekema Yehowa ana lilikpo nado ɖe Zion to blibo la kple ame siwo katã ƒo ƒu ɖe afi ma kple dzudzɔ la dzi le ŋkeke me
Isaiah4:6 Woanye vɔvɔli na anyigba le ŋkeke me kple bebeƒe le tsidzadza kple ahomwo me.
Isaiah5:1 Azɔ mele ha dzi ge na nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ tso eƒe waingble ŋuti. Waingble aɖe le nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ si le togbɛ si nyoa nuku la dzi.
Isaiah5:2 Edzobo eme heɖe kpewo le eme
Isaiah5:3 “Azɔ
Isaiah5:4 Nu ka wòle be mawɔ na nye waingble la esi nyemewɔ nɛ o? Ekema nu ka ta mele mɔ kpɔm na waintsetse nyuiwo
Isaiah5:5 Azɔ magblɔ nu si wɔ ge mala nye waingble la na mi. Magbã kpɔ ɖa le eŋuti
Isaiah5:6 Mawɔe wòazu gbegbe
Isaiah5:7 Israel ƒe aƒee nye Yehowa
Isaiah5:8 Baba na mi ame siwo le xɔ tsiam ɖe xɔ nu
Isaiah5:9 Ale Yehowa
Isaiah5:10 Woakpɔ wain adzafi ɖeka kple afã pɛ ko le waingble agbleka ewo sɔŋ me
Isaiah5:11 Baba na mi
Isaiah5:12 Kasaŋkuwo kple saŋkuwo ɖina le miaƒe kplɔ̃ɖoƒewo
Isaiah5:13 Eya ta nye amewo ayi ɖe aboyome le nugɔmemasemase ta; dɔwuame awu woƒe ame ŋkutawo
Isaiah5:14 Eya ta nuɖuɖu le yɔdo dzrom vevie
Isaiah5:15 Ale woaɖiɖi ame ɖe anyi
Isaiah5:16 Ke woado Yehowa
Isaiah5:17 Ekema alẽwo aɖu gbe abe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe lãnyiƒee wole ene; eye alẽviwo aɖu nu le kesinɔtɔwo ƒe aƒedowo me.
Isaiah5:18 Baba na ame siwo tsɔ beble ƒe kawo de dzidada le hehem
Isaiah5:19 ame siwo gblɔna be “Mawu newɔ kaba. Nedo tsɔtsɔe eƒe dɔ be miakpɔe; Israel ƒe Kɔkɔetɔ la ƒe aɖaŋudede neva kaba ne mianyae.”
Isaiah5:20 Baba na ame siwo yɔ vɔ̃ be nyui
Isaiah5:21 Baba na ame siwo bua wo ɖokuiwo nunyalawoe
Isaiah5:22 Baba na ame siwo nye kalẽawo le wain gã nono me
Isaiah5:23 ame siwo xɔa zãnu
Isaiah5:24 Eya ta abe ale si dzo ƒe aɖe fiaa bee
Isaiah5:25 Eya ta Yehowa ƒe dziku bi ɖe eƒe amewo ŋu. Ekɔ eƒe alɔ dzi
Isaiah5:26 Ekɔ aflaga dzi na didiƒe dukɔwo
Isaiah5:27 Ɖeɖi mete wo dometɔ aɖeke ŋu alo nu nati kɔ nɛ o. Ɖeka pɛ hã medɔ akɔlɔ̃e alo dɔ alɔ̃ o. Alidziblanu metu le ɖeke ƒe ali o

Isaiah16:3 “Ɖo aɖaŋu na mí

Isaiah16:10 Dzidzɔ kple vivisese nu tso le abɔwo me

Isaiah30:27 Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah30:28 Eƒe ŋɔtimegbɔgbɔ le sisim abe tɔʋu si ɖɔ va se ɖe ve ke ene. Etsraa dukɔwo le gbegblẽ ƒe tsranui me
Isaiah30:29 Ekema miadzi ha le zã me abe ŋkekenyui aɖe ɖum miele ene. Miaƒe dziwo akpɔ dzidzɔ abe ale si wònɔna ne wole dze kum yina ɖe Yehowa ƒe to la dzi kple Israel ƒe Agakpe la gbɔ ene.
Isaiah30:30 Yehowa ana be amewo nase eƒe gãnyenye ƒe gbe
Isaiah30:31 Yehowa ƒe gbe akaka Asiria ʋayaʋaya. Atsɔ eƒe fiatikplɔ axlã ɖe wo
Isaiah30:32 Zi ale si Yehowa tsɔ eƒe toheti le Asiria ƒomii la
Isaiah30:33 Wodzra afi si woatɔ dzo Tofet le la da ɖi xoxo. Wodzrae ɖo ɖi na fia la hã. Wowɔ eƒe dzoʋe la wògoglo hekeke. Dzo kple nake bɔ ɖe eme. Yehowa ƒe Gbɔgbɔ si le sisim abe aŋɔtɔʋu ene lae atɔ dzoe.
Isaiah31:1 Baba na ame siwo ƒu du yi ɖe Egipte be woaxɔ na yewo; ame siwo ɖo dzi ɖe sɔwo ŋu
Isaiah31:2 Ke nunyala vavã eya hã nye
Isaiah31:3 Ke Egiptetɔwo la

Isaiah32:3 Ekema ame siwo kpɔa nu la ƒe ŋkuwo maganye tre o
Isaiah32:4 Ame mabutamewo ƒe susu anya nu
Isaiah32:5 Womagayɔ bometsilawo be bubumewo

Isaiah32:7 Yakamewo ƒe wɔnawo vɔ̃ɖi. Woɖoa nu vɔ̃ɖiwo be woatsrɔ̃ hiãtɔwo kple alakpa

Isaiah32:9 Mi nyɔnu siwo ɖe dzi ɖi bɔkɔɔ

Isaiah32:11 Miʋuʋu

Isaiah56:11 Wonye avu siwo ɖua nutsu; nu meɖia ƒo na wo o. Wonye alẽkplɔla siwo mesea nugɔme o. Wo katã wolé woƒe mɔ tsɔ

Isaiah57:4 Ame ka ŋue miele fewu ɖum le? Ame ka ŋu mieke nu bãa ɖo hedo aɖe ɖe gota biɖaa na? Ɖe menye aglãdzelawo kple alakpatɔwo ƒe dzidzimeviwoe mienye oa?
Isaiah57:5 Fieŋufieŋu le lãme na mi ɖe legbawo ŋu

Jeremiah2:9 Yehowa be
Jeremiah2:10 Mitso ƒu ne miava Kiprotɔwo ƒe fukpo dzi ne miakpɔ nu. Midɔ ame ɖo ɖe Kedar ne woalé ŋku ɖe nuwo ŋu nyuie. Mikpɔe ɖa be nane nɔ anyi alea kpɔ hã.
Jeremiah2:11 Ɖe dukɔ aɖe ɖɔli eƒe mawuwo kpɔa? Evɔ menye mawuwoe wonye hafi o; gake nye dukɔ tsɔ woƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ɖɔli legba maɖinuwoe.
Jeremiah2:12 O
Jeremiah2:13 “Nye dukɔ wɔ nu vɔ̃ eve. Wogbe nu le nye agbetsivudo la gbɔ eye woɖe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe tsiʋewo
Jeremiah2:14 Subɔvi alo kluvie Israel nye tso dzidzimea? Ke nu ka ta wòva zu nuhaha ɖo?
Jeremiah2:15 Dzatawo ɖe gbe
Jeremiah2:16 Memfistɔwo kple Tapanhestɔwo hã ƒlɔ dzodome na wo.
Jeremiah2:17 Ɖe menye miawo ŋutɔe he esia va mia ɖokui dzii esi miegbe Yehowa
Jeremiah2:18 Azɔ nu ka ta miebe yewoayi ɖe Egipte
Jeremiah2:19 Miaƒe vɔ̃ɖivɔ̃ɖi ahe to na mi eye miaƒe megbedede aka mo na mi. Bu eŋu nàdze si ale si wòavɔ̃ɖi na wò
Jeremiah2:20 “Tso gbe aɖe gbe ke nèŋe wò kɔkuti
Jeremiah2:21 Medo wò abe wainti nyuitɔ si tso wainka vavã siwo tsena nyuie la dometɔ ɖeka ene. Ke nu ka ta nèwɔ ɖe ŋutinye alea hezu abe wainka si mie le eɖokui si la ene?
Jeremiah2:22 Togbɔ be èle tsi kple adzalẽ eye nèle adzalẽ ʋeʋĩ geɖe hã la
Jeremiah2:23 “Nu ka ta nàgblɔ be
Jeremiah2:24 Èle abe gbetedzi si nyagbegbe nyuie hele ya ʋẽm kple eƒe ŋɔti le eƒe fieŋufieŋu me la ene. Ne asiyɔyɔ le edzrom la
Jeremiah2:25 Mègaƒu du va se ɖe esime wò afɔwo natsi ƒuƒlu
Jeremiah2:26 “Abe ale si ŋu kpea fiafitɔ ne asi su edzi ene la
Jeremiah2:27 Wogblɔna na ati be
Jeremiah2:28 Ekema afi ka gɔ̃e mawu siwo miewɔ na mia ɖokuiwo la le? Woneva ne woate ŋu aɖe mi
Jeremiah2:29 Yehowa be

Jeremiah3:1 “Ne ŋutsu aɖe gbe srɔ̃a

Jeremiah10:1 Mise nya si gblɔm Yehowa le na mi
Jeremiah10:2 Ale Yehowa gblɔe nye esi: “Migasrɔ̃ dukɔwo ƒe mɔwo o. Togbɔ be ŋɔdzi léa dukɔwo le dzesi siwo dona ɖe dziŋgɔli ŋuti hã la
Jeremiah10:3 Dukɔ siawo ƒe kɔnyinyiwo nye yaka. Wotsoa ati le ave me eye atikpala tsɔa hɛ kpanɛ kple aɖaŋu.
Jeremiah10:4 Wotsɔa klosalo kple sika fana ɖe eŋuti.
Jeremiah10:5 Wotsɔa gatagbadzɛ klãnɛ ɖe enɔƒe be magamu o. Woƒe aklamakpakpɛ siwo mate ŋu aƒo nu o la le abe xevi nyanu le adzamatregble me ene. Ele be woakɔ wo
Jeremiah10:6 O Yehowa
Jeremiah10:7 Ame kae li si agbe wò bubu
Jeremiah10:8 Wo katã wonye susumanɔsitɔwo kple numanyalawo. Aklamakpakpɛ si mele ɖeke me o lae nye woƒe nufiala.
Jeremiah10:9 Wotsɔa klosalo si woƒo gbabɛ la tsoa Tarsis eye wotsɔa sika tsoa Ufaz. Wotsɔa awu blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ dona na nu si atikpala kple sikanutula wɔ
Jeremiah10:10 Ke Yehowa koe nye nyateƒe ƒe Mawu
Jeremiah10:11 “Gblɔ nya sia na wo
Jeremiah10:12 Ke Mawue wɔ anyigba kple eƒe ŋusẽ; eyae na anyigba dzɔ to eƒe nunya me
Jeremiah10:13 Ne eɖe gbe la
Jeremiah10:14 Amegbetɔwo katã nye movitɔwo eye nunya mele tagbɔ na wo o. Sikanutula ɖe sia ɖe ƒe legbawo akpe ŋu nɛ. Eƒe legbawo nye beble elabena agbe mele wo me o.

Jeremiah20:2 ena woƒo Nyagblɔɖila Yeremia eye wodee kunyowu me
Jeremiah20:3 Esi ŋu ke eye Parsur ɖee le game la
Jeremiah20:4 elabena ale Yehowa gblɔe nye esi: ‘Mawɔ wò nàzu ŋɔdzi na ɖokuiwò kple xɔ̃wòwo katã. Wò ŋutɔ wò ŋkuwo akpɔ ale si xɔ̃wòwo atsi woƒe futɔwo ƒe yi nue. Makplɔ Yuda katã ade asi na Babilonia fia
Jeremiah20:5 Matsɔ du sia ƒe kesinɔnuwo
Jeremiah20:6 Ke wò Pasur kple ame siwo katã le wò aƒe me la
Jeremiah20:7 O Yehowa
Jeremiah20:8 Ɣe sia ɣi ne mebe maƒo nu la
Jeremiah20:9 Ke ne megblɔ be
Jeremiah20:10 Mese ame geɖewo le dalĩ dom be
Jeremiah20:11 Ke Yehowa li kplim abe aʋawɔla kalẽtɔ ene
Jeremiah20:12 O Yehowa
Jeremiah20:13 Midzi ha na Yehowa! Mitsɔ kafukafu na Yehowa! Eɖe hiãtɔwo ƒe agbe tso ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe asi me.
Jeremiah20:14 Aɖi gbe si gbe wodzim la ŋu kpekpekpe. Yayra meganɔ gbe si gbe danye dzim la dzi o!
Jeremiah20:15 Fiƒode nenɔ ame si tsɔ dzidzɔnya sia yi na fofonye be
Jeremiah20:16 Nenɔ na ŋutsu ma abe du siwo Yehowa gbã nublanuimakpɔmakpɔtɔe la ene. Nese aviɣli le ŋdi me kple aʋaɣli le ŋdɔ me
Jeremiah20:17 elabena mewum ɖe vidzidɔ me be danye nanye yɔdo nam
Jeremiah20:18 Nu ka ta medo go le vidzidɔ me be makpɔ fukpekpe kple nuxaxa eye nye ŋkekewo nawu nu le ŋukpe me?
Jeremiah21:1 Gbedeasi sia va na Yeremia tso Yehowa gbɔ esi Fia Zedekia dɔ Pasur
Jeremiah21:2 “Bia gbe Yehowa na mí elabena Babilonia fia
Jeremiah21:3 Tete Yeremia ɖo eŋu na wo be
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Ale Yehowa
Jeremiah21:5 Nye ŋutɔ matsɔ alɔ si le dzi kple alɔ sesẽ awɔ aʋa kpli mi le dziku
Jeremiah21:6 Maƒo du sia me nɔlawo aƒu anyi
Jeremiah21:7 Yehowa be le esia megbe la
Jeremiah21:8 “Gawu la
Jeremiah21:9 Ame si atsi du sia me la
Jeremiah21:10 Meɖo vɔ̃ ɖe du sia ŋuti kplikpaa
Jeremiah21:11 “Gawu la
Jeremiah21:12 O David ƒe aƒe
Jeremiah21:13 Metso ɖe ŋutiwò
Jeremiah21:14 Yehowa be
Jeremiah22:1 Ale Yehowa gblɔe nye si
Jeremiah22:2 ‘O Yuda fia
Jeremiah22:3 Ale Yehowa gblɔe nye si: Miwɔ nu dzɔdzɔe eye miwɔ nu si le eteƒe. Mixɔ ame si woda adzoe la le ŋutasẽla ƒe fego me. Migawɔ vɔ̃ alo ate amedzrowo
Jeremiah22:4 elabena ne mieɖɔ ŋu ɖo hewɔ ɖe sedede siawo dzi la
Jeremiah22:5 Ke ne mieɖo to sedede siawo o la
Jeremiah22:6 Elabena ale Yehowa gblɔ le Yuda fia ƒe fiasã la ŋue nye esi: “Togbɔ be èle nam abe Gilead kple Lebanon towo ƒe tame ene hã la
Jeremiah22:7 Maɖo nugblẽlawo ɖe ŋuwò
Jeremiah22:8 “Dukɔ geɖe me tɔwo ava to du sia ŋu ayi eye woabia wo nɔewo be
Jeremiah22:9 Ŋuɖoɖoa anye be
Jeremiah22:10 Mègafa avi na fia si ku la alo nàfa eƒe ku o
Jeremiah22:11 Ale Yehowa gblɔ le Salum
Jeremiah22:12 Aku ɖe afi si woɖe aboyoe ɖo eye magakpɔ anyigba sia akpɔ o.”
Jeremiah22:13 “Baba na ame si tu eƒe fiasã to mɔ madzɔmadzɔ dzi eye eƒe sã to amebaba me
Jeremiah22:14 Ame si gblɔ be
Jeremiah22:15 “Ɖe sedati gbogbo siwo le asiwò la wɔ wò nèzu fia? Ɖe nuɖuɖu kple nunono menɔ fofowò si oa? Fofowò wɔ nu si dze eye wòle eteƒe eya ta nu sia nu dze edzi nɛ nyuie.
Jeremiah22:16 Eʋli ame dahewo kple hiãtɔwo ta eya ta nu sia nu dze edzi nɛ ɖo. Ɖe menye esiae nye sidzedzem oa?” Yehowae gblɔe.
Jeremiah22:17 “Ke wò ŋku kple dzi ku ɖe viɖe ƒoɖi
Jeremiah22:18 Eya ta ale Yehowa gblɔ le Yosia ƒe vi
Jeremiah22:19 Woaɖii abe ale si woɖia tedzi kuku ene elabena woahee lelele le anyigba
Jeremiah22:20 “Yi ɖe Lebanon
Jeremiah22:21 Megblɔe na wò kɔtɛe esi nèsusu be yele dedinɔnɔ me
Jeremiah22:22 Yaƒoƒo akplɔ wò alẽkplɔlawo katã adzoe
Jeremiah22:23 Mi
Jeremiah22:24 Yehowa be
Jeremiah22:25 Makplɔ wò ade asi na ame siwo le wò agbe yome tim
Jeremiah22:26 Matsɔ wò kple dawò si dzi wò la aƒu gbe ɖe dukɔ bubu me
Jeremiah22:27 Miagatrɔ agbɔ ava anyigba si miedi vevie la dzi kpɔ o.”
Jeremiah22:28 Ɖe ŋutsu sia Yehoyatsin zu ze gbagbã ɖigbɔ̃ si dim ame aɖeke mele oa? Nu ka ta woatsɔ eya kple viawo aƒu gbe ɖe anyigba si womenya o la dzi?
Jeremiah22:29 O anyigba
Jeremiah22:30 Ale Yehowa gblɔe nye esi: “Miŋlɔ nu tso ŋutsu sia ŋu abe ame si si vi mele o la ene
Jeremiah23:1 Yehowa be
Jeremiah23:2 Eya ta ale Yehowa
Jeremiah23:3 “Nye ŋutɔ maƒo nye alẽ mamlɛawo nu ƒu tso anyigba siwo katã dzi menya wo ɖo ɖo la dzi
Jeremiah23:4 Matsɔ alẽkplɔla siwo akpɔ wo dzi nyuie la aɖo wo nu
Jeremiah23:5 Yehowa be
Jeremiah23:6 Le eƒe ŋkekewo me la
Jeremiah23:7 “Yehowa be eya ta ŋkekewo li gbɔna esi amewo magagblɔ be
Jeremiah23:8 Ke boŋ woagblɔ be
Jeremiah23:9 Nya siwo ku ɖe nyagblɔɖilawo ŋu: nye dzi gbã le menye eye nye lãme katã le ƒoƒom. Ɖeko mele abe ŋutsu si mu aha alo abe ŋutsu si wain wu ko na la ene
Jeremiah23:10 Anyigba la dzi yɔ fũu kple ahasiwɔlawo eye le fiƒode la ta la
Jeremiah23:11 “Nyagblɔɖilawo kple Nunɔlawo siaa nye Mawumavɔ̃lawo eye le nye gbedoxɔ me gɔ̃ hã la
Jeremiah23:12 “Eya ta woƒe mɔ dzi aɖiɖi dribadriba
Jeremiah23:13 “Mekpɔ bometsinu sia le nyagblɔɖila siwo le Samaria la dome. Wogblɔ nya ɖi le Baal ƒe ŋkɔ me eye wokplɔ nye dukɔ Israel trae.
Jeremiah23:14 Ke mekpɔ ŋunyɔnu sia hã le nyagblɔɖila siwo le Yerusalem la dome. Wole ahasi wɔm eye wole alakpa hã dam. Wodoa ŋusẽ nu baɖa wɔlawo be ne ame aɖeke nagaɖe asi le eƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ŋu o. Wo katã le nam abe Sodom ene. Yerusalem nɔlawo le abe Gomoratɔwo ene.”
Jeremiah23:15 Eya ta ale Yehowa
Jeremiah23:16 Ale Yehowa
Jeremiah23:17 Wogblɔna na ame siwo doa vlom ɖaa la be
Jeremiah23:18 Ke wo dometɔ kae nɔ Yehowa ƒe aɖaŋu me be wòakpɔ nu alo ase eƒe nya? Ame kae ɖo to hese eƒe nya?
Jeremiah23:19 Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah23:20 Yehowa ƒe dziku magbugbɔ o va se ɖe esime wòwɔ nu si wòɖo ɖe eƒe dzi me de goe. Le ŋkeke siwo gbɔna me la
Jeremiah23:21 Nyemedɔ nyagblɔɖila siawo o
Jeremiah23:22 Ke ne ɖe wonɔ nye aɖaŋudede me la
Jeremiah23:23 Yehowa be
Jeremiah23:24 Ɖe ame aɖe abe ɖe bebeƒe aɖe be nyemate ŋu akpɔe oa?” Yehowae gblɔe. “Ɖe nyemeyɔ dziƒo kple anyigba taŋtaŋ oa?” Yehowae gblɔe.
Jeremiah23:25 “Mese nu si gblɔm nyagblɔɖilawo le
Jeremiah23:26 Ɣe ka ɣie nu sia ayi edzi le aʋatsonyagbɔɖila siawo ƒe dzi me ase ɖo
Jeremiah23:27 Wobu xaa be drɔ̃e siwo wolĩna na wo nɔewo la awɔe be nye amewo aŋlɔ nye ŋkɔ be abe ale si wo fofowo ŋlɔ nye ŋkɔ be
Jeremiah23:28 Yehowa be
Jeremiah23:29 “Ɖe nye nya mele abe dzo ene kple zu si gbãa kpe sesẽ gudugudu la ene oa?” Yehowae gblɔ.
Jeremiah23:30 Eya ta ale Yehowa gblɔe nye esi: “Matso ɖe nyagblɔɖila siwo fia nya siwo wosusu be etso gbɔnye la le wo nɔewo gbɔ la ŋuti.”
Jeremiah23:31 Yehowa be
Jeremiah23:32 Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah23:33 “Ne ame siawo
Jeremiah23:34 Ke ne nyagblɔɖila alo nunɔla alo ame aɖe ko agblɔ be
Jeremiah23:35 Esiae nye nu si mia dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe nɔ gbɔgblɔm na ehavi alo eƒe ƒometɔ: ‘Aleke Yehowa ɖo eŋutie?’ Alo ‘Nya ka Yehowa gblɔ?’
Jeremiah23:36 Ke migakɔ nu le ‘Yehowa ƒe nya’ dzi azɔ o
Jeremiah23:37 Esia nye nya si mienɔ gbɔgblɔm ɖaa na nyagblɔɖila
Jeremiah23:38 Togbɔ be miegblɔ be
Jeremiah23:39 Eya ta kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah23:40 Mahe ŋukpe mavɔ kple vlododo mavɔ si womaŋlɔ be akpɔ o la va mia dzi.”

Jeremiah26:3 Ɖewohĩ woaɖo to eye wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe atrɔ tso eƒe mɔ vɔ̃ dzi. Ekema maɖe asi
Jeremiah26:4 Gblɔ na wo be: ‘Ale Yehowa gblɔe nye esi: Ne mieɖo tom hewɔ ɖe nye se siwo mede na mi la dzi o
Jeremiah26:5 eye ne mieɖo to nye dɔla nyagblɔɖila siwo meɖo ɖe mi enuenu (ame siwo miedo tokui va yi la ƒe nyawo o la)
Jeremiah26:6 ekema mawɔ gbedoxɔ sia abe Silo ene eye du sia azu fiƒodenu le anyigbadzidukɔwo katã dome.’ ”
Jeremiah26:7 Nunɔlawo
Jeremiah26:8 Kaka Yeremia nawu nya siwo katã Yehowa gblɔ nɛ be wòagblɔ nu la
Jeremiah26:9 Nu ka ta nègblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ me be gbedoxɔ sia azu abe Silo ene eye du sia azu aƒedo si me ame aɖeke maganɔ o?” Ale zi ƒo ɖe Yeremia ŋuti le Yehowa ƒe gbedoxɔ la me.
Jeremiah26:10 Esi Yuda ƒe dumegãwo se nu siawo la
Jeremiah26:11 Tete nunɔlawo kple nyagblɔɖilawo gblɔ na dumegãwo kple ameha la be
Jeremiah26:12 Tete Yeremia gblɔ na dumegãwo kple ameha la be
Jeremiah26:13 Ke azɔ la
Jeremiah26:14 Ke nye ya la
Jeremiah26:15 Gake meka ɖe edzi na mi be ne miewum la
Jeremiah26:16 Tete dumegãwo kple ameha la gblɔ na nunɔlawo kple nyagblɔɖilawo be
Jeremiah26:17 Dumegãwo dometɔ aɖewo do ɖe ŋgɔgbe hegblɔ na ameha la be

Jeremiah26:23 Woyi ɖakplɔ Uria tso Egipte vɛ na Fia Yehoyakim

Jeremiah29:3 Ame siwo xɔ agbalẽa yi na woe nye
Jeremiah29:4 Ale Yehowa

Jeremiah29:8 Ɛ̃

Jeremiah29:27 Ekema nu ka ta mèka mo na Yeremia
Jeremiah29:28 Eɖo agbalẽ sia ɖe mi le Babilonia be mianɔ afi ma wòadidi

Jeremiah30:20 Wo viwo anɔ abe le blema ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo me ene eye woƒe amehawo ali ke le ŋkunye me. Mahe to na ame siwo katã te wo ɖe to.
Jeremiah30:21 Woƒe kplɔla anye woawo ŋutɔ dometɔ ɖeka eye woƒe fia ado tso woawo ŋutɔ dome. Matee vɛ kpokploe eye wòate ɖe ŋunye nyuie. Elabena ame kae atsɔ eɖokui ana blibo be wòate ɖe ŋutinye kpokploe?

Jeremiah38:6 Ale wolé Yeremia tsɔ de Malkiya
Jeremiah38:7 Ke Kusitɔ aɖe

Jeremiah38:19 Fia Zedekia gblɔ na Yeremia be

Jeremiah49:5 Mahe ŋɔdzi va dziwò tso ame siwo ƒo xlã wò la gbɔ.” Aƒetɔ lae gblɔe. “Woanya mia dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ɖa eye ame aɖeke maƒo aʋasilawo nu ƒu o.
Jeremiah49:6 “Gake emegbe la
Jeremiah49:7 Ku ɖe Edom ŋuti: Ale Yehowa
Jeremiah49:8 Mi ame siwo le Dedan
Jeremiah49:9 Ne waintsetsegbelawo va gbe waintsetsewo na wò la
Jeremiah49:10 Gake nye la
Jeremiah49:11 Migblẽ miaƒe tsyɔ̃eviwo ɖi
Jeremiah49:12 Ale Yehowa gblɔe nye esi: “Nenye be ame siwo medze be woano kplu la o la noe la
Jeremiah49:13 Yehowa be
Jeremiah49:14 Mexɔ gbedeasi sia tso Yehowa gbɔ: Wodɔ dɔla aɖe ɖe dukɔwo gbɔ be wòagblɔ be
Jeremiah49:15 “Azɔ mawɔ wò nàzu sue le dukɔwo dome eye maɖi gbɔ̃ wò vevie.
Jeremiah49:16 Ŋɔdzi si le ŋuwò kple dada si le wò dzi me la ble wò
Jeremiah49:17 “Edom azu ŋɔdzinu
Jeremiah49:18 Anɔ abe ale si metsrɔ̃ Sodom kple Gomora kple du siwo ƒo xlã wo la ene ale be ame aɖeke manɔ afi ma o
Jeremiah49:19 “Maɖe Edom ɖe nu tso eƒe anyigba dzi zi ɖeka
Jeremiah49:20 Eya ta ɖo to nàse nu si Yehowa ɖo ɖe Edom ŋuti
Jeremiah49:21 Woƒe anyidzedze ƒe gbeɖiɖi ana anyigba naʋuʋu; eye woase woƒe aviɣli le Ƒu Dzĩ nu ke.
Jeremiah49:22 Kpɔ ɖa! Hɔ̃ aɖe ayi yame ʋĩi
Jeremiah49:23 Tso Damasko ŋuti: “Hamat kple Arpad ƒe mo tsi dãa
Jeremiah49:24 Damasko zu nu beli
Jeremiah49:25 Nu ka ta womegblẽ du xɔŋkɔ si ŋu mekpɔa dzidzɔ le la ɖi o?
Jeremiah49:26 Via ŋutsuwo aku
Jeremiah49:27 Matɔ dzo Damasko ƒe gliwo eye wòafia Ben Hadad ƒe mɔ sesẽwo.” Yehowae gblɔe.
Jeremiah49:28 Nya sia ku ɖe Kedar kple Hazor fiaɖuƒe siwo dzi Babilonia fia Nebukadnezar va dze la ŋu: Ale Yehowa gblɔe nye esi: “Tso
Jeremiah49:29 Woaxɔ woƒe avɔgbadɔwo kple woƒe lãhawo eye woaxɔ woƒe gbɔɖemeƒewo kple woƒe nunɔamesiwo kple woƒe kposɔwo. Amewo ado ɣli ɖe wo ŋu be
Jeremiah49:30 “Misi dzo kaba! Mi ame siwo le Hazor
Jeremiah49:31 “Tso nàdze dukɔ si li bɔkɔɔ kple dukɔ si si dzideƒo le la dzi. Dukɔ si nu agbo alo akɔbli ƒe mɔnuxenu mele o eye eƒe amewo le dziɖeɖi me.” Yehowae gblɔe.
Jeremiah49:32 “Woƒe kposɔwo azu nuhaha eye woƒe lãha gbogboawo azu afunyinu. Makaka ame siwo le didiƒewo
Jeremiah49:33 “Hazor azu nɔƒe na amegaxiwo eye wòazu aƒedo tegbetegbe. Ame aɖeke manɔ afi ma o; aƒe aɖeke manɔ eme o.”
Jeremiah49:34 Esia nye Yehowa ƒe nya si va na Nyagblɔɖila Yeremia ku ɖe Elam ŋuti
Jeremiah49:35 Ale Yehowa
Jeremiah49:36 Makplɔ ya eneawo tso dziƒo ƒe dzogoe eneawo dzi aƒu Elam. Makaka wo ɖe ya eneawo dzi eye dukɔ aɖeke manɔ anyi si ke me womakpɔ Elam ƒe aboyomewo le o.

Jeremiah49:38 Maɖo nye zikpui anyi ɖe Elam eye matsrɔ̃ eƒe fia kple dumegãwo.” Yehowae gblɔe.
Jeremiah49:39 “Ke hã la
Jeremiah50:1 Esia nye nya si Yehowa gblɔ to Nyagblɔɖila Yeremia dzi ku ɖe Babilonia kple Babiloniatɔwo ƒe anyigba ŋuti:
Jeremiah50:2 “Miɖe gbeƒãe eye mido kpoe le dukɔwo dome

Jeremiah50:4 Yehowa be
Jeremiah50:5 Woabia Zion ƒe mɔ ta ase eye woatrɔ woƒe mo ɖo ɖe egbɔ. Woava eye woabla nubabla mavɔ kple Yehowa
Jeremiah50:6 “Nye dukɔ le abe alẽ tatrawo ene

Jeremiah50:26 Mitso adzɔge miava ƒo ɖe edzi. Migbã eƒe nuɖuɖudzraɖoƒewo

Jeremiah50:30 Eya ta eƒe ɖekakpuiwo aku akaka ɖe mɔtatawo dzi eye ɖoɖoe azi le eƒe asrafowo nu gbe ma gbe.” Yehowae gblɔe.
Jeremiah50:31 Aƒetɔ Yehowa

Jeremiah51:1 Ale Yehowa gblɔe nye esi: “Kpɔ ɖa

Jeremiah51:28 Dzra dukɔwo ɖo ne woakpe aʋa kplii. Media fiawo

Jeremiah51:30 Babilonia ƒe kalẽtɔwo dzudzɔ aʋawɔwɔ eye wotsi woƒe mɔ sesẽwo me. Ŋusẽ vɔ le wo ŋu

Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia xɔ ƒe blaeve-vɔ-ɖekɛ esi wòzu fia eye wòɖu fia le Yerusalem ƒe wuiɖekɛ. Dadaa ŋkɔe nye Hamutal
Jeremiah52:2 Ewɔ nu vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋkume
Jeremiah52:3 Yehowa ƒe dziku tae nu siawo katã va Yerusalem kple Yuda dzi ɖo. Eye le nuwuwu la
Jeremiah52:4 Ale le Zedekia ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe asiekɛlia me
Jeremiah52:5 Woɖe to ɖe du la va se ɖe fia Zedekia ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me.
Jeremiah52:6 Le ɣleti enelia ƒe ŋkeke asiekɛlia dzi la
Jeremiah52:7 Kasia
Jeremiah52:8 gake Babilonia ƒe aʋakɔ la ti Fia Zedekia yome eye wòva tui le Yeriko tagba. Woma eya kple eƒe asrafowo dome eye asrafoawo kaka gbẽe.

Jeremiah52:10 Le Ribla la

Jeremiah52:12 Le ɣleti atɔ̃lia ƒe ŋkeke ewoa gbe
Jeremiah52:13 Etɔ dzo Yehowa ƒe gbedoxɔ
Jeremiah52:14 Babiloniatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ blibo si le aʋafia la ƒe kpɔkplɔ te la gbã Yerusalem ƒe gliwo katã keŋkeŋ.
Jeremiah52:15 Aʋafia
Jeremiah52:16 Gake Nebuzaradan gblẽ anyigba la ƒe ame dahewo ɖi be woawɔ dɔ le waingblewo kple agble bubuwo dzi.
Jeremiah52:17 Babiloniatɔwo gbã akɔblisɔti
Jeremiah52:18 Wotsɔ zɔwo
Jeremiah52:19 Fiaŋusrafowo ƒe tatɔ la tsɔ gagbawo
Jeremiah52:20 Akɔbli si woɖe le akɔblisɔti eveawo
Jeremiah52:21 Sɔti ɖe sia ɖe kɔkɔ “mita” asiekɛ
Jeremiah52:22 Wotsɔ akɔbli wɔ kukuvi ɖe sɔti ɖe sia ɖe tame
Jeremiah52:23 Yevuboɖa blaasiekɛ-vɔ-ade le axawo dzi
Jeremiah52:24 Aʋafia la ɖe aboyo nunɔlagã Seraya
Jeremiah52:25 Ekplɔ asrafo siwo gale aʋa wɔm la ƒe amegã kple fia ƒe aɖaŋuɖola adre
Jeremiah52:26 Aʋafia Nebuzaradan kplɔ wo yi na Babilonia fia le Ribla.
Jeremiah52:27 Le Ribla
Jeremiah52:28 Esia nye ame siwo Nebukadnezar kplɔ yi aboyo mee la ƒe xexlẽme: Le eƒe ƒe adrelia me
Jeremiah52:29 Le Nebukadnezar ƒe ƒe wuienyilia me
Jeremiah52:30 Le eƒe ƒe blaeve-vɔ-etɔ̃lia me
Jeremiah52:31 Le Yuda fia
Jeremiah52:32 Eƒo nu nɛ lɔlɔ̃tɔe eye wòna bubuteƒe si kɔ wu fia siwo katã li kpli le Babilonia la tɔ.
Jeremiah52:33 Ale Yehoyatsin ɖe eƒe gaxɔmewu da ɖi
Jeremiah52:34 Babilonia fia naa Yehoyatsin ƒe gbe sia gbe nuhiahiãwoe le eƒe agbemeŋkeke mamlɛawo me va se ɖe eƒe kugbe.
Lamentations1:1 “Aleke du si yɔ fũu kple amewo tsã la ɖi gbɔlo ale! Du si nye du gã le duwo dome la le azɔ abe ahosi ene! Duwo ƒe Fianyɔnu zu kluvi egbe.
Lamentations1:2 “Ele avi fam hehehe le zã me eye aɖatsi tsi alɔgo dzi nɛ. Eƒe ahiãvi gbogboawo dometɔ aɖeke meli afa akɔ nɛ o. Xɔlɔ̃ lɔlɔ̃wo katã trɔ le eyome hezu eƒe futɔwo.
Lamentations1:3 “Le teteɖeanyi kple dzizizidɔ sesẽwo megbe la
Lamentations1:4 “Zion mɔwo le konyi fam elabena ame aɖeke megazɔa wo dzi yina ɖe eƒe azãwo ɖuƒe o. Eƒe agbowo gbã
Lamentations1:5 “Eƒe futɔwo zu edziɖulawo eye eƒe ketɔwo ɖe dzi ɖi. Yehowa do hiã nɛ le eƒe nu vɔ̃ gbogboawo ta. Viawo yi ɖe aboyo me
Lamentations1:6 “Zion vinyɔnu ƒe atsyɔ̃wo katã dzo le eŋu. Eƒe dumegãwo le abe zi siwo mekpɔ gbeɖuƒe aɖeke o
Lamentations1:7 “Yerusalem ɖo ŋku eƒe kesinɔnu siwo nɔ esi le blemaŋkekewo me la dzi
Lamentations1:8 “Yerusalem ƒe nu vɔ̃wo lolo eya ta wòzu ame makɔmakɔ. Ame siwo dea bubu eŋu tsã la le vlo domi
Lamentations1:9 “Eƒe ɖiƒoƒo lé ɖe eƒe avɔto
Lamentations1:10 Futɔ la do asi ɖe eƒe kesinɔnuwo katã gbɔ; ekpɔ trɔ̃subɔdukɔwo
Lamentations1:11 Eƒe amewo katã le tsatsam le abolo dim kple ŋeŋe
Lamentations1:12 “Mi ame siwo katã to afi ma yi
Lamentations1:13 “Eɖo dzo ɖa tso dziƒo
Lamentations1:14 “Ebla nye nu vɔ̃wo abe kɔkuti ene
Lamentations1:15 “Aƒetɔ la gbe nu le kalẽtɔ siwo katã le donyeme la gbɔ
Lamentations1:16 “Esia ta mefa avi eye nye ŋkuwo fa aɖatsi blobloblo. Ame aɖeke metsɔ ɖe gbɔnye afa akɔ nam o eye ame aɖeke meli si agbɔ agbe nye luʋɔ o. Vinyewo zu hiãtɔwo elabena futɔ ƒe alɔ yi dzi.”
Lamentations1:17 Zion ke eƒe abɔwo me gake ame aɖeke meli si afa akɔ nɛ o. Yehowa gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Yakob ŋu be eƒe aƒelikawo nanye eƒe futɔwo eye Yerusalem va zu ŋunyɔnu le wo dome.
Lamentations1:18 “Yehowa le dzɔdzɔe
Lamentations1:19 “Meyɔ xɔ̃nyewo gake woflum. Nye nunɔlawo kple dumegãwo siaa tsrɔ̃ le dua me esime wonɔ tsatsam le nuɖuɖu dim be woaɖu atsi agbe.
Lamentations1:20 “O Yehowa
Lamentations1:21 “Amewo se nye ŋeŋe gake ame aɖeke meli afa akɔ nam o. Nye futɔwo katã se nye dzɔgbevɔ̃eŋkɔ eye wodzɔ dzi le nu si nèwɔ ta. Na be ŋkeke si ƒe gbeƒã nèɖe la nava be woawo hã nanɔ abe nye ene.
Lamentations1:22 “Na be woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔwo katã nava ŋkuwò me; wɔ na wo abe ale si nèwɔm le nye nu vɔ̃wo katã ta la ene. Nye hũuɖeɖe sɔ gbɔ eye nu te nye dzi ŋuti.”
Lamentations2:1 Aleke Aƒetɔ la tsɔ eƒe dzikulilikpo tsyɔ Zion vinyɔnu dzi nye esi! Etsɔ Israel ƒe atsyɔ̃ tso dziƒo xlã ɖe anyigba dzi eye meɖo ŋku eƒe afɔɖodzinu dzi le eƒe dzikudogbe o.
Lamentations2:2 Aƒetɔ la gblẽ Yakob ƒe nɔƒewo katã nublanuimakpɔmakpɔtɔe. Eye le eƒe dziku me wògbã Yuda vinyɔnu ƒe mɔ sesẽwo ƒu anyi. Egbã eƒe fiaɖuƒe kple eƒe dumegãwo ƒu anyi le vlododo me.
Lamentations2:3 Etsɔ dziku helĩhelĩ helã Israel ƒe dzo ɖe sia ɖe ɖa. Esi futɔwo gbɔna mía gbɔ la
Lamentations2:4 Ehe eƒe da me abe futɔ ene eye eƒe nuɖusibɔ le klalo. Ewu ame siwo katã nyo na eƒe ŋku abe ale si futɔ wɔnɛ ene. Etrɔ eƒe dziku kɔ ɖe Zion vinyɔnu ƒe agbadɔ dzi abe dzo ene.
Lamentations2:5 Aƒetɔ la zu futɔ eye wòtsrɔ̃ Israel. Etsrɔ̃ eƒe fiasãwo katã eye wògbã eƒe mɔ sesẽwo ƒu anyi. Edzi Yuda vinyɔnu ƒe nuxaxa kple konyifafa ɖe edzi.
Lamentations2:6 Ekaka eƒe nɔƒe abe ale si wokakaa kpɔ le abɔ ŋu ene hegblẽ eƒe takpeƒe. Yehowa na Zion ŋlɔ eƒe ŋkekenyuiwo kple Dzudzɔgbewo be eye le eƒe dziku helĩhelĩ me wòdo vlo fia la kple nunɔla siaa.
Lamentations2:7 Aƒetɔ la gbe nu le eƒe vɔsamlekpui kple eƒe kɔkɔeƒe la gbɔ. Etsɔ eƒe fiasãwo ƒe gliwo de asi na eƒe futɔwo eye wodo ɣli sesĩe le Yehowa ƒe gbedoxɔ me abe le ŋkekenyuiɖugbe ene.
Lamentations2:8 Yehowa ɖoe kplikpaa be yeagbã gli le Zion vinyɔnu ŋu. Etsɔ nudzidzeka ɖo eŋu eye mehe eƒe asi ɖe megbe o
Lamentations2:9 Eƒe agbowo ɖo do ɖe anyigba eye wòŋe eƒe gametiwo kple gakpo siwo ŋu wobla wo ɖo. Woɖe aboyo eƒe fia kple dumegãwo ɖo ɖe dukɔwo dome
Lamentations2:10 Zion vinyɔnu ƒe dumegãwo nɔ anyi ɖe anyigba le ɖoɖoezizi gã me. Wolɔ dzofi kɔ ɖe tame eye wota akpanya. Ke Yerusalem ɖetugbiwo ya de mo to.
Lamentations2:11 Avifafa na nu te nye ŋkuwo ŋu
Lamentations2:12 Wobia wo dadawo be

Lamentations3:1 Nyee nye ŋutsu si kpe fu le eƒe dziku ƒe ameƒoti te.
Lamentations3:2 Enyam ɖe nu eye wòna mezɔ viviti me
Lamentations3:3 Vavã etrɔ eƒe asiwo ɖe ŋutinye atraɖii le ŋkeke blibo la me.
Lamentations3:4 Ena be nye ŋutilã kple nye ŋutigbalẽ do xoxo eye wògbã ƒu ɖe lãme nam.
Lamentations3:5 Eva dze dzinye eye wòtsɔ veve helĩhelĩ kple fukpekpe tɔ kpɔ ɖe ŋunye.
Lamentations3:6 Ena menɔ viviti me abe ame siwo ku gbe aɖe gbe ke ene.
Lamentations3:7 Etɔ kpɔ ƒo xlãm ale be nyemate ŋu asi o
Lamentations3:8 Ne meyɔe alo do ɣli be wòaxɔ nam gɔ̃ hã la
Lamentations3:9 Etsɔ kpe gãwo xe mɔ me nam eye wòglɔ̃ nye mɔwo.
Lamentations3:10 Abe sisiblisi si de xa ɖi kple dzata si le adeklo dzi ene la
Lamentations3:11 ehem ɖa le mɔ me eye wòvuvum
Lamentations3:12 Evu eƒe da me eye wòdzidze eƒe dati ɖe dzinye.
Lamentations3:13 Etsɔ aŋutrɔwo le eƒe daku me tsɔ ŋɔ nye dzi.
Lamentations3:14 Mezu nu ɖikokoe le nye amewo katã dome
Lamentations3:15 Etsɔ ama veve ɖi ƒo nam eye wòkpe veve nam meno.
Lamentations3:16 Etsɔ kpe ŋe aɖu nam eye wòfanyam ɖe kewɔ me.
Lamentations3:17 Woxɔ ŋutifafa le asinye
Lamentations3:18 Eya ta megblɔ be
Lamentations3:19 Meɖo ŋku nye hiã
Lamentations3:20 Meɖo ŋku wo katã dzi nyuie eye nye luʋɔ bɔbɔ eɖokui le menye.
Lamentations3:21 Ke esia dzi meɖo ŋkue eye mɔkpɔkpɔ ɖo asinye:

Lamentations3:23 Wozua yeye ŋdi sia ŋdi
Lamentations3:24 Megblɔ na ɖokuinye be

Lamentations3:26 Enyo be woalala le ɖoɖoezizi me na Yehowa ƒe ɖeɖe.
Lamentations3:27 Enyo na ame be wòatsɔ kɔkuti le ɖekakpuime.
Lamentations3:28 Nenɔ anyi le ɖoɖoezizi me elabena Yehowae tsɔ kɔkuti la da ɖe edzi.
Lamentations3:29 Netsɔ eƒe mo ƒo ɖe ke me
Lamentations3:30 Neɖo to me anyi na ame si le eƒo ge eye ŋukpe neyɔe fũu.
Lamentations3:31 Elabena Aƒetɔ la metsɔa ame ƒua gbe ɖikaa o
Lamentations3:32 Togbɔ be ehea nuxaxa vɛ hã la
Lamentations3:33 Elabena mehea fukpekpe kple nuxaxa vaa amegbetɔviwo dzi ɖe dzidzɔ teƒe o.
Lamentations3:34 Woafanya anyigbadzigamenɔlawo katã kple afɔ.
Lamentations3:35 Ne woagbe nu si nye ame tɔ la tsɔtsɔ nɛ le Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la ŋkume
Lamentations3:36 eye wotrɔ gbo ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe nya; ɖe Aƒetɔ la makpɔ esiawo oa?
Lamentations3:37 Ame ka aƒo nu eye wòava eme
Lamentations3:38 Ɖe menye Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la ƒe nu mee dzɔgbevɔ̃enyawo kple dzidzɔnyawo siaa doa go tsona oa?
Lamentations3:39 Nu ka ta amegbetɔ ahe nya ne wohe to nɛ ɖe eƒe nu vɔ̃wo ta?
Lamentations3:40 Mina míalé ŋku ɖe míaƒe zɔzɔme ŋu ne míado wo akpɔ eye mina míatrɔ ɖe Yehowa ŋu.
Lamentations3:41 Mina míado míaƒe dziwo kple asiwo ɖe Mawu gbɔ le dziƒo ahagblɔ bena:
Lamentations3:42 “Míewɔ nu vɔ̃ hedze aglã eye mètsɔe ke mi o.
Lamentations3:43 “Ètsɔ dziku tsyɔ ɖokuiwò dzi eye nèti mía yome hewu mí nublanuimakpɔmakpɔtɔe.
Lamentations3:44 Ètsɔ lilikpo tsyiɔ ɖokuiwò dzi ale be
Lamentations3:45 Ètsɔ mí wɔ ŋunyɔnu kple gbeɖuɖɔe le dukɔwo dome.
Lamentations3:46 “Míaƒe futɔwo katã ke nu baa ɖe mía ŋuti.
Lamentations3:47 Ŋɔdzi lé mí; míedze ʋe me eye tsɔtsrɔ̃ kple gbegblẽ va mía dzi.”
Lamentations3:48 Nye ŋkuwo le aɖatsi fam yoyoyo elabena wotsrɔ̃ nye amewo.
Lamentations3:49 Nye ŋkuwo le aɖatsi fam ɖaa
Lamentations3:50 va se ɖe esime Yehowa aɖo ŋku anyi tso dziƒo akpɔe.
Lamentations3:51 Nu si mekpɔ la na nye luʋɔ xa nu ɖe nyɔnu siwo katã le nye dua me la ta.
Lamentations3:52 Ame siwo nye nye futɔwo madzemadzee la ɖem ɖe nu abe xevi ene.

Ezekiel16:38 Mana nyɔnu ahasitɔwo kple esiwo kɔa ʋu ɖi la ƒe tohehe nava dziwò. Mana nye dziku ƒe hlɔ̃biabia ɖe ʋu ta kple nye ŋuʋaʋã ƒe dɔmedzoe nava dziwò.
Ezekiel16:39 Ekema matsɔ wò ade asi na wò ahiãviawo
Ezekiel16:40 Woana ame aɖewo natso ɖe ŋuwò. Ame siawo aƒu kpe wò
Ezekiel16:41 Woatɔ dzo wò aƒewo
Ezekiel16:42 Ekema nye dziku ɖe ŋuwò nu abɔbɔ
Ezekiel16:43 “Esi mèɖo ŋku wò ɖetugbimeŋkekewo dzi o
Ezekiel16:44 “Ame sia ame si doa lo la
Ezekiel16:45 Vavã ènye dawò
Ezekiel16:46 Nɔviwò nyɔnu tsitsitɔe nye Samaria
Ezekiel16:47 Mienɔ agbe abe woawo ene ɖeɖe ko o
Ezekiel16:48 Aƒetɔ Yehowae gblɔ be
Ezekiel16:49 “Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel16:50 Ale wodo wo ɖokuiwo ɖe dzi
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria mewɔ nu vɔ̃ siwo nèwɔ la ƒe afã o. Èwɔ ŋukpenanuwo wu woawo
Ezekiel16:52 Eya ta de ta wò ŋukpe te
Ezekiel16:53 “ ‘Ke magaɖo Sodom kple via nyɔnu ƒe dzɔgbenyui te
Ezekiel16:54 ale be nàtsɔ wo vlodoame
Ezekiel16:55 Eye nɔviwò nyɔnuwo
Ezekiel16:56 Màyɔ nɔviwò nyɔnu Sodom ƒe ŋkɔ le wò dadaɣi
Ezekiel16:57 hafi woava klo nu le wò vɔ̃ɖivɔ̃ɖi ŋu o. Azɔ la
Ezekiel16:58 Àde ta wò ŋukpenanuwɔnawo kple wò ŋunyɔnuwo ƒe yomedzenu te.’ ” Yehowae gblɔe.
Ezekiel16:59 “Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔe nye si

Ezekiel34:19 Ɖe wòle be nye alẽha naɖu gbe si dzi mietu afɔe eye woano tsi si me miefa ba ɖo kple miaƒe afɔwoa?’

Ezekiel40:1 Le míaƒe aboyomenɔnɔ ƒe ƒe blaeve-vɔ-atɔ̃lia me
Ezekiel40:2 Le Mawu ƒe ŋutegawo me la
Ezekiel40:3 Ekplɔm yi afi ma
Ezekiel40:4 Amea gblɔ nam be
Ezekiel40:5 Mekpɔ gli aɖe si ƒo xlã gbedoxɔ la ƒe teƒe kpe ɖo. Dzidzeti si le ŋutsu la si la didi mita etɔ̃. Edzidze gli la; gli la tri dzidzeti ɖeka
Ezekiel40:6 Tete wòyi agbo si dze ŋgɔ ɣedzeƒe la gbɔ. Elia eƒe atrakpuiwo
Ezekiel40:7 Dzɔlawo ƒe nɔƒe didi dzidzeti ɖeka hekeke dzidzeti ɖeka. Gli siwo do ɖa ɖe nɔƒeawo dome la tri mita eve kple afã
Ezekiel40:8 Edzidze agbo la ƒe akpata wòkeke dzidzeti ɖeka
Ezekiel40:9 eye wòdidi mita ene. Yaxɔƒe si le agboa nu la dze ŋgɔ gbedoxɔ la.
Ezekiel40:10 Xɔvi etɔ̃ le ɣedzeƒegbo la nu ƒe akpa ɖe sia ɖe; dzidzeme ɖeka li na wo ame etɔ̃awo
Ezekiel40:11 Edzidze agbo la ƒe mɔnu wòkeke mita atɔ̃ eye wòdidi mita ade kple afã.
Ezekiel40:12 Gli si kɔ mita afã la le xɔvi ɖe sia ɖe nu
Ezekiel40:13 Emegbe la
Ezekiel40:14 Edzidze gli siwo do ɖe ŋgɔ la ŋkume ƒo xlã agbo la nu wòde mita blaetɔ̃ va se ɖe agbo la ƒe akpata gbɔ le goawo katã me.
Ezekiel40:15 Tso agboa nu yi akpata la ƒe seƒe la le mita blaeve vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezekiel40:16 Xɔviawo kple gli siwo do ɖe ŋgɔ le agbo la ƒe mɔnu la
Ezekiel40:17 Emegbe la
Ezekiel40:18 Kpenyigba le agbo la ƒe axawo dzi ɖe agbo la ƒe didime nu. Esiae nye kpenyigba si le anyigbeme lɔƒo.
Ezekiel40:19 Edzidze didime si le agbo etetɔ kple xɔxɔnu emetɔ dome. Edidi mita blaatɔ̃ le ɣedzeƒe kple anyiehe siaa.
Ezekiel40:20 Emegbe la
Ezekiel40:21 Xɔvi etɔ̃ le axa ɖe sia ɖe dzi. Eƒe domegliwo kple akpata la ƒe didime kple woƒe kekeme sɔ kple agbo gbãtɔ tɔwo. Edidi mita blaeve vɔ atɔ̃
Ezekiel40:22 Eƒe mɔnuwo
Ezekiel40:23 Agbo aɖe le xɔxɔnu egodotɔ ŋu dze ŋgɔ anyiehegbo la abe ale si ɖeka nɔ ɣedzeƒe ene. Edzidze nu tso agbo ɖeka nu yi esi le eƒe axadzi gbɔ
Ezekiel40:24 Tete wòkplɔm yi dziehe lɔƒo
Ezekiel40:25 Fesrewo nɔ agbo la kple eƒe akpata ŋu abe bubuawo ƒe fesrewo ene. Edidi mita blaeve vɔ atɔ̃
Ezekiel40:26 Atrakpui adre nɔ ete
Ezekiel40:27 Agbo aɖe le xɔxɔnu emetɔ hã ŋu
Ezekiel40:28 Emegbe la
Ezekiel40:29 Eƒe xɔviwo
Ezekiel40:30 Akpata siwo ƒo xlã xɔxɔnu emetɔ la keke mita wuieve kple afã
Ezekiel40:31 Eƒe akpata dze ŋgɔ xɔxɔnu egodotɔ; detiwo ɖo atsyɔ̃ na eƒe sɔtiwo
Ezekiel40:32 Tete wòkplɔm yi xɔxɔnu emetɔ si le ɣedzeƒe lɔƒo
Ezekiel40:33 Eƒe xɔviwo
Ezekiel40:34 Eƒe akpata dze ŋgɔ xɔxɔnu egodotɔ
Ezekiel40:35 Le esia megbe la
Ezekiel40:36 abe eƒe xɔviwo
Ezekiel40:37 Eƒe akpata dze ŋgɔ xɔxɔnu egodotɔ
Ezekiel40:38 Xɔ aɖe li si ƒe mɔnu le akpata la ŋu le agbo emetɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu
Ezekiel40:39 Le akpata si le agbo la nu me la
Ezekiel40:40 Le akpata la ƒe gli egodotɔ
Ezekiel40:41 Ale kplɔ̃ ene le agbo la ƒe akpa ɖeka
Ezekiel40:42 Kplɔ̃ ene bubu hã gali siwo wowɔ kple kpe fufuwo hena numevɔsawo; ɖe sia ɖe didi mita ɖeka
Ezekiel40:43 Woklã nu siwo woatsɔ nuwo akui
Ezekiel40:44 Le agbo egodotɔ godo
Ezekiel40:45 Egblɔ nam be
Ezekiel40:46 eye esi dze ŋgɔ anyiehe lae nye nunɔla siwo kpɔa vɔsamlekpui la dzi tɔ. Ame siawoe nye Zadok ƒe viwo
Ezekiel40:47 Edzidze xɔxɔnu la; eƒe didime sɔ kple eƒe kekeme si nye mita blaatɔ̃. Vɔsamlekpui la le gbedoxɔ la ŋgɔ.
Ezekiel40:48 Ekplɔm va gbedoxɔ la ƒe akpata me
Ezekiel40:49 Akpata la keke mita ewo
Ezekiel41:1 Tete ŋutsu la kplɔm yi gbedoxɔ la godo
Ezekiel41:2 Ʋɔtru la nu keke mita atɔ̃
Ezekiel41:3 Azɔ la
Ezekiel41:4 Edzidze gbedoxɔ emetɔ ƒe didime; esia nye mita ewo
Ezekiel41:5 Tete wòdzidze gbedoxɔ la ƒe gliwo; etri mita etɔ̃
Ezekiel41:6 Axadzixɔawo le ɖoɖo etɔ̃ me
Ezekiel41:7 Axadzixɔawo le ɖoɖo gbãtɔ me mekeke abe evelia me tɔwo ene o
Ezekiel41:8 Mekpɔ be woƒu kpo ƒo xlã gbedoxɔ la wòzu gɔmeɖokpe na axadzixɔawo. Ekeke abe dzidzeti la ƒe didime ene: mita etɔ̃.
Ezekiel41:9 Axadzixɔawo ƒe gli egodotɔ tri mita eve kple afã. Teƒe si tsi anyi le axadzixɔawo
Ezekiel41:10 kple nunɔlawo ƒe xɔwo dome la keke mita ewo ƒo xlã gbedoxɔ la.
Ezekiel41:11 Ʋɔtruwo le axadzixɔawo ŋu tso teƒe si le woawo kple nunɔlawo ƒe xɔwo dome
Ezekiel41:12 Xɔ si dze ŋgɔ gbedoxɔ la ƒe xɔxɔnu le ɣetoɖoƒe lɔƒo la keke mita blaetɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃
Ezekiel41:13 Azɔ la
Ezekiel41:14 Gbedoxɔ la ƒe xɔxɔnu le ɣedzeƒe lɔƒo kple gbedoxɔ la ŋgɔ keke mita blaatɔ̃.
Ezekiel41:15 Le esia megbe la
Ezekiel41:16 kple fesre sue kple xɔmedziƒoxɔ siwo ƒo xlã nu etɔ̃awo; wofa ʋuƒo ɖe wo kple anyigba kpakple gliawo ŋu va se ɖe fesreawo te.
Ezekiel41:17 Le teƒe si le gbedoxɔ emetɔ ƒe ʋɔtru tame kple gliawo ŋu le dometsotso mamlɛtɔ si ƒo xlã gbedoxɔ emetɔ kple egodotɔ ŋu la
Ezekiel41:18 kerubiwo kple deti siwo wokpa la li. Mo eve li na kerubi ɖe sia ɖe.
Ezekiel41:19 Ame ƒe mo dze ŋgɔ deti la le akpa ɖeka
Ezekiel41:20 Tso anyigba yi teƒe si le ʋɔtru la tame la
Ezekiel41:21 Ʋɔtruti si le dzogoe ene me la le gbedoxɔ egodotɔ ƒe mɔnu abe esi le Kɔkɔeƒe ƒe Kɔkɔeƒe la ŋgɔ ene.
Ezekiel41:22 Ativɔsamlekpui si kɔ mita ɖeka kple afã
Ezekiel41:23 Ʋɔtru gã evee nɔ gbedoxɔ egodotɔ kple Kɔkɔeƒe ƒe Kɔkɔeƒe la nu.

Ezekiel48:34 Le ɣetoɖoƒe lɔƒo
Ezekiel48:35 “Teƒe la katã ƒe didime anye mita akpe asiekɛ. “Eye du la ƒe ŋkɔ tso ɣe ma ɣi dzi yina la anye
Daniel1:1 Le Yuda fia Yehoyakim ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe etɔ̃lia me la
Daniel1:2 Aƒetɔ la tsɔ Yehoyakim
Daniel1:3 Fia la ɖe gbe na Aspenaz
Daniel1:4 ɖekakpui siwo menye nuwɔamitɔwo le go aɖeke me o
Daniel1:5 Fia la naa woƒe gbe sia gbe ƒe nuɖuɖu kple wain wo tso fia la ƒe kplɔ̃ dzi. Woahe wo ƒe etɔ̃ eye le ɣeyiɣi sia megbe la
Daniel1:6 Ame siawo dometɔ aɖewo nye Yudatɔwo. Woawoe nye Daniel
Daniel1:7 Amegã la tsɔ ŋkɔ yeye na wo: Daniel ƒe ŋkɔ yeyeae nye Beltesazar
Daniel1:8 Ke Daniel ɖo ta me be yemagblẽ kɔ ɖo na ye ɖokui kple fia la ƒe nuɖuɖu kple wain o
Daniel1:9 Azɔ la
Daniel1:10 Ke dzikpɔla la gblɔ na Daniel be
Daniel1:11 Daniel gblɔ na ameŋudzɔla si dzikpɔla la tia be wòadzɔ Daniel
Daniel1:12 “Meɖe kuku do wò dɔlawo kpɔ ŋkeke ewo. Mègana nu bubu aɖeke mí wu amagbe si míaɖu kple tsi si míano o.
Daniel1:13 Ekema nàtsɔ míaƒe dzedzeme asɔ kple ɖekakpui siwo ɖua fia la ƒe nuɖuɖu eye nàwɔ na mí ɖe nu si nàkpɔ la nu.”
Daniel1:14 Ale wòlɔ̃ eye wòdo wo kpɔ ŋkeke ewo.
Daniel1:15 Le ŋkeke ewo megbe la
Daniel1:16 Ale ameŋudzɔla la ɖe nuɖuɖu nyui si woaɖu kple wain si woano la ɖa eye wòtsɔa amagbewo na wo ɖe wo teƒe.
Daniel1:17 Mawu na nunya kple gɔmesese ɖekakpui ene siawo tso nuŋlɔɖi kple nunya ƒe alɔdze ɖe sia ɖe ŋu. Ke Daniel ya tea ŋu sea ŋutegawo kple drɔ̃e ɖe sia ɖe ƒomevi gɔme.
Daniel1:18 Le ɣeyiɣi si fia la ɖo be woakplɔ wo vɛ na ye ƒe nuwuwu la
Daniel1:19 Fia la ƒo nu kpli wo eye wòkpɔ be
Daniel1:20 Le nunya kple gɔmesese ƒe nya ɖe sia ɖe gome
Daniel1:21 Daniel nɔ afi ma va se ɖe fia Sirus ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe gbãtɔ me.
Daniel2:1 Le Nebukadnezar ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe evelia me la
Daniel2:2 Ale fia la yɔ dzotɔwo
Daniel2:3 egblɔ na wo be
Daniel2:4 Tete ɣletivimenunyalawo gblɔ nɛ le Aramgbe me be
Daniel2:5 Fia la ɖo eŋu na ɣletivimenunyalawo be
Daniel2:6 Ke ne mielĩ drɔ̃e la eye mieɖe egɔme nam la
Daniel2:7 Wogagblɔ be
Daniel2:8 Tete fia la ɖo eŋu be
Daniel2:9 Ne mielĩ drɔ̃e la nam o la
Daniel2:10 Ɣletivimenunyalawo ɖo eŋu na fia la be
Daniel2:11 Nu si fia la bia la sẽ akpa. Ame aɖeke mate ŋu aɖee afia fia la o
Daniel2:12 Nu sia do dɔmedzoe na fia la ale gbegbe be wòɖe gbe be woawu Babilonia nunyalawo katã.
Daniel2:13 Ale wòde se be woawu nunyalawo katã
Daniel2:14 Esime Ariɔk
Daniel2:15 Ebia amegã la be
Daniel2:16 Tete Daniel yi fia la gbɔ eye wòbia be wòana ɣeyiɣi ye be yeaɖe drɔ̃e la gɔme nɛ.
Daniel2:17 Daniel trɔ yi eƒe aƒe me eye woɖe nya la me na xɔlɔ̃awo: Hananiya
Daniel2:18 Edo ŋusẽ xɔlɔ̃awo be woaɖe kuku na Mawu si le dziƒo be wòakpɔ nublanui na yewo le nya ɣaɣla sia ŋu ale be womawu ye kple ye xɔlɔ̃wo kpe ɖe Babilonia nunyala bubuawo ŋu o.
Daniel2:19 Le zã me la
Daniel2:20 hegblɔ be
Daniel2:21 Eyae ɖɔa li ɣeyiɣiwo kple azãgbewo Eyae ɖoa fiawo eye wòtua fiawo. Eyae naa nunya nunyalawo Eye wònaa gɔmesese nugɔmeselawo
Daniel2:22 Eyae ɖea nu detowo kple nu ɣaɣlawo fiana Enyaa nu si ɣla ɖe viviti me Eye kekeli nɔa eŋu.
Daniel2:23 Meda akpe na wò eye mekafu wò O
Daniel2:24 Tete Daniel yi Ariɔk
Daniel2:25 Ariɔk kplɔ Daniel yi fia la gbɔ enumake
Daniel2:26 Fia la bia Daniel (ame si wogayɔna be Beltesazar la) be
Daniel2:27 Daniel ɖo eŋu be
Daniel2:28 gake Mawu aɖe le dziƒo
Daniel2:29 “Esi nèmlɔ anyi la
Daniel2:30 Le nye gome la
Daniel2:31 “Èɖo ŋku anyi
Daniel2:32 Wowɔ legba la ƒe ta kple sika nyuitɔ
Daniel2:33 wowɔ eƒe afɔwo kple gayibɔ eye wowɔ eƒe afɔwo ƒe akpa aɖewo kple gayibɔ
Daniel2:34 Esi nènɔ ŋku lém ɖe nuwo ŋu la
Daniel2:35 Tete gayibɔ la
Daniel2:36 “Drɔ̃e lae nye si. Azɔ la míaɖe egɔme na fia la.
Daniel2:37 O fia
Daniel2:38 amegbetɔwo
Daniel2:39 “Fiaɖuƒe bubu aɖe
Daniel2:40 Le nuwuwu la
Daniel2:41 Abe ale si nèkpɔe be wowɔ afɔwo kple afɔbidɛwo ƒe akpa aɖewo kple tsu kple gayibɔ ene la
Daniel2:42 Abe ale si wowɔ afɔbidɛawo ƒe akpa aɖe kple gayibɔ eye wowɔ akpa aɖe kple tsu ene la
Daniel2:43 Eye abe ale si nèkpɔ wotsaka gayibɔ kple tsu ene la
Daniel2:44 “Le fia mawo ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo me la
Daniel2:45 Esiae nye ŋutega tso agakpe si tso toa me la ƒe gɔmeɖeɖe
Daniel2:46 Tete Nebukadnezar tsyɔ mo anyi hede ta agu na Daniel eye wòɖe gbe be woasa vɔ eye woado dzudzɔ ʋeʋĩ na Daniel.
Daniel2:47 Fia la gblɔ na Daniel be
Daniel2:48 Tete fia la tsɔ Daniel da ɖe ɖoƒe kɔkɔ aɖe eye wòtsɔ nunana geɖewo nɛ. Etsɔe ɖo Babilonia nuto la katã me nu
Daniel2:49 Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la
Daniel3:1 Fia Nebukadnezar wɔ sikalegba aɖe wòkɔ afɔ blaasiekɛ
Daniel3:2 Esia megbe la
Daniel3:3 Ale amegãwo
Daniel3:4 Tete gbeƒãɖela do ɣli sesĩe gblɔ be
Daniel3:5 ne mienya se lãdzowo
Daniel3:6 Ame sia ame si mamlɔ anyi eye wòade ta agu o la
Daniel3:7 Eya ta ne amewo nya se lãdzowo
Daniel3:8 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Daniel3:9 Wogblɔ na Fia Nebukadnezar be
Daniel3:10 Ède se
Daniel3:11 eye ame sia ame si mamlɔ anyi ade ta agu o la
Daniel3:12 Ke Yudatɔ aɖewo li
Daniel3:13 Nebukadnezar do dɔmedzoe ŋutɔ eye wòɖo du ɖe Sadrak
Daniel3:14 Fia la bia wo be
Daniel3:15 Azɔ la
Daniel3:16 Sadrak
Daniel3:17 Ne woda mí ɖo ɖe kpodzoa me la
Daniel3:18 Ke ne maɖe mí o hã la
Daniel3:19 Tete Nebukadnezar do dɔmedzoe vevie ɖe Sadrak
Daniel3:20 Eɖe gbe na eƒe asrafo sesẽtɔwo le eƒe aʋakɔ me be woabla Sadrak
Daniel3:21 Ale ame siawo
Daniel3:22 Fia la ƒe gbeɖeɖe nu sẽ
Daniel3:23 Ke ame etɔ̃ siawo
Daniel3:24 Tete Fia Nebukadnezar ƒe nu ku. Etso kpla eye wòbia eƒe aɖaŋudelawo be
Daniel3:25 Fia la gblɔ be
Daniel3:26 Tete Fia Nebukadnezar te ɖe kpodzo la ƒe ʋɔtru ŋu
Daniel3:27 eye amegãwo
Daniel3:28 Tete Nebukadnezar gblɔ be
Daniel3:29 eya ta mele se dem be dukɔ sia dukɔ me tɔ alo gbe aɖe gblɔla si agblɔ nya vɔ̃ aɖe ɖe Sadrak
Daniel3:30 Tete fia la do Sadrak
Daniel4:1 Gbedeasi tso Fia Nebukadnezar
Daniel4:2 Enye dzidzɔ nam be maɖi ɖase na mi tso dzesi wɔnuku kple nukunu siwo Mawu
Daniel4:3 Eƒe dzesiwo lolo ŋutɔ
Daniel4:4 Nye
Daniel4:5 Meku drɔ̃e aɖe si na vɔvɔ̃ ɖom. Esi memlɔ nye aba dzi la
Daniel4:6 Ale meɖe gbe be woakplɔ nunyala siwo katã le Babilonia la vɛ be woaɖe drɔ̃e la gɔme nam.
Daniel4:7 Esime akunyawɔlawo
Daniel4:8 Mlɔeba la
Daniel4:9 Megblɔ be
Daniel4:10 Esiawoe nye ŋutega siwo mekpɔ esi memlɔ nye aba dzi. Mekpɔ ati aɖe le nye ŋkume le anyigba la titina. Ekɔ ŋutɔ.
Daniel4:11 Ati la tsi
Daniel4:12 Eƒe aŋugbawo nya kpɔ ŋutɔ
Daniel4:13 “Le ŋutega siwo mekpɔ esi memlɔ nye aba dzi me la
Daniel4:14 Edo ɣli kple gbe sesẽ aɖe be
Daniel4:15 Ke na eƒe takpo la kple eƒe kewo nanɔ babla kple gayibɔ kple akɔbli eye wòanɔ tome le gbe siwo le gbedzi la dome. “ ‘Na dziƒozãmu naƒoe eye nàna wòanɔ agbe kple lãwo le anyigba la ƒe nu miemiewo dome.
Daniel4:16 Na woatrɔ eƒe amegbetɔ ƒe susu wòazu gbemelã tɔ va se ɖe esime ƒe adre nava yi.
Daniel4:17 “ ‘Dɔla kɔkɔewo ɖe gbeƒã nyametsotso sia ale be ame nɔagbewo nanya be Dziƒoʋĩtɔ lae nye fia ɖe amegbetɔwo ƒe fiaɖuƒewo katã dzi eye wòtsɔa wo katã naa ame sia ame si wòlɔ̃ eye wòtsɔa ame siwo bɔbɔa wo ɖokuiwo la ɖoa wo nu.’
Daniel4:18 “Esia nye drɔ̃e si nye Fia Nebukadnezar meku. Azɔ la
Daniel4:19 Tete Daniel
Daniel4:20 Ati si nèkpɔ wòlolo
Daniel4:21 kple eƒe aŋugba dzeaniwo kple kutsetse sɔgbɔwo
Daniel4:22 wò ŋutɔ. O fia
Daniel4:23 “Wò
Daniel4:24 “O fia
Daniel4:25 Woanya wò ɖa le amewo dome eye nànɔ agbe abe lã wɔadãwo ene; àɖu gbe abe nyi ene eye dziƒozãmu adza ɖe dziwò. Ƒe adre ava yi va se ɖe esime nànyae be
Daniel4:26 Gbe si wòɖe be nàgblẽ ati la ƒe takpo kple kewo ɖe tome la gɔmee nye
Daniel4:27 Eya ta
Daniel4:28 Nu siawo katã dzɔ ɖe Fia Nebukadnezar dzi.
Daniel4:29 Le ɣleti wuieve megbe esime fia la nɔ tsa ɖim le eƒe fiasã la tame le Babilonia la
Daniel4:30 egblɔ be
Daniel4:31 Megblɔ nya siawo vɔ hafi gbe aɖe ɖi tso dziƒo o. Gbe la ɖi be
Daniel4:32 Woanya wò do goe le amewo dome eye nànɔ lã wɔadãwo dome; àɖu gbe abe nyi ene. Fe adre ava yi na wò va se ɖe esime nànyae be Dziƒoʋĩtɔ lae nye fia ɖe amegbetɔwo ƒe fiaɖuƒewo katã dzi
Daniel4:33 Enumake nu si wogblɔ ɖe Nebukadnezar ŋu la va eme. Wonyae ɖa tso amewo dome eye wòɖu gbe abe nyi ene. Zãmu dza ɖe edzi va se ɖe esime eƒe taɖa to abe hɔ̃ ƒe fuwo ene eye eƒe fewo to abe xevi ƒe fewo ene.
Daniel4:34 Le ɣeyiɣi ma ƒe nuwuwu la
Daniel4:35 Wobua anyigbadzitɔwo katã be womele ɖeke me o. Ewɔa nu si dzea eŋu kple dziƒoŋunuwo kple anyigbadzitɔwo. Ame aɖeke mate ŋu ahe eƒe asi ɖe megbe loo alo abiae be
Daniel4:36 Le ɣe ma ɣi ke esi Mawu gbugbɔ nye susu ɖo te la
Daniel4:37 Ke azɔ la
Daniel5:1 Fia Belsazar ɖo kplɔ̃ gã aɖe na eƒe ame ŋkuta akpe ɖeka eye wòno wain kpli wo.
Daniel5:2 Esime Belsazar nɔ eƒe wain nom la
Daniel5:3 Ale wotsɔ sikanu siwo wolɔ tso Mawu ƒe gbedoxɔ me le Yerusalem la vɛ eye fia la
Daniel5:4 Esi wonɔ aha la nom la
Daniel5:5 Tete amegbetɔ ƒe asibidɛ dze eye wòŋlɔ nu ɖe gli si ŋu wosi akalo ɖo la eye wòte ɖe akaɖiti si le fiasã la me ŋu. Fia la lé ŋku ɖe asibidɛ la ŋu esi wònɔ nua ŋlɔm.
Daniel5:6 Fia la ƒe mo fu kpĩi eye dzidzi ƒoe ale gbegbe be eƒe klowo de asi wo nɔewo ƒoƒo me kpakpakpa eye eƒe afɔwo gbɔdzɔ le ete.
Daniel5:7 Fia la na woyɔ eƒe bokɔwo
Daniel5:8 Tete fia la ƒe nunyalawo katã va
Daniel5:9 Ale vɔvɔ̃ gaɖo Fia Belsazar ɖe edzi wu eye eƒe mo gafu kpĩi ɖe edzi wu. Eƒe ame ŋkutawo hã tɔtɔ.
Daniel5:10 Esi fia dada se fia la kple eƒe ame ŋkutawo ƒe nuƒoƒo la
Daniel5:11 Ame aɖe le wò fiaɖuƒe la me
Daniel5:12 Wokpɔe dze sii be Daniel
Daniel5:13 Ale wokplɔ Daniel va fia la ŋkume eye fia la biae be
Daniel5:14 Mese be mawuwo ƒe gbɔgbɔ le mewò eye be gɔmesese
Daniel5:15 Wokplɔ nunyalawo kple dzosalawo va nye ŋkume be woaxlẽ nuŋɔŋlɔ la eye woaɖe egɔme nam gake womete ŋu ɖe egɔme nam o.
Daniel5:16 Azɔ la
Daniel5:17 Tete Daniel ɖo eŋu na fia la be
Daniel5:18 “O fia
Daniel5:19 Le teƒe kɔkɔ si Mawu nae ta la
Daniel5:20 Ke esi dada ge ɖe dzi me nɛ eye dada na eƒe dzi me sẽ ta la
Daniel5:21 Enyae le amegbetɔwo dome eye wotsɔ gbemelã ƒe susu nɛ. Enɔ gbetedziwo dome
Daniel5:22 “Ke wò fia
Daniel5:23 Le esiawo katã teƒe la
Daniel5:24 eya ta Mawu ɖo asi si ŋlɔ nu la ɖa.
Daniel5:25 “Nu si wòŋlɔ lae nye
Daniel5:26 “Nya siawo gɔme le ale: “ Mene: Mawu ɖo seɖoƒe na wò fiaɖuɖu eye wòna wòwu enu.
Daniel5:27 “Tekel: Woda wò le nudanu dzi
Daniel5:28 “Perez: Woma wò fiaɖuɖu me eye wotsɔe na Mediatɔwo kple Persiatɔwo.”
Daniel5:29 Le Belsazar ƒe gbeɖeɖe nu la
Daniel5:30 Le zã ma ke me la
Daniel5:31 eye Darius
Daniel6:1 Edze Darius ŋu be wòatia dumegã alafa ɖeka blaeve be woaɖu dzi le dukɔa me
Daniel6:2 eye wòtsɔ amegã etɔ̃ ɖo wo nu. Ame siawo dometɔ ɖekae nye Daniel. Dziɖulawo ana akɔnta amegãwo ale be fia la mabu naneke o.
Daniel6:3 Azɔ la
Daniel6:4 Esia ta amegãwo kple dziɖulawo di mɔnuwo be woatsɔ nya ɖe eŋu le eƒe dzikpɔdɔwo wɔwɔ me gake womete ŋui o. Womete ŋu kpɔ nu gbegblẽ aɖeke le eŋu o
Daniel6:5 Mlɔeba la
Daniel6:6 Ale amegãwo kple dziɖulawo ƒo ƒu yi fia la gbɔ eye wogblɔ nɛ be
Daniel6:7 Dɔdzikpɔlawo
Daniel6:8 Azɔ la
Daniel6:9 Ale Fia Darius na woŋlɔ se la.
Daniel6:10 Esi Daniel se be woŋlɔ se la kaka la
Daniel6:11 Tete ame siawo yi le ha me ɖakpɔ Daniel wònɔ gbe dom ɖa henɔ kpekpeɖeŋu biam Mawu.
Daniel6:12 Ale woyi fia la gbɔ eye woƒo nu nɛ tso se si wòde la ŋuti. Wobiae be
Daniel6:13 Tete wogblɔ na fia la be
Daniel6:14 Esi fia la se nya sia la
Daniel6:15 Tete ameawo yi fia la gbɔ le ha me eye wogblɔ nɛ be
Daniel6:16 Ale fia la ɖe gbe
Daniel6:17 Wokɔ kpe aɖe da ɖe doa nu eye fia la tsɔ eya ŋutɔ ƒe ŋkɔsigɛ kple eƒe ame ŋkutawo ƒe ŋkɔsigɛwo tre do la nu ale be womagatrɔ nya si dzɔ ɖe Daniel dzi la o.
Daniel6:18 Tete fia la trɔ yi eƒe fiasã me. Meɖu nu fiẽ ma o eye womewɔ dzidzɔdonamenu aɖeke hã nɛ o. Mete ŋu dɔ alɔ̃ o.
Daniel6:19 Le ŋdi kanya esi dzite tso ko la
Daniel6:20 Esi wòte ɖe do la ŋu la
Daniel6:21 Daniel ɖo eŋu be
Daniel6:22 Nye Mawu ɖo eƒe dɔla aɖe ɖa eye wòde ga nu na dzataawo. Womewɔ nuvevi aɖekem o elabena nyemeɖi fɔ aɖeke le Mawu ŋkume o eye nenema ke nyemewɔ nu vɔ̃ aɖeke kpɔ le wò ŋkume o
Daniel6:23 Tete fia la kpɔ dzidzɔ ŋutɔ eye wòɖe gbe be woaɖe Daniel le do la me. Esi woɖe Daniel le do la me la
Daniel6:24 Le fia la ƒe gbeɖeɖe nu la
Daniel6:25 Tete Fia Darius ŋlɔ agbalẽ na eƒe amewo katã
Daniel6:26 Nyee de se be le nye fiaɖuƒea me la
Daniel6:27 Eɖea ame eye wòxɔna na ame. Le dziƒowo kple anyigba dzi siaa. Eɖe Daniel tso dzatawo ƒe asi me.”
Daniel6:28 Ale eme nyo na Daniel le Darius ƒe fiaɖuɣi kple Persiatɔ
Daniel7:1 Le Belsazar
Daniel7:2 Daniel gblɔ be
Daniel7:3 Lã gã ene siwo to vovo tso wo nɔewo gbɔ la do go tso atsiaƒu la me.
Daniel7:4 “Gbãtɔ le abe dzata ene eye wòto hɔ̃ ƒe aʋala. Melé ŋku ɖe eŋu va se ɖe esime wotu aʋala la ɖa le eŋu
Daniel7:5 “Lã evelia si ɖi sisiblisi la nɔ tsitre ɖe nye ŋkume. Wofɔ eƒe akpa ɖeka ɖe dzi eye agbaƒuti etɔ̃ nɔ eƒe nu me le eƒe aɖuwo dome. Wogblɔ nɛ be
Daniel7:6 “Le esia megbe la
Daniel7:7 “Le esia hã megbe la
Daniel7:8 “Esi menɔ dzoawo ŋu bum la
Daniel7:9 “Esi menɔ ŋku lém ɖe eŋu la
Daniel7:10 Dzotɔsisi aɖe nɔ sisim le eŋgɔ. Ame akpe akpewo nɔ esubɔm
Daniel7:11 “Meyi ŋkuléle ɖe nuwo ŋu dzi le adegbeƒonya siwo lãdzo la nɔ gbɔgblɔm la ta. Meyi nukpɔkpɔ dzi va se ɖe esime wowu lã la eye wotsɔ eƒe ŋutilã kukua ƒu gbe ɖe dzo bibi la me.
Daniel7:12 Woxɔ ŋusẽ le lã bubuawo si gake wona be woanɔ agbe hena ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ko.
Daniel7:13 “Le nye ŋutega me le zã me la
Daniel7:14 Wotsɔ ŋusẽ
Daniel7:15 “Nye
Daniel7:16 Mete ɖe ame siwo nɔ tsitre ɖe afi ma la dometɔ ɖeka ŋu eye mebia nu siawo katã ƒe gɔmeɖeɖe nyuitɔ tso egbɔ. “Ale wògblɔe nam eye wòna nu siawo katã ƒe gɔmeɖeɖem.
Daniel7:17 ‘Lã gã eneawoe nye fiaɖuƒe ene siwo ava dzɔ tso anyigba dzi.
Daniel7:18 Ke Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la ƒe ame kɔkɔewo axɔ fiaɖuƒe la eye wòanye wo tɔ tegbee
Daniel7:19 “Tete medi be manya lã enelia ƒe gɔmeɖeɖe tututu. Lã sia to vovo sãa tso bubuawo gbɔ eye ŋɔdzi nɔ eŋu ŋutɔ kple eƒe gaɖuwo kple akɔblifewo. Enye lã si vuvua nu
Daniel7:20 Medi hã be manya nu tso eƒe dzo ewo siwo nɔ eƒe ta kple dzo bubu si wòto
Daniel7:21 Esi melé ŋku ɖe eŋu la
Daniel7:22 Va se ɖe esime Blema Mawu la va eye wòtso afia na Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la ƒe ame kɔkɔeawo eye ɣeyiɣia de be fiaɖuƒe la nazu wo tɔ.
Daniel7:23 “Ena gɔmeɖeɖe siam. ‘Lã eneliae nye fiaɖuƒe enelia si ado ɖe anyigba dzi. Ato vovo tso fiaɖuƒe bubuawo katã gbɔ
Daniel7:24 Dzo ewoawo nye fia ewo siwo ado tso fiaɖuƒe sia me. Le woawo yome la
Daniel7:25 Aƒo nu atsi tsitre ɖe Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la ŋu
Daniel7:26 “ ‘Ke ʋɔnu la aɖi anyi
Daniel7:27 Ekema woatsɔ dziɖuɖu
Daniel7:28 “Esiae nye nya la ƒe nuwuwu. Nye
Daniel8:1 Le fia Belsazar ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe etɔ̃lia me la
Daniel8:2 Le nye ŋutega la me la
Daniel8:3 Mefɔ kɔ dzi
Daniel8:4 Menɔ ŋku lém ɖe agboa ŋu esi wònɔ dzo dam ɖo ta ɣetoɖoƒe kple anyiehe kple dziehe. Lã aɖeke mete ŋu nɔ te ɖe enu o eye ɖeke mete ŋu xɔ nu léle le esi o. Ewɔ nu si dze eŋu eye wòkpɔ ŋusẽ ŋutɔ.
Daniel8:5 Esi menɔ nu sia ŋu bum la
Daniel8:6 Eva agbo si to dzo eve si mekpɔ le tɔsisi la to la gbɔ eye wòlũ ɖe edzi kple dɔmedzoe helĩhelĩ.
Daniel8:7 Mekpɔe wòlũ ɖe agbo la dzi dɔmedzoetɔe
Daniel8:8 Gbɔ̃tsu la va xɔ ŋkɔ ale gbegbe gake le eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe kɔkɔƒe la
Daniel8:9 Dzo bubu to tso dzoawo dometɔ ɖeka me. Dzo sia nɔ sue gake eva tsi le ŋusẽ me yi ɖe dziehe godo
Daniel8:10 Etsi va se ɖe esime wòtɔ dziƒo ŋu
Daniel8:11 Edo eɖokui ɖe dzi ɖe aʋakɔwo ƒe Fia la ŋu eye wòxɔ gbe sia gbe ƒe vɔsalã le esi hegbã eƒe nɔƒe kɔkɔe la.
Daniel8:12 Le aglãdzedze ta la
Daniel8:13 Tete mese ame kɔkɔe aɖe wònɔ nu ƒom eye ame kɔkɔe bubu gblɔ nɛ be “Va se ɖe ɣe ka ɣi hafi ŋutega sia nava eme
Daniel8:14 Egblɔ nam be
Daniel8:15 Esime nye
Daniel8:16 eye mese ame aɖe ƒe gbe tso Ulai tɔsisi la gbɔ wògblɔ be
Daniel8:17 Esi wògogo afi si metsi tsitre ɖo la
Daniel8:18 Esime wònɔ nu ƒom nam la
Daniel8:19 Egblɔ nam be
Daniel8:20 Agbo dzoevee si nèkpɔ la nye Media fia kple Persia fia.
Daniel8:21 Gbɔ̃tsu la nye Grik fia eye dzo titri si nɔ eƒe ŋkuwo dome lae nye fia gbãtɔ.
Daniel8:22 Dzo ene siwo to ɖe ɖeka si woŋe teƒe lae nye fiaɖuƒe ene siwo ado tso eƒe dukɔ me gake ŋusẽ ma tɔgbi ke manɔ wo ŋu o.
Daniel8:23 “Le woƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo esime aglãdzelawo ƒe aglãdzedze ado gã ɖe edzi la
Daniel8:24 Azu ame sesẽ aɖe ŋutɔ gake menye to eya ŋutɔ ƒe ŋusẽ me o. Agblẽ nuwo nyamanyama eye wòakpɔ dzidzedze le nu sia nu si wòawɔ la me. Atsrɔ̃ ŋutsuwo kple ame kɔkɔewo.
Daniel8:25 Ana beble nakpɔ dzidzedze eye wòabu eɖokui gã wu ale si wòle. Ne amewo bu be yewole dedie la
Daniel8:26 “Ŋutega si wona nèkpɔ tso fiẽ kple ŋdi ŋu la nye nyateƒe gake dzra ŋutega la ɖo ɖe wò dzi me elabena eku ɖe ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe si gbɔna la ŋu.”
Daniel8:27 Ɖeɖi te nye
Daniel9:1 Le Ahasuerus (Mediatɔ ƒe vi)
Daniel9:2 nye Daniel
Daniel9:3 Ale metrɔ ɖe Yehowa
Daniel9:4 Medo gbe ɖa na Yehowa
Daniel9:5 míewɔ nu vɔ̃ eye míeda vo. Míesẽ ŋuta eye míedze aglã. Míeɖe asi le wò ɖoɖowo kple sewo ŋuti.
Daniel9:6 Míeɖo to wò dɔla nyagblɔɖilawo
Daniel9:7 “Aƒetɔ
Daniel9:8 O Yehowa
Daniel9:9 Aƒetɔ
Daniel9:10 Míeɖo to Yehowa
Daniel9:11 Israel blibo la da le wò sewo dzi
Daniel9:12 Èwɔ nya siwo wogblɔ ɖe míawo kple míaƒe dziɖulawo ŋu la dzi
Daniel9:13 Abe ale si woŋlɔ ɖe Mose ƒe sewo me ene la
Daniel9:14 Yehowa mehe ɖe megbe le dzɔgbevɔ̃e la hehe va mía dzi me o elabena Yehowa
Daniel9:15 “Azɔ la
Daniel9:16 O Aƒetɔ
Daniel9:17 “Azɔ
Daniel9:18 Ɖo to

Daniel9:21 eye meganɔ gbe dom ɖa ko la
Daniel9:22 Efia num
Daniel9:23 Esime nèdze gbedodoɖa gɔme teti ko la
Daniel9:24 “Woɖo Kɔsiɖa blaadre na wò amewo kple wò du kɔkɔe la be miawu sedzidada nu

Daniel9:26 Le kɔsiɖa blaade-vɔ-eveawo megbe la

Daniel10:1 Le Sirus
Daniel10:2 Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Daniel10:3 Nyemeɖu nu nyui aɖeke o
Daniel10:4 Le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke blaeve-vɔ-enelia dzi
Daniel10:5 mefɔ kɔ dzi eye ŋutsu aɖe si do aklala biɖibiɖi ƒe awu eye sika nyuitɔ si tso Ufaz ƒe alidziblanu le ali dzi nɛ la nɔ nye ŋkume.
Daniel10:6 Eƒe ŋutilã nɔ abe adzagba ene
Daniel10:7 Nye
Daniel10:8 Ale nye ɖeka metsi anyi henɔ ŋutega la kpɔm. Ŋusẽ vɔ le ŋunye
Daniel10:9 Tete mesee wònɔ nu ƒom eye esi menɔ to ɖom la
Daniel10:10 Asi aɖe ka ŋunye eye wòna mede asi dzodzo me nyanyanya le nye asiwo kple klowo dzi.

Daniel10:12 Eyi edzi gblɔ be

Daniel10:16 Kasia

Daniel11:1 Le Midiatɔ
Daniel11:2 “Azɔ la
Daniel11:3 Emegbe fia sesẽ aɖe ava zi dzi
Daniel11:4 Ne eva zi dzi teti ko la
Daniel11:5 “Dziehefia akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe edzi gake eƒe aʋafiawo dometɔ ɖeka akpɔ ŋusẽ wui gɔ̃ hã eye wòaɖu fia ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe fiaɖuƒe dzi kple ŋusẽ triakɔ.
Daniel11:6 Le ƒe aɖewo megbe la
Daniel11:7 “Ke ame ado tso eƒe ƒome me axɔ ɖe eteƒe. Aho aʋa ɖe Anyiehefia ƒe aʋakɔwo ŋu eye wòage ɖe eƒe mɔ sesẽ la me awɔ aʋa kpli wo eye wòaɖu wo dzi.
Daniel11:8 Axɔ woƒe mawuwo le wo si
Daniel11:9 Emegbe la
Daniel11:10 Viawo abla akpa na aʋawɔwɔ
Daniel11:11 “Tete Dziehefia atsɔ dziku helĩhelĩ awɔ aʋa kple Anyiehefia
Daniel11:12 Dziehefia ayɔ fũu kple dada nenye be woɖe aboyo Anyiehefia ƒe aʋakɔwo eye woawu ame akpewo gake maɖu dzi ɖaa o
Daniel11:13 elabena Anyiehefia agbugbɔ aƒo aʋakɔ gã bubu nu ƒu si alolo wu gbãtɔ eye le ƒe geɖe megbe la
Daniel11:14 “Le ŋkeke mawo me la
Daniel11:15 Ekema Anyiehefia ava ƒu kpo ɖe du la ŋu eye wòaxɔ du si woɖo gli sesẽ ƒo xlãe. Ŋusẽ manɔ Dzieheʋakɔwo ŋu be woaʋli o
Daniel11:16 Anyigbemeʋakɔwo awɔ nu si adze wo ŋu
Daniel11:17 Adze agbagba be yeatsɔ yeƒe fiaɖuƒe la ƒe aʋakɔ la katã vɛ ahanyi dzo kple Dziehefia eye wòatsɔ via nyɔnu nɛ wòaɖe ale be wòate ŋu amu fiaɖuƒe la aƒu anyi gake eƒe tameɖoɖo sia madze edzi nɛ loo alo akpe ɖe eŋu o.
Daniel11:18 Emegbe la
Daniel11:19 Esia megbe la
Daniel11:20 “Ame si axɔ ɖe eteƒe la ana dugadzɔlawo natsa adzɔ ga be woalé fiaɖuƒe la ƒe atsyɔ̃ ɖe te. Ke le ƒe ʋɛ aɖewo megbe la
Daniel11:21 “Ame ɖigbɔ̃ aɖe ava ɖu fia ɖe eteƒe
Daniel11:22 Akplɔ aʋakɔ gã si gbagbã ɖe anyi la adzoe eye wòatsrɔ̃ aʋakɔ la kple nubabla la ƒe amegã siaa.
Daniel11:23 Ne wonyi dzo kplii vɔ la
Daniel11:24 Ekema ne nuto si si nunɔamesiwo le fũu la kpɔ be wole dedie la
Daniel11:25 “Atsɔ aʋakɔ gã aɖe ade dzo eƒe ŋusẽ kple dzideƒo me ɖe Dziehefia ŋu. Dziehefia la akpe aʋa kplii kple aʋakɔ gã sesẽ dranyi aɖe gake mate ŋu anɔ te ɖe enu o
Daniel11:26 Ame siwo ɖua nu le fia ƒe aƒe me la adze agbagba be yewoawui
Daniel11:27 Fia eveawo
Daniel11:28 Anyiehefia atrɔ ayi eƒe anyigba dzi kple kesinɔnu geɖewo gake eƒe dzi atsi tsitre ɖe nubabla kɔkɔe la ŋu
Daniel11:29 “Ne ɣeyiɣi si woɖo
Daniel11:30 elabena
Daniel11:31 “Eƒe asrafowo atsi tsitre ava gblẽ kɔ ɖo na gbedoxɔ la ƒe mɔ sesẽ la eye woaɖe gbe sia gbe vɔsawo ɖa. Emegbe woaɖo ŋunyɔnu si he gbegblẽ vɛ la anyi
Daniel11:32 eye woatsɔ amenublenyawo agblẽ ame siwo da le nubabla la dzi
Daniel11:33 “Nunyalawo afia nu ame geɖewo
Daniel11:34 Ne wodze anyi la
Daniel11:35 Nunyalawo dometɔ aɖewo akli nu
Daniel11:36 “Fia la awɔ nu si adze eŋu. Ado eɖokui ɖe dzi eye wòawɔ eɖokui gãe wu mawu ɖe sia ɖe ale be wòagblɔ nya masekpɔwo ɖe mawuwo dzi Mawu la ŋuti. Nuwo adze edzi nɛ va se ɖe dziku ɣeyiɣiawo ƒe nuwuwu elabena ele be woawu nu si woɖo ɖi la nu.
Daniel11:37 Made bubu aɖeke fofoawo ƒe mawuwo
Daniel11:38 Le woawo teƒe la
Daniel11:39 Ava dze mɔ sesẽtɔwo kekeakewo dzi to dzromawu aɖe ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu me eye wòade bubu gã aɖe ame siwo xɔe la ŋuti. Atsɔ wo aɖo amegãwoe ɖe ame geɖewo nu eye wòama anyigba la na wo woaxe fe ɖe eta.
Daniel11:40 “Ne eƒe nuwuwu ɖo vɔ la
Daniel11:41 Ava dze Anyigba Nyui la hã dzi. Dukɔ geɖewo atsrɔ̃ gake woaɖe Edom kple Moab kple Amon ƒe dumegãwo tso eƒe asi me.
Daniel11:42 Eƒe ŋusẽ akeke ɖe dukɔ geɖewo dzi. Egiptenyigba hã mato le eme o.
Daniel11:43 Akeke ɖe Egipte ƒe sika
Daniel11:44 gake nyadzɔdzɔ siwo atso ɣedzeƒe kple anyiehe wòase la ado ŋɔdzi gã aɖe nɛ ale be wòaho kple dziku helĩhelĩ be wòagblẽ wo eye wòatsrɔ̃ geɖewo.
Daniel11:45 Atu eƒe fiagbadɔ ɖe atsiaƒu kple to kɔkɔe nyui la dome. Ke hã la
Daniel12:1 “Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Daniel12:2 Ame gbogbo siwo le alɔ̃ dɔm le anyigba ƒe tume la anyɔ
Daniel12:3 Nunyalawo aklẽ abe dziƒoŋunuwo ene eye ame siwo fiaa dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe mɔ ame geɖewo la hã aklẽ abe ɣletiviwo ene tegbetegbe.
Daniel12:4 Ke wò
Daniel12:5 Tete nye
Daniel12:6 Wo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ na ame si do aklala biɖibiɖi ƒe awu eye wòle tsitre ɖe tɔsisi la tame be
Daniel12:7 Ŋutsu si do aklala biɖibiɖi ƒe awu eye wòle tsitre ɖe tɔsisi la tame la
Daniel12:8 Mesee gake nyemese egɔme o. Ale mebiae be
Daniel12:9 Eɖo eŋu nam be
Daniel12:10 Woakɔ ame geɖewo ŋu
Daniel12:11 “Tso esime wotsi gbe sia gbe ƒe vɔsawo nu
Daniel12:12 Woayra ame si do dzi
Daniel12:13 “Ke wò la

Hosea7:1 Ne medi be mada gbe le Israel ŋu la
Hosea7:2 Dua me tɔwo hã mede dzesii be nye ŋku le woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖiwo wɔwɔ dzi o. Woƒe nu vɔ̃ ɖe to ɖe wo godoo va kpe
Hosea7:3 “Wotsɔa woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ doa nukokoe na fia la

Hosea7:5 Le miaƒe fia ƒe ŋkekenyui dzi la
Hosea7:6 Woƒe dziwo bina abe kpodzo ene
Hosea7:7 Wo katã woxɔ dzo abe kpodzo ene

Hosea7:9 Du bubu me tɔwo xɔ ŋusẽ le esi
