Matthew24:6 Ne miese be aʋa dzɔ le afi aɖe
Matthew24:7 Le ɣeyiɣi mawo me la
Matthew24:8 Ke esiawo katã anye nu siwo do ŋgɔ na fukpekpe gã siwo le vava ge la ko.
Matthew24:9 “Le ɣeyiɣi mawo me la
Matthew24:10 Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Matthew24:11 Aʋatsonyagblɔɖilawo abɔ fũu
Matthew24:12 Nu vɔ̃ wɔwɔ axɔ aƒe ale gbegbe be
Matthew24:13 Ke ame si anɔ te ase ɖe nuwuwu la
Matthew24:14 Azɔ la
Matthew24:15 “Eya ta ne miekpɔ ‘ŋunyɔnu si hea gbegblẽ vɛ la’ le tsitre ɖe Kɔkɔeƒe la
Matthew24:16 ekema ame siwo le Yudea la nasi ayi towo dzi.
Matthew24:17 Ame si le eƒe xɔ ta la megaɖi va anyigba alo age ɖe eƒe xɔ me be yeatsɔ naneke le eme o.
Matthew24:18 Ame si le agble me la megatrɔ va tsɔ eƒe awu o.
Matthew24:19 “Baba na funɔwo kple ame siwo si vidzĩwo le le ŋkeke mawo me.
Matthew24:20 Mido gbe ɖa be miaƒe sisigbe megadze vuvɔŋɔli alo Dzudzɔgbe ŋkeke dzi o.
Matthew24:21 Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Matthew24:22 “Le nyateƒe me la
Matthew24:23 Nenye be ame aɖe agblɔ na mi be
Matthew24:24 elabena aʋatsokristotɔwo kple aʋatsonyagblɔɖilawo ava do
Matthew24:25 Kpɔ ɖa
Matthew24:26 “Eya ta ne ame aɖe gblɔ na mi be
Matthew24:27 Abe ale si dzi kea dzo le ɣedzeƒe wokpɔnɛ le ɣetoɖoƒe ene la
Matthew24:28 Minyae be afi si nu kuku le la
Matthew24:29 “Le xaxaŋkeke mawo megbe teti ko la
Matthew24:30 “Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Matthew24:31 eye wòadɔ eƒe dɔlawo kple kpẽ ƒe ɖiɖi sesĩe
Matthew24:32 “Azɔ misrɔ̃ nu tso gboti la ŋuti. Nenye be tsi ɖo eƒe alɔwo me
Matthew24:33 Nenema ke ne miekpɔ be nu siawo katã de asi dzɔdzɔ me la
Matthew24:34 Vavã mele egblɔm na mi be dzidzime sia nu mava yi o
Matthew24:35 “Dziƒo kple anyigba nu ava yi
Matthew24:36 Ke hã la
Matthew24:37 “Abe ale si wòdzɔ le Noa ŋɔli ene la
Matthew24:38 Elabena le ŋkeke siwo do ŋgɔ na tsiɖɔɖɔ me la
Matthew24:39 eye womenya nu si gbɔna dzɔdzɔ ge o va se ɖe esime tsiɖɔɖɔ la va
Matthew24:40 “Ame eve anɔ agble me anɔ dɔ wɔm
Matthew24:41 Nyɔnu eve anɔ bli tum le te dzi
Matthew24:42 “Eya ta minɔ ŋudzɔ
Matthew24:43 “Ne ame aɖe medi be fiafitɔ neva fi yeƒe nuwo le zã me o la
Matthew24:44 Eya ta minɔ ŋudzɔ ɣeawo katã ɣi elabena
Matthew24:45 “Azɔ minye dɔla nuteƒewɔla kple nunyala
Matthew24:46 Nenye be metrɔ gbɔ va kpɔ nye subɔlawo miele miaƒe dɔdeasi siawo wɔm anukwaretɔe la
Matthew24:47 Le nyateƒe me la
Matthew24:48 “Gake ne miewɔ abe dɔla vɔ̃ɖiwo ene hegblɔ na mia ɖokuiwo be
Matthew24:49 ale be miede asi dɔla bubuawo ƒoƒo me hele nutsuɖuɖu kple ahamumu dzi la
Matthew24:50 miaƒe aƒetɔ ava le ŋkeke si miele mɔ kpɔm nɛ o kple gaƒoƒo si mienya o la dzi
Matthew24:51 eye wòaƒo mi vevie. Emegbe la
Matthew25:1 Míatsɔ ɖetugbi ewo aɖewo ƒe ŋutinya asɔ kple dziƒofiaɖuƒe la. Ɖetugbi ewo siawo tsɔ woƒe akaɖiwo ɖe asi be yewoayi aɖakpe ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ aɖe.
Matthew25:2 Wo dometɔ atɔ̃ nye abunɛtɔwo
Matthew25:3 Abunɛtɔwo tsɔ woƒe akaɖiwo
Matthew25:4 Ke nunyalawo ya tsɔ ami ɖe woƒe goewo me kpe ɖe woƒe akaɖiawo ŋuti.
Matthew25:5 Eva dzɔ be ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ la tsi megbe
Matthew25:6 “Ke le zãtitina la
Matthew25:7 “Ɖetugbiawo katã fɔ
Matthew25:8 Tete abunɛtɔawo gblɔ na nunyalawo be
Matthew25:9 “Gake woɖo eŋu na abunɛtɔawo be
Matthew25:10 “Kaka woaɖe afɔ la
Matthew25:11 “Emegbe la
Matthew25:12 “Aƒetɔ la ɖo eŋu na wo be
Matthew25:13 “Eya ta minɔ ŋudzɔ
Matthew25:14 “Dziƒofiaɖuƒe la gasɔ kple Aƒetɔ aɖe si ɖo be yeawɔ mɔzɔzɔ ayi anyigba bubu aɖe dzi la. Hafi wòadzo la
Matthew25:15 “Etsɔ sidi akpe atɔ̃ na ame gbãtɔ
Matthew25:16 Ame si xɔ sidi akpe atɔ̃ la de asi asitsatsa me kplii enumake
Matthew25:17 Ame si xɔ sidi akpe eve hã tsa asi kple etɔ
Matthew25:18 “Ke ame si xɔ sidi akpe ɖeka la ya yi ɖaɖe do ɖe anyigba
Matthew25:19 “Aƒetɔ la trɔ gbɔ le ŋkeke geɖewo megbe
Matthew25:20 Ame si wòtsɔ sidi akpe atɔ̃ na la tsɔ sidi akpe ewo vɛ nɛ.
Matthew25:21 “Eƒe Aƒetɔ kafui ŋutɔ le eƒe dɔ nyui si wòwɔ la ta. Egblɔ na dɔla la be
Matthew25:22 “Ame si xɔ sidi akpe eve la hã va gblɔ na Aƒetɔ la be
Matthew25:23 “Aƒetɔ la gblɔ nɛ kple dzidzɔ be
Matthew25:24 “Ame si xɔ sidi akpe ɖeka la hã va do
Matthew25:25 ale menɔ vɔvɔ̃m be ne mekpɔ viɖe aɖe ɖe ga la dzi la
Matthew25:26 “Aƒetɔ la ɖo eŋu nɛ kple dɔmedzoe be
Matthew25:27 ele na wò be nàtsɔ ga la ada ɖe gadzraɖoƒe nam teti be wòahe viɖe vi aɖe vɛ nam.
Matthew25:28 “ ‘Mixɔ ga la le ame vɔ̃ɖi sia si
Matthew25:29 elabena ame si wɔ nu si wotsɔ nɛ ŋu dɔ nyuie la
Matthew25:30 Woatsɔ dɔla ɖigbɔ̃ sia aƒu gbe ɖe viviti si do tsiɖitsiɖi la me
Matthew25:31 “Ne Nye
Matthew25:32 Ekema dukɔ siwo katã le xexea me alo ame siwo katã le xexea me la aƒo ƒu ɖe ŋkunyeme
Matthew25:33 Mada alẽawo ɖe nye nuɖusime
Matthew25:34 “Ekema Nye
Matthew25:35 elabena esi dɔ wum la
Matthew25:36 Awu menɔ ŋunye o
Matthew25:37 “Ame dzɔdzɔewo abia be
Matthew25:38 Ɣe ka ɣi nèva dze mí abe amedzro ene
Matthew25:39 eye gbe ka gbee míetsɔ awu na wò nèdo kpɔ? Ɣe ka ɣi wode wò gaxɔ me alo nedze dɔ
Matthew25:40 “Eye Nye
Matthew25:41 “Azɔ matrɔ ɖe ame siwo le nye miame la ŋu agblɔ na wo be
Matthew25:42 elabena esi dɔ wum la
Matthew25:43 Meva dze mi abe amedzro ene
Matthew25:44 “Woawo hã aɖo eŋu nam be
Matthew25:45 “Ale maɖo eŋu na wo be
Matthew25:46 “Ale ame siawo ayi ɖe fukpekpe mavɔ me. Ke ame dzɔdzɔewo ayi agbe mavɔ la me.”
Matthew26:1 Esi Yesu ƒo nu na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo le nya siawo ŋu vɔ la
Matthew26:2 “Abe ale si mienya ene la
Matthew26:3 Le ɣeyiɣi ma tututu me la
Matthew26:4 be yewoade ŋugble tso ale si woawɔ alé Yesu le bebeme
Matthew26:5 Ke wo katã wolɔ̃ ɖe edzi be
Matthew26:6 Azɔ Yesu yi Betania
Matthew26:7 Esi wonɔ nu ɖum la
Matthew26:8 Esia ve dɔ me na nusrɔ̃lawo ŋutɔ
Matthew26:9 Ate ŋu adzra ami sia
Matthew26:10 Yesu nya nu si bum nusrɔ̃lawo le
Matthew26:11 Ame dahewo li kpli mi gbe sia gbe
Matthew26:12 Esi wònye be nye ku gbɔna kpuie ta la
Matthew26:13 Vavã
Matthew26:14 Le nyadzɔdzɔ sia megbe la
Matthew26:15 eye wòbia be
Matthew26:16 Tso gbe ma gbe dzi la
Matthew26:17 Le Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi la
Matthew26:18 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Matthew26:19 Nusrɔ̃lawo wɔ ɖe Yesu ƒe gbe dzi pɛpɛpɛ
Matthew26:20 Le fiẽ me la
Matthew26:21 Ke esi wonɔ nua ɖum la
Matthew26:22 Nya sia ɖi ɖe nusrɔ̃lawo ŋutɔ
Matthew26:23 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Matthew26:24 Ele na nye Amegbetɔ Vi la be maku abe ale si nyagblɔɖilawo gblɔe da ɖi xoxo ene
Matthew26:25 Ke azɔ la
Matthew26:26 Esi wonɔ nua ɖum la
Matthew26:27 Emegbe la
Matthew26:28 esiae nye nye ʋu si wotsɔ tre nubabla yeye la nui. Wokɔe ɖi be ame geɖe nakpɔ nu vɔ̃ tsɔtsɔke to eme.”
Matthew26:29 Yesu yi edzi gblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be
Matthew26:30 Esi Yesu ƒo nu vɔ la
Matthew26:31 Azɔ Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Matthew26:32 Gake ne mefɔ ɖe tsitre tso ame kukuwo dome la
Matthew26:33 Petro tɔ asi akɔ gblɔ nɛ be
Matthew26:34 Ke Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Matthew26:35 Petro gaɖo eŋu kple kakaɖedzi be
Matthew26:36 Ke Yesu kplɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo yi ɖe abɔ aɖe si woyɔna be Getsemane la me
Matthew26:37 Ekplɔ Petro kple Zebedeo ƒe vi eveawo siwo nye Yohanes kple Yakobo la ɖe asi. Esi wova ɖo teƒea la
Matthew26:38 Ale wògblɔ na wo be
Matthew26:39 Yesu zɔ yi ŋgɔ vie
Matthew26:40 Yesu trɔ va nusrɔ̃la etɔ̃awo gbɔ
Matthew26:41 Minɔ ŋudzɔ
Matthew26:42 Yesu gagblẽ nusrɔ̃la etɔ̃awo ɖi heyi ɖado gbe ɖa ake be
Matthew26:43 Esi wògatrɔ va la
Matthew26:44 Etrɔ le wo gbɔ gayi ɖado gbe ɖa zi etɔ̃lia.
Matthew26:45 Azɔ etrɔ va nusrɔ̃lawo gbɔ
Matthew26:46 Mitso mídzo! Mikpɔ ɖa
Matthew26:47 Esi wònɔ nu ƒom la
Matthew26:48 Yuda ɖo dzesi ɖi na wo eye wògblɔ na wo do ŋgɔ be ame si dim wole lae nye ame si yeado gbe na
Matthew26:49 Yuda zɔ tẽe yi ɖe Yesu gbɔ gblɔ nɛ be
Matthew26:50 Ke Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Matthew26:51 Enumake Yesu ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dometɔ ɖeka ɖe eƒe yi le aku me
Matthew26:52 Ke Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Matthew26:53 Alo mènya be mate ŋu abia Fofonye
Matthew26:54 Ke ne mewɔ nenema ɖe
Matthew26:55 Azɔ Yesu trɔ ɖe amehawo gbɔ ƒo nu na wo be
Matthew26:56 Nyateƒe
Matthew26:57 Ameha la kplɔ Yesu yi ɖe nunɔlagã Kayafa ƒe aƒe me
Matthew26:58 Petro nɔ adzɔge ʋĩi le Yesu yome. Esi wòva ɖo nunɔlagã la ƒe aƒe me la
Matthew26:59 Nunɔlagãwo kple Yudatɔwo ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la gãwo nɔ nutsotso aɖewo dim le Yesu ŋu be yewoatsɔ abu fɔe eye yewoatso kufia nɛ
Matthew26:60 gake womete ŋu kpɔ nutsotso aɖeke o
Matthew26:61 Le nuwuwu la
Matthew26:62 Enumake Yudatɔwo ƒe nunɔlagã la tsi tsitre hebia Yesu be
Matthew26:63 Ke Yesu meke nu o. Nunɔlagã la yi edzi gblɔ nɛ be
Matthew26:64 Azɔ Yesu ɖo eŋu gblɔ be
Matthew26:65 Eƒe nya sia tɔ dzi na Yudatɔwo ƒe nunɔlagã la
Matthew26:66 Nu kae nye miaƒe nyametsotso?” Ameha gã la do ɣli be
Matthew26:67 Azɔ amewo ƒu du ɖe edzi
Matthew26:68 hegblɔ nɛ be
Matthew26:69 Le ɣeyiɣi siawo katã me la
Matthew26:70 Ke Petro sẽ nu le wo katã ƒe ŋkume be
Matthew26:71 Emegbe la
Matthew26:72 Azɔ Petro ka atam be
Matthew26:73 Ke eteƒe medidi o la
Matthew26:74 Azɔ Petro do ɣli
Matthew26:75 Enumake Petro ɖo ŋku nya si Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Matthew27:1 Esi ŋu ke la
Matthew27:2 Emegbe la
Matthew27:3 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Matthew27:4 Egblɔ na wo be
Matthew27:5 Ale Yuda tsɔ ga la ƒu gbe ɖe anyigba le gbedoxɔ la me
Matthew27:6 Nunɔlagãwo va fɔ ga la le anyigba
Matthew27:7 Mlɔeba la
Matthew27:8 Eya ta woyɔa ameɖiƒe sia be
Matthew27:9 Esia wu nya si Nyagblɔɖila Yeremia gblɔ ɖi be
Matthew27:10 ƒle abɔe tso zemelawo si abe ale si Aƒetɔ la gblɔ nam ene” la nu.
Matthew27:11 Azɔ la
Matthew27:12 Nunɔlagãwo kple Yudatɔwo ƒe dumegãwo tsɔ nya geɖewo wɔ nutsotsoe ɖe Yesu ŋuti
Matthew27:13 Pilato gabiae be
Matthew27:14 Ke Yesu meɖo nya la ŋu nɛ o
Matthew27:15 Enye mɔmefia la ƒe ɖoɖo be ne Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la ɖo edzi ƒe sia ƒe la
Matthew27:16 Le ƒe sia me la
Matthew27:17 Esi ameha la ɖi anyi ɖe Pilato ƒe xɔxɔnu le ŋdi ma la
Matthew27:18 Elabena Pilato nya nyuie be ale si ame geɖewo dze Yesu yomee la koe biã ŋu na Yudatɔwo ƒe dumegãwo
Matthew27:19 Ke esi wònɔ ʋɔnudrɔ̃zikpui la dzi la
Matthew27:20 Azɔ la
Matthew27:21 Eya ta esi mɔmefia la gabia be
Matthew27:22 Pilato bia wo be
Matthew27:23 Pilato gabia wo be
Matthew27:24 Esi Pilato kpɔ be ameawo ɖo kplikpaa
Matthew27:25 Ameha la do ɣli sesĩe be
Matthew27:26 Ale Pilato ɖe asi le Barabas ŋuti na wo. Ena woƒo Yesu
Matthew27:27 Gbã la
Matthew27:28 Woɖe eƒe awu siwo wòdo la le eŋuti
Matthew27:29 eye wotsɔ ŋu didi aɖewo wɔ fiakuku heɖɔ nɛ
Matthew27:30 Azɔ la
Matthew27:31 Esi wowu fewuɖuɖu la nu la
Matthew27:32 Esi woyina eklã ge ɖe atitsoga ŋuti la
Matthew27:33 Ale wova ɖo teƒe si woyɔna be Golgata si gɔmee nye “Ametakoli Togbɛ.”
Matthew27:34 Asrafoawo tsɔ wain si me wode gbe siwo vena la nɛ be wòano
Matthew27:35 Esi woklãe ɖe atitsoga ŋuti vɔ la
Matthew27:36 Esia megbe la
Matthew27:37 Woŋlɔ nu klã ɖe eƒe atitsoga la tame be
Matthew27:38 Ŋdi ma ke la
Matthew27:39 Ame siwo to teƒea va yina la dzui hegblɔ nya vlo geɖewo ɖe eŋuti. Woʋuʋua ta fewuɖutɔe be
Matthew27:40 “Ke alee wòle! Àte ŋu agbã gbedoxɔ la
Matthew27:41 Nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo kple dumegã siwo le afi ma la ɖu fewu le eŋu be
Matthew27:42 “Èɖe ame bubuwo
Matthew27:43 Ebe yexɔ Mawu dzi se; Mawu neɖo kpe eƒe xɔse la dzi ne wòaɖee le atia ŋuti. Alo menye eyae gblɔ be
Matthew27:44 Nenema ke adzodala siwo woklã ɖe ati ŋuti kpe ɖe eŋuti la hã dzui heɖe alɔme le eŋuti.
Matthew27:45 Le ŋdɔ ma la
Matthew27:46 Le ɣetrɔ ga etɔ̃ me la
Matthew27:47 Nukpɔla siwo le afi ma la dometɔ aɖewo mese nya si wògblɔ la gɔme nyuie o
Matthew27:48 Ameawo dometɔ ɖeka ƒu du ɖatsɔ aha tsitsi
Matthew27:49 Ke ame bubuwo gblɔ nɛ be
Matthew27:50 Yesu gado ɣli sesĩe ake. Etsɔ eƒe gbɔgbɔ la na
Matthew27:51 Eye kpɔ ɖa
Matthew27:52 eye yɔdowo nu ʋu
Matthew27:53 Le Yesu ƒe tsitretsitsi megbe la
Matthew27:54 Esi asrafo siwo klãe ɖe atia ŋuti kple woƒe amegãwo kpɔ nu siwo va dzɔ kple ale si anyigba ʋuʋui la
Matthew27:55 Nyɔnu siwo kplɔ Yesu ɖo tso Galilea be yewoava kpɔ eƒe hiahiãwo gbɔ nɛ le Yerusalem la le nu siwo katã le dzɔdzɔm la kpɔm tso adzɔge.
Matthew27:56 Ame siawo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Maria Magdalatɔ
Matthew27:57 Esi fiẽ ɖo la
Matthew27:58 yi ɖe Pilato gbɔ hebia Yesu ƒe ŋutilã kukua. Pilato ɖe gbe be woakɔ Yesu ƒe ŋutilã kuku la nɛ.
Matthew27:59 Yosef xɔ ame kuku la
Matthew27:60 eye wòkɔe mlɔ yɔdo si eya ŋutɔ ɖe ɖe agakpewo dome la me hemli kpe gã aɖe tu ɖe yɔdo la nu.
Matthew27:61 Maria Magdalatɔ kple Maria evelia wonɔ anyi henɔ ale si woɖi Yesu kple afi si woɖi ɖo la kpɔm.
Matthew27:62 Eye le dzadzraɖoŋkeke ƒe ŋufɔke dzi la
Matthew27:63 eye wogblɔ nɛ be
Matthew27:64 eya ta míedi be nàɖe gbe ne woatre yɔdo la nu va se ɖe ŋkeke etɔ̃a gbe
Matthew27:65 Pilato ɖo nya la ŋu na wo be
Matthew27:66 Ale wotre yɔdo la nu hetsɔ asrafowo ɖo afi ma be woadzɔ eŋuti.
Matthew28:1 Ke le ŋkeke si dze Dzudzɔgbe yome
Matthew28:2 Kasia anyigba ʋuʋu sesĩe
Matthew28:3 Mawudɔla la ƒe mo nɔ keklẽm abe dzikedzo ene
Matthew28:4 Esi dzɔlawo kpɔe la
Matthew28:5 Mawudɔla la ƒo nu na nyɔnuawo gblɔ be
Matthew28:6 gake mele afi sia o
Matthew28:7 Azɔ miɖe abla miayi aɖagblɔe na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be etsi tsitre tso ame kukuwo dome
Matthew28:8 Nyɔnuawo ƒu du dzo le yɔdo la to kple vɔvɔ̃ kple dzidzɔ. Esi wole dua dzi yina ɖe nusrɔ̃lawo di ge la
Matthew28:9 Yesu va kpe wo. Edo gbe na wo be
Matthew28:10 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Matthew28:11 Esi nyɔnuawo le gegem ɖe dua me la
Matthew28:12 Esi nunɔlagãwo kpe ta kple dumegãwo la
Matthew28:13 “Migblɔ be
Matthew28:14 Takpekpe la do ŋugbe be
Matthew28:15 Ale asrafoawo xɔ ga la
Matthew28:16 Nusrɔ̃la wuiɖekɛawo hã dze Galilea mɔ dzi
Matthew28:17 Wokpe Yesu le afi sia
Matthew28:18 Egblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be
Matthew28:19 eya ta miyi ɖawɔ amewo le dukɔ ɖe sia ɖe me woanye nye nusrɔ̃lawo; miade mawutsi ta na wo le Fofo la
Matthew28:20 Miafia nu nusrɔ̃la yeye siawo be woawɔ ɖe se siwo katã mede na mi la dzi
Mark1:1 Yesu Kristo
Mark1:2 Abe ale si woŋlɔe ɖi le Nyagblɔɖila Yesaya ƒe agbalẽ me ene be
Mark1:3 ame si ƒe gbe le ɖiɖim le gbea dzi be
Mark1:4 Yohanes Mawutsidetanamelae nye dɔla sia. Enɔ gbedzi
Mark1:5 Ame geɖe ŋutɔ tso Yerusalem kple Yudea nutowo me yi gbea dzi be yewoakpɔ Yohanes
Mark1:6 Wotɔ awu si Yohanes do la kple kposɔfu
Mark1:7 Egblɔ na eƒe nyaselawo be
Mark1:8 Nye la
Mark1:9 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Mark1:10 Esi Yesu nɔ dodom tso tsia me la
Mark1:11 Gbe aɖe hã ɖi tso dziƒo be
Mark1:12 Enumake Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la do dui wòyi gbedzi.
Mark1:13 Enɔ gbea dzi ŋkeke blaene
Mark1:14 Esi Fia Herod lé Yohanes de gaxɔ me vɔ megbe la
Mark1:15 Eɖe gbeƒã be
Mark1:16 Gbe ɖeka esi Yesu ɖi tsa to Galilea ƒuta va yina la
Mark1:17 Yesu yɔ wo hegblɔ na wo be
Mark1:18 Enumake wogblẽ woƒe asabu ɖi hedze eyome.
Mark1:19 Esi wozɔ ƒuta la yina sẽe la
Mark1:20 Eyɔ woawo hã be woadze ye yome
Mark1:21 Yesu kple ame siwo nɔ eŋu la va ɖo Kapernaum
Mark1:22 Ame siwo nɔ ƒuƒoƒea la ƒe mo wɔ yaa le Yesu ƒe nufiafia ŋuti
Mark1:23 Ŋutsu aɖe si me gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ nɔ la hã nɔ ƒuƒoƒe la gbe ma gbe. Ame sia de asi ɣlidodo me be
Mark1:24 “Yesu Nazaretitɔ
Mark1:25 Yesu blu ɖe eta gblɔ be
Mark1:26 Le Yesu ƒe gbeɖeɖea nu la
Mark1:27 Nuwɔna sia wɔ nuku na eteƒekpɔlawo ŋutɔ
Mark1:28 Nu si Yesu wɔ la na be eƒe ŋkɔ ɖi hoo le Galilea nutowo katã me le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe megbe.
Mark1:29 Yesu kple eŋutimeawo do go le ƒuƒoƒe la
Mark1:30 Ŋudza lé Simɔn lɔ̃xo
Mark1:31 Yesu yi dɔnɔ la ƒe aba gbɔ
Mark1:32 Esi ɣe nɔ to ɖom la
Mark1:33 Kapernaum du blibo la katã kloe va ƒo ƒu ɖe ʋɔtrua nu be yewoakpɔ nu.
Mark1:34 Yesu da gbe le dɔléla geɖewo ŋu
Mark1:35 Le fɔŋli la
Mark1:36 Le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la
Mark1:37 Esi wokpɔe la
Mark1:38 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark1:39 Ale wòzɔ mɔ tsa le Galilea nutowo katã me
Mark1:40 Gbe ɖeka la
Mark1:41 Anyidzela la ƒe nu wɔ nublanui na Yesu ŋutɔ
Mark1:42 Enumake anyidzela la ƒe lãme sẽ.
Mark1:43 Yesu dɔe enumake kple sedede vevi sia be
Mark1:44 “Kpɔ egbɔ be mègblɔ nu sia na ame aɖeke o
Mark1:45 Gake esi ŋutsu la dzo yina la
Mark2:1 Le ŋkeke aɖewo megbe la
Mark2:2 Medidi kura hafi aƒe si me wònɔ la yɔ fũu kple amewo o. Aƒea me yɔ ale gbegbe be nɔƒe aɖeke meganɔ ʋɔtrua nu hã o. Yesu de asi mawunyagbɔgblɔ me na ameha la.
Mark2:3 Sẽe la
Mark2:4 Ke le amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ta la
Mark2:5 Yesu kpɔ be ŋutsu eneawo xɔe se vevie be yeate ŋu ayɔ dɔ wo nɔvi la
Mark2:6 Ke Yudatɔwo ƒe agbalẽfiala siwo nɔ afi ma la gblɔ le woƒe dzi me be
Mark2:7 “Nu ka! Ame sia gblɔ busunya! Ɖe wòbu be Mawue yenyea? Menya be Mawu ɖeka hɔ̃ɔ koe ate ŋu atsɔ nu vɔ̃wo ake oa?”
Mark2:8 Yesu nya nu si bum ameawo nɔ
Mark2:9 Kae bɔbɔ wu
Mark2:10 Be miadze sii be wona ŋusẽ Amegbetɔ Vi la be wòatsɔ nu vɔ̃ ake le anyigba dzi.” Egblɔ na lãmetututɔ la be
Mark2:11 “Mele egblɔm na wò be tsi tre! Ŋlɔ wò aba nàyi aƒe me!”
Mark2:12 Ŋutsu la tso enumake
Mark2:13 Yesu gado go yi ƒuta
Mark2:14 Esi wòzɔ yina la
Mark2:15 Le fiẽ me la
Mark2:16 Agbalẽfiala siwo tso Farisitɔwo dome la kpɔ Yesu wònɔ nu ɖum kple dugadzɔlawo kple nu vɔ̃ wɔlawo
Mark2:17 Yesu se nya siwo gblɔm wonɔ la
Mark2:18 Yohanes ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo kple Farisitɔwo tsia nu dɔna ɣe aɖewo ɣi. Gbe ɖeka esi wogatsi nu dɔ alea la
Mark2:19 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark2:20 Gake ŋkeke aɖe li gbɔna
Mark2:21 “Menyo be woatsɔ avɔnuɖeɖi yeye aka avɔ vuvu o
Mark2:22 Womekɔa aha yeye hã ɖe lãgbalẽgolo xoxo me o
Mark2:23 Gbe ɖeka le Dzudzɔgbe dzi esi Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo zɔ to bligble aɖe me yina la
Mark2:24 Farisitɔ aɖewo kpɔ wo
Mark2:25 Eɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark2:26 Esi Abiata nye nunɔlagã la
Mark2:27 Egblɔ yi edzi be
Mark2:28 Gawu la
Mark3:1 Yesu gayi Yudatɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒe le Kapernaum
Mark3:2 Esi wònye Dzudzɔgbe ŋkeke ta la
Mark3:3 Yesu yɔ amea be neva tsi tsitre ɖe ameha la ŋkume.
Mark3:4 Etrɔ ɖe wo gbɔ hebia wo be
Mark3:5 Yesu tsa ŋku le ameawo dzi dzikutɔe
Mark3:6 Esi Farisitɔwo kpɔ esia la
Mark3:7 Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo ɖe wo ɖokui ɖe aga heyi ƒua ta
Mark3:8 Esi wose nu siwo katã Yesu nɔ wɔwɔm ta la
Mark3:9 Yesu vɔ̃ be ameawo ava mimi ye ɖo
Mark3:10 elabena eda gbe le dɔnɔ geɖewo ŋu gbe ma gbe ale gbegbe be dɔnɔ bubuwo ƒo zi ɖe eŋu fũu henɔ didim be yewoaka asi eŋu ko.
Mark3:11 Nenye be ame siwo me gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo le la kpɔ Yesu la
Mark3:12 gake Yesu dea se na wo vevie be womegana amewo nanya ame si yenye o.
Mark3:13 Le nu siawo megbe la
Mark3:14 Azɔ la
Mark3:15 eye wòna ŋusẽ wo be woanya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo do goe le amewo me.
Mark3:16 Ame wuieve siwo wòtia la ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye: Simɔn (ame si wòna ŋkɔe be Petro)
Mark3:17 Yakobo kple nɔvia Yohanes
Mark3:18 Andrea
Mark3:19 kple Yuda Iskariɔt
Mark3:20 Esi Yesu trɔ yi aƒe si me wòdze la
Mark3:21 Esi eƒe ƒometɔwo se nya sia la
Mark3:22 Gake Yudatɔwo ƒe agbalẽfiala siwo tso Yerusalem va afi ma la gblɔ be
Mark3:23 Yesu yɔ ɖeklemiɖela siawo
Mark3:24 Fiaɖuƒe si ma ɖe eve la
Mark3:25 Aƒe si me mama kple dzrewɔwɔ le la hã mate ŋu anɔ te o.
Mark3:26 Ne Satana tsi tsitre ɖe eya ŋutɔ ɖokui ŋu la
Mark3:27 Le nyateƒe me la
Mark3:28 Mele nyateƒe la gblɔm na mi be woatsɔ amewo ƒe nu vɔ̃wo kple woƒe busunyawo katã ake wo
Mark3:29 ke ame sia ame si agblɔ busunya ɖe Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la ŋu la
Mark3:30 Yesu gblɔ nya sia
Mark3:31 Azɔ Yesu dada kple nɔviawo va aƒe si me wònɔ la godo
Mark3:32 Ameha gã aɖe nɔ anyi ɖe egbɔ ƒo xlãe
Mark3:33 Yesu biae be
Mark3:34 Etsa ŋku le ame siwo ƒo xlãe la dome godoo
Mark3:35 Ame sia ame si wɔa Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu la
Mark4:1 Eva eme be ame geɖewo gava ƒo ƒu ɖe Yesu ŋu esime wònɔ nu fiam le ƒuta. Le ameawo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ta la
Mark4:2 Efia nu geɖe amewo to lododowo me.
Mark4:3 Egblɔ na wo be
Mark4:4 Nuku siwo wòwu la ƒe ɖewo ge ɖe mɔto
Mark4:5 Ɖewo hã ge ɖe kpenyigba dzi
Mark4:6 gake esi ŋdɔ ʋu ɖe wo dzi la
Mark4:7 Nuku bubuwo ge ɖe ŋuwo me
Mark4:8 Ke nuku aɖewo ya ge ɖe anyigba nyui dzi
Mark4:9 Azɔ Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Mark4:10 Le esia megbe la
Mark4:11 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark4:12 Miɖo ŋku edzi be
Mark4:13 Ale Yesu gblɔ na wo bena
Mark4:14 Agbledela si ŋu meƒo nu tsoe lae nye ame si gblɔa mawunya na amewo.
Mark4:15 Mɔto
Mark4:16 Kpenyigba si dzi nuku aɖewo ge ɖo lae nye ame siwo sea mawunya la
Mark4:17 gake abe nuku siwo miena ɖe anyigba ma ƒomevi dzi ene la
Mark4:18 Ŋunyigba si dzi nuku aɖewo ge ɖo lae nye ame siwo sea nyanyui la
Mark4:19 gake xexe sia me ƒe dzitsitsi ɖe kesinɔnuwo ŋu
Mark4:20 Azɔ anyigba nyui lae nye ame siwo xɔa Mawu ƒe Nya la le nyateƒe me
Mark4:21 Yesu yi edzi bia nusrɔ̃lawo be
Mark4:22 Nu siwo katã le ɣaɣla fifia la
Mark4:23 Ne to senu li na mi la
Mark4:24 Mikpɔ egbɔ be miewɔ ɖe nu siwo miese la dzi
Mark4:25 Ame si si nu le la
Mark4:26 “Lododo bubu si fia ale si mawufiaɖuƒe la le lae nye esi: ‘Agbledela aɖe ƒã nuku ɖe eƒe abɔ me
Mark4:27 ke le ŋkeke aɖewo megbe la
Mark4:28 Gbã la
Mark4:29 Ke esi kutsetse la ɖi la
Mark4:30 Yesu yi edzi bia wo be
Mark4:31 Mawufiaɖuƒe la le abe atiku suetɔ kekeake ene le anyigba dzi.
Mark4:32 Togbɔ be ele alea hã la
Mark4:33 Yesu wɔ lododo vovovowo ŋu dɔ tsɔ fia nu amewo. Ewɔ esiwo gɔme amewo ate ŋu ase la ŋu dɔ.
Mark4:34 Le nyateƒe me la
Mark4:35 Esi ɣe nɔ to ɖom la
Mark4:36 Eya kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo ge ɖe ʋu aɖe me
Mark4:37 Esi wozɔ yina sẽe la
Mark4:38 Togbɔ be esiawo katã nɔ edzi yim hã la
Mark4:39 Yesu blu ɖe ya la ta enumake
Mark4:40 Azɔ etrɔ ɖe nusrɔ̃lawo ŋu bia wo be
Mark4:41 Vɔvɔ̃ ɖo nusrɔ̃lawo ŋutɔ. Woƒe mo wɔ yaa
Mark5:1 Wotso ƒu la
Mark5:2 Esi Yesu do go tso ʋua me la
Mark5:3 Ame sia ƒe nɔƒee nye ameɖibɔ me
Mark5:4 elabena zi geɖe wodea gakɔsɔkɔsɔ eƒe asiwo kple afɔwo
Mark5:5 Le ŋkeke kple zã me siaa la
Mark5:6 Ame sia kpɔ Yesu xoxoxo esi wònɔ ƒua dzi gbɔna
Mark5:7 Edo ɣli sesĩe be
Mark5:8 Elabena Yesu nɔ gbɔgblɔm nɛ be
Mark5:9 Yesu bia gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ la be
Mark5:10 Azɔ gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃awo ɖe kuku na Yesu vevie be meganya yewo ɖo ɖe du didi aɖeke me o.
Mark5:11 Eva eme be aƒehawo ƒe ha gã aɖe nɔ nu ɖum le togbɛ si te ɖe toa ŋu la dzi.
Mark5:12 Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃awo gblɔ na Yesu be
Mark5:13 Yesu na mɔ wo be woayi
Mark5:14 Hakplɔlawo lé du tsɔ sesĩe eye esi wonɔ yiyim la
Mark5:15 Le esia ta
Mark5:16 Ame siwo va kpɔ nu si dzɔ ɖe gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ tɔ la kple haawo dzi la hã yi ɖagblɔe na ame bubuwo
Mark5:17 ale amewo gava fũu
Mark5:18 Esia ta Yesu gbugbɔ ge ɖe ʋu la me be yeadzo. Tete ŋutsu si me wònya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo le la ɖe kuku nɛ be yeayi kplii
Mark5:19 gake egblɔ nɛ be
Mark5:20 Ŋutsu la dze mɔ
Mark5:21 Esi Yesu va ɖi go kple ʋua ɖe ƒua ƒe go evelia dzi la
Mark5:22 Yudatɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒedzikpɔla aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Yairo la va dze klo ɖe ekɔme
Mark5:23 eye wòɖe kuku nɛ vevie be wòava da gbe le ye vinyɔnuvi sue si dze dɔ la ŋu na ye. Egblɔ na Yesu be
Mark5:24 Yesu tso kpla dze eyome
Mark5:25 Nyɔnu aɖe nɔ ameawo dome si nɔ ʋusisidɔ lém ƒe wuieve sɔŋ.
Mark5:26 Nyɔnu sia kpe fu
Mark5:27 Ese nukunu geɖe siwo Yesu wɔ
Mark5:28 elabena exɔe se
Mark5:29 Vavã esi wòka asi Yesu ƒe awu ŋu teti ko la
Mark5:30 Yesu se le eɖokui me enumake be dɔyɔyɔ ƒe ŋusẽ aɖe do le ye me
Mark5:31 Eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark5:32 Gake Yesu ganɔ ŋku tsam kokoko be yeakpɔ ame si wɔ nenem nu sia.
Mark5:33 Kasia nyɔnu la do le ameawo dome kple vɔvɔ̃ kple dzodzo nyanyanya va dze klo ɖe Yesu ƒe afɔ nu hegblɔ nu si wòwɔ la nɛ.
Mark5:34 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Mark5:35 Le esime Yesu nɔ nu ƒom na nyɔnu la la
Mark5:36 Yesu se nya si wova gblɔ na Yairo
Mark5:37 Azɔ Yesu tia Petro
Mark5:38 Esi wòva ɖo ƒuƒoƒemegã ƒe agbonu la
Mark5:39 Ege ɖe aƒea me
Mark5:40 Ameawo koe ʋuu le nya si wògblɔ la ta. Ke Yesu nya wo do goe le aƒea me. Azɔ ekplɔ ɖevi la fofo
Mark5:41 Yesu lé ɖevi la ƒe alɔnu
Mark5:42 Nyɔnuvi la ti kpo tso aba la dzi
Mark5:43 Ke Yesu de se na wo vevie ŋutɔ be womegagblɔ nu si dzɔ la na ame aɖeke o. Azɔ ebia tso wo si be woadi nane na ɖevi la wòaɖu.
Mark6:1 Le esia megbe la
Mark6:2 Le Dzudzɔgbe ŋkeke dzi la
Mark6:3 Alo menye ame siae nye atikpala la oa? Menye Maria ƒe viŋutsu si nɔviwoe nye Yakobo
Mark6:4 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Mark6:5 Le ameawo ƒe dzimaxɔse ta la
Mark6:6 Ewɔ nuku na Yesu ŋutɔ be wo detɔwo mexɔ edzi se o
Mark6:7 Yesu yɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃la wuieveawo
Mark6:8 Egblɔ na wo be
Mark6:9 Migatsɔ afɔkpa eve alo awu eve teti hã o.
Mark6:10 Midze aƒe ɖeka ko me le kɔƒe ɖe sia ɖe me; miganɔ tsatsam tso aƒe me yi aƒe me o.
Mark6:11 Nenye be kɔƒe aɖe me tɔwo mexɔ mi alo ɖo to mi o la
Mark6:12 Nusrɔ̃lawo dze mɔ henɔ nu xlɔ̃m ame sia ame si wodo goe le mɔa dzi la be wòatrɔ dzime.
Mark6:13 Wonya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo le amewo me
Mark6:14 Fia Herod se Yesu ŋkɔ
Mark6:15 Ame aɖewo hã bu be Yesue nye Eliya
Mark6:16 Ke Herod ya gblɔ kple kakaɖedzi be
Mark6:17 Herod sia nye ame si dɔ asrafowo be woalé Yohanes de gaxɔ me. Ewɔ esia le Herod
Mark6:18 elabena Yohanes gblɔ na Herod be
Mark6:19 Le esia ta Herod di vevie be woawu Yohanes
Mark6:20 elabena Herod tsɔ bubu geɖe na Yohanes le eƒe ame ɖɔʋu kple ame kɔkɔenyenye ta
Mark6:21 Mlɔeba la
Mark6:22 Eva dzɔ be Herod ƒe vinyɔnu va ɖu ɣe na ame kpekpeawo. Eƒe ɣeɖuɖu do dzidzɔ na ame sia ame ŋutɔ. Le esia ta fia la gblɔ na nyɔnuvi la be
Mark6:23 Eka atam nɛ be
Mark6:24 Nyɔnuvi la yi dadaa gbɔ ɖagblɔ nya la nɛ. Dadaa gblɔ nɛ be
Mark6:25 Nyɔnuvi la gaɖe abla va fia la gbɔ va gblɔ nɛ be
Mark6:26 Nya sia ve fia la ŋutɔ
Mark6:27 eya ta eɖo asrafo si le eŋu dzɔm la ɖa be wòayi aɖatso ta le Yohanes nu atsɔ vɛ na ye. Asrafo la yi ɖatso ta le Yohanes nu le gaxɔ la me
Mark6:28 hetsɔ de agba me vɛ na nyɔnuvi la
Mark6:29 Esi Yohanes ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo se nu si dzɔ la
Mark6:30 Yesu ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo trɔ tso woƒe mɔzɔzɔ la gbɔ
Mark6:31 Yesu se nya siawo keŋ
Mark6:32 Ale wodzo le teƒe sia kple ʋu heyi teƒe aɖe si zi ɖoɖoe wu
Mark6:33 gake ame geɖewo gakpɔ wo xoxo
Mark6:34 Abe ale si wònɔna ɖaa ene la
Mark6:35 Le ɣetrɔ me la
Mark6:36 eya ta gblɔ na ameawo be woayi kɔƒe kple agble siwo te ɖe afi sia ŋu la me aɖadi nuɖuɖu na wo ɖokuiwo.”
Mark6:37 Gake Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Mark6:38 Yesu bia wo be
Mark6:39 Yesu gblɔ na wo be woana ameawo nanɔ anyi ɖe ƒuƒoƒowo me le gbe dama la dzi.
Mark6:40 Ale ameawo nɔ anyi ɖe hatsotso alafawo kple blaatɔ̃wo me.
Mark6:41 Azɔ Yesu tsɔ abolo atɔ̃ la kple tɔmelã meme eve la
Mark6:42 Ameawo ɖu nu la ale gbegbe be woɖi ƒo wu ale si hiã
Mark6:43 eye esi nusrɔ̃lawo ƒo ƒu abolo kple tɔmelã kakɛ siwo susɔ la
Mark6:44 Ke ŋutsu siwo ɖu nua la ƒe xexlẽme anɔ akpe atɔ̃ (5
Mark6:45 Le nuɖuɖu la nana ameawo vɔ megbe teti ko la
Mark6:46 Le esia megbe la
Mark6:47 Le zã me esi tɔdziʋua ɖo ƒu la ƒe titina la
Mark6:48 Yesu ɖeka nɔ godzi kpɔ wo ɖa. Ekpɔ be ya sesẽ si nɔ ƒoƒom la nɔ fu ɖem na wo ale gbegbe be ʋua kuku sesẽ na wo ŋutɔ. Anɔ abe fɔŋli ga etɔ̃ me ene la
Mark6:49 gake wo katã wokpɔe wònɔ zɔzɔm le ƒu la dzi
Mark6:50 Gake eƒo nu gblɔ na wo enumake be
Mark6:51 Azɔ ege ɖe ʋu la me
Mark6:52 elabena va se ɖe fifia la
Mark6:53 Wotso ƒu la va ɖi go ɖe Genesaretnyigba dzi
Mark6:54 Ke esi wodo go le eme la
Mark6:55 eya ta woƒu du ɖagblɔe na ame siwo katã le nuto la me be Yesu va ɖo. Ale amewo kɔ dɔnɔwo ɖe abawo dzi va egbɔ.
Mark6:56 Afi sia afi si Yesu yi le kɔƒewo
Mark7:1 Gbe ɖeka la
Mark7:2 Ame siawo de dzesii be Yesu ƒe nusrɔ̃la aɖewo meklɔa asi le Yudatɔwo ƒe kɔnu nu hafi ɖua nu o.
Mark7:3 (Elabena Yudatɔwo
Mark7:4 Ne wotso asi me gbɔ la
Mark7:5 Ale Farisitɔwo kple agbalẽfiala siawo va bia Yesu be
Mark7:6 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark7:7 Woƒe subɔsubɔ nye dzodzro
Mark7:8 Elabena miegbe nu le Mawu ƒe ɖoɖo vavãwo gbɔ hewɔa mia ŋutɔwo ƒe kɔnyinyiwo dzi.
Mark7:9 Ɖe mieɖoe koŋ le nu gbem le Mawu ƒe sewo gbɔ
Mark7:10 “Le kpɔɖeŋu me
Mark7:11 gake miawo la
Mark7:12 Mieɖea mɔ nɛ be wòawɔ nu si dze be wòawɔ la na fofoa alo dadaa o.
Mark7:13 Ale miegbe Mawu ƒe nya
Mark7:14 Azɔ Yesu yɔ ameha la be woava ɖo to ye. Egblɔ na wo be
Mark7:15 Naneke meli si tsoa gota gena ɖe ame me
Mark7:16 Ame si to senu li na la nesee.]”
Mark7:17 Azɔ Yesu ge ɖe aƒe aɖe me be yeadzo le ameha la gbɔ vie. Eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va biae le afi sia be wòaɖe lo si wòdo la gɔme na yewo.
Mark7:18 Yesu bia wo be
Mark7:19 Ne ame ɖu nu la
Mark7:20 Egagblɔ be
Mark7:21 elabena ame ƒe dzi mee susu baɖa doa go tsona. Nu baɖawo abe
Mark7:22 ŋubiabiã
Mark7:23 Nu vɔ̃ɖi siawo katã doa go tso miaƒe dziwo me
Mark7:24 Yesu dzo le Galilea heyi Tiro kple Sidon nutowo me. Edze agbagba be yeaɣla ye ɖokui ɖe aƒe aɖe me
Mark7:25 Nyɔnu aɖe si ƒe vi gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ nɔ fu ɖem na la va egbɔ enumake. Nyɔnu sia se Yesu ŋkɔ
Mark7:26 heɖe kuku nɛ be wòanya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ la do goe le ye vi la me. Nyɔnu la nye Sirofoiniketɔ.
Mark7:27 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Mark7:28 Nyɔnu la ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark7:29 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Mark7:30 Esi nyɔnu sia va ɖo aƒe me la
Mark7:31 Azɔ Yesu tso Tiro yi Sidon to Dekapoli alo Du Ewoawo me gatrɔ yi Galilea ƒua nu.
Mark7:32 Wokplɔ tokunɔ aɖe si menya nuƒoƒo nyuie o la vɛ nɛ
Mark7:33 Yesu kplɔ tokunɔ la dzoe le ameawo dome yi adzɔge
Mark7:34 Ewu mo dzi kpɔ dziƒo
Mark7:35 Enumake ame la ƒe towo ʋu
Mark7:36 Yesu de se na ameha la be womegana amewo nanya nu si yewɔ la o. Ke zi ale si wòde se sia na wo la
Mark7:37 Elabena nuwɔna la wɔ nuku na wo. Ale amewo nɔ gbɔgblɔm ɖaa be
Mark8:1 Ameha gã aɖe gaƒo ƒu ɖe Yesu ŋu le teƒe aɖe gbe ɖeka
Mark8:2 “Ame siawo ƒe nu wɔ nublanui nam ŋutɔ
Mark8:3 Ne meɖo wo ɖe aƒe me dɔmeɣii la
Mark8:4 Nusrɔ̃lawo biae be
Mark8:5 Ke Yesu hã bia wo be
Mark8:6 Azɔ Yesu gblɔ na ameawo be woanɔ anyi ɖe gbea dzi. Etsɔ abolo adreawo
Mark8:7 Lã meme ʋe aɖewo hã nɔ wo si
Mark8:8 Ameawo ɖu nu
Mark8:9 Ame siwo ɖu nua la ƒe xexlẽme anɔ akpe ene (4
Mark8:10 Le nu siawo megbe la
Mark8:11 Farisitɔ siwo nɔ afi ma la se be Yesu va ɖo teƒea ale woyi be yewoahe nya kplii. Wova gblɔ nɛ be
Mark8:12 Yesu ɖe hũu le eƒe gbɔgbɔ la me hegblɔ na wo be
Mark8:13 Yesu dzo le wo gbɔ
Mark8:14 Hafi woadzo la
Mark8:15 Esi wonɔ ƒua dzi yina la
Mark8:16 Nusrɔ̃lawo bia wo nɔewo be
Mark8:17 Yesu nya nya si gblɔm wonɔ
Mark8:18 Miaƒe ŋkuwo la
Mark8:19 “Mieɖo ŋku edzi be menyi ame akpe atɔ̃ (5
Mark8:20 Egabia wo be
Mark8:21 Azɔ egblɔ na wo be
Mark8:22 Azɔ esi wova ɖo Betsaida la
Mark8:23 Yesu lé ŋkunɔ la ƒe alɔnu
Mark8:24 Ame la tsa ŋku godoo
Mark8:25 Yesu gaɖo asi ame la ƒe ŋkuwo dzi ake
Mark8:26 Yesu ɖoe ɖe eƒe ƒometɔwo gbɔ
Mark8:27 Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dzo le Galilea heyi Kaisarea Filipi kɔƒewo me. Esi wozɔ yina la
Mark8:28 Nusrɔ̃lawo ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark8:29 Ke ebia woawo ŋutɔ be
Mark8:30 Ke Yesu de se na wo be womegana ame aɖeke nanya esia o!
Mark8:31 Azɔ Yesu de asi nufiafia wo me be edze be Amegbetɔ Vi la nakpe fu geɖewo. Egblɔ na wo be dumegãwo kple nunɔlagãwo agbe nu le ye gbɔ. Sefialawo hã agbe ye
Mark8:32 Yesu ƒo nu na wo faa le nya siawo ŋu
Mark8:33 Yesu trɔ kɔ kpɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo
Mark8:34 Azɔ eyɔ nusrɔ̃lawo kple amehawo ƒo ƒu be woaɖo to ye. Egblɔ na wo be
Mark8:35 Ne miedi kokoko be miaɖe miaƒe agbe la
Mark8:36 “Viɖe ka wòanye na ame be xexea me katã nazu etɔ
Mark8:37 Nane gaxɔ asi wu eya ŋutɔ ƒe luʋɔ le xexe sia mea?
Mark8:38 Le ŋkeke siawo me
Mark9:1 Yesu yi edzi gblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be
Mark9:2 Le ŋkeke ade megbe la
Mark9:3 eye eƒe awu si wòdo la trɔ fu tititi. Awu la fu ale gbegbe be
Mark9:4 Azɔ Eliya kple Mose wova do ɖe Yesu gbɔ
Mark9:5 Petro gblɔ na Yesu be
Mark9:6 (Egblɔ esia
Mark9:7 Esi Petro nɔ nya siawo gblɔm la
Mark9:8 Kasia
Mark9:9 Esi wonɔ ɖiɖim tso toa dzi gbɔna la
Mark9:10 Ale nusrɔ̃lawo ɣla nya siawo ɖe woƒe dziwo me
Mark9:11 Wobiae be
Mark9:12 Yesu ɖo eŋu be
Mark9:13 Ke mele egblɔm na mi be
Mark9:14 Esi wova ɖo toa te la
Mark9:15 Esi ameha la kpɔ Yesu la
Mark9:16 Yesu bia wo be
Mark9:17 Ame ɖeka le ameawo dome do ɣli gblɔ be
Mark9:18 Nyateƒe ne gbɔgbɔ baɖa sia dze edzi la
Mark9:19 Yesu trɔ ɖe nusrɔ̃lawo ŋu hegblɔ na wo be
Mark9:20 Ale wokplɔ ɖevi la yi na Yesu
Mark9:21 Yesu bia ɖevia fofo be
Mark9:22 Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ sia nana wòdzea dzo me alo tsi me
Mark9:23 Yesu gabiae be
Mark9:24 Fofoa ɖo eŋu enumake be
Mark9:25 Yesu kpɔ be ameha la nɔ agbɔ sɔm ɖe edzi
Mark9:26 Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ la do ɣli sesĩe
Mark9:27 Ke Yesu lé eƒe alɔnu
Mark9:28 Azɔ esi Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo ɖeɖe wonɔ aƒe si me wodze la
Mark9:29 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark9:30 Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dzo le afi ma
Mark9:31 edi be yeakpɔ ɣeyiɣi geɖe afia nu yeƒe nusrɔ̃lawo. Zi geɖe ne ele nu fiam wo la
Mark9:32 Nusrɔ̃lawo mete ŋu se nya siawo gɔme o
Mark9:33 Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va ɖo Kapernaum. Esi wova ɖo aƒe si me wodze me la
Mark9:34 Nyateƒe
Mark9:35 Yesu nɔ anyi
Mark9:36 Azɔ ekplɔ ɖevi sue aɖe va wo titinae
Mark9:37 “Ame si axɔ ɖevi sue aɖe abe esia ene le nye ŋkɔ me la
Mark9:38 Yesu ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dometɔ ɖeka si woyɔna be Yohanes la gblɔ nɛ be
Mark9:39 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Mark9:40 Ame si metsi tsitre ɖe mía ŋu o la
Mark9:41 Yesu yi edzi be
Mark9:42 “Gake ne ame aɖe awɔe be ɖevi sue siawo dometɔ ɖeka nabu xɔse si le esi ɖe ŋunye la
Mark9:43 Ne wò asi nana be nèwɔa nu vɔ̃ la
Mark9:44 Afi si
Mark9:45 Ne wò afɔ nana be nèwɔa nu vɔ̃ la
Mark9:46 Afi si
Mark9:47 Nenye be wò ŋkue nana be nèwɔa nu vɔ̃ la
Mark9:48 afi si
Mark9:49 Eye woatsɔ dzo bibi ade dze ame sia ame wòatee.”
Mark9:50 Yesu wu eƒe nuƒo la nu be
Mark10:1 Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dzo le Kapernaum
Mark10:2 Farisitɔ aɖewo va egbɔ le afi sia be yewoadoe kpɔ ne yewoalée le nya aɖe me. Wobiae be
Mark10:3 Yesu trɔ bia wo be
Mark10:4 Ameawo ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark10:5 Yesu ɖo eŋu be
Mark10:6 Ke tso nuwɔwɔ ƒe gɔmedzedze me ke la
Mark10:7 Le esia ta ŋutsu agble fofoa kple dadaa ɖi
Mark10:8 eye wo kple eve la woazu ŋutilã ɖeka. Eya ta womeganye ame eve o
Mark10:9 Esia ta nu si ke Mawu bla la
Mark10:10 Le esia megbe la
Mark10:11 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Mark10:12 Nenema ke ne nyɔnu aɖe hã gbe srɔ̃a
Mark10:13 Gbe ɖeka la
Mark10:14 Yesu kpɔ nu si nusrɔ̃lawo wɔ la
Mark10:15 Le nyateƒe me
Mark10:16 Azɔ exɔ ɖeviawo ɖe eƒe abɔwo dome
Mark10:17 Esi Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dzra ɖo vɔ be yewoayi teƒe aɖe la
Mark10:18 Yesu biae be
Mark10:19 Azɔ le wò biabia la ŋuti la
Mark10:20 Ɖekakpui la gblɔ na Yesu be
Mark10:21 Yesu kpɔe dũ eye wòlɔ̃e
Mark10:22 Ɖekakpui la yrɔ esi wòse nya siawo; eƒe mo trɔ zi ɖeka eye wòdzo nublanuitɔe
Mark10:23 Esi wòdzo yina la
Mark10:24 Nya siawo wɔ nuku na nusrɔ̃lawo ŋutɔ. Yesu gagblɔ be
Mark10:25 Le nyateƒe me la
Mark10:26 Nya siawo gawɔ nuku na nusrɔ̃lawo ŋutɔ. Ale wobiae be
Mark10:27 Yesu kpɔ wo dũu
Mark10:28 Petro gblɔ na Yesu be
Mark10:29 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Mark10:30 woakpɔ woƒe aƒewo
Mark10:31 Ke ame siwo nye gbãtɔwo la
Mark10:32 Esi wodze mɔ yina Yerusalem la
Mark10:33 Egblɔ na wo be
Mark10:34 Woaɖu fewu le eŋu vevie
Mark10:35 Azɔ Yakobo kple Yohanes
Mark10:36 Yesu bia wo be
Mark10:37 Woɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark10:38 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark10:39 Woɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark10:40 gake ŋusẽ mele asinye be maɖo mi zikpuiwo dzi le nye nuɖusime kple nye miame o
Mark10:41 Nusrɔ̃la ewo mamlɛawo se nya si Yakobo kple Yohanes ɖabia Yesu
Mark10:42 Le esia ta Yesu yɔ wo va eɖokui gbɔe hegblɔ na wo be
Mark10:43 gake meganɔ nenema le miawo ya dome o. Ame si di be yeanye amegã le mia dome la
Mark10:44 eye ame si di be yeanye amewo katã ƒe tatɔ la
Mark10:45 elabena Amegbetɔ Vi la meva be ame aɖeke nasubɔ ye o. Ke boŋ be wòasubɔ amewo
Mark10:46 Azɔ wova ɖo Yeriko. Emegbe la
Mark10:47 Esi Bartimeo se be Yesu Nazaretitɔ la va yina la
Mark10:48 Ame siwo kplɔ Yesu ɖo la dometɔ aɖewo blu ɖe eta sesĩe be
Mark10:49 Esi Yesu se eŋkɔ la
Mark10:50 Eɖe eƒe awu ƒu gbe
Mark10:51 Yesu biae be
Mark10:52 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Mark11:1 Esi wogogo Betfage kple Betania le Yerusalem gbɔ
Mark11:2 Egblɔ na wo be
Mark11:3 Ne ame aɖe bia mi be nu ka ta miele ka ɖemee hã la
Mark11:4 Nusrɔ̃la eveawo dze mɔ
Mark11:5 ame siwo nɔ tsitre ɖe afi ma la bia wo be
Mark11:6 Wogblɔ nya siwo Yesu be woagblɔ la na wo.
Mark11:7 Ale wokplɔ tedzivi la vɛ na Yesu eye nusrɔ̃lawo ɖe woƒe awuwo ɖo ɖe edzi be wòadoe.
Mark11:8 Ame geɖewo ɖo woƒe avɔwo ɖe mɔa dzi le eŋgɔ be wòazɔ wo dzi
Mark11:9 Eya ŋutɔ nɔ titina
Mark11:10 “Woakafu Mawu be wòtrɔ Mía Fofo David ƒe fiaɖuƒe la vɛ na mí!” “Hosana le dziƒo ʋĩi.”
Mark11:11 Ale wòge ɖe Yerusalem dua me
Mark11:12 Esi ŋu ke ŋdi
Mark11:13 Ekpɔ gboti aɖe si da ama ŋutɔ
Mark11:14 Yesu ƒo fi de ati la be
Mark11:15 Esi wova ɖo Yerusalem la
Mark11:16 eye meɖe mɔ be ame aɖeke natsɔ naneke ato gbedoxɔ la me o.
Mark11:17 Egay eƒe nufiafia dzi hegblɔ na ameawo be
Mark11:18 Esi nunɔlagãwo kple sefialawo se nu si Yesu wɔ la
Mark11:19 Abe ale si wowɔna ɖaa ene la
Mark11:20 Esi ŋu ke ŋdi la
Mark11:21 Kasia Petro ɖo ŋku nya si Yesu gblɔ na ati la dzi
Mark11:22 Yesu ɖo eŋu be
Mark11:23 Nyateƒenya wònye be ne ame aɖe agblɔ na to sia be
Mark11:24 Eya ta mele egblɔm na mi be nu sia nu si miabia to gbedodoɖa me la
Mark11:25 Gake ne miebe yewoado gbe ɖa la
Mark11:26 Ke ne mietsɔ ke amewo o la
Mark11:27 Wogava ɖo Yerusalem
Mark11:28 “Ŋusẽ kae nètsɔ le nu siawo wɔm
Mark11:29 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark11:30 Yohanes ƒe mawutsidede ta na ame ɖe
Mark11:31 Wodzro nya sia me le wo ɖokuiwo dome
Mark11:32 Gake ne míegblɔ be
Mark11:33 Esia ta wogblɔ nɛ be
Mark12:1 Yesu ƒo nu na wo le lododowo me be
Mark12:2 Le nuŋeɣi la
Mark12:3 gake agblea dzi nɔlawo ƒo ame dɔdɔ la
Mark12:4 “Agbletɔ la gaɖo dɔla bubu ɖa
Mark12:5 Ame si wògaɖo ɖa la
Mark12:6 esime wòsusɔ ame ɖeka pɛ ko
Mark12:7 “Gake esi agblea dzi kpɔlawo kpɔe wògbɔna ko la
Mark12:8 Ale wolée hewui
Mark12:9 “Nu ka miebu be agbleatɔ awɔ ne ese nya sia? Ava kple dɔmedzoe
Mark12:10 Mieɖo ŋku edzi be miexlẽ le mawunya me kpɔ be
Mark12:11 Aƒetɔ lae wɔ nu sia
Mark12:12 Yudatɔwo ƒe kplɔlawo nɔ didim vevie be yewoalée le afi ma kokoko
Mark12:13 Emegbe la
Mark12:14 Ameawo va gblɔ na Yesu amenubletɔe be
Mark12:15 Ɖe míadzɔe loo alo ɖe míadzɔe oa? Ke Yesu dze si woƒe alakpanuwɔwɔ
Mark12:16 Tete wotsɔ ga la nɛ eye wòbia wo be
Mark12:17 Yesu yi edzi be
Mark12:18 Eteƒe medidi o la
Mark12:19 “Nufiala
Mark12:20 Azɔ nɔviŋutsu adre aɖewo nɔ anyi. Tsitsitɔ ɖe srɔ̃
Mark12:21 Ale ame si dzɔ ɖe ameyinugbe la yome la ɖe ahosi la. Eya hã ku vimadzii. Nɔvia si kplɔe ɖo la ɖe ahosi la
Mark12:22 Ale nɔviŋutsu adreawo ku vi aɖeke madzimadzi
Mark12:23 Fifia la
Mark12:24 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark12:25 elabena ne ame kukuwo fɔ ɖe tsitre la
Mark12:26 Ne mieƒo nu tso ame kukuwo ƒe tsitretsitsi ŋuti la
Mark12:27 Menye ame kukuwo ƒe Mawu wònye o
Mark12:28 Agbalẽfialawo dometɔ ɖeka si nɔ tsitre ɖe afi ma
Mark12:29 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark12:30 Eya ta lɔ̃ Aƒetɔ
Mark12:31 Se eveliae nye
Mark12:32 Agbalẽfiala la gblɔ nɛ be
Mark12:33 eye ele vevie be ame nalɔ̃ eya ɖeka kple eƒe dzi
Mark12:34 Esi Yesu kpɔ be eɖo nya la ŋu nunyatɔe la
Mark12:35 Emegbe la
Mark12:36 Elabena David ŋutɔ gblɔ le Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la ƒe ŋusẽ me be
Mark12:37 Esi David ŋutɔ yɔe be ‘Aƒetɔ’ ɖe
Mark12:38 Yesu yi edzi gblɔ na ameawo be
Mark12:39 Ame siawo lɔ̃a teƒe kɔkɔwo nɔnɔ le ƒuƒoƒewo
Mark12:40 Woxɔa ahosiwo ƒe aƒewo le wo si
Mark12:41 Yesu bɔbɔ nɔ anyi dze ŋgɔ nudzɔɖaka la. Ame siwo nye kesinɔtɔwo la va da ga home gãwo ɖe nudzɔɖaka la me dadatɔe.
Mark12:42 Ahosi dahe aɖe hã va
Mark12:43 Yesu yɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va eɖokui gbɔe
Mark12:44 elabena ame siawo na nu si wozã wosusɔ la
Mark13:1 Esime Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo nɔ go dom tso gbedoxɔ la me la
Mark13:2 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark13:3 Azɔ eɖanɔ anyi ɖe Amito la dzi afi si dze ŋgɔ gbedoxɔ la. Petro
Mark13:4 “Ɣe ka ɣie nu siawo le dzɔdzɔ ge? Míakpɔ dzesi aɖe do ŋgɔ si ana míanya be nu siawo le dzɔdzɔ gea?”
Mark13:5 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Mark13:6 Ame geɖewo ava agblɔ na mi be yewoe nye Kristo la
Mark13:7 Ne miese aʋawɔwɔwo kple aʋaɣliwo la
Mark13:8 Dukɔ atsi tsitre ɖe dukɔ ŋu
Mark13:9 Yesu yi edzi be
Mark13:10 Ke ele be dukɔ ɖe sia ɖe nase nyanyui la hafi nuwuwuŋkeke la naɖo.
Mark13:11 Nenye be wolé mi yi ʋɔnui la
Mark13:12 Yesu yi edzi be
Mark13:13 Ke miawo la
Mark13:14 “Nenye be miekpɔ ŋunyɔnu si gbãa aƒe wòle tsitre ɖe afi si mele be wòanɔ o la
Mark13:15 Ame si le eƒe xɔta la megaɖi va anyigba alo age ɖe eƒe xɔ me be yeatsɔ naneke o.
Mark13:16 Ame si le agble me la megatrɔ va tsɔ eƒe awu o.
Mark13:17 “Baba na nyɔnu siwo fɔ fu le ŋkeke mawo me kple nyɔnu siwo si vi nonowo le.
Mark13:18 Mido gbe ɖa vevie be miaƒe sisiɣi meganye vuvɔŋɔli me o
Mark13:19 elabena ŋkeke mawo anye ŋkeke siwo ƒomevi meva kpɔ tso keke ɣeyiɣi si me Mawu wɔ xexea me va se ɖe fifia o. Eye ŋkeke siawo ƒomevi hã mava ɣe aɖeke ɣi le esia megbe o.
Mark13:20 Nenye Mawu ɖe meto ŋkeke vɔ̃ɖi siawo ɖe eme o la
Mark13:21 “Nenye be ame aɖe gblɔ na mi be
Mark13:22 elabena aʋatsokristotɔwo kple aʋatsonyagblɔɖilawo ava do
Mark13:23 Eya ta mikpɔ nyuie! Megblɔe na mi do ŋgɔ!
Mark13:24 “Le fukpekpe gã ma megbe la
Mark13:25 Ɣletiviwo age tso dziƒo
Mark13:26 “Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Mark13:27 Adɔ mawudɔlawo be woaƒo ame siwo katã nye etɔwo le xexe bliboa me la nu ƒu tso keke anyigba ƒe dzogoe eneawo dzi va se ɖe dziƒo ƒe nuwuwu ke.
Mark13:28 “Mitsɔ gboti abe kpɔɖeŋu ene. Nenye be tsi ɖo eƒe alɔwo me eye aŋgba fɛ̃wo ke
Mark13:29 Eya ta ne miekpɔ be nu siwo katã megblɔ la le dzɔdzɔm la
Mark13:30 Vavã mele egblɔm na mi be
Mark13:31 Dziƒo kple anyigba nu ava yi
Mark13:32 “Ke hã la
Mark13:33 Mikpɔ nyuie
Mark13:34 “Nye vava zi evelia anɔ abe ame aɖe si yi nugbe le anyigba didi aɖe dzi ene. Hafi wòadzo le aƒe ayi la
Mark13:35 Eya ta minɔ ŋudzɔ elabena mienya ɣeyiɣi si aƒea tɔ atrɔ agbɔ o
Mark13:36 Ale be ne eva kpata la
Mark13:37 Nu si megblɔ na mi la
Mark14:1 Azɔ esusɔ ŋkeke eve pɛ ko ne Ŋutitoto kple Abolo Maʋamaʋã ƒe Ŋkekenyui la naɖo
Mark14:2 Ke wogblɔ be
Mark14:3 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Mark14:4 Ame siwo nɔ kplɔa ŋu la dometɔ aɖewo bia wo nɔewo kple dziku be
Mark14:5 Woate ŋu adzrae wòaxɔ asi wu klosaloga alafa etɔ̃ eye woatsɔ ga la ama na ame dahewo.” Ale woka mo na nyɔnu la vevie.
Mark14:6 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Mark14:7 Ame dahewo le mia dome ɣe sia ɣe eye miate ŋu ana kpekpeɖeŋu wo ɣe sia ɣi si mielɔ̃
Mark14:8 “Nyɔnu sia wɔ nu si wòate ŋui la nam. Esi ami na nye ŋutilã
Mark14:9 Vavã mele egblɔm na mi be dɔ nyui si nyɔnu sia wɔ la mabu akpɔ o
Mark14:10 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Mark14:11 Esi nunɔlagãwo se nu si ta wòva wo gbɔ ɖo la
Mark14:12 Le Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ si dzi woawu alẽviwo le la
Mark14:13 Edɔ nusrɔ̃la eve ɖo ɖe Yerusalem be woawɔ dzadzraɖo ɖe ŋkeke la ɖuɖu ŋu. Egblɔ na wo be
Mark14:14 Mikplɔ ame sia ɖo eye miage ɖe aƒe si me wòage ɖo la me. Migblɔ na aƒea tɔ be
Mark14:15 Aƒetɔ la akplɔ mi ayi dziƒoxɔ dzi eye wòafia xɔ gã aɖe si me wòdzra ɖo la mi. Miɖo kplɔ̃ ɖe afi ma hena míaƒe Ŋutitotoŋkeke la ɖuɖu.”
Mark14:16 Nusrɔ̃la eveawo yi dua me eye wokpɔ be nu sia nu si Yesu gblɔ na wo la va eme tututu
Mark14:17 Le fiẽ me la
Mark14:18 Esime wonɔ anyi ɖe kplɔ̃a ŋu nɔ nua ɖum la
Mark14:19 Wo katã woxa nu
Mark14:20 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Mark14:21 Amegbetɔ Vi la aku abe ale si Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖelawo gblɔe da ɖi xoxoxo la ene
Mark14:22 Esi wonɔ nua ɖum la
Mark14:23 Etsɔ wainkplu la heda akpe ɖe eta
Mark14:24 Egblɔ na wo be
Mark14:25 Mele egblɔm na mi le nyateƒe me be
Mark14:26 Le esia megbe la
Mark14:27 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Mark14:28 Gake ne mefɔ ɖe tsitre tso ame kukuwo dome la
Mark14:29 Petro gblɔ nɛ be
Mark14:30 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Mark14:31 Petro gblɔ kple kakaɖedzi be
Mark14:32 Azɔ wova ɖo teƒe si woyɔna be Getsemanebɔ la me. Yesu gblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be
Mark14:33 Ekplɔ Petro
Mark14:34 Egblɔ na nusrɔ̃la etɔ̃awo be
Mark14:35 Azɔ la
Mark14:36 Egblɔ be
Mark14:37 Le esia megbe la
Mark14:38 Minɔ ŋudzɔ
Mark14:39 Yesu gatrɔ yi teƒe la
Mark14:40 Esi wògatrɔ va la
Mark14:41 Etrɔ gbɔ va wo gbɔ zi etɔ̃lia eye wògblɔ na wo be
Mark14:42 Mitso mídzo! Mikpɔ ɖa
Mark14:43 Esi Yesu ganɔ nu ƒom la
Mark14:44 Hafi woava ɖo teƒea la
Mark14:45 Esi ameha la va ɖo teƒea teti ko la
Mark14:46 Ameha la dze Yesu dzi helée sesĩe.
Mark14:47 Gake ame aɖe he eƒe yi ɖe go eye wòkpa nunɔlagã la ƒe dɔla ƒe to ɖeka wòge va dze anyigba.
Mark14:48 Yesu bia elélawo be
Mark14:49 Menɔ gbedoxɔ la ƒe xɔxɔnu gbe sia gbe nɔ nu fiam. Ke esia va eme be woawu Ŋɔŋlɔ Kɔkɔe la nu.”
Mark14:50 Le esime nya siawo katã nɔ dzɔdzɔm la
Mark14:51 Ɖekakpui aɖe si ta aklala biɖibiɖi ko la nɔ Yesu yome. Esi amelélawo te kpɔ be yewoalée la
Mark14:52 esi amama hegblẽ eƒe avɔ la ɖi.
Mark14:53 Wokplɔ Yesu yi nunɔlagã ƒe aƒe me
Mark14:54 Petro nɔ adzɔge ʋĩi le Yesu yome. Esi wòva ɖo nunɔlagã la ƒe aƒe me la
Mark14:55 Nunɔlagãwo kple Yudatɔwo ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la gãwo nɔ nutsotso aɖewo dim le Yesu ŋu be yewoatsɔ abu fɔe
Mark14:56 Ame geɖewo va ɖi alakpaɖasewo
Mark14:57 Mlɔeba la
Mark14:58 “Míese wògblɔ be
Mark14:59 Togbɔ be wogblɔ alea hã la
Mark14:60 Mlɔeba la
Mark14:61 Yesu meke nu o
Mark14:62 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Mark14:63 Ŋuɖoɖo sia do dziku na nunɔlagã la ale gbegbe be wòdze eƒe awu si wòdo la hegblɔ be
Mark14:64 Gbeɖe
Mark14:65 Azɔ ame aɖewo tu ta ɖe mo nɛ ƒia
Mark14:66 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Mark14:67 Ɖetugbivi la te ɖe Petro ŋu
Mark14:68 Ke Petro sẽ nu gblɔ be
Mark14:69 Subɔla la ƒe ŋku ganɔ Petro ŋu kokoko. Ekpɔ afi si wòɖanɔ eye wòyɔ ame bubuwo hegblɔ na wo be
Mark14:70 Petro gasẽ nu be yemenya Yesu o! Ke ame siwo tsi tsitre ɖe dzoa gbɔ la hã de asi gbɔgblɔ me na Petro be
Mark14:71 Petro ta nu gblɔ be
Mark14:72 Kasia koklo ku atɔ zi evelia. Enumake Petro ɖo ŋku Yesu ƒe nya siawo dzi be
Mark15:1 Esi ŋu ke ŋdi kanya la
Mark15:2 Esi Yesu va ɖo Pilato gbɔ la
Mark15:3 Nunɔlagãwo tso enu be ewɔ nu vɔ̃ geɖewo.
Mark15:4 Pilato gabiae be
Mark15:5 Gake Yesu meke nu o. Esia wɔ nuku na Pilato ŋutɔ.
Mark15:6 Azɔ nu ɖeka aɖe si Pilato wɔna ɖaa le Ŋutitotoŋkeke la dzi lae nye be eɖea asi le Yudatɔ gamenɔla ɖeka si ŋu amewo lɔ̃ be wòaɖe asi le la ŋuti.
Mark15:7 Gamenɔla siawo dometɔ ɖekae nye Barabas
Mark15:8 Azɔ amewo ƒo ƒu eye wobia tso Pilato si be wòaɖe asi le gamenɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka ŋu na yewo abe ale si wòwɔna ɖaa ene.
Mark15:9 Pilato bia wo be
Mark15:10 Le esime wònya nyuie be ŋuʋaʋã ta koe nunɔlagãwo tsɔ Yesu de asi nɛ ɖo.
Mark15:11 Ke nunɔlagãwo ƒoe ɖe ameawo nu be woabia be wòaɖe asi le Barabas boŋ ŋu
Mark15:12 Pilato bia wo be
Mark15:13 Ameawo katã do ɣli be
Mark15:14 Pilato bia wo be
Mark15:15 Azɔ Pilato vɔ̃ be ameha la ava wɔ ʋunyaʋunya eye be wòadze wo ŋu ta la
Mark15:16 Asrafoawo kplɔ Yesu yi woƒe nɔƒe le fiasã la me
Mark15:17 Wodo awu dzĩ nɛ
Mark15:18 Azɔ wode asi fewuɖuɖu le eŋu me. Wodo gbe nɛ gblɔ be
Mark15:19 Amewo tsɔ ameƒoti ƒo tame nɛ. Ɖewo ɖe ta ɖe mo nɛ
Mark15:20 Esi wowɔ funyafunyae ʋuu wòti wo la
Mark15:21 Le mɔa dzi la
Mark15:22 Ale wokplɔ Yesu va teƒe aɖe si woyɔna be Golgata (si gɔmee nye “Ametakoliƒe”).
Mark15:23 Le afi sia la
Mark15:24 Woklãe ɖe atitsoga ŋu. Woda akɔ ɖe eƒe awuwo dzi be woakpɔ esi ame sia ame axɔ.
Mark15:25 Anɔ abe ŋdi ga asiekɛ me ene esi woklãe ɖe atitsoga ŋu.
Mark15:26 Woŋlɔ nutsotso si wotsɔ ɖe eŋu esi ta woklãe ɖe atia ŋu la ɖe ʋuƒo kakɛ aɖe dzi klã ɖe atitsoga la tame. Nu si woŋlɔ ɖe ʋuƒoa dzi enye: Yudatɔwo ƒe Fia.
Mark15:27 Woklã adzodala eve aɖewo hã ɖe eƒe axa eveawo dzi. [
Mark15:28 Ale wowu ale si mawunya gblɔ da ɖi la nu be
Mark15:29 Ame siwo va nɔ eŋu tom la ɖea alɔme le eŋu
Mark15:30 ɖe ɖokuiwò le atitsoga la ŋue!”
Mark15:31 Nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfiala siwo nɔ tsitre ɖe teƒea hã nɔ alɔme ɖem le Yesu ŋu. Wogblɔ be
Mark15:32 “Wò Kristo la! Wò Israel ƒe Fia! Ɖi le atitsoga la ŋu
Mark15:33 Le ŋdɔ ga wuieve me lɔƒo la
Mark15:34 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Mark15:35 Esi ame siwo nɔ tsitre ɖe afi ma se esia la
Mark15:36 Le esia ta wo dometɔ ɖeka ƒu du yi ɖaku wain tsitsi eye wòkɔe ɖe ƒumekutsa me
Mark15:37 Yesu gado ɣli sesĩe
Mark15:38 Le gaƒoƒo sia me tututu la
Mark15:39 Esi Romasrafo si nɔ Yesu ŋu dzɔm kpɔ ale si Yesu kue la
Mark15:40 Nyɔnu aɖewo hã nɔ adzɔge nɔ nu siwo nɔ dzɔdzɔm la kpɔm. Ame siawo nye Maria Magdalatɔ
Mark15:41 Ame siawo kple Galilea nyɔnu bubu siwo nye eyomenɔlawo
Mark15:42 Nu siawo katã dzɔ ŋkeke ɖeka do ŋgɔ na Dzudzɔgbe ŋkeke la. Le ɣetrɔ me lɔƒo la
Mark15:43 Yosef si tso Arimatia
Mark15:44 Pilato mexɔe se be Yesu ku le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ko megbe o
Mark15:45 Asrafomegã la ɖo kpe edzi na Pilato be eku. Ale Pilato ɖe mɔ na Yosef be wòaxɔ ame kukua aɖaɖi.
Mark15:46 Yosef ƒle aklala biɖibiɖi gã aɖe
Mark15:47 Maria Magdalatɔ kple Maria Yose dada hã nɔ afi ma kpɔ afi si wòɖi Yesu ɖo.
Mark16:1 Le fiẽ me
Mark16:2 Le Kɔsiɖa ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ
Mark16:3 Esi wole mɔa dzi yina la
Mark16:4 Gake nukutɔe la
Mark16:5 Woge ɖe yɔdo la me eye wokpɔ ɖekakpui aɖe wònɔ awu ɣi tititi me
Mark16:6 Gake mawudɔla la gblɔ na wo be
Mark16:7 Azɔ miyi ɖagblɔ nya sia na Petro kple nusrɔ̃la bubuawo be: ‘Yesu dze mia ŋgɔ yina ɖe Galilea. Miakpɔe le afi ma abe ale si wògblɔe na mi hafi ku ene.’ ”
Mark16:8 Nyɔnuawo si do go le yɔdo la me kple vɔvɔ̃ gã aɖe. Wovɔ̃ ale gbegbe be womagate ŋu aƒo nu gɔ̃ hã o. [
Mark16:9 Kɔsiɖagbe ƒe ŋdi kanyae Yesu fɔ tso ame kukuwo dome eye ame gbãtɔ si kpɔe lae nye Maria Magdalatɔ
Mark16:10 Eɖake ɖe nusrɔ̃lawo ŋu
Mark16:11 Egblɔ na wo be yekpɔ Yesu wòle agbe
Mark16:12 Esia megbe la
Mark16:13 Esi wova kpɔe dze sii mlɔeba be Yesue la
Mark16:14 Emegbe la
Mark16:15 Azɔ egblɔ na wo be
Mark16:16 Ame siwo axɔ nyanyui la
Mark16:17 Dzesi siawo akplɔ ame siwo axɔe se la ɖo: le nye ŋkɔ me woanya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ado goe. Woaƒo nu kple aɖe yeyewo.
Mark16:18 Woalé dawo kple woƒe asiwo
Mark16:19 Esi Aƒetɔ Yesu wu nya siawo nu la
Mark16:20 Nusrɔ̃lawo ɖo gbe henɔ mawunya gblɔm na amewo tso teƒe yi teƒe
Luke1:1 Ame geɖewo ŋlɔ nu tso nu siwo va eme le mía dome la ŋu
Luke1:2 ame siwo tu woƒe ŋutinyawo ɖe nyadzɔdzɔ siwo woxɔ tso ame siwo nye nuteƒekpɔlawo le gɔmedzedzea me la gbɔ
Luke1:3 Eya ta enyo nye hã ŋunye
Luke1:4 be wòagbugbɔ aɖo kpe edzi na wò be nu siwo katã wofia wò lae nye nyateƒea.
Luke1:5 Le Herod si nye Yudea fia ƒe ŋkekewo me la
Luke1:6 Wo kple evea wonye ame dzɔdzɔewo le Mawu ŋkume
Luke1:7 Gake vi aɖeke hã menɔ wo si o
Luke1:8 Eva eme be Zekaria ƒe hatsotso le nunɔdɔ wɔm le kɔnu la nu le Mawu ƒe ŋkume
Luke1:9 eye le nunɔdɔ ƒe kɔnu la nu la
Luke1:10 Esi dzudzɔdoɣi ɖo la
Luke1:11 Zekaria nɔ kɔkɔeƒe la
Luke1:12 Esi Zekaria kpɔe la
Luke1:13 Gake mawudɔla la gblɔ nɛ be
Luke1:14 Mi ame eve la miakpɔ dzidzɔ manyagblɔ aɖe le edzidzi ta
Luke1:15 elabena ɖevi la anye gã le Aƒetɔ la ŋkume. Mano wain alo aha sesẽ aɖeke o. Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la ayɔ eme taŋtaŋtaŋ hafi woadzii gɔ̃ hã
Luke1:16 akplɔ Israelvi geɖewo ava Mawu si nye woƒe Aƒetɔ la gbɔe.
Luke1:17 Eya adze ŋgɔ na Aƒetɔ la
Luke1:18 Zekaria bia mawudɔla la be
Luke1:19 Mawudɔla la gblɔ nɛ kple kakaɖedzi be
Luke1:20 gake esi mèxɔ dzinye se o ta la
Luke1:21 Le ɣeyiɣi siawo katã me la
Luke1:22 Esi wòdo go mlɔeba la
Luke1:23 Zekaria tsi gbedoxɔ la me va se ɖe esime eƒe subɔsubɔŋkeke mamlɛawo wu enu
Luke1:24 Le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe megbe la srɔ̃a Elizabet fɔ fu
Luke1:25 Elizabet gblɔ kple dzidzɔ be
Luke1:26 Le Elizabet ƒe fufɔfɔ ƒe ɣleti adelia me la
Luke1:27 Ame si gbɔ wòdɔe ɖo la nye ɖetugbi aɖe si menya ŋutsu o
Luke1:28 Gabriel va do ɖe Maria gbɔ le vo me
Luke1:29 Maria ɖi vo
Luke1:30 Mawudɔla la yi edzi gblɔ nɛ be
Luke1:31 Èle fu fɔ ge adzi ŋutsuvi
Luke1:32 Anye ame xɔŋkɔ aɖe
Luke1:33 Ale wòaɖu fia ɖe Yakob ƒe aƒe dzi
Luke1:34 Maria bia mawudɔla la be
Luke1:35 Mawudɔla la ɖo eŋu be
Luke1:36 Gawu la
Luke1:37 Elabena ŋugbe ɖe sia ɖe si Mawu do la ava me pɛpɛpɛ.”
Luke1:38 Maria gblɔ be
Luke1:39 Le ŋkeke siawo me la
Luke1:40 eye wòge ɖe Zekaria ƒe aƒe me
Luke1:41 Esi Elizabet se Maria ƒe gbedodo nɛ ko la
Luke1:42 Elizabet do dzidzɔɣli
Luke1:43 Bubu kae nye gã si nède ŋunye
Luke1:44 Esi nèva do gbe nam teti ko la
Luke1:45 Èxɔe se be Mawu awɔ ɖe ale si wògblɔ la dzi
Luke1:46 Maria ɖo eŋu na Elizabet be
Luke1:47 Eye nye gbɔgbɔ tso aseye le Mawu nye xɔla la ŋuti.
Luke1:48 Elabena ekpɔ nye
Luke1:49 Elabena Ŋusẽtɔ la wɔ nu gãwo nam. Kɔkɔe nye eƒe ŋkɔ.
Luke1:50 Eƒe nublanuikpɔkpɔ li na ame siwo vɔ̃nɛ tso dzidzime yi dzidzime.
Luke1:51 Ewɔ nu dzɔtsuwo kple eƒe alɔ
Luke1:52 Eɖe fiawo ɖa le woƒe zi dzi
Luke1:53 Etsɔ nu nyuiwo ɖi ƒo na dɔwuitɔwo
Luke1:54 Ekpe ɖe eƒe dɔla Israel ŋu
Luke1:55 be wòakpɔ nublanui na Abraham kple eƒe dzidzimeviwo tegbee
Luke1:56 Maria nɔ Elizabet gbɔ abe dzinu etɔ̃ ene hafi trɔ yi aƒe.
Luke1:57 Elizabet ƒe vidziɣi va ɖo
Luke1:58 Nya sia kaka ɖo eƒe aƒelikawo kple ƒometɔwo dome kaba
Luke1:59 Esi ɖevia xɔ ŋkeke enyi la
Luke1:60 gake Elizabet gblɔ be
Luke1:61 Amewo do ɣli be
Luke1:62 Ale womia asi ɖevia fofo
Luke1:63 Zekaria na wotsɔ nuŋlɔkpe aɖe vɛ nɛ
Luke1:64 Enumake Zekaria ƒe nu ʋu
Luke1:65 Nyadzɔdzɔ blibo la wɔ nuku na woƒe aƒelikawo ŋutɔ
Luke1:66 Ame sia ame si se nya sia la bua ta me le eŋu ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe
Luke1:67 Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la yɔ fofoa Zekaria me
Luke1:68 “Woakafu Aƒetɔ
Luke1:69 Eɖo ɖeɖe ƒe ŋusẽ anyi na mí le eƒe dɔla
Luke1:70 (abe ale si wògblɔe to eƒe Nyagblɔɖila kɔkɔewo dzi le blema ene)
Luke1:71 be yeaɖe mí tso míaƒe futɔwo kple ame siwo lé fu mí la ƒe asi me
Luke1:72 ne wòakpɔ nublanui na mía fofowo
Luke1:73 kple atam si wòka na mía fofo Abraham la dzi
Luke1:74 be yeaɖe mí tso míaƒe futɔwo ƒe asi me
Luke1:75 le eŋkume le kɔkɔenyenye kple dzɔdzɔenyenye me le míaƒe ŋkekewo katã me.
Luke1:76 “Ke wò
Luke1:77 ne nàtsɔ xɔxɔ ƒe sidzedze na eƒe dukɔ to woƒe nu vɔ̃wo ƒe tsɔtsɔke me
Luke1:78 le míaƒe Mawu la ƒe nublanuikpɔkpɔ sɔgbɔ la ta
Luke1:79 ne wòaklẽ na ame siwo le viviti me kple ku ƒe vɔvɔli te
Luke1:80 Ɖevi la tsi
Luke2:1 Le ɣeyiɣi siawo me la
Luke2:2 (Esiae nye amexexlẽ gbãtɔ si va eme esi Kirenio nye mɔmefia le Siria le ɣe ma ɣi.)
Luke2:3 Wodi tso ame sia ame si be wòayi eya ŋutɔ ƒe dedu me be woaŋlɔ eŋkɔ le afi ma.
Luke2:4 Esi wònye be Yosef tso fiaƒome me ta la
Luke2:5 Ekplɔ Maria
Luke2:6 Esi woɖo Betlehem la
Luke2:7 ale wòdzi ŋutsuvi si nye via gbãtɔ. Exatsa ɖevi la ɖe abadzivɔ me
Luke2:8 Gbe ma gbe la
Luke2:9 Kasia mawudɔla aɖe va do ɖe wo dome kpoyii
Luke2:10 gake mawudɔla la de dzi ƒo na wo gblɔ be
Luke2:11 “Ɛ̃
Luke2:12 Ale esia anye dzesi na mi be miakpɔ ɖevi aɖe si woxatsa abadzivɔ ɖe eŋu
Luke2:13 Kasia dziƒoʋakɔ gã aɖewo va kpe ɖe mawudɔla ɖeka ma ŋu
Luke2:14 “Woakafu Mawu si le dziƒo ʋĩi
Luke2:15 Esi mawudɔlawo dzo le wo gbɔ yi dziƒo la
Luke2:16 Alẽkplɔlawo ɖe abla yi kɔƒea me eye woyi afi si Yosef kple Maria nɔ. Wokpɔ vidzĩ la hã
Luke2:17 Esi Alẽkplɔlawo kpɔe la
Luke2:18 Woƒe nya la wɔ nuku na ame siwo katã see la ŋutɔ.
Luke2:19 Ke Maria ya ɣla nya siawo katã ɖe eƒe dzi me
Luke2:20 Ale alẽkplɔlawo gatrɔ yi woƒe alẽwo gbɔ le gbea dzi
Luke2:21 Esi vidzĩ la xɔ ŋkeke enyi la
Luke2:22 Ke esi wowu ŋutikɔklɔŋkekeawo nu le Mose ƒe seawo nu la
Luke2:23 (elabena woŋlɔe ɖe Aƒetɔ la ƒe seawo me be
Luke2:24 Yesu dzilawo na nunana si wòle be woana abe ale si Mawu ƒe se la gblɔ ene be
Luke2:25 Ke ŋutsu aɖe le Yerusalem si ŋkɔe nye Simeon la hã nɔ gbedoxɔ la me gbe ma gbe. Ame sia nye ame ɖɔʋu aɖe si vɔ̃a Mawu ŋutɔ
Luke2:26 Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la ɖee fiae be maku akpɔ o
Luke2:27 Gbɔgbɔ la zi edzi be wòayi gbedoxɔ la me gbe ma gbe. Esi Maria kple Yosef wova be yewoatsɔ Yesu
Luke2:28 Simeon nɔ afi ma xoxo
Luke2:29 “Aƒetɔ Ŋusẽkatãtɔ
Luke2:30 Elabena nye ŋkuwo kpɔ wò ɖeɖe
Luke2:31 si nèdzra ɖo le dukɔwo katã ƒe ŋkume.
Luke2:32 Eyae nye kekeli kple nyaɖeɖefia na ame siwo menye Yudatɔwo o
Luke2:33 Maria kple Yosef ƒe nu ku
Luke2:34 Simeon yra wo
Luke2:35 ale be ame geɖewo aɖe woƒe susuwo ɖe go afia
Luke2:36 Nyɔnu nyagblɔɖila aɖe si woyɔna be Ana hã nɔ gbedoxɔ la me gbe ma gbe. Enye Fanuel si tso Yuda ƒe ƒome si woyɔna be Aser me la ƒe vi. Exɔ ƒe geɖe ŋutɔ
Luke2:37 eye wònye ahosi si xɔ ƒe blaenyi-vɔ-ene sɔŋ. Nyɔnu sia medzona le gbedoxɔ la me gbeɖe o. Enɔa afi sia zã kple keli nɔa Mawu subɔm henɔa gbedodoɖa kple nutsitsidɔ dzi atraɖii.
Luke2:38 Nyɔnu sia zɔ va do ɖe Maria kple Yosef gbɔ esime Simeon nɔ nu ƒom na wo
Luke2:39 Esi Yosef kple Maria wu nu siwo katã wòle be woawɔ le Yerusalem abe ale si Mawu ƒe se la bia tso wo si ene nu la
Luke2:40 Ɖevi la tsi le afi sia le nunya
Luke2:41 Yesu dzilawo yia Yerusalem ƒe sia ƒe hena Ŋutitotoŋkekenyui la ɖuɖu.
Luke2:42 Esi Yesu xɔ ƒe wuieve la
Luke2:43 Esi azã la wu enu la
Luke2:44 elabena wobu be eya kple woƒe ƒometɔwo kple xɔlɔ̃ bubuwo do megbe. Ke esi fiẽ ɖo
Luke2:45 Wodii ʋuu
Luke2:46 Wodii le afi ma ŋkeke etɔ̃ hafi va ke ɖe eŋu le gbedoxɔ la me le sefialagãwo dome wònɔ biabia sesẽwo me dzrom kpli wo.
Luke2:47 Amewo katã ƒe nu ku le eƒe nunya kple nugɔmesese ta.
Luke2:48 Edzilawo menya nu si woagblɔ esi wokpɔe o. Mlɔeba la
Luke2:49 Yesu
Luke2:50 Edzilawo mese nya si wògblɔ na wo la gɔme o.
Luke2:51 Ale Yesu trɔ yi Nazaret kpli wo
Luke2:52 Yesu tsi ɖe edzi le nunya kple tsitsi kple amenuveve le Mawu kple amewo gbɔ me.
Luke3:1 Le Kaisaro Tibero ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe wuiatɔ̃lia me
Luke3:2 esime Anas kple Kayafa wonye nunɔlagãwo la
Luke3:3 Yohanes nɔ tsatsam tso teƒe yi teƒe le Yɔdan tɔsisi la ƒe go eveawo dzi
Luke3:4 Abe ale si woŋlɔe le Nyagblɔɖila Yesaya ƒe nyagblɔɖigbalẽ me ene be
Luke3:5 Balimewo katã akɔ kpo
Luke3:6 Ekema amegbetɔƒomea katã akpɔ ɖeɖe si Mawu ɖo ɖa la.’ ”
Luke3:7 Yohanes gblɔ mawunya na ame siwo vaa egbɔ be wòade mawutsi ta na yewo be
Luke3:8 Gbã la
Luke3:9 Woɖo ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ƒe fiá atiwo ƒe kewo dzi. Ɛ̃
Luke3:10 Ameha la ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke3:11 Yohanes ɖo eŋu na wo be
Luke3:12 Dugadzɔla siwo nye amebala vɔ̃ɖiwo la gɔ̃ hã va do ɖe egbɔ be wòade mawutsi ta na yewo. Wobiae be
Luke3:13 Yohanes ɖo eŋu na wo be
Luke3:14 Asrafo aɖewo siwo le afi ma la biae be
Luke3:15 Ame sia ame kloe nɔ mɔ kpɔm be ava kpuie le ŋkeke mawo me
Luke3:16 Yohanes ɖo woƒe biabia la ŋu hegblɔ na wo be
Luke3:17 Ame si si lugbɔnu le
Luke3:18 Yohanes xlɔ̃ nu amewo vevie kple nya siawo esime wònɔ nyanyui la gblɔm na wo.
Luke3:19 Yohanes he nya ɖe Herod si nye dziɖula nɔ Galilea ŋu le dutoƒe
Luke3:20 Herod lé Yohanes hã de gaxɔ me.
Luke3:21 Gbe ɖeka la
Luke3:22 eye Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la ɖiɖi ɖe edzi le akpakpa ƒe nɔnɔme me
Luke3:23 Yesu xɔ abe ƒe blaetɔ̃ ene hafi dze mawunyagbɔgblɔ gɔme le dutoƒo. Amewo nya Yesu abe Yosef ƒe vi ene. Yosef fofoe nye Heli
Luke3:24 Heli fofoe nye Matat
Luke3:25 Yosef fofoe nye Matatias
Luke3:26 Nagai fofoe nye Mat
Luke3:27 Yoana fofoe nye Resa
Luke3:28 Neri fofoe nye Melki
Luke3:29 Er fofoe nye Yosua
Luke3:30 Levi fofoe nye Simeon
Luke3:31 Eliakim fofoe nye Melea
Luke3:32 David fofoe nye Yese
Luke3:33 Naheson fofoe nye Aminadab
Luke3:34 Yuda fofoe nye Yakob
Luke3:35 Nahɔ fofoe nye Serug
Luke3:36 Sela fofoe nye Kainan
Luke3:37 Lamek fofoe nye Metusela
Luke3:38 Kenan fofoe nye Enos
Luke4:1 Azɔ Yesu si me Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la yɔ fũu la dzo le Yɔdan tɔsisi la to
Luke4:2 Enɔ afi ma ŋkeke blaene
Luke4:3 Abosam gblɔ nɛ be
Luke4:4 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke4:5 Abosam kplɔe yi teƒe kɔkɔ aɖee
Luke4:6 eye wògblɔ na Yesu be
Luke4:7 Eya ta ne èdze klo de ta agu nam ko la
Luke4:8 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke4:9 Azɔ Abosam gakplɔe yi Yerusalem
Luke4:10 Elabena woŋlɔ ɖi be
Luke4:11 woatsɔ wò ɖe woƒe asiwo me
Luke4:12 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke4:13 Esi Abosam wu tetekpɔwo katã nu la
Luke4:14 Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe la ƒe ŋusẽ yɔ Yesu me fũu azɔ ale wòtrɔ yi Galilea. Eteƒe medidi o la
Luke4:15 Le mawunya deto siwo wògblɔna le woƒe ƒuƒoƒewo ta la
Luke4:16 Eva Nazaret
Luke4:17 wotsɔ Nyagblɔɖila Yesaya ƒe agbalẽ nɛ be wòaxlẽ. Eʋu teƒe si woŋlɔ ɖo be
Luke4:18 “Aƒetɔ la ƒe Gbɔgbɔ le dzinye
Luke4:19 eye maɖe gbeƒã Aƒetɔ la ƒe ƒe nyui la.”
Luke4:20 Esi wòxlẽ nya siawo vɔ la
Luke4:21 Yesu gagblɔ na ameawo be
Luke4:22 Ame siwo katã nɔ xɔa me la kafui
Luke4:23 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Luke4:24 “Vavã mele egblɔm na mi be
Luke4:25 Mele egblɔm na mi kple kakaɖedzi be ahosi geɖewo nɔ Israel le Eliya ŋɔli
Luke4:26 Gake womeɖo Eliya ɖe wo dometɔ aɖeke gbɔ o
Luke4:27 Mibu Nyagblɔɖila Elisa
Luke4:28 Yesu ƒe nya siawo ve dɔ me na ameawo ŋutɔ le ƒuƒoƒea esi wose wo.
Luke4:29 Woƒe dziwo ho ɖe eŋu ale wotso hetutu asi ʋu me nɛ do goe le xɔa me. Wokplɔe yi togbɛ si dzi wotu dua ɖo la ƒe kɔkɔƒe be yewoatutui tso teƒe sia wòayi aɖadze agame.
Luke4:30 Gake ezɔ to amehawo dome hedzo le wo gbɔ kɔ̃ɔ.
Luke4:31 Yesu trɔ yi Kapernaum si nye du aɖe si le Galilea nuto me la me
Luke4:32 Eƒe nyagbɔgblɔwo wɔ nuku na ameawo katã le afi sia hã
Luke4:33 Gbe ɖeka esi Yesu nɔ mawunya gblɔm le ƒuƒoƒea la
Luke4:34 “Yesu Nazaretitɔ
Luke4:35 Yesu blu ɖe eta gblɔ be
Luke4:36 Esia wɔ nuku na ameawo ŋutɔ
Luke4:37 Nukunu si Yesu wɔ la kaka ɖe nutoa katã me le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ko me.
Luke4:38 Esi Yesu do go le ƒuƒoƒea gbe ma gbe la
Luke4:39 Yesu yi ɖatsi tsitre ɖe dɔnɔa ƒe aba gbɔ
Luke4:40 Le ɣetrɔ miaa la
Luke4:41 Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ tɔ aɖewo hã nɔ ameawo dome
Luke4:42 Le ŋkeke evea gbe ƒe ŋdi kanyaa la
Luke4:43 Ke Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Luke4:44 Ale wòdzo henɔ tsatsam le Yudea nutowo katã me kpe ɖo
Luke5:1 Gbe ɖeka esi Yesu le tsitre nɔ nu fiam le Genesaret ƒuta la
Luke5:2 Yesu kpɔ ʋu eve siwo me ame aɖeke menɔ o la le ta la to. Ɖɔkplɔlawo nɔ woƒe ɖɔwo kpalam le tsia me.
Luke5:3 Yesu yi ɖage ɖe ʋua ɖeka me
Luke5:4 Esi wòwu nuƒoa nu la
Luke5:5 Simɔn ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke5:6 Wogada ɖɔ la ake ke azɔ la
Luke5:7 Ale Simɔn kple nɔvia wodo ɣli yɔ wo nɔvi siwo nɔ ʋu bubu me le tsia dzi la be woava kpe ɖe yewo ŋu. Woɖe lã fũu wòyɔ ʋu eveawo ale gbegbe be ʋuawo di be yewoanyrɔ gɔ̃ hã.
Luke5:8 Simɔn Petro kpɔ nu si va dzɔ la
Luke5:9 Elabena lã geɖe si woɖe la wɔ nuku na Petro kple eƒe dɔwɔhatiwo.
Luke5:10 Nenema kee nye Yakobo kple Yohanes ame siwo nye Zebedeo viwo
Luke5:11 Esi wova ɖi go teti ko la
Luke5:12 Gbe ɖeka la
Luke5:13 Yesu ka asi ŋutsua hegblɔ be
Luke5:14 Azɔ Yesu de se nɛ be
Luke5:15 Nya sia kaka ɖe teƒe geɖewo xoxo
Luke5:16 Gake zi geɖe la
Luke5:17 Gbe ɖeka esi Yesu nɔ nu fiam la
Luke5:18 Kasia
Luke5:19 gake womete ŋui o le amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ta. Le esia ta wolia xɔa
Luke5:20 Esi Yesu kpɔ woƒe xɔse la
Luke5:21 Farisitɔwo kple agbalẽfiala siwo nɔ ameawo dome la bia wo nɔewo be
Luke5:22 Yesu nya nu si ŋu bum wonɔ
Luke5:23 Kae bɔbɔ wu
Luke5:24 Ke ne mianyae bena ŋusẽ le Amegbetɔ Vi la si be wòatsɔ nu vɔ̃ ake le anyigba dzi.” Ale wògblɔ na lãmetututɔ la be
Luke5:25 Ame sia ame ke ŋku ɖi be yeakpɔ nu
Luke5:26 Ame siwo katã nɔ afi ma la ƒe mo wɔ yaa eye vɔvɔ̃ ɖo wo
Luke5:27 Esi Yesu dzo le du sia me yina la
Luke5:28 Ale Levi gblẽ nu sia nu ɖi
Luke5:29 Eteƒe medidi o
Luke5:30 Farisitɔwo kple agbalẽfialawo kpɔ kpɔtsotso le Yesu ƒe nuwɔna sia ŋu
Luke5:31 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Luke5:32 Menye ame dzɔdzɔewo ta meva ɖo o
Luke5:33 Ameawo gayi edzi bia Yesu be nu ka tae eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo metsia nu dɔna hedoa gbe ɖa abe ale si Yohanes ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo kple Farisitɔwo wɔnɛ ene o
Luke5:34 Ke Yesu bia wo be
Luke5:35 Gake ɣeyiɣi li gbɔna esi woava kplɔ srɔ̃tɔ la adzoe le ameawo gbɔ
Luke5:36 Azɔ Yesu do lo sia na wo be
Luke5:37 Nenema ke womekɔa aha yeye ɖe lãgbalẽgolo xoxo me o; ne wowɔ esia la
Luke5:38 Ke boŋ lãgbalẽgolo yeye mee wòdze be woakɔ aha yeye ɖo.
Luke5:39 Nenema kee ame aɖeke menoa aha tsitsi vɔ teti ko ganoa yeyetɔ tɔtɔnɛ o
Luke6:1 Gbe ɖeka le Dzudzɔgbe ŋkekea dzi esi Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo zɔ to bligble aɖewo me va yina la
Luke6:2 Farisitɔ aɖewo nɔ afi ma kpɔ wo
Luke6:3 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Luke6:4 Eyi ɖe Mawu ƒe aƒe la me
Luke6:5 Yesu gblɔ kpe ɖe eŋu be
Luke6:6 Le Dzudzɔgbe bubu gbe esi wònɔ nu fiam le ƒuƒoƒe la
Luke6:7 Esi wònye Dzudzɔgbe ŋkeke dzie ta la
Luke6:8 Yesu nya nu si bum ame siawo nɔ xoxoxo
Luke6:9 Azɔ Yesu trɔ ɖe Farisitɔwo kple agbalẽfialawo gbɔ
Luke6:10 Etsa ŋku le wo katã dzi ɖekaɖeka
Luke6:11 Nuwɔna sia do dziku na Yesu ƒe futɔwo ŋutɔ. Wode asi ɖoɖowɔwɔ me le nu si woate ŋu awɔ Yesu la ŋuti.
Luke6:12 Le nu siawo megbe la
Luke6:13 Esi ŋu ke la
Luke6:14 Ameawo ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye
Luke6:15 Mateo
Luke6:16 Yuda si nye Yakobo vi
Luke6:17 Esi wòɖi tso toa dzi la
Luke6:18 va be yewoaɖo toe alo be wòada gbe le yewo ŋu. Gbe ma gbe la
Luke6:19 Ame geɖewo ŋutɔ nɔ didim be yewoaka asi eŋu
Luke6:20 Azɔ etrɔ ɖe eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo gbɔ hegblɔ na wo be
Luke6:21 Dzidzɔ gã ŋutɔ le mi ame siwo wum dɔ le la lalam
Luke6:22 Dzidzɔ gã ŋutɔ le mia lalam
Luke6:23 “Dzi nedzɔ mi
Luke6:24 “Ao
Luke6:25 Babaa na mi ame siwo ƒe ƒodo yɔ
Luke6:26 Woƒe nukoko ɖe yame fifia ava zu konyifafa na wo. Babaa na mi ame siwo ŋu amewo aƒo nu nyui le
Luke6:27 “Ke mi ame siwo le to ɖom la
Luke6:28 Miyra ame siwo ƒo fi de mi la
Luke6:29 “Nenye be ame aɖe ƒo wò tome ɖeka la
Luke6:30 Ne nu le asiwò
Luke6:31 Ale si tututu nèdina be amewo newɔ na ye la
Luke6:32 “Ne mielɔ̃ mia lɔ̃lawo ɖeɖe ko ɖe
Luke6:33 Ne miewɔa dɔmenyo na ame siwo wɔa dɔmenyo na mi ko ɖe
Luke6:34 Ne miedoa ga na ame siwo miele mɔ kpɔm na be woagaxee na mi emegbe ɖe
Luke6:35 “Milɔ̃ miaƒe ketɔwo
Luke6:36 “Mizu nublanuikpɔlawo abe ale si mia Fofo hã nye nublanuikpɔla ene.
Luke6:37 “Migadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu ame aɖeke
Luke6:38 Mina nu
Luke6:39 Yesu yi edzi do lo sia na wo be
Luke6:40 Nusrɔ̃la mewua eƒe nufiala o. Ke ame sia ame si xɔ hehe nyuitɔ la anɔ ko abe eƒe nufiala ene.
Luke6:41 “Nu ka ta nèkpɔa ati fefi si le nɔviwò ƒe ŋku dzi
Luke6:42 Aleke wɔ nàgblɔ na nɔviwò be
Luke6:43 “Ati nyui aɖeke mate ŋu atse ku manyomanyo o
Luke6:44 Ku si ati aɖe tsena lae wotsɔna dzea si ati si ƒomevi wònye lae; elabena womegbea gbowo le ŋutiwo dzi o
Luke6:45 Ame nyui ƒe nuƒo fiana be nu nyui wɔwɔ yɔ eƒe dzi me. Ke ame vɔ̃ɖi ya ƒe dzi me yɔna fũu kple nu vɔ̃
Luke6:46 “Nu ka tae mieyɔam be ‘Aƒetɔ
Luke6:47 Ame sia ame si vaa gbɔnye
Luke6:48 Eɖi ame aɖe si tu xɔ
Luke6:49 Ke ame si sea nye nya
Luke7:1 Esi Yesu wu eƒe mawunyagbɔgblɔ la nu la
Luke7:2 Romatɔwo ƒe aʋafia gã si nɔ du ma me la ƒe dɔla si gbɔ melɔ̃a nu le o la dze dɔ vevie
Luke7:3 Aʋafia la se Yesu ŋkɔ
Luke7:4 Ameawo yi Yesu gbɔ heɖe kuku nɛ vevie be wòava kpe ɖe aʋafia la ŋu. Wona wònya be aʋafia sia nye ame nyui aɖe ŋutɔ.
Luke7:5 Wogblɔ na Yesu be
Luke7:6 Yesu tso kpla kplɔ wo ɖo. Gake hafi wòaɖo aƒea me la
Luke7:7 Eye nyemedze be mava kpe wò ŋutɔ gɔ̃ hã o. Gblɔ nya si wòle be nàgblɔ la ɖo ɖa tso afi si nèle ekema nye dɔla ƒe lãme asẽ.
Luke7:8 Elabena nye ŋutɔ hã menye ame le ŋusẽ te
Luke7:9 Esi Yesu se nya siawo la
Luke7:10 Esi aʋafia la xɔlɔ̃wo yi aƒe me la
Luke7:11 Le esia megbe la
Luke7:12 Esi wòsusɔ vie woaɖo dua ƒe agbo nu la
Luke7:13 Esi Aƒetɔ la kpɔ ahosia la
Luke7:14 Yesu te ɖe amekukuɖaka la ŋu
Luke7:15 Enumake ɖekakpui la fɔ henɔ alinu
Luke7:16 Vɔvɔ̃ gã aɖe ɖo ameawo
Luke7:17 Nukunu si Yesu wɔ gbe ma gbe la kaka ɖe Yudea bliboa katã kple nuto siwo ƒo xlã Yudea la me.
Luke7:18 Yohanes ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo se nu siwo katã wɔm Yesu nɔ
Luke7:19 eye wòdɔ wo ɖo ɖe Aƒetɔ la gbɔ be woabiae be
Luke7:20 Esi nusrɔ̃la eveawo va egbɔ la
Luke7:21 Le gaƒoƒo ma tututu dzi la
Luke7:22 Eya ta eɖo eŋu na ame dɔdɔawo be
Luke7:23 Migblɔ kpe ɖe eŋu nɛ be
Luke7:24 Le ame dɔdɔwo ƒe dzodzo vɔ megbe la
Luke7:25 Ne menye nenema o la
Luke7:26 Ekema nu ka miedo go ɖakpɔ? Nyagblɔɖila aɖea? Ɛ̃
Luke7:27 Eyae nye ame si ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le mawunya me be
Luke7:28 Le ame siwo nyɔnuwo dzi dome la
Luke7:29 (Ame siwo katã se Yohanes ƒe mawunyagbɔgblɔ kpɔ dometɔ aɖewo siwo nye nudzɔlawo la kpɔ ŋudzedze le Mawu ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋu
Luke7:30 Farisitɔwo kple sefialawo koe gbe be yewomaxɔ ɖoɖo si Mawu wɔ na yewo la o. Ale wogbe be Yohanes made mawutsi ta na yewo o.)
Luke7:31 Azɔ Yesu bia wo be
Luke7:32 Wole abe ɖevi siwo ƒo ƒu ɖe asi me nɔ fefem la ene. Ame siwo gblɔ na wo nɔewo be
Luke7:33 Yohanes Mawutsidetanamela tsia nu dɔna
Luke7:34 Ke nye Amegbetɔ Vi la
Luke7:35 Miebuna be miaƒe nuwɔnawo dze
Luke7:36 Eva eme be Farisitɔ aɖe kpe Yesu be wòava ɖu nu kple ye. Esi wonɔ kplɔ̃a ŋu la
Luke7:37 nyɔnu nu vɔ̃ wɔla aɖe si le dua me la se be Yesu nɔ nu ɖum le Farisitɔ la ƒe aƒe me. Eyi ɖatsɔ amiʋeʋĩ xɔasi aɖe ɖe asi.
Luke7:38 Etsi tsitre ɖe Yesu ŋgɔ le eƒe afɔ nu
Luke7:39 Farisitɔ si kpe Yesu la kpɔ nu si nɔ edzi yim
Luke7:40 Yesu nya nu si bum Farisitɔ la nɔ
Luke7:41 Yesu gblɔ ŋutinya sia nɛ be
Luke7:42 Wo dometɔ aɖeke mete ŋu xe fea o
Luke7:43 Simɔn ɖo eŋu be
Luke7:44 Azɔ Yesu trɔ ɖe nyɔnu la ŋu
Luke7:45 Le mía dekɔnu nu la
Luke7:46 Mèsi ami ɖe ta nam o; ke eya tsɔ ami si ɖe nye afɔwo ŋuti.
Luke7:47 Le esia ta la
Luke7:48 Yesu gblɔ na nyɔnu la azɔ be
Luke7:49 Ame siwo nɔ kplɔ̃a ŋu kplii la gblɔ na wo nɔewo be
Luke7:50 Yesu gagblɔ na nyɔnu la be
Luke8:1 Le esia megbe la
Luke8:2 Nyɔnu aɖe si me wònya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo le kple esiwo ŋu wòda gbe le la kplɔ wo ɖo. Wo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Maria Magdalatɔ ame si me wònya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ adre le
Luke8:3 Yohana
Luke8:4 Gbe ɖeka esi ame geɖe gaƒo ƒu ɖe Yesu ŋu be yewoase eƒe nyawo
Luke8:5 “Agbledela aɖe yi eƒe agble me be yeaƒã nuku. Esi wònɔ nukuawo wum la
Luke8:6 Nuku aɖewo hã ge ɖe kpenyigba dzi. Nuku siawo de asi miemie me
Luke8:7 Bubuwo ge ɖe ŋugbewo me
Luke8:8 Nuku bubuwo ya ge ɖe anyigba nyui dzi
Luke8:9 Eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va egbɔ be wòaɖe lododo la gɔme na yewo.
Luke8:10 Ke egblɔ na wo be
Luke8:11 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Luke8:12 Mɔƒome afi si nuku aɖewo ge ɖo lae nye ame siwo ƒe dziwo ku atri. Ame siawo ƒomevi sea Mawu ƒe nya
Luke8:13 Esiwo ge ɖe kpenyigba dzi lae nye ame siwo ne wose nya la la
Luke8:14 Nuku si ge ɖe ŋu me lae nye ame siwo sea mawunya eye woxɔnɛ sena
Luke8:15 Ke anyigba nyui lae nye ame siwo se nya la kple dzi nyui si dza
Luke8:16 Ɣe bubu ɣi la
Luke8:17 Esia fia be gbe ɖeka la
Luke8:18 Le esia ta mikpɔ nyuie le nu siwo miesena la ŋu elabena ame si si nu le la
Luke8:19 Gbe ɖeka Yesu nɔviawo kple dadaa wova be yewoakpɔe ɖa. Amewo sɔ gbɔ ale gbegbe be dadaa kple nɔviawo mete ŋu te ɖe eŋu o.
Luke8:20 Ame aɖe va gblɔ na Yesu be dadaa kple nɔviawo le edim be yewoakpɔ.
Luke8:21 Esi Yesu se be ye dada kple ye nɔviwo le xexe le ye dim la
Luke8:22 Gbe bubu gbe esi eya kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo nɔ ʋu aɖe me le ƒua dzi la
Luke8:23 Esi wonɔ ʋua me le ƒua dzi yina la
Luke8:24 Nusrɔ̃lawo ɖe abla va Yesu gbɔ heʋuʋui
Luke8:25 Azɔ ebia eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be
Luke8:26 Wova ɖi go ɖe Gadaratɔwo ƒe anyigba si le Galilea ƒua godo la dzi.
Luke8:27 Esi wonɔ go dom tso ʋua me ko la
Luke8:28 Esi wòkpɔ Yesu teti ko la
Luke8:29 Egblɔ nya sia
Luke8:30 Yesu bia gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃a be
Luke8:31 Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃awo ɖe kuku na Yesu vevie be meganya yewo de do globo si seɖoƒe meli na o la me o.
Luke8:32 Aƒehawo ƒe ha gã aɖe nɔ nu ɖum le to si te ɖe wo ŋu la kɔgo le ɣeyiɣi sia me
Luke8:33 Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃awo do go le amea me yi ɖage ɖe haawo me. Enumake haawo katã ƒu du sesĩe tso toa kɔgo yi ɖadze ƒu me doo heno tsi ku.
Luke8:34 Esi hakplɔlawo kpɔ nu siwo dzɔ la
Luke8:35 Eteƒe medidi o la
Luke8:36 Ame siwo kpɔ ale si Yesu da gbe le gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ tɔ la ŋui la gblɔe na wo tɔ bubuawo.
Luke8:37 Ale Gadaratɔwo ƒe nutometɔwo katã ɖe kuku na Yesu be wòadzo le yewo gbɔ kpoo
Luke8:38 Hafi wòadzo la
Luke8:39 “Trɔ nàyi wò ƒometɔwo gbɔ
Luke8:40 Ke esi Yesu trɔ va la
Luke8:41 Azɔ ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Yairo si nye Yudatɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒedzikpɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka la va Yesu gbɔ dze klo ɖe eƒe afɔ nu heɖe kuku nɛ vevie be nekplɔ ye ɖo yi aƒe me
Luke8:42 elabena vinyɔnuvi ɖeka hɔ̃ si le ye si si xɔ ƒe wuieve la le kudɔ ƒom. Yesu dze eyome enumake
Luke8:43 Nyɔnu aɖe nɔ afi ma
Luke8:44 Nyɔnu sia va te ɖe eŋu le emegbe
Luke8:45 Ke Yesu trɔ bia be
Luke8:46 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke8:47 Nyɔnu si wɔ nenem nu sia la kpɔe be nu si yewɔ la le nyanya na Yesu eya ta etsɔ vɔvɔ̃ kple dzodzo nyanyanya va dze klo ɖe eŋkume hegblɔ nu si ta wòka asi eŋu kple ale si wòkpɔ dɔyɔyɔ enumake la nɛ.
Luke8:48 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Luke8:49 Le esime Yesu nɔ nu ƒom na nyɔnu la la
Luke8:50 Esi Yesu se nya si amea tsɔ vɛ la
Luke8:51 Esi woɖo aƒea me la
Luke8:52 Aƒea me ŋutɔ yɔ fũu kple konyifala siwo nɔ avi fam. Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Luke8:53 Nya sia ɖi kokoe na ameawo
Luke8:54 Azɔ Yesu zɔ ɖe ɖevia dzi le xɔa me
Luke8:55 Eye eƒe gbɔgbɔ gagbugbɔ
Luke8:56 Dzi dzɔ ɖevia dzilawo ŋutɔ. Ke Yesu de se na wo vevie be womegagblɔ nu si dzɔ la na ame aɖeke o.
Luke9:1 Gbe ɖeka Yesu yɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃la wuieveawo ƒo ƒui
Luke9:2 Le esia megbe la
Luke9:3 Ede se na wo be
Luke9:4 Ne mieɖo du aɖe me la
Luke9:5 Nenye be amewo mexɔ mi le du aɖe me o la
Luke9:6 Ale nusrɔ̃lawo dze mɔ nɔ tsatsam le du kple kɔƒewo me
Luke9:7 Esi Herod si nye mɔmefia la se nukunu siwo wɔm Yesu nɔ la
Luke9:8 Ɖewo hã nɔ gbɔgblɔm be
Luke9:9 Le esia ta la
Luke9:10 Esi apostoloawo trɔ gbɔ va la
Luke9:11 Gake ame geɖewo nya afi si yim wonɔ xoxoxo
Luke9:12 Le ɣetrɔ miaa la
Luke9:13 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be
Luke9:14 (Wogblɔ esia
Luke9:15 ale ameha la nɔ anyi nenema.
Luke9:16 Azɔ Yesu tsɔ abolo atɔ̃ kple tɔmelã evea
Luke9:17 Ame sia ame ɖu nu ɖi ƒo
Luke9:18 Gbe ɖeka la
Luke9:19 Nusrɔ̃lawo ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke9:20 Yesu bia wo be “Miawo ya ɖe
Luke9:21 Ke ede se na wo vevie be womegagblɔ nya sia na ame aɖeke o.
Luke9:22 Eyi edzi gblɔ na wo be
Luke9:23 Egblɔ na wo be
Luke9:24 Ame si di be yeaɖe yeƒe agbe la
Luke9:25 Viɖe ka ame akpɔ ne nu siwo katã le xexe sia me la zu etɔ ke to esia me la
Luke9:26 “Ame siwo katã nye ŋutɔ kple nye nyawo le ŋu kpem na fifia la
Luke9:27 “Enye nyateƒe matrɔmatrɔ be mia dometɔ aɖewo siwo le tsitre ɖe afi sia la maku akpɔ o
Luke9:28 Le ŋkeke enyi megbe la
Luke9:29 Esi wònɔ gbe dom ɖa la
Luke9:30 Ŋutsu eve
Luke9:31 wodo kple ŋutikɔkɔe gã aɖe henɔ nu ƒom kple Yesu. Woƒo nu tso eƒe dzodzo si ava va eme kpuie le Yerusalem la ŋu.
Luke9:32 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Luke9:33 Esi ŋutsu eveawo nɔ dzodzom le Yesu gbɔ la
Luke9:34 Esi wònɔ nya siawo gblɔm la
Luke9:35 Gbe aɖe ɖi tso lilikpo la me be
Luke9:36 Esi gbea ɖi vɔ ko la
Luke9:37 Le ŋufɔke esi woɖi tso togbɛa dzi gbɔna la
Luke9:38 Ŋutsu aɖe si nɔ wo dome la kɔ gbe dzi gblɔ nɛ be
Luke9:39 Ke gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ aɖe dzea edzi enuenu esi wɔnɛ be wòdoa ɣli sesĩe. Etsɔnɛ xlãna ɖe anyi sesĩe
Luke9:40 Meɖe kuku na wò nusrɔ̃lawo be woanyae le eme
Luke9:41 Yesu xɔ edzi gblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be
Luke9:42 Esi ŋutsuvi la gbɔna ɖe Yesu gbɔ la
Luke9:43 Ame sia ame ƒe mo wɔ yaa le ale si Yesu ɖe Mawu ƒe ŋusẽ fiae la ta. Esi ameha la nɔ nu ƒom le nu wɔnuku siwo katã wɔm wònɔ ŋu la
Luke9:44 “Miɖo to afii
Luke9:45 Gake nusrɔ̃lawo mese nya si wògblɔ la gɔme o
Luke9:46 Azɔ ʋiʋli aɖe va ɖo nusrɔ̃lawo dome le ame si anye gã wu ŋuti.
Luke9:47 Ke Yesu nya woƒe dzimesusuwo
Luke9:48 Eye wògblɔ na wo be
Luke9:49 Yesu ƒe nusrɔ̃la Yohanes va egbɔ va gblɔ nɛ be
Luke9:50 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke9:51 Esi Yesu ƒe ɣeyiɣi si wòle be wòatrɔ ayi dziƒo nɔ aƒe tum la
Luke9:52 eye le mɔa dzi la
Luke9:53 Gake kɔƒea me tɔwo gbe be yewomana xɔ ame dɔdɔawo o
Luke9:54 Esi Yakobo kple Yohanes se nya sia la
Luke9:55 Gake Yesu trɔ ɖe wo gbɔ
Luke9:56 Ale wodzo yi kɔƒe bubu me.
Luke9:57 Esi wonɔ mɔa dzi nɔ yiyim la
Luke9:58 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke9:59 Egblɔ na ame bubu be
Luke9:60 Yesu ɖo eŋu gblɔ nɛ be
Luke9:61 Ame bubu aɖe si hã wòyɔ la gblɔ nɛ be
Luke9:62 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be

Luke10:4 Migatsɔ ga aɖeke ɖe asi o

Luke10:7 “Nenye be mieɖo kɔƒe aɖe me la
Luke10:8 “Nenye be miege ɖe du aɖe me eye dua me tɔwo xɔ mi nyuie la

Luke10:12 Mele gbe tem ɖe edzi na mi be nuwo anɔ bɔbɔe na Sodom wu du sia le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃gbe la.

Luke10:17 Esi nusrɔ̃la blaadre-vɔ-eveawo trɔ gbɔ la
Luke10:18 Yesu ɖo eŋu be
Luke10:19 Mena ŋusẽ mi be miaɖu Futɔ la ƒe ŋusẽwo katã dzi
Luke10:20 Gake migakpɔ dzidzɔ be gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ɖo to mi o. Ke boŋ midzɔ dzi be woŋlɔ miaƒe ŋkɔwo ɖe dziƒonɔlawo dome.”

Luke10:25 Gbe ɖeka sefiala aɖe si nya Mose ƒe seawo nyuie ŋutɔ la va be yeado Yesu ƒe nyateƒetɔnyenye kpɔ. Ebiae be

Luke10:27 Eɖo eŋu be
Luke10:28 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be
Luke10:29 Ŋutsu sia di be yeatso afia na ye ɖokui
Luke10:30 Yesu ɖo biabia sia ŋu nɛ kple lododo sia be
Luke10:31 Dzɔgbenyuitɔe la
Luke10:32 Levitɔ aɖe si nye ame siwo naa kpekpeɖeŋu le gbedoxɔ me la dometɔ aɖe hã va kpɔ amea wòmlɔ mɔa to

Luke11:1 Gbe ɖeka Yesu nɔ gbe dom ɖa le teƒe aɖe. Esi wòwu nu la
Luke11:2 Yesu gblɔ na wo be
Luke11:3 Na nuɖuɖu mí gbe sia gbe
Luke11:4 tsɔ mìaƒe nu vɔ̃wo ke mí le
Luke11:5 Yesu yi edzi gagblɔ na wo be
Luke11:6 elabena xɔ̃nye aɖe si le mɔ zɔm la va dzem
Luke11:7 “Mitsɔe be ame si le xɔ me la ɖo eŋu be
Luke11:8 “Mele egblɔm na mi be nenye be xɔ̃wòa mefɔ ʋu ʋɔa o
Luke11:9 Alea tututue wònɔna le gbedodoɖa hã me. Mibia nu
Luke11:10 Ame sia ame si biaa nu la
Luke11:11 “Mi ame siwo nye vi fofowo ɖe
Luke11:12 Alo ne ebia koklozi ɖe
Luke11:13 “Azɔ nenye be mi ame siwo nye nu vɔ̃ wɔlawo mienaa nu nyui mia viwo la
Luke11:14 Gbe ɖeka Yesu nya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ do goe le tokunɔ aɖe me
Luke11:15 Gake ame aɖewo nɔ ameawo dome siwo gblɔ be
Luke11:16 Ame bubuwo di tso esi be wòana dzesi aɖewo nadze le yame si afia be eƒe ŋusẽ tso Mawu gbɔ vavã.
Luke11:17 Yesu dze si nu si nɔ ame siawo katã ƒe susu me
Luke11:18 Nenye be enye nyateƒe abe ale si miegblɔe be Belzebul ye le dɔ wɔm le menye be manya eƒe gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ɖa la
Luke11:19 Eye nenye be miele gbɔgblɔm be mele gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo nyam kple Belzebul ƒe ŋusẽ ɖe
Luke11:20 Azɔ ne mele gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo nyam kple Mawu ƒe ŋusẽ la
Luke11:21 Nenye be ŋusẽtɔ aɖe kpla eƒe aʋawɔnuwo
Luke11:22 Gake ne ame si sẽ ŋu wui va dze edzi
Luke11:23 “Ame si mele dzinye o la
Luke11:24 “Ne gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ aɖe do go le ame aɖe me la
Luke11:25 Ne wòkpɔ be wokplɔ yeƒe nɔƒe xoxo la wòle dzadzɛe
Luke11:26 Eyina ɖayɔa gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ adre bubu siwo vɔ̃ɖi wui la wogena ɖe amea me. Esia wɔnɛ be ame sia ƒe nɔnɔme gblẽna ɖe edzi wu tsã.”
Luke11:27 Esi Yesu nɔ nya siawo gblɔm la
Luke11:28 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke11:29 Esi amehawo le ƒu ƒom ɖe edzi la
Luke11:30 Elabena ale si Yona nye dzesi na Ninivetɔwoe la
Luke11:31 Le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ŋkekea dzi la
Luke11:32 Ninivetɔwo kura gɔ̃ hã atsi tsitre le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ la me ɖe dzidzime sia ŋu
Luke11:33 “Ame aɖeke mesia akaɖi tsɔnɛ ɣlana ɖe nu te o
Luke11:34 Wò ŋkue nye akaɖi na wò ŋutilã. Ne wò ŋku dzi kɔ la
Luke11:35 Eya ta kpɔ nyuie be kekeli si le mewò la naganye viviti o.
Luke11:36 Nenye be èkɔ le ɖokuiwò me
Luke11:37 Esi Yesu wu nya siawo gbɔgblɔ nu la
Luke11:38 Ke esi Farisitɔ la kpɔ be Yesu meklɔ ŋui gbã hafi be yeaɖu nu o la
Luke11:39 Aƒetɔ la gblɔ nɛ be
Luke11:40 Mi movitɔwo! Menye Mawue wɔ nu sia nu godo kple eme oa?
Luke11:41 Eya ta miklɔ nuawo me to dɔmenyowɔwɔ na ame dahewo me
Luke11:42 “Ke babaa na mi Farisitɔwo! Togbɔ be mieɖoa ŋku edzi tsɔa ahamɛ kple ƒãglo kpakple ama bubu ƒomeviwo katã ƒe ewolia naa Mawu hã la
Luke11:43 “Baba na mi Farisitɔwo! Elabena mielɔ̃a bubuteƒenɔnɔ le miaƒe ƒuƒoƒewo
Luke11:44 “Babaa na mi. Ɖeko miele abe yɔdo siwo dzi gbe vu tsyɔ̃ ene. Amewo va toa mia dzi
Luke11:45 Sefialawo dometɔ ɖeka si hã nɔ ameawo dome la yɔe
Luke11:46 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke11:47 “Babaa na mi! Elabena ɖeko miele abe mia tɔgbui siwo wu nyagblɔɖila siwo nɔ anyi tsã va yi la ene.
Luke11:48 Mieɖi ɖase
Luke11:49 Nu si Mawu gblɔ tso mia ŋu lae nye be
Luke11:50 Woatsɔ nya ɖe mi dzidzime sia ŋu ɖe Mawu ƒe nyagblɔɖilawo ƒe ʋukɔkɔɖi tso keke xexe sia me ƒe gɔmedzedze ke ta.
Luke11:51 Le nyateƒe me
Luke11:52 “Baba na mi senyalawo

Luke12:4 Ke mele egblɔm na mi xɔ̃nyewo be
Luke12:5 Gake magblɔ ame si wòle be miavɔ̃ la na mi
Luke12:6 “Ho neni akpakpa atɔ̃ xɔna? Menye sidi ʋɛ aɖe koe oa? Woƒe home mede naneke kura o ɖe? Gake Mawu meŋlɔa wo dometɔ ɖeka pɛ hã be o.
Luke12:7 Miaƒe taɖa katã gɔ̃ hã ƒe xexlẽme le nyanya me na Mawu. Migavɔ̃ o
Luke12:8 “Medi be mana kakaɖedzi mi be

Luke12:24 Mikpɔ akpaviãwo ɖa
Luke12:25 Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la
Luke12:26 Eye nenye be dzimaɖeɖi mate ŋu awɔ nu sue siwo megblɔ va yi o la

Luke12:36 Miawo la

Luke12:38 Mienya ɣe ka ɣie wòava o
Luke12:39 Ame sia ame anɔ klalo na eƒe vava nenye be wònya ga si me wòle vava ge. Ɖeko wòle abe ale si ame nanɔ ŋudzɔ na fiafitɔ ƒe vava nenye be enya ga si me tututu wòle vava ge ene.
Luke12:40 Eya ta minɔ ŋudzɔ ɣeawo katã ɣi elabena
Luke12:41 Petro biae be
Luke12:42 Aƒetɔ la ɖo eŋu nɛ be
Luke12:43 Eme anyo na dɔla ma ne eƒe aƒetɔ trɔ gbɔ va kpɔ be ewɔ eƒe dɔdeasi.
Luke12:44 Le nyateƒe me la
Luke12:45 Gake nenye be dɔla ma gblɔ le eƒe dzi me be
Luke12:46 eƒe aƒetɔ ava le ŋkeke si mele mɔ kpɔm nɛ o kple gaƒoƒo si menya o la dzi
Luke12:47 “Woahe to na dɔla ma vevie
Luke12:48 Ame si menya be nane si wɔm yele la nye vɔ̃ o la ƒe tohehe masesẽ o. Ame si si wotsɔ nu geɖe dee la
Luke12:49 “Ɖe meva be made agbe yeye ƒe dzo anyigbadzitɔwo me. Ne ɖe mewu dɔ sia nu xoxo la
Luke12:50 Tsideta dziŋɔ aɖe le ŋgɔnye
Luke12:51 Miebu be ŋutifafae metsɔ va anyigba dzia? Gbeɖe
Luke12:52 Tso azɔ dzi yina la
Luke12:53 Vi kple tɔ ƒe gbe madze gbe dzi o le tanye
Luke12:54 Yesu trɔ ɖe ameha la ŋu azɔ
Luke12:55 Ne anyigbemeya de asi ƒoƒo me la
Luke12:56 Mi alakpanuwɔlawo! Mienya be tsi le dzadza ge alo ŋdɔ le ʋuʋu ge to ŋkuléle ɖe yame kple anyigba ŋu me. Gake miegbe be yewomalé ŋku ɖe nu si gbɔna la ƒe dzesi si ƒo xlã mi la ŋu o.
Luke12:57 “Nu ka ta miagbe be yewomakpɔ nu si nyo la na mia ɖokuiwo o ɖo?
